reviews.author: 123doit
reviews.text: Went today February 24th for the last flight around Maui and Molokai with the landing on the side of Haleakalā. Incredible experience, first time in a helicopter and we couldnt have been more stoked on it. Chris was a top notch pilot, smooth operator and a great tour guide along the ride. Favourite “excursion” I’ve done. If you can afford it I highly recommend it.

reviews.author: M4066IJjasona
reviews.text: We did the west Maui and Molokai trip.  Excellent time...easily in the top 1-2 things we did on Maui!  Tim was our pilot and he was awesome.  Lots of great information and he also made everyone feel comfortable with the turns and ascent and descent rates.  Scenery is out of this world....especially the cliffs and waterfalls on Molokai.  I promise you wont find scenery like this from the ground.  Thanks Tim!!

reviews.author: patriciadW1544TV
reviews.text: A beautiful helicopter ride over Maui and Molokai! The pilot made us feel secure since all five of us were really nervous about the experience! We are so glad we did it. It’s a once in a lifetime opportunity to see beautiful Hawaii from above. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Amanda M
reviews.text: My grandmother and I did the 50 minute waterfall tour. We were amazed at everything we were able to see from up these in just a 50 minute tour. We also splurged for the video. I was a little disappointed that I was not visible in the video due to the person in front of me blocking the camera. Especially given the steep price. But it was still nice seeing the views from the video.

reviews.author: Bronwyn R
reviews.text: This was such a great tour and I recommend getting the video afterwards. It’s such a great way to relive the experience, take in the grand scenery and wildlife encounters, and learn more from the pilot’s outstanding narrative.

reviews.author: Bronwyn R
reviews.text: The helicopter tour was a lifetime GREAT experience. We had 6 passengers, a thorough orientation before takeoff, and an exceptional pilot who gave us so much great information we would have happily talked with him  all day.

reviews.author: roderickd318
reviews.text:
I booked and paid for first class tickets for my wife and I.
With less than 24 hours notice they cancelled my tickets, because they did not have enough people to fly in that helicopter.
They require customers to give at least 24 hours notice or they will not give a refund, however they do not have the same courtesy.
Do not book with these people, save money and book somewhere else!!!!

reviews.author: GourmandTrashPanda
reviews.text: Y'all should splurge for this one. Totally worth every penny. The views are outstanding and the pilots excellent. You will get to see areas of Maui that are otherwise not accessible in any other way. Dress lightly and ideally in black to prevent reflections on the windows. Overall and outstanding experience worth a repeat.

reviews.author: 510brians
reviews.text: The Best!!! Second time flying Blue Hawaiian and this tour did not disappoint!  Marco our pilot was awesome!  Great tour guide and super personable!  The views of Molokai and Maui were amazing!    This was truly an awesome experience!

reviews.author: adrienmC2100PS
reviews.text: it was a great helicopter ride . got to see part of maui i would have  not been able to view unless i could fly. The pilot was super friendly and really took care of us

reviews.author: Morsk
reviews.text: A truely amazing experience worth every penny.  The pilot was very skilled and reassuring. Pilot narration along with the music perfected the flight.  I recommend paying the $100 upgrade for the front row.  I am definitely doing this again!

reviews.author: C8664HQmarks
reviews.text:
Staff at the airport was friendly and helpful.

Safety briefing was taken seriously and had plenty of time for questions.

Helicopter was clean and appeared to be well maintained.  We could watch from from the terminal some of the preflight inspection.

Staff escorted all 6 of us to the Helicopter, strapped us in a 4 point harness, helped with our radio headsets. This crew on the ground took our Safety seriously, thank you all!

Our pilot Matt, was friendly and well versed on the sights.  As I w

reviews.author: Coastal19286127654
reviews.text: Wow wow wow! Absolutely loved this flight. Can’t say enough about the safety, the beautiful trip and our pilot Derrick. Not only did we get everything we anticipated but saw extraordinary things such as whales and waterfalls. Our pilot made sure everyone was comfortable with his manoeuvres etc. He was very knowledgeable and took the time to answer all our questions. I would love to do the Hana flight next and will definitely ask for Derrick!

reviews.author: Andreas B
reviews.text: Es war ein wunderbares Erlebnis in diesem tollen Hubschrauber mit fachlich erstklassiger Unterhaltung durch den Piloten. Die Route war gut gewählt und zeigte uns die unglaubliche Natur der West-Maui-Berge und der Insel Molokai. Einchecken und Sicherheitseinweisung waren sehr professionell! Das Video war genial, so dass wir es spontan erworben haben. Super Team!!!

reviews.author: U2993VHrobertk
reviews.text: Tim the pilot was excellent with great commentary thoughout and smooth flying. Sincerly appreciated us as passengers.

reviews.author: lindacO3835RV
reviews.text:
1/28/25 I scheduled Hana/Rainforest flight.  They cancelled as there were not more people on the flight.
I reschedules for Waterfalls/Molokai for 1:30 I believe on 1/30.
Another call from Blue to re-schedule yet again at 2:35!  I cancelled it all together.
It was a real inconvenience and had I not rescheduled I could have done something else!!
Not happy and do not recommend.

reviews.author: StanTheMan4u
reviews.text:
Amazing trip! I recommend helicopter flights!
It’s one of the best experiences of my life. Views are incredible. Flight is smooth and comfortable. Crew is chatty and very nice . Definitely will do that again when will be in Hawaii next time .  It’s one of those feeling you can’t replicate in any other way. Just have to be there and experience it.

reviews.author: Voyage13186275807
reviews.text: Our pilot Tim was amazing, very knowledgeable about the history and cultural heritage of the Hawaiian people. The view from a bird’s eye is great. Once  in a lifetime experience. Just awesome!!!

reviews.author: tracies521
reviews.text: The helicopter ride and tour was great!  We flew over west Maui and across the ocean to Molokai. On Molokai we saw world’s highest sea cliffs, waterfalls, valleys and the largest fringing reef in the US. Beautiful scenery!  Marco was a great pilot and tour guide.  Would highly recommend this tour.

reviews.author: MooshLA
reviews.text: Welcome, safety overview, pre-boarding and throughout the flight was excellent. We felt safe and concerned for overall. The pilot/tour guide was superb and open to fielding questions during the flight using our provided microphones (something new since my last flight many years ago with BH). The booking was the only challenging aspect as the booking agent wasn't very clear with her communications as it took several attempts to get to key answers which for readers here are as follows - although y

reviews.author: Kingstone Y
reviews.text: Ride was amazing had a great time.And saw a lot of cool things plus the pilot was great and kind.

reviews.author: Melanie Yrjo
reviews.text: Amazing experience with a fantastic pilot! Thank you, Blue Hawaiian Helicopters!

reviews.author: Jennifer Mandic
reviews.text: Had a great experience, changed my feelings about helicopters after my previous experience of a medivac flight. The flight and views were amazing. Markus, our pilot, was really informative. Worth every penny. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Samantha Wong
reviews.text: Ground crew was friendly with lots of Aloha.  Our ride was smooth, no bumps at all.  We had a great tour.  Our pilots told us the landmarks of the areas we flew by.  The views were amazing 😍!  A big mahalo to Blue Hawaiian Helicopters!

reviews.author: Lorna Acikalin
reviews.text:
This is a must trip for this beautiful island. You see everywhere, and many places that you won’t have time to visit or can’t get there.
Very professionally run, taking all safety precautions seriously. Been on a few trips like this in US and have to say felt very safe with attention to detail before you set off.
Thank you for such a memorable experience team and Marcus. (Our pilot)

reviews.author: Joyce Carroll
reviews.text: While seeing the beauty of Hawaii from above is spectacular in many ways, the excursion would've had a greater wow factor if we had actually flown over the sites as opposed to alongside of. The write-up indicates a flyover Diamond Head - not only did that not happen, but we also didn't flyover the other craters or the waterfall. Tha waterfall view was at such a distance that it was hard to appreciate the impact. I had flown in a helicopter before, so that aspect of a wow factor had come to pass.

reviews.author: Abeer Bilbeisi
reviews.text: Thank you for the amazing tour, really i had very exciting experience in discovering the Hawaiian islands from the sky by  Bue Hawaiian Helicopters.

reviews.author: Cruz Brooks
reviews.text: Excellent smooth ride, amazing tour guide, I will be back again!

reviews.author: Shannon Hammett
reviews.text: Booked 5 of us for the complete island tour. Patrick was our pilot and was extremely knowledgeable about the island and the experience was awesome. Patrick went out of his way to comfort a few in my group that were a little afraid of flying. Made the trip super fun for all. All the staff were extremely friendly and helpful. We have booked additional flights on other islands. Truly a great experience and worth the money spent!

reviews.author: S R
reviews.text: Great way to see island.  Great staff!!!!  Neat experience!!!

reviews.author: Steven Syas
reviews.text: Had an incredible time. Staff and pilot were top shelf

reviews.author: Rafael Vilela
reviews.text:
Amazing helicopter tour! 🚁🌺

Our pilot Marcus made the experience unforgettable. He was incredibly knowledgeable, friendly, and made everyone feel safe and comfortable throughout the flight. The views were absolutely breathtaking, and Marcus pointed out so many beautiful spots and shared interesting facts along the way.

reviews.author: Maite Fernandez
reviews.text:
Must-Do Experience on Oʻahu

Blue Horizon Helicopters delivers an unforgettable experience and is an absolute must when visiting Oʻahu. Marcus was outstanding — his deep knowledge of Waikiki and the island, combined with his professionalism and skill, made the flight smooth, relaxing, and enjoyable. The views were breathtaking, the ride felt safe and effortless, and the overall experience was truly exceptional. Seeing Oʻahu from above is something you’ll never forget. Highly recommended and wort

reviews.author: Amy Young
reviews.text: Fantastic experience. I was skeptical about doing this as I’m extremely afraid of heights. But Marcus is an excellent pilot and it was a smooth enjoyable experience. The views are phenomenal and his narrative about the island highly informative.  Five stars all the way!

reviews.author: Kenneth Statton
reviews.text: Mary and I had the greatest time!  Easy check jn, very pleasant, knowledable and professional group of people…and our pilot, Marcus, was phenomenal!  Thank you all so much for making our trip around the island perfect!!!  If your coming to Hawaii and want tk take a Heli Tour….PICK THIS ONE!!!❤️

reviews.author: Osmond S.
reviews.text: We loved blue Hawaiian helicopter tour! It was amazing and worth it! Being able to tour basically the entire island was awesome!

reviews.author: harold dambly
reviews.text:
It was an incredible flight our pilot was Bastian Hagspiel.
I recommend this tour 100% it was awesome!

reviews.author: Cindy Klabunde
reviews.text: Bastian was an awesome pilot and guide!  Very knowledgable!!

reviews.author: Chris Krivohlavek
reviews.text: Great, smooth flight

reviews.author: d vic
reviews.text: The Staff was Great and professional. The pilot Patrick did an outstanding job.

reviews.author: Bob K
reviews.text: Our pilot Tone did a great job explaining local horticulture and landscape.  The landing in the rainforest was smooth as butter.  They did a great job explaining what to expect.  The ride was excellent !  Would recommend.

reviews.author: brenhlewis
reviews.text: Our pilot, Josh, was very knowledgeable, friendly, and knows the island well. He gave interesting dialogue on the many, many point's of interest. It being near the end of whale season, he gave an fun whale watch-from-above. I highly recommend Maverick Helicopters on Maui.

reviews.author: aarrmmss
reviews.text:
We had a really great experience and you could tell that the pilot cared about it. When we spotted some whales, he made sure both sides of the helicopter saw them and could take pictures. Same thing with the waterfalls.  Our original itinerary to land in the rainforest wasn’t going to work out well because of clouds so they gave us the option to cancel or accept a little longer time in the helicopter and do the North Maui and Mallonee light path.

Everyone was very professional in the check-in w

reviews.author: Cameron H
reviews.text: We loved our trip. The staff were very friendly, helicopter was comfortable, and we saw lots of amazing waterfalls and whales.

reviews.author: joygJ3109BB
reviews.text: Great experience ! Nick was awesome and the whole staff was fabulous .  A must do 👍

reviews.author: B W
reviews.text: We booked this and were very happy with the trip, the pilot and his knowledge. Bring peak humpback whale season the pilot spent extra time finding pods of whales and getting us great photos.

reviews.author: donitam2026
reviews.text: Fabulous helicopter tour. Pilot was very knowledgeable. Would do it again.

reviews.author: Voyager22232241241
reviews.text:
Excellent views and knowledgeable pilot 

Love the fact that Mavericks has the FAA Diamond Maintenance Award since 2011

reviews.author: traveling_monster_me
reviews.text: Best tour ever! Our pilot Tone was personable, fun and informative.  Much better than many other similar tours we've been on. Lots of waterfalls, cliffs and valleys on the Molokai tour. No transport by them,  but Uber got us there fine.

reviews.author: Journey318778
reviews.text: The best helicopter experience, first class all the way

reviews.author: paulinelR3612FU
reviews.text: Our experience with Maverick Helicopters was world-class from start to finish. Our pilot and guide, Josh, was fantastic—incredibly knowledgeable and professional. The views of the coastline, hidden waterfalls, and the rainforest were breathtaking, and seeing the winding Road to Hana from above is a perspective I’ll never forget. Highly recommend Josh and the whole Maverick team for anyone visiting Maui!

reviews.author: judyreyesd
reviews.text: John our pilot was very informative. The scenic views were fantastic from above. This was a lifetime experience to ride in a helicopter.. I recommend this tour.

reviews.author: tracysI5323BF
reviews.text: It was FANTASTIC!!!  Nick was great.  It was such an amazing experience!  The views were amazing.  We had a beautiful day!  Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: ruthmX1574WX
reviews.text: Our pilot used to fly a Blackhawk!  He was very informative.  The trip was well worth the $$ ad you can only see most of the islands from a helicopter.  I felt very safe

reviews.author: justinebC5533QJ
reviews.text: Great experience. The pilot was very good and knowledgeable. Wish it was a little more flight time for what it cost.

reviews.author: kanglail
reviews.text: 평생 잊을수 없는 멋진경험이였다. 산,폭포,바다,무지개,고래등등 및 몰로키니의 멋진 절벽.. 그리고 기장님이 발음도 외국인이 알아듣기 쉽게 이야기했고 즐겁게 해줬다.

reviews.author: jennieh738
reviews.text: We've been on several different helicopter tours - this is definitely our favorite!  Fabulous service and breathtaking sight-seeing.

reviews.author: Chris M
reviews.text: I didn't fly on my original booked trip because I was the only person booked for that time but took a different trip with them and it was great! We flew  over the West Maui mountains then over the straight between Maui and Moloka'i,  saw amazing waterfalls and valleys and the craters, amazing sea cliffs  and more waterfalls, then back over to Maui seeing  a number of whales surfacing on the way. Felix, our pilot was wonderful with commentary and circled around for all of us to get great views. T

reviews.author: Mobile00193672102
reviews.text: Maverick Helicopters is a 1st class operation from walking in the door to landing. The staff and pilots were all personable and professional. If you want to see waterfalls, this is the ticket. We flew out with 3 helicopters and it was very cool to all come in to the private landing area with all of them lined up and then having a champagne toast in the middle of the rain forest.

reviews.author: William S
reviews.text: Our favorite experience on Maui.  Must do.  Josh was our pilot, he did a great job narrating as we experienced amazing views.

reviews.author: PAW Homebuilders
reviews.text: Did the west Maui/Molokai doors on. It was actually a very clear day on both islands so we were able to go into some canyons and see waterfalls not usually seen on this tour. Great pilot and smooth ride.

reviews.author: Brian Burik
reviews.text:
Absolutely incredible!  Iʻve travel extensively and have done my share of tours and excursions.  I can honestly say the experience with Maverick Helicopters was one of the most incredible I’ve ever had. Breathtaking!

From the moment we arrived, the professionalism and safety culture were obvious. The team runs a first-class operation. Everything was organized, clearly explained, and executed with precision. It immediately gave us confidence that we were in extremely capable hands.

The flight i

reviews.author: Nick M
reviews.text: We had an awesome helicopter tour with Jake as our captain. He was very friendly with all of us. We were a group of 6 with 2 kids and he was very patient with all the questions kid had. The whole tour was amazing and also had received lot of information on Maui. Would definitely recommend on taking this tour when in Maui

reviews.author: Russ Nelson
reviews.text:
We just did a tour with Maverick today in Maui. We signed up for one tour but because of weather they weren’t able to do that tour. So they offered to upgrade us to the deluxe tour of Molokai and Maui.
Our pilot was Tone and he put my wife’s mind at ease because she was nervous.
This was a total bucket list thing to do. If you have the chance to do it take it!!!!
Incredibly beautiful scenery. We saw humpbacks from the air. It was amazing!!!

reviews.author: Brian Williams
reviews.text: This should be on everyone's to do list. What an amazing and fun time. Very professional! We landed into the most beautiful paradise, it was truely breathtaking. The pictures tell it all. I can not wait to return for another tour.

reviews.author: Daniel Nguyen
reviews.text: If you are on Maui and don’t have much time to see the island. This week do it now! We seen over 20 waterfalls!!! Had the Helicopter fly us and was a cool experience! Too bad I couldn’t upload videos, but you just have to go seee it. We saw a circle rainbow! We had 6 in the group! Good for photos. Pilot was Nick.

reviews.author: Who is This
reviews.text: Funnnn

reviews.author: Stephen
reviews.text: The best helicopter tour, all staff super helpful

reviews.author: Ken S
reviews.text:
For anyone hesitating because of the price, don't wait-book it. We did the 3-Island Hawaiian Odyssey and the views were absolutely fantastic. As a bonus, we easily saw over 40 humpback whales from a bird's-eye view. Huge thanks to our pilot, Nick, who made sure everyone got great views.
The only downside is that everything in the store is very expensive, but it's completely optional—you don't need to buy anything.

reviews.author: P R
reviews.text: From start to finish, this was a great experience! Josh our pilot was outstanding and gave us a private tour of the rain forest with champagne. Stunning views from above. Josh even circled the shoreline twice just so we could get great pics of a whale. You haven't experienced Maui until you've gone on a Maverick tour!

reviews.author: Jennie Hendricks
reviews.text: Top-shelf experience! We've been on several helicopter tours in Maui, and this is the one we will recommend from now on!

reviews.author: Wesley Kilian
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
An unforgettable helicopter tour with Maverick Helicopters over Maui. Pilot Nick was professional, relaxed, and shared great insights along the way. Flying over Maui’s incredible landscapes was amazing, and spotting whales from the air was the absolute highlight. Highly recommended! 🚁🐋

reviews.author: Jos Bisschop
reviews.text: Fantastische vlucht boven Maui en Moloka’i gehad met Nick. Wat een landschappen, vergezichten, watervallen, valleien en zelfs een aantal walvissen hebben wij gezien, geweldig!! Dank voor deze bijzondere ervaring!!

reviews.author: Steve Narum
reviews.text: The flight over Maui and Moloka'i was amazing. I really wish it had been just 4 passengers because the two in the middle of the back row really don't get to see very well. The pilot was friendly and knowledgeable. He made the flight very enjoyable.

reviews.author: Graham Fortier-Dubé
reviews.text: The whole experience was easy and the flight was incredible. Our pilot, John, was great and very knowledgeable. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Anton Karraa
reviews.text: Went on the trip to the Hana rainforest. It was an incredible experience. Josh was a fantastic pilot. The ride was exceptionally smooth and the views were breathtaking. Landing in the clearing of the Hana Rainforest was such a special experience - we didn’t want to leave. You really can’t go wrong with this trip.

reviews.author: Tom Weise
reviews.text:
On New Year's morning outstanding flight experience with Mavericks. The four of us discovered the beauty of the island of nature and its secrets, otherwise not within walking distance. We couldn't get enough. The full circle of the rainbow was a single time because we flew through it.
The final highlight was whale watching.
Very nice team at fair prices.

reviews.author: Guy Nassim
reviews.text:
The helicopter flight was absolutely incredible — a truly unforgettable experience. The views from above were breathtaking and felt completely surreal.

Our pilot, Felix, was outstanding. His professionalism, smooth flying, and engaging explanations made the entire experience even more special.

This is a must-do experience and comes highly recommended!!!

Inbar&Guy

reviews.author: Lärs
reviews.text: Helicopters 🚁 are always an adventure

reviews.author: kevinwQ3261TX
reviews.text: Wir starteten am Morgen bei herrlichem Sonnenschein. Alle Mitarbeiter sind sehr freundlich und total gut drauf! Sicherheit wird hochgeschrieben und man wird immer gut begleitet. Da unserem Flug eine längere Regenperiode vorausging, gab es an vielen Stellen Wasserfälle zu sehen, die sonst nicht beobachbar sind. Zwischendurch passierten wir kleine Regenschauer, was auch wunderschöne Regenbogen über die Landschaft zauberte. Der Flug zeigt einem viel unberührte Natur, eindrückliche Schluchten und at

reviews.author: J5695UCannem
reviews.text: STELLAR experience with a GREAT crew and pilot!! The only way to see the entire island.....

reviews.author: babyrice
reviews.text: My husband and I booked a doors-off helicopter tour to get an unobstructed view of the beautiful Kauai landscape. It was my first time riding in a helicopter, and I wish I had booked a doors-on tour for a better view. I was stuck in a middle seat and, since I'm only 5'2, most of my front window view was obstructed by the cockpit and the side views were obstructucted by people. It would have been a better experience riding in a doors-on helicopter where all the seats are window seats, even if tha

reviews.author: Chris M
reviews.text: What a great way to see Kauai from the air. We went to places that have no roads. Great photography option. Having the extra time is a great option.

reviews.author: Chris M
reviews.text: Great experience. Worth every penny. Highly knowledgeable, experienced staff.

reviews.author: Orit C
reviews.text: We had an incredible experience flying with the pilot nick over the island reaching astonishing views and nick gave us so much interesting information about the unique island Kauai

reviews.author: Tourist752152
reviews.text: Preston was our pilot and he was fantastic! Our group of 6 adults did this activity - 4 in one helicopter and 2 in the other helicopter with another couple. We felt the cost of this was fitting for the time and experience. You're up in the air for about 60-65 minutes and it goes way quicker than you'd expect. It was just AMAZING! Kauai is beautiful! I was a little nervous as this was my first time in a helicopter - but it was super smooth and just wonderful all around. I would highly recommend t

reviews.author: carlamT2620CC
reviews.text: Amazing ride! Our pilot Arthur was fantastic, telling us about the island! It was windy but he did an amazing job driving the helicopter, and made sure for everyone on the helicopter to experience the amazing views!

reviews.author: 370lynnh
reviews.text:
Flying over the island with views of the canyons, waterfalls, Napoli Coast and many other site was amazing! Our pilot Arthur was excellent.  He knows  the island well! My husband got great pictures.  
The only issue, and this is for anyone who is thinking about booking : if there’s 4 people going someone has to sit between the pilot and the person on the end.  It’s determined by weight and size.  Unfortunately it was me.  We had one and a half seats for 2 people. It was uncomfortable, I could ba

reviews.author: Trek61554235663
reviews.text: An awesome way to see Kauai.  Breathtaking, we were left speechless.  Our pilot Arthur, was like an encyclopedia (revealing my age) and his shared knowledge describing the landscape and Hawaian culture made the trip all the more interesting.

reviews.author: PricklyJoe
reviews.text:
In order to experience the entire  magnificence of Kauai, this tour is number one.
We were fortunate to have great weather and pilot. It’s amazing the beauty of the inter island that one can’t view from driving around or boating to. 
Our only negative was inability to understand the pilot’s narrative due to air noise.

reviews.author: Dmccartin
reviews.text: Highly suggest the doors off helicopter ride. Chris was awesome and explained all the sites and rotated the helicopter so everyone could get good photos/views. Amazing views!!

reviews.author: jeaniator
reviews.text:
Excellent, a trip not to be missed. Chris our pilot was fantastic, gave a commentary of the flight,extremely knowledgeable.
We were collected from the port and taken back to the port, very efficient. 
Word of warning! Make sure you enter correct weight. The website would not retain weight value entered? There was an issue with this.

reviews.author: John B
reviews.text: From start to finish, Jack Harter helicopters handled our tour professionally and efficiently. Our pilot, Nick was outstanding! He smoothly took us over the island and was excellent in sharing his knowledge of the island. This was a great tour and I highly recommended the tour and company.

reviews.author: carlaaaab
reviews.text:
If you are NOT mandatorily assigned to the middle seat, you will experience an amazing no-door tour of Na Apali coast. 

Disclaimer:
The middle seat in this case is a SCAM.
You pay the same price as all other seats, but you get much worse views, and obviously, you are not next to a door frame, but stuck between the pilot and another passenger. 
For stadiums, concert and theatre halls, you pay differently depending on the seat: an obstructed view with no leg room pays a fraction of the cost vs a

reviews.author: 89BillT
reviews.text: Amazing experience. great way to see the island. Recommend wearing long pants and a jacket. Chris is a great pilot and gave informative commentary. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: S94ZGjenifers
reviews.text: All the set-up was great.  Location easy to find, check-in smooth, bus ride to airport good, friendly staff.  They supply a wrist strap for your phone which worked very well (wish they had told us that before we purchased our own devices that btw they wouldn't let us use).  However, you get assigned a seat based on some weight process.  I weigh 140# and was assigned behind the female pilot which to weigh about same as I did.  Though 2 heavier men on the trip were both on outside?  So not sure ho

reviews.author: RondaRA
reviews.text: My family of four really enjoyed our helicopter tour. Our pilot Nick was great. Such a fun way to see the Island. It was such a thrilling ride.

reviews.author: 413vincentt
reviews.text: Great communication from start to finish working in our family of 4 into 2 helicopters., We felt very safe and pilots provided very informative and up close views of the canyon and Napali coast. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: O8563NJamyd
reviews.text: A great way to see the beautiful parts of the Island that aren’t easily accessible. The safety briefing and the pilot, Chrissy, made us feel safe even when parts were a little scary!

reviews.author: Chris OShea
reviews.text: This was probably one of the coolest things I have ever done on a trip. There simply is not better way to experience all of Kauai and see the true beauty of the paradise it is. From take off to landing our pilot Arthur was kind, knowledgeable and a great guide through the skies! As a local to Kauai I feel like there are few better people to give you a tour from ocean to mountaintop! As someone who is scared of heights I felt confident in their abilities throughout the whole experience despite be

reviews.author: Curtis Brandt
reviews.text: Way back in 2010, I took a doors-off MD500 ride with Jack Harter Helicopters, and it was one of the most incredible things I've ever done. Fast forward to March 2026 and this time I brought the family. Kauai is so rugged and remote, that a helicopter ride is just about the only way to really take it in. We had an incredible time. Our pilot Nick has an incredible flying resume, and talked about the island, its geography, history, and lore, nonstop for the whole flight. This was the family's first

reviews.author: Rick Morey
reviews.text: I cannot recommend this company enough! All the crew - on the ground and in the air were super nicer and professional! Thanks to all of them for making this a once-in-a-lifetime experience!!

reviews.author: Christie Spires
reviews.text: We did a tour with this company in 2017. We had a wonderful experience and enjoyed our tour of the island. We went with the doors off tour and had the best time. Our pilot I believe was named Miles (I might have the name wrong since it has been a while). He was excellent and very knowledgeable. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Anthony McLean
reviews.text: We had such a fun time.   Arthur was our pilot and was super knowledgeable of the Island.   The pictures were fantastic my family of 4 had a blast.   Absolutely best way to see entire Island if you only have one day do this!!!

reviews.author: Roy Hagglund
reviews.text: The coolest thing we got to do in Kauai. Such a gorgeous island and Arthur was a great tour guide pointing out all the sights. So many waterfalls it's insane. We did doors off and I cannot recommend enough. Great service all the way throughout as well!

reviews.author: Grace Liljenquist
reviews.text: Great experience! Chrissy is an amazing pilot. The extra time on this tour compared to others is well spent and well worth it.

reviews.author: Jeanne Genovese
reviews.text:
We had an amazing experience with Chrissy and the rest of the staff. We felt we were in very competent hands with her.
I would unequivocally recommend this tour.

reviews.author: Mark Douglas Dally
reviews.text: We got lucky with the weather, waterfalls, and even whales on the Napali Coast. This doors off helicopter tour was the highlight of our time on Kauai. Thanks to our pilot Arthur for such good info and commentary on what we were seeing.

reviews.author: Chris Massa
reviews.text: Excellent trip, what a great way to see parts of Kauai that no one else can, from the air. Great photo options.

reviews.author: Daniel Gilbreaith
reviews.text: The doors off helicopter tour of Kauai, especially the Napali coast with Jack Harter Helicopters was the highlight of our trip.  The safety briefing was was very clear and painless and the guy  (can't remember his name) giving the briefing and ride down to the tarmac was super chill and and made everyone smile.  The pilot (Preston) was awesome to be in the air with and made us feel very safe during the flight.  From the start of the flight, Preston made you feel like you had been friends for alo

reviews.author: Jerry Micetic
reviews.text: Wow, what a great bucket list ✔️ off, our pilot Chrissie was smooth and fun to experience this thrilling flight with, highly recommend this company, every minute is worth it, a big thanks to everyone ( ground crew, receptionist) at Jack Harter, you made us feel safe and secure... Life is good..

reviews.author: cd fewell
reviews.text: Our pilot, Chrissy, has probably flown this route 100+ times. However, she knows it’s a once-in-a-lifetime experience for her guests. Chrissy flew over soaring knife edge ridges & peaks, showed us nearby waterfalls, and pointed out whales off the Na Pali coast. She also provided informative commentary about the sites. The grand finale was flying into a tight box canyon w sheer walls (my favorite)! Chrissy went the extra mile to show us the stunning beauty of Kauai from a helicopter. She made tur

reviews.author: Kendra Hetrick
reviews.text: Our doors-off helicopter ride with Pilot Nick was the highlight of our trip!! We had amazing weather and got to see so much of the Na Pali Coast. Nick was very knowledgeable about the island and shared a lot of history and fun facts. Flying into the volcano was amazing!! Thanks for a safe flight, Nick!

reviews.author: Kyle Anderson
reviews.text: I did the doors off tour with Chrissie who was our pilot and she was amazing! They are very professional, organized, and do everything possible to make sure you have a great experience. Highly recommend this company if you want to do a helicopter tour of the island!

reviews.author: Michal B
reviews.text: Great staff and amazing flight. Thank you!

reviews.author: Janile Martin
reviews.text: I did this helicopter tour as a solo traveler. Our wonderful pilot Krissy, checked in with me several times to make sure I was doing OK. She was great when things got a little bumpy she said not to worry, this was normal. She told us she had flown for 10 yrs, over 5000 flights. I found that very reassuring. She also gave commentary on the history and ecology of the areas we were flying over. The sights were amazing and only seen from the air.

reviews.author: bradpA4855MC
reviews.text: Jake was our pilot and did a fantastic job. He made us feel safe and gave us a grand tour of Kauai and it’s amazing waterfalls and the Nepali coast.

reviews.author: alainfU6235BC
reviews.text:
Expérience incroyable, paysages spectaculaires tout au long du vol. Sensations décuplées avec un vol door-off!
Le vol initial avait été reporté la veille, à cause du vent et nous remercions l'équipe de Mauna Loa pour leur professionnalisme.

reviews.author: B1253FTdebbieh
reviews.text: This by far was one of the best activity we did on the Island. Our pilot was very knowledgeable and made us feel comfortable. Safety was their main priority and we felt safe. First time with the doors off. I would highly recommend these folks. You really need to see the island from this advantage point. Everyone was great from the ladies in the office to the staff on the ground and of course our pilot. Thank you for making our 35th anniversary so memorable.

reviews.author: MikeTravelsAbroad
reviews.text:
Everyone we interacted with was amazing. Easy instructions, clear idea of what to expect. Handling of weather was done well during the Kona low and rain, and they told us the schedule so we felt confident we could fit in the tour before we left the island in the afternoon for our flight. 
Amazing views of the whole island of Kauai were a great compliment to end our trip. It was incredible to see all the major sights of the island in an hour, and great to go into the volcano and see the sheer cli

reviews.author: Paradise259186
reviews.text: Amazing flight.  Jake was a great pilot and guide. Smooth ride!! Pointed out landmarks and talked about the history of the island. Loved the theme music at Jurassic Falls! Doors off was perfect for the 2 of us to both experience views and capture amazing photos. No better way to see Napali coast, waterfalls and the full island.

reviews.author: Jörg E
reviews.text: Wir hatten die hinteren zwei Plätze und wegen der offenen Türen hatten wir eine tolle Sicht. Der Pilot hat bei den wichtigsten Stellen eine extra Runde gedreht, damit wir beide alles gut sehen konnten. Eng anliegende Kleidung ist sehr sinnvoll.

reviews.author: Exploration820026
reviews.text: This was amazing! It was so great to see the aerial aspect of what we'd already seen on our Napali coast tour.  Views were fantastic.  Ride was smooth.  Pilot was very good.

reviews.author: DA284ever
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! The doors-off flight made it feel like we were soaring through paradise. Smooth, safe, and exhilarating from start to finish. The scenery—towering waterfalls, lush valleys, dramatic cliffs, and sparkling coastline—was breathtaking at every turn. A must-do for anyone visiting Kauai!

reviews.author: JayneB6464
reviews.text: We loved it - Micah was a great pilot and an interesting tour guide.  I was nervous at first, but quickly got used to the flight and enjoyed all the scenery and sights you couldn't see from the ground.  Some things are worth the cost.  One suggestion, if at all possible, tie your hair back, even if it is not that long.  It gets very tangled.

reviews.author: gabriellelU8298SU
reviews.text: My husband and I loved seeing all of Kauai’s beauty from a birds-eye point of view. We did the doors off and felt completely safe. Would recommend a windbreaker and maybe some sunglasses/googles just for the wind. Definitely an unforgettable experience. Would absolutely recommend.

reviews.author: 963riche
reviews.text:
Our doors off helecopter experience was incredible and we will definitely refer our family and friends for your experience. Our pilot Chris was not only friendly, he kept us entertained the entire flight.
Mahalo

reviews.author: Shelley R
reviews.text: This tour was a last minute decision and did not disappoint!  Our pilot Jake took good care of us and made sure we were safe.  The doors off option was one not to be missed.  Overall the best excursion of our Hawai’i vacation!  5 STARS!!!!!

reviews.author: Trek08249618963
reviews.text: Phenomenal experience, breathtaking views! Jake was an excellent pilot and got us some amazing views of the island. If we could only do one thing in Kauai this would have been it!

reviews.author: trancegirl21
reviews.text: We did this private helicopter tour with doors off around Oahu for my birthday and can’t stop talking about it to anyone who listen! It was a great experience from start to finish! Linnea at the front office was helpful and personable. Our helicopter pilot, Jake was professional and informative, giving us fun facts about the island and locations as we passed them. it was our first helicopter ride, and Jake put our mind at ease. We got so many great pictures and videos and we even saw whales brea

reviews.author: BackPacker819713
reviews.text: The views are totally different from hiking and driving on beautiful Kauai. It is a stunning island with forest, cliffs, farms, beaches and the massive Napali cliffs. Pilots are often helicopter instructors. The ride is very safe and cell phone holders give you total use of phone. You simply must put anxiety aside and go with Mauna Loa. D. L.

reviews.author: SundyF_12
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our helicopter tour with our pilot, Mike. He was very friendly & showed us a lot of things we would have not seen on this trip otherwise. We felt safe with the doors off and got great photos & videos.

reviews.author: L9038MBmargaretf
reviews.text: What a fabulous experience. Chris, our pilot, was awesome- knowledgeable and friendly. The views- breathtaking. I already recommended this to a FB group. Spend the money. It's fantastic.

reviews.author: Joel J
reviews.text: Our pilot was friendly, informative, and made sure we had great views from both sides of the helicopter. Felt very safe and we even saw a few whales.

reviews.author: wardp2025
reviews.text: Totally exhilarating experience.  Chris, our pilot was awesome; explained everything very well and provided ample commentary throughout the trip.  We did doors off which I highly recommend.

reviews.author: Luka R
reviews.text: This was one of the best experiences on Kauai, from check-in to the flight itself. The lady at check-in was smiling and helpful, even though we were a little late... When we arrived at the airport, we were met by a smiling pilot. Even though we had booked a door-on flight, we were able to change our minds and fly without a door. The pilot explained the safety procedures to us once again, then we took off... I don't know where to start... breathtaking views of the landscape. We circled over Juras

reviews.author: DP DP
reviews.text: From booking to flight Mauna Loa did not disappoint. It was everything that we expected and then some. Jake was an excellent pilot and shared various points of interest and information along the flight route. We did the doors off tour and would highly recommend ! An experience of a lifetime if you can,  make sure to check this helicopter tour off your bucket list.

reviews.author: Kristen Butler
reviews.text: On a recent trip to Hawaii, my husband & I booked a “doors off” helicopter tour of Kaua’i. It was our first time in a helicopter so we were definitely nervous. But as soon as we met the pilot, we felt completely at ease. He clearly explained everything in detail, including the safety aspects of our flight. When we started to go up, I felt a bit scared, especially after the first tilt, but as the tour went on, I became much more comfortable. We flew over Kaua’i for an hour & it was amazing to see

reviews.author: Anya Bender-Kissee
reviews.text:
My husband and I had such an amazing experience with Moana Loa Helicopter Tours—truly unforgettable!

We originally had a tour booked with a different company on Wednesday at 10:45, but after the recent helicopter crash, they canceled our flight. We quickly rebooked with Moana Loa for Tuesday, but unfortunately that tour was also canceled due to high winds. I will say, we really appreciated that Moana Loa called us about an hour before our scheduled time to let us know they were canceling all fl

reviews.author: Joel Williams
reviews.text: Cancelled right before tour. Didn’t seem to care at all about the short notice. When I mentioned that fact, they simply said it was their right to cancel anytime. Zero customer care.

reviews.author: Niki Kozak
reviews.text: We really enjoyed having a private tour with just the two of us and pilot, Walt! We had done a group helo tour and really wanted something with "great seating" and a pilot all to ourselves to hammer with questions. : )  Doors off was a good choice for providing the most clear photo options. Definitely bring a jacket, we were happy we had ours on! Windy conditions during our particular flight day, but Walt kept us safe and comfortable!

reviews.author: Kathy Wilker
reviews.text: Our pilot, Lance, went above and beyond to accommodate our group!  And, Jackie was all smiles while getting us ready for our ride.  Really great experience!!

reviews.author: Heather Scott
reviews.text: Great helicopter trip! All staff was very informative and helpful, went over all safety measures, and talked through what the tour would look like. Our pilot was Walter and he was great!

reviews.author: Daniel Drinan
reviews.text: Amazing experience.

reviews.author: Jeff
reviews.text:
Great time, doors off is the only way to go. Shorts and a T worked just fine as the cool temps are very temporary. Views are fantastic to say the least.
Wife and I walked from cruise ship to heliport and back.
Thank you pilot Jake and staff!

reviews.author: Jana
reviews.text: Nepopsatelný zážitek, moc doporučujeme. Skvělá komunikace, organizace. Pilot byl moc milý, poskytl nám mnoho zajímavých informací.

reviews.author: Anirudh Kanwar
reviews.text: Amazing tour.

reviews.author: Hope Roberts
reviews.text: This was our second adventure with Mauna Loa Helicopters. The greeting staff are friendly, knowledgeable and informative. The pilots are professional, warm and welcoming. The islands do the rest. HIGHLY recommend ANY trip in the air but the smaller birds and doors off allow you to see so much more. Even (especially) in the rain it's incredible. If you are on Kauai and do not see the Na Pali Coast you are doing it WRONG.

reviews.author: Donald Cox
reviews.text: It was great. Best view of the island.   A great experience.

reviews.author: Kiffin Hansen
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! Our pilot was very knowledgeable about the island and was a great tour guide. Would recommend to everyone!

reviews.author: Priya Patel
reviews.text: Our experience was AMAZING!!!! Everyone was so friendly and clear as to what the protocol was. They initially had to reschedule us due to weather. Pilot Jack told us the news and he was very clear and answered all questions on rescheduling. The day of, we thankfully got beautiful weather. Our pilot was Walt and he was awesome!!! So kind, clear, and friendly. He pointed out landmarks and history associated with places. The ride was smooth the whole way. We did the doors off experience and I HIGHL

reviews.author: Tara Granlie
reviews.text: A must do in Kauai! Was the highlight of our trip. Napali coast is one of a kind and so is Mauna Loa! Doors off is an experience of its own. They provided cell phone holders so everything felt secure as you do your own video/picture taking. Bring an extra layer even on a hot day if doing doors off. Pilot was fun and knowledgeable, even found a whale off the coast to watch for a moment! Will never forget it! Mahalo

reviews.author: anthony skudlarek
reviews.text: This helicopter tour was phenomenal! Having a private couples tour with a great and experience pilot and guide was beyond anything I could have imagined! Having the doors off might seem adventurous, but it is totally worth it and the best way to experience the island from the skies! Cannot say enough good things about the process, people, and experience!

reviews.author: 97rinkub
reviews.text: Bucket list experience for sure. you get to see all of Oahu's mountains and beaches. Our pilot Connor talked to us about geography and a bit of history as well which was fun.

reviews.author: zachj468
reviews.text: We did the doorless helicopter ride. It was amazing. I would highly recommend it. The views were spectacular. The pilot also had a lot of great information about the island.

reviews.author: Dirk B
reviews.text:
Avoid Rainbow Helicopters if you’re cruising on NCL Pride of America
This particular cruiseship often misses the Kona port (which happens due to rough seas) - do not book your excursion with Rainbow Helicopters. We learned this the hard way. The company refused to refund our payment even though the ship couldn’t dock — something completely out of our control. They rescheduled us for a later date on a shorter flight, then canceled that flight due to weather, and still refused a refund.

The custo

reviews.author: claudiapJ45GT
reviews.text: The most exciting experience I’ve

reviews.author: charlesnI3595IX
reviews.text: Awesome experience. Lucky to have Gavin as our pilot,  doors off Robinson Helicopter tour of Oahu. Great narration and piloting skills. Highlight of our Christmas in Hawaii.

reviews.author: 779annemiekev
reviews.text: Het was fantastisch, geweldig en kan het iedereen aanraden. Je krijgt de geschiedenis te horen en hoe het eiland is ontstaan. Heel mooi.

reviews.author: Traveler00007800882
reviews.text: Set up a tour but had to cancel well before the cancellation deadline. Requested a refund and haven’t heard anything back for two weeks. Called to check and they said the matter has been referred to their accounting department, still nothing. Beware of a company like this.

reviews.author: 94tiredtraveler
reviews.text: Great experience for our 50th anniversary.  We did the open door 60 minute flight. Spectacular!! Our pilot, Nikki, ex navy,  was wonderful.  Highly recommend this adventure.

reviews.author: Nic L
reviews.text: Nothing but utter disappointment. I leave to get there early thats when I first got told I was heavy and their was a fee of around$200 extra from what I paid ahead of time, then the fee was waved, then you can't take your camera, then maybe you can take your camera, then maybe we can make a strap work. Worst part there was a strap in my hand that was made for it but i started getting the feeling they wanted to sell me pictures from my flught, no doubt at a huge markup. I ended up refusing to fly

reviews.author: jennsE6651CI
reviews.text: I bought the excursion for my mother in laws 70th birthday, and she was absolutely blown away. She loved the pilot Lucien, and spoke very highly of the tour.

reviews.author: Kendall M
reviews.text: Had an amazing flight at the 5pm time slot. I chose the doors off and I highly recommend it. It brought the tour to the next level and made you feel like you were a bird.  Gavin was my pilot.  He was fun, easy going and informative.  Overall worth every penny!

reviews.author: woom888
reviews.text: 하와이현지 시간으로 10월7일 레인보우헬리콥터를 향해 가던중 차량타이어 펑크가 발생 시간이 촉박하여 무리하게 레인보우에 도착 일단 헬리콥터 탑승을 위한 교육을 듣고 파이로트 이다님의 멋진 비행으로 하와이 곳곳을 누비며 하와이를 즐기고 그 높은 산, 구름속으로 들어갈땐 쾌감, 양쪽문이 오픈되어 하강할때 보여주는 파아란 바다에 빠질것 같은 짜릿함, 너무 멋진 하와이의 풍경에 반했습니다. 하지만 타이어가 찢어지는 바람에 긴급출동서비스 특약을 하지않아 견인을 하게되면 미화로399불을 지불하고 수리비 별도 라는 엄청난 상황이 발생하였으나, 영어 소통이 어려운 우리들을 대신 인포에 근무하신 하와이 김씨(할아버지가 한국분) 분이 보험회사와 통화해서 어려움이 발생하자 Tim Burton 이라는 친절한 외국인인데 자연스러운 한국어로 우리에게 다가오셔서 자동차 상태를 점검해주고 스페어 타이어가 있는지 확인해주시고 우리들이 불안해하자 물도 사다주면서 우리를 위로해 주시고 가장 최선의 방법은 가장가까운곳

reviews.author: Johannes M
reviews.text: Es war ein super tolles, unvergessliches Erlebnis! Wir sind sehr froh diese Tour gebucht zu haben! Gerne wieder mit euch!

reviews.author: 462DebJ462
reviews.text: What a thrill! Doors off or doors on? In the end we decided doors off. OMG I didn't believe my heart could pound that fast. A one hour tour of Oahu was fantastic and our pilot was the best. Filled with knowledge about the island. So wonderful to see everything from above from diamond Head to the North shore to the Arizona memorial. Highly recommend this company. Just do it! Worth every penny.

reviews.author: Irmgard F
reviews.text: Was absolutely worth it! The pilot explained everything while flying safely. An amazing flight! Got an insight about the beauty of the island!

reviews.author: benwM9978CX
reviews.text: Ben was our pilot and was just the best. Great rapport, very knowledgable about the sites on our flight path. My spouse had never flown in a helicopter before and was a little nervous until Ben made her feel comfortable about the experience.

reviews.author: Daniel H
reviews.text: I feel this was a well run operation from the check-in  to the flight line and the helicopter flight and back. I chose the doors off flight and except for a little helicopter hair,  it was a fantastic flight  i would highly recommend it,  the views were fantastic with no glass reflecting in the way.

reviews.author: marcosT5706UD
reviews.text: Eine absolute Empfehlung! Viele Dinge die man vom Boden aus nicht sehen konnte, wurden sichtbar! Wir hatten einen tollen Piloten (Galvin) und waren nur allein im Helikopter 🚁! Noch einmal ganz neue Eindrücke, absolute Empfehlung mit offenen Türen zu fliegen! Würden die Tour gleich nochmal machen! Mahalo 🤙

reviews.author: P302SRcherylb
reviews.text: Ida was our pilot and was amazing.She took us to all the best views. It was our first time in a helicopter and we loved it. Would definitely do it again!

reviews.author: smhalmich
reviews.text: Very cool seeing Oahu from above. Beautiful scenery and loved seeing Pearl Harbor from a different view point. Our Pilot, Ida did an excellent job.

reviews.author: Christian Harra
reviews.text: Wilson and his crew were nothing but professional, courteous, timely and accommodating.  Our original tour,  due to weather was forced to be rescheduled.  They insured that our already scheduled Island tours were first and they completely rescheduled their appointments around us.  Made sure the doors off request was met and that our experience was beyond our expectations.  Can't say enough about the professionalism that each team member showed.  Wilson, way to go!.....you lead by example and you

reviews.author: Rob RU
reviews.text:
I booked a last minute tour with Rainbow Tours. I Had a great time with JoJo on a doors off ride. Outstanding job with everyone involved as well.
You can purchase pictures from them in front of the helo, but they will take the photos with you camera/phone as well.
Thank you all for a great time!!!

reviews.author: Julia Best
reviews.text: We had the best experience with Jojo and Ben. The views on the Kohala coast were unmatched. Would not hesitate for a second to go again!

reviews.author: Donna Gieseke
reviews.text: Scheduled a flight but couldn’t tender in from the ship so they rescheduled for 2 days later. Then they canceled on me. Asked for a refund but was denied. Neither event was my fault. They got my 2k and did nothing for it.

reviews.author: Claire McClintock
reviews.text: The people at Rainbow Helicopters were amazingly accommodating to our group. I highly recommend calling and booking with them directly. Our group did the Kona Coast tour and it did not disappoint. Our kids will always remember the experience and I will never forget the friendliness and helpfulness of the staff.

reviews.author: Eli Bertrand
reviews.text: AMAZING service and wonderful, breathtaking flight.

reviews.author: Tyler Graveline
reviews.text: Our helicopter tour with Jeff was incredible! He was friendly, knowledgeable, and quick to answer any questions we had. The whole team at Rainbow Helicopters gave us such a warm welcome; especially Nalu (?) the sweet office dog! We chose the 45 minute tour as our first experience, but if we go again we will definitely be choosing the waterfall tour at the north end of the island!

reviews.author: Erin Moone
reviews.text: We had an epic journey all through the island. From the volcanos through the valleys and volcanos. The terrain was stunning. Our captain Joseph was beyond amazing with stories and knowledge. Wilson and the staff at the home base were lovely. We are so grateful to have experienced this with Rainbow.

reviews.author: Dawn Scudero
reviews.text: Rainbow was absolutely amazing and a great host. From the time we walked into the office til we got off the helicopter they were amazing. We had Ida as our pilot and she was sooooo amazing. Her love for the island definitely showed and she was super informative. We did the waterfall tour and added the volcano tour with the doors off. It’s cold while over the volcanos but perfect weather over the coast and waterfalls. She made sure to circle each attraction so both sides of the helicopter got the

reviews.author: Jenny Burkowski
reviews.text: Our pilot, Ida, was AMAZING!!!  She was very educated on the parts of the Big Island and the volcanic activity.  She was very personable and professional.  She far exceeded my expectations of the Big Island and volcano tour.  Thank you for helping us make lasting memories with our small children that will last a lifetime!

reviews.author: PrecisionSurfacesLLC
reviews.text:
Let me help you, stop browsing and book the trip.

The entire experience is indescribable. Our pilot Jeff was stellar, all of the staff were amazingly friendly.

Our doors-off 90 minute ride is an unforgettable experience.

Thanks team Rainbow. Keep up the great work and thank you for letting us experience Hawaii in a way that is like no other.

reviews.author: Monkey Bumper
reviews.text:
Justin was great 👍
Had an amazing flight.

reviews.author: 史玮劼
reviews.text:
AMAZING!!!

Everyone there went extra miles to make my tour with them unforgettable.

On the day of my tour, the wind is so strong that they are not sure whether we can reach the volcano. However, after they learned that I flew in from Honolulu just for this tour, they upgraded me to a larger aircraft, and tried an unusual route to increase the chance to reach the volcano. The owner even assured me that if we were not able to reach the volcano, then I could take the tour the next morning for fre

reviews.author: Steve
reviews.text: I recently took the newly added Kīlauea volcano eruption tour that covers most of the Big Island with Chris as the pilot and the doors off. What an amazing time. Chris was a great pilot who is both friendly and knowledgeable. I highly recommend this tour in the R44 helicopter with the doors off if you’re not afraid of heights.

reviews.author: A M
reviews.text: Loved our pilot Jojo but that was the one plus to the tour. We were under the impression that we would see a volcano and waterfalls, but we saw none of that. Literally, it was just a helicopter tour of a barren old mountain (“volcano”) and then back down again and then we flew over the beach area. It costs $450 per person and they don’t even include a photo with it. If you want a photo you have to purchase for an additional $50!  Not worth the cost at all. Sad. The staff was friendly tho

reviews.author: Zach Lubinski
reviews.text: Well earned premium price point with great customer service. The team identified at the last minute that we could change our plan to see the erupting volcano, which was what my family had originally hoped for but thought might not be possible. Our pilot Jeff was knowledgeable and professional, and just great to chat with. His passion for his work and the island was apparent. I also appreciated the flexibility to choose our departure time.

reviews.author: Miles Heddin
reviews.text:
We did the waterfall route and it was fantastic! It was totally different than what we’ve been seeing around Hawaii. Our pilot Josh was fantastic as he was incredible knowledgeable and funny! I would recommend it highly for helicopter tours around the island!

Only complaint is after you pay you have the option to pay extra for photos they take of you. So I’d highly recommend you take lots of photos with your phone or have group photos taken with your photos.

reviews.author: S Agarwal
reviews.text: We had an amazing experience with Rainbow Helicopter tours. Our pilots Jeff and Donavan were knowledgeable and extremely friendly.  It is a very family friendly service so if you have kids. I would highly recommend using this. Their office (where you check in) is so clean, welcoming, and kid friendly. Their office staff is also so nice and efficient.  We loved our ride. We even spotted whales from up above and loved seeing the beautiful landscape and taking in all of Big Island. 5 stars for Rain

reviews.author: Lin Qi
reviews.text:
We had an extremely disappointing and frustrating experience with Rainbow Helicopters

Same as another review has mentioned, our plan to Hawaii was disrupted by American Airlines. we immediately reached out to Rainbow Helicopters to explain the situation and asked if we could reschedule or receive a refund, given that the delay was entirely out of our control. Unfortunately, we were met with a firm refusal. I agree that their “protection policy” was really unclear and their was no place to add i

reviews.author: Z3041WLchriss
reviews.text: Great experience! Staff was knowledgeable and helpful! Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Gossamer007
reviews.text: First time visit to Hawaii.  Spent two weeks on the island and this was my favorite thing I did on my visit.  Long flight time that lets you see most of the island of Oahu.  Our pilot Kanani did an excellent job and provided a commentary and description of many of the landmarks we flew over.  One benefit I had was having taken an island driving tour the week before and I was able to see many of the places I had been on the ground from the air.  Company allows you to rent or purchase a cell phone

reviews.author: billbF734AS
reviews.text: Overall, a very good time, from the initial greeting to the final good byes. The flight was most enjoyable with lots of great scenery and commentary from the pilot. Definitely worth the money and time. As recommended on their website, bing a light jacket, even it is warm at sea level. In flight, with the doors open, etc, the wind was a bit chilly. We brought windbreakers which was perfrect.

reviews.author: John F
reviews.text:
One of the best birthday gifts ever!! 

First of all, Captain Herbert, our pilot that day, was extremely safe, skilled at the controls, and knowledgeable. He takes extremely good care of his passengers. He was patient and thoughtful through the flight to ensure that everyone on board could take in the views from both sides of the aircraft.

With that said, the ground team at Magnum Helicopters was courteous, knowledgeable and safety conscious. They ensure that the passengers knew what was expect

reviews.author: 868chadf
reviews.text: This was a blast!  First time for our two kids in a helicopter and our pilot Jeff was amazing.  The sites were also amazing from the air.  Would do again anytime.

reviews.author: Richandcas
reviews.text:
What a super afternoon. We were greeted very warmly on arrival, shown all of the necessary safety features , and purchased some souvenirs. Our valuables were placed in a locker and we were escorted to the  aircraft. 
We  had lots of pictures taken which we purchased after the flight for 35 dollars which was very reasonable especially for the amount of photos.

The flight ! Well it’s hard to find the superlatives really …. It was so exhilarating, fast! Breathless at times, as the scenery unfolded

reviews.author: cathyw480
reviews.text: Everyone one took great care of us. It was my first helicopter ride and I hope it’s not my last. What a great time

reviews.author: rainerg405
reviews.text: Super Trip! Jeff war ein super und immer sicherer Pilot.

reviews.author: hroikjer
reviews.text: Amazing tour with knowledgeable pilot, my wife and I loved it....

reviews.author: davidaZ7990LA
reviews.text:
We had an amazing time and highly recommend using Magnum Helicopters should you decide to take a helicopter tour during your time in Oahu!  Ian, Brittany and  Khrislynett made us feel welcome the minute we walked through the door.  Having an enjoyable experience and our safety was there primary concern.  Our pilot, Tianna was awesome.  Her knowledge on the history of the island was exceptional, providing detailed explanations  of everything we saw.
If there is one excursion that you plan on taki

reviews.author: Passport284981
reviews.text: What an awesome experience! We arrived a bit early (and so did the other couple) so the pilot so we took off a bit early due to some rain that was moving through our flight path.

reviews.author: marion644
reviews.text: The experience was totally fantastic, the pilot was a true professional and was very informative and very knowledgeable about the key points of the Island.

reviews.author: cindymL6109UE
reviews.text: This trip was incredible! From the start to finish.  Josh made us feel comfortable informed and took us on a trip around the island. Thank you to the entire team! We will be back soon!

reviews.author: 344sallye
reviews.text: Never flown in a helicopter before, but it was amazing, from check-in to leaving. The staff are very friendly and full of useful information and tips. Although we took off (in THE original Magnum 'copter) in a downpour, we soon dried out and had a really enjoyable flight. Not once did I feel unsafe, despite no doors and warm clothing is a good idea. I could have done it again, but my husband had to get a shirt and other souvenirs. Yes, it's not cheap, but well worth it🥰

reviews.author: charlesrZ2320RR
reviews.text: The people were great and of course the views were spectacular. Time flew by much too quickly. I would totally recommend this adventure.

reviews.author: Tim R
reviews.text: Communicated clearly, pilot was friendly and knowledgeable. Ground crew were helpful and funny. Made us feel welcome.

reviews.author: peytonw460
reviews.text: We had an absolutely amazing tour with Josh. He’s not only an incredible pilot, he was also super friendly and knowledgeable. I would highly recommend a helicopter tour while you’re here, you won’t be disappointed.

reviews.author: 970todda
reviews.text: Our ride was fantastic . Would go again in a heartbeat . The pilot was a real pro and gave us a ride of a lifetime .

reviews.author: davewB4903HT
reviews.text:
Brilliant Experience!

We have done helicopters before, but doing it with doors off is just another level.

Once you get over the first 2 minutes of utter terror (maybe that was just me!), It is completely exhilarating and one of the best things you will do in Honolulu.

Herb, our pilot, not only gave us a fabulous view of Oahu, but he also took the time to point out all the major points of interest, including spotting 3 whales on the southeast side of the island, which we hovered over to get so

reviews.author: caseyhC6301ZF
reviews.text: Excellent tour! Everyone was super helpful and our pilot Josh did a great job! Definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Laura Henrichs
reviews.text:
Fantastic experience from start to finish.  Warmly welcomed by staff upon arrival, walked us through the safety protocols and got us swiftly ready for flight.  Our 13 year old was so excited to sit in the front next to Herbert, our pilot for the trip.

Breathtaking views abound.  Definitely the highlight of our vacation.

reviews.author: S J
reviews.text: Extremely last minute cancellation by company. Very disappointed in this business. A days notice, instead of an email a few hours before, would have been great. Not even a phone call. We have flown with you guys several times before, never again.

reviews.author: lorie cruza
reviews.text: I was a little nervous since I'm scared of heights and turbulence on plane but did not regret doing this. It was a great experience with amazing views and super friendly staff. We went late March and I’d recommend wearing a sweater and jeans as it is cold while flying.

reviews.author: Mega Boast (MeGaBoAsT)
reviews.text: Amazing experience. Not my first helicopter tour but my first No Door Helicopter tour. Worth it!

reviews.author: musaab abualjis
reviews.text: Had an amazing experience the staff was so nice and knowledgeable the manager went above and beyond to make our experience the best

reviews.author: thomas tan
reviews.text: Took our family of 4 on the “doors off” helicopter flight.   An absolute thrill of a ride, not like a rollercoaster but very smooth, a beautiful unique view from above of the famous North Shore, overflight of Pearl Harbor, waterfalls.  For aviation and movie fans, this is the similar design helicopter seen in the TV show Magnum PI but also Apocalypse Now and Blackhawk Down, a great nimble helicopter.  The pilot and ground support team were kind and knowledgeable.   The highlight of our trip! 🚁

reviews.author: Judene SMITH
reviews.text:
Had an awesome time. Only issue was that my partner’s headset fell a part half way through our trip. Other than that it was great!!!
Big suggestion if you are going and doing the doors off trip take a sweatshirt or semi warm jacket. It’s colder than you expect.
Thank you ladies for the enjoyable time and conversation.

reviews.author: Shawn Vorba
reviews.text: Probably the coolest thing I have ever got to experience. Staff is amazing!!

reviews.author: K Cossyleon
reviews.text: Tianna is wonderful! She is very knowledgeable and an excellent pilot. The experience was unforgettable and breathtaking. Thank you on behalf of the Cossyleon family.

reviews.author: Michelle Novotny
reviews.text: Amazing tour! It was 50 minutes and we covered literally half the island! It was exhilarating! My husband is very afraid of heights- he is the one that wanted to do this- and he loved it. I do recommend dramamine if you get air sick or motion sick at all- and definitely wear warm clothes because it is cold up there! The crew was great- very well prepared and informative. highly recommend!

reviews.author: William Klaetsch
reviews.text:
Cool experience 50 minutes of flying time
Will add a few pictures around the flight

reviews.author: Jennifer
reviews.text: We had a great time! The staff was very courteous and our pilot was wonderful and knowledgeable. A definite trip to book!

reviews.author: Chad Fry
reviews.text: Great experience. So much fun. Kids first ride was awesome.  Jeff the pilot was so knowledgeable, personable, and good.

reviews.author: Ja’Da Brayboy
reviews.text: Magnum helicopters was great!!!! This was our first time in a helicopter ride and I felt at ease! The views were amazinggg and adventurous. Shoutout to Brittney and Jeff definitely made this once in a lifetime experience one for the books!

reviews.author: Mike Doherty
reviews.text: spectacular experience.   great scenery and our pilot,  Herb was excellent.  great pilot and tour guide

reviews.author: Richard Gray
reviews.text: Absolutely thrilling, super , great care from the team - exceptional experience

reviews.author: Mike Waldo
reviews.text: Great ride, wear a jacket.

reviews.author: Lisa Allen
reviews.text:
Thoroughly enjoyed our tour with Magnum Helicopters!
We felt safe and, our pilot Tyler was incredibly professional and knowledgeable!
We learned a lot and definitely will be back!

reviews.author: Jeff Odegard
reviews.text: The flight was very smooth despite the wind. Had a great time, pilot and ground crew were all great.

reviews.author: Ruiz Esparza
reviews.text: What a experience, I would recommend it to everyone. If you have never flown in a helicopter it was a beautiful ride.

reviews.author: Vanessa H
reviews.text:
We are extremely disappointed with our experience with Air Maui. The way our helicopter tour was handled felt unprofessional and, honestly, quite frustrating.

What upset us the most was that the company apparently already knew in advance that the flight would not take place. However, instead of informing us ahead of time, we were only told once we arrived on site. This meant we had no opportunity to adjust our plans or make alternative arrangements.

To make matters worse, we were then presente

reviews.author: Y8910ZSpaulk
reviews.text: Great tour and beautiful sites and the pilot was very informative so it was an awesome experience and a check off our bucket list!

reviews.author: X5449NXjenniferk
reviews.text: Our pilot Kirk made the trip amazing. Of course the views were incredible with our doors off ride, but his interaction with everyone on board as well as the information he provided was top notch. Not sure if you can request a pilot, but if they allow it, I would definitely ask for Kirk.

reviews.author: Heidi M
reviews.text: Even though we had to do a different route due to weather, it was an amazing experience!  The highlight of my trip!  Captain Kirk was very knowledgeable about the history and was entertaining.  The views were unreal!  So worth the money to do this!

reviews.author: michaelsX1955GO
reviews.text:
My wife and I have taken multiple helicopter tours and we have always enjoyed the experience. The Air Maui Odyssey tour experience was good but not as nice as we had hoped.

Positives: The pilot (Drew) was very knowledgeable and entertaining. He was  local resident and provided a wealth of insight about the areas and most specifically about the various valleys and waterfalls. The views from the helicopter are phenomenal and always provide you a deeper appreciation for the beauty of land and wate

reviews.author: H8429LZgeorgep
reviews.text: The pilot and tour were excellent. The big complaint is that the helicopter was very crowded, thus horribly uncomfortable. It was difficult taking pictures from my middle seat in the back as others kept their cameras in my view. There shouldn’t be 4 large people in the back seat.  The front seat had 2 people plus the pilot, who appeared to be crowded. The office crew was helpful and explained change of itinerary due to weather. Drew, the pilot, gave an excellent narration, and given the difficul

reviews.author: rlmartin76
reviews.text: Amazing and breathtaking beauty up close, Literally took my breath away. First thing my son said after we landed was "That was money well spent". Mission accomplished, and a memory that will last forever!

reviews.author: J5525JTtaraj
reviews.text: Fantastic experience. Could have not imagined anything at this level. The staff and the pilot were super super nice and the door off experience definitely paid off...

reviews.author: V8581ICconnieb
reviews.text: The cloud cover over the volcano prevented us from going there, but our brilliant pilot took us along the Maui coast and over to the spectacular cliffs and waterfalls of Molokai, commenting with clarity and authority on all we were seeing.  A++

reviews.author: Thrice4life
reviews.text: Went on the doors of molokai / west maui it was so  much fun . parking was 8 for 1 hour . they went over safety video then gave us a windbreaker to use and googles and a strap for your phone . would highly recommended for anyone looking for breathtaking views of west Maui and molokai and we even saw whales and blow hole join off like crazy  . would go again

reviews.author: macpan
reviews.text:
teuer, aber gutes P/L Verhältnis. Check in war 0k, angemessene Wartezeit.
Pilot war gut. Alles in allem guter Deal, dennoch recht hochpreisig.

reviews.author: robbN5401MZ
reviews.text: Amazing experience. The pilot Richie was great. Definitely recommend. Doors off was awesome, definitely windy though. But wind is pushing you into helicopter, not out!

reviews.author: Jeffer P
reviews.text: Phenomenal! Highlight of our trip! Seeing the island from above is breathtaking. The waterfalls. We even saw whales! Definitely a must do

reviews.author: bryanmV9307PF
reviews.text:
My wife and I did the Doors Off West Maui and Molokai 45-minute helicopter tour and had an absolutely amazing experience. Forty-five minutes was the perfect amount of time — we got to see so much without feeling rushed.

Our pilot was incredible — very skilled, informative, and made the entire ride smooth and enjoyable. Maui is such a beautiful island, and seeing it from the air gave us breathtaking scenic views that we’ll never forget.

This was easily one of the highlights of our trip. Highly

reviews.author: Al C
reviews.text: Capt. Kirk was great,  he was knowledgeable,  friendly and made sure we were all comfortable and having a great time.    The views and sights on the 60 minute tour were absolutely breathtaking.   Nothing short of amazing.   Highly recommend.

reviews.author: auchris
reviews.text: The open door tour was both terrifying and safe fun. The pilot was engaging and knowledgeable about the islands and took us to amazing sites and the music was  fitting.  The ground crew were professional,  nice and accommodating...sweet, kind island vibe. Would highly recommend this trip and it should not be missed!

reviews.author: robinkJ7093GW
reviews.text: This tour was a favorite of our trip!! Our pilot, Cameron, was very knowledgeable and extremely entertaining. The sites you get to see are amazing and breathtaking! The beauty of this place is unparalleled. I highly recommend this helicopter tour, thank you!!

reviews.author: jonathand120
reviews.text: I would give 10stars if it was possible. Air Maui is top notch quality of customer service from checkin to return. Flawless. Dillon was our pilot and I cannot say enough about how informative he was and  extremely steady flat flying. We had a doors off 45 min flight. Absolutely incredible.

reviews.author: MargieDubai
reviews.text: Drew was an excellent pilot and gave us an exciting and informative adventure over Kauai and Molokai.  He even spotted Humback Whales for us to see up close!  Staff was very accommodating when there was a booking mix-up.

reviews.author: JennaLaurie
reviews.text: 10/10. This was amazing. I’m terrified of flying and the thought of going up in a helicopter made me nauseous but it all faded away quickly. Our pilot Dylan was fantastic. He was friendly, knowledgeable, and had literally the perfect curated playlist for this flight. Take off and landing were flawless and he showed us amazing sights up close that you otherwise wouldn’t get to see. The staff at Air Maui were kind and friendly. They even helped us out easily with a photo mishap. I would fly with t

reviews.author: Amy E
reviews.text: Drew was an amazing pilot. He took us safely around. The helicopter how we had had large scuffs in the windows right where you’d record.  So we were planning to purchase the video from them. The office staff also seem very disorganized.  We asked if sunglasses came with a case. We were told yes. Paid $35.  Then they couldn’t find them. No adjustment. The video apparently didn’t record for our flight so expecting to purchase it and was unable.  They offered some other guy on our tour a free shirt

reviews.author: Andy
reviews.text: We ended our once in a lifetime 40th wedding anniversary trip to Maui with a complete island tour on Air Maui. Cameron was a great pilot, and the entire experience was a magnificent way to say goodbye and thank you Maui. The video we purchased of the flight afterwards is a wonderful keepsake we are still watching. To borrow Cameron's analogy, it is like a magic carpet ride over some of the most breathtaking scenery you can imagine. Thank you Air Maui.

reviews.author: Sachin
reviews.text:
We had one of the most memorable experiences ever! We did the West Maui and Molokai special and the landscape was beautiful. Initially booked a doors-on tour but after a lot of nervousness-driven thought, upgraded it to a doors-off tour and man, we surely made the best decision.
The pilot (Drew?) was amazing, explained the landscape throughout the tour and made sure it was worth the while.

reviews.author: Tammy Nolan
reviews.text: The helicopter ride was really fun and a great way to see the island in a different way. Drew was our pilot and told us all about everything.

reviews.author: Daniel Barrientos
reviews.text: Amazing!!!!!

reviews.author: Atomic Vibro
reviews.text: Drew is a great pilot, local and very informed. Showed us everything there is to see on the islands plus we got to see the west side cliffs of Molokai and that is a world wonder to see. Great service and I would love to do this tour again!

reviews.author: Robert Radkowski
reviews.text: We recently took the 60-minute Maui helicopter tour and appreciated the staff’s courtesy and our pilot, Ryan, whose knowledge was exceptional and easy to listen to.
