Additionally, I called a week before, post heavy rain storm, and they said

reviews.author: Jason Knott
reviews.text: We had an excellent afternoon aboard the Pride of Maui. The crew was respectful and knowledgeable. We saw whales and dolphins, and everyone enjoyed the snorkeling and felt very safe.

reviews.author: Bob Bobberson
reviews.text:
Our family had an amazing time on the Pride of Maui for 3 hours of whale watching and snorkeling. We saw no less than 7 whales and 2 dolphins, which was amazing luck. Our captain had all sorts of fun-facts about the whales and different types of dolphins and how they interact. He even stopped the boat and dropped a mic in the water so we could hear the whales communicating with each other - super cool. We didn't get any major breeches from the whales, but it was still awesome.

When it came to s

reviews.author: Brandi Warnke
reviews.text:
Review for Myths of Maui Snorkeling Tour
Rating: 5/5 Stars
Our family had an absolutely incredible day with Pride of Maui! From start to finish, the staff was amazing, kind, and went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of.
The boat itself was impressive—clearly new, impeccably clean, and remarkably fast and smooth on the water. We felt the utmost confidence in our captain, whose primary focus was clearly our safety. He carefully monitored the weather conditions to ensure we had the

reviews.author: Andrew Lamers
reviews.text: Our snorkel tour on the Elua (3/19/26) was the best! We did other excursions on our trip and this one was the best value for our money. 10/10

reviews.author: Cody Bellec
reviews.text: First time being in Hawaii and booked this excursion. Mind you, I used to be a lifeguard and have always swam growing up. Love the water and this experience was amazing! From the catering provided to us to two stops we made to snorkel and to lastly the amazing staff onboard. Just a truly amazing experience. Everything was very organized. Would recommend Pride of Maui anytime.

reviews.author: brian kennedy
reviews.text: Can't add anything not already said in recent reviews. Captain and crew were great, experience was fun and well worth the price, equipment was in good shape, drinks were tasty. Easily one of our top experiences on the trip. Don't forget your sun protection!

reviews.author: M Bang
reviews.text: Great boat and great crew.  Awesome experience!

reviews.author: Chelsea L
reviews.text: Hands down one of the best experiences! The crew was so kind, knowledgeable and helpful  Went for the snorkeling, and saw so many whales along the way. Turtle town was filled with turtle sightings!  10/10 experience!

reviews.author: Jon Morris
reviews.text: Best eco tour I have been on anywherein the world.   Snokeling was amazing.   Whales, turtles, exotic fish!   Friendly relaxed staff.... crazy good.

reviews.author: Cassidy Reynolds
reviews.text: My husband and I had a PHENOMENAL time with Pride of Maui for our snorkeling excursion! It was hands down our favorite thing we did in Maui. The experience was incredible (we even got to see a Manta Ray- which is rare!!) but it was incredible to see the coral reefs with the countless fish, sea turtles, and coral. We went during whale season which I highly recommend because you can not only see them while you’re cruising in the boat but also you can hear their symphonies underwater! The whole cre

reviews.author: Trina Hemann
reviews.text: Yesterday we did the snorkeling tour.  First time ever going.  The staff were amazing and so accommodating.  The one staff member spent extra time with me helping me get set up.  He didn’t make me feel weird for never doing it before and was so patient with me.  His extra help made the experience even more enjoyable.  Food was good as well as the after snorkeling drinks.  I would highly recommend them.  And you must go off the slide at least once!!

reviews.author: Deep Atkare
reviews.text:
Great host and very helpful staff. Its worth every penny you spend with them. We saw a good amount of whales. Their snorkeling equipment is good too and they give you flippers and snorkeling masks.

My wife is pregnant and she loved it as well. The boats are big enough to not feel that much waves and sea sickness.

I would strongly recommend them for the whale watching and snorkeling.

reviews.author: Craig Neth
reviews.text: We went on the Whale watch and snorkel tour and it was amazing!!!  Tons of whale sightings, and the crew was just amazing.   They did a great job accommodating everyone and made sure we had a great time.

reviews.author: Mike Nagan
reviews.text:
We had a great experience! We booked with Pride of Maui in February. We were greeted promptly upon arrival. The breakfast was a nice start to the day. We snorkeled at the Molokini Crater. They gave us plenty of time in the water to enjoy the reef and fish. We had lunch before heading to Turtle Town. The lunch was excellent. Hot off the grill burgers. Better than we expected on this type of tour. Turtle Town was great, many turtles, my wife who did not snorkel, saw them right from the boat.
This

reviews.author: Lydia Chan
reviews.text: The crew on the Pride of Maui ‘Elua prioritizes the guest experience, and it shows. They made sure we were outfitted with the proper gear (the wetsuits were great in keeping us warm in the cooler water), and their detailed explanations had us feeling safe about the entire experience. Caden, Sienna, and team even extended our journey back to the harbor when several humpback whales unexpectedly put on a show for us. Thank you for a memorable trip!

reviews.author: Charity
reviews.text: We had a group of 6 and did the afternoon whale watching and snorkeling trip.  We had a great time!  We saw some whales, but we were in the heart of the season too.  We had about an hour of snorkeling and that was fun.  They gave instructions and even offered a quick class for those who had never snorkeled.  They offered different floatation devices too if you wanted, but no snuba on this trip.  😔  After whale watching and snorkeling they fed us and we got drinks too.  Great time and would high

reviews.author: Deborah Newkirk
reviews.text:
Amazing experience! Crew and captain were very knowledgeable and accommodating. Ship was new and very clean. Easy access on and off the deck. They supplied quality snorkel gear, fins, wet suit jackets and noodle floaties. We didn’t have to worry about a thing. They even had warm fresh water showers to rinse off on!! Top notch style!! Food was also cooked well and presented beautifully. Drinks were yummy as well.
We saw an abundance of Humpback whales, turtles and beautiful fish.
Highly recommend

reviews.author: John Russo
reviews.text: We booked the Pride of Maui luxury snorkel tour this week and I can say the trip certainly lived up to the name. The Captain was personable and professional sharing his knowledge of the are with us all. Took us to two spots that were very nice with calm waters for us to enjoy. The crew was also very knowledgeable and very  attentive to all of our needs. We would certainly book this trip again without hesitation.

reviews.author: Rachel M
reviews.text: Was okay, I don’t think I’d do it again for how expensive it was.  The weather/waves were bad so we only drove past the crater and did not snorkel  (I know that isn’t their fault) but otherwise it was just a very long boat ride to another random snorkel area that we could have just driven a few minutes to.  We still had a good time but don’t think it was worth the price, personally.

reviews.author: ahastedt
reviews.text: Great staff and captain. Took us to the molokini crater and provided an amazing lunch also!

reviews.author: disconnnectc
reviews.text: Went on this tour with my teenage daughter and it was great. Super clean boat, really good food, fun and professional environment. The Crew is knowledgeable and it's all easy to manage. It's a 2fer because you can see whales and snorkel. Don't hesitate! TIP: Bring binoculars so you can see the whales. Since it starts so early you have all day!!! Great day!

reviews.author: P3563YKrichardc
reviews.text: Incredibly friendly and helpful staff. Didn’t matter if it was your first time snorkeling or well experienced,  they made it a worthwhile and memorable experience for everyone, A nice boat, good equipment, delicious lunch.  In addition to snorkeling, the whale watching was an unexpected plus.  The QR code for parking on the dock didn’t work- no problem- was able to scan and pay on the boat.  This was an outstanding excursion- family oriented and for everyone regardless of age or  skill.  Highly

reviews.author: S5514JTpatrickc
reviews.text: Good but did not make it to Molokini. Very nice crew. Captain decided there was too much wind blowing into crater. Saw lots of whales and snorkeled in 2 other fairly good areas. Saw turtles.

reviews.author: Ashley T
reviews.text: Beautiful day on the water with Maui Magic. Very friendly and helpful crew. Captain was very informative,along with 2 mates. Breakfast and lunch were excellent. With two stops I saw octopus, turtle, mana ray, along with beautiful fish. Multiple whale sightings. I recommend this excursion with a group or Solo!

reviews.author: Melinda J
reviews.text: Perfect amount of time, amazing crew, one fun surprise after another. We were really impressed! We stopped for whales, in addition to snorkeling. You could upgrade to snuba, buy photos, or rent underwater cameras, but that was all optional. At Molokini, they offered float belts, wet suits, flippers and masks, and even floating platforms with a window for little kids. There was a slide into the water, as well as 3 ladders, so there was no waiting to get into the water. The glass bottom was clear

reviews.author: amysI3957FX
reviews.text: We had an excellent excursion to Molokini on Four Winds III.  The boat is new and beautiful, including lots of seating, shade, a slide, and of course the underwater viewing window. The snorkeling gear worked well and we rented wetsuit tops for $10.  They had free flotation belts, boogie boards, and even sea boards that you could float on with a viewing window if you did not want to put your face in the water.  They did a snorkeling lesson for new snorkelers and had staff in the water to help out

reviews.author: fsdukejr
reviews.text: We have snorkeld at Molokini  many times before. This was one of the most comfortable boats because they did not stuff it and there was plenty of space for ourselves and our gear.  Everyone ha lots of room. On the way out it turned into a whale watch as a huge humpback swam under the boat multiple times and surfaced beside us. The captain had to shut off the engines until it left. Everyone got great pictures of this unlikely event. The crew were very helpful and provided great service throughout

reviews.author: S5949FHmiker
reviews.text: Great trip!  Morning snorkeling and whale watching. Ship was very clean, crew was very attentive and friendly, food was tasty, snorkeling was great AND, had a juvenile male whale play with the ship!  Passed under the vessel several times when we stopped.

reviews.author: karengN2593DB
reviews.text:
I went on this boat snorkel tour by myself to the Coral Gardens near Olowalu and had a very solid experience.

The crew was professional and organized, and we had a generous amount of time in the water, about 1 hour and 15 minutes. I rented a wetsuit vest from them because I had forgotten my own wetsuit, and I strongly recommend doing this. For $10, it made a noticeable difference in comfort and allowed me to stay in the water longer.

The Coral Gardens were in good condition, with a nice mix of

reviews.author: 694beverlyd
reviews.text: Took the morning snorkel tour which included whale watching and also breakfast and lunch. The boat, staff, and equipment were all excellent. The food and drinks were delicious too!

reviews.author: D9453KPshannonm
reviews.text: We had a perfect day for our afternoon tour! The boat is beautiful and well cared for. Plenty of room for everyone and no cramming in. The staff was fantastic and every need was taken care of. Beautiful snorkeling, amazing lunch, and we saw so many whales! It was crazy! I can’t think of anything that would’ve made the day better. Thanks so much for a great experience!

reviews.author: melaniemY2512ZF
reviews.text: Just got back from the most amazing morning with Four Winds Maui. I did the 5hr Molikini snorkeling trip and can’t say enough good about the whole trip. The crew were phenomenal Capt Jenna was wonderful keeping us informed about our trip, putting safety first and spotting so many whales!🐋 Elenie really made the trip for me teaching snuba and taking me underwater for the first time. 🤿 we saw a lot of different fish and coral. 🐠🐟🪸 Jessie, Noemi, Richard, and Pete rounded out the great times w

reviews.author: jeffreymD3390TE
reviews.text: Very friendly staff, great freshly prepared breakfast and lunch!  Lots of whale sightings in route to Molokini where the clear waters provided excellent snorkeling amongst abundant coral fish.  Stop at turtle cove provided for up close encounters with the green sea turtles.  Fantastic trip

reviews.author: dlad1703
reviews.text: Fabulous!   The fish we saw were beautiful.  The staff were friendly, helpful, and knowledgeable.   The crater had an amazing variety of fish.  Angel fish, tangs, puffer fish, baby black tip shark, and rainbow fish to name a few.  The whales we saw were definitely putting on a show!  Also the breakfast and the lunch were perfect.

reviews.author: Meander482257
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed this outing. Check in was easy and the entire day went off without a hitch. The crew was very professional, the boat and equipment was in good repair and comfortable, and the food was good (even if boat buffets kind of gross me out a bit.)  we also saw many whales. Very cool and the staff shared some great information to educate us. 

A couple of tips: complete the waiver before you go. Check in will be much quicker. Stake out some seats above quickly. These fill up. We rented

reviews.author: prituls2025
reviews.text: Extremely well organized, and every crew member made us feel comfortable throughout the entire trip. They also guided us through our first-ever snorkeling experience.

reviews.author: John B
reviews.text: Perfect boat for a family. The glass bottom is awesome for little ones that are not ready for the water. The crater was perfect and we got to see whales on the way back. Crew was very helpful and friendly.

reviews.author: rebeccae10111985
reviews.text: My wife and I took this trip, and thoroughly enjoyed it. The snorkeling was great, but we were most impressed by the quality of the crew, and their patience, friendliness, and professionalism. The food and drink options were generous. The boat was clean and well designed for seating in multiple  places and the activities of the trip.

reviews.author: Brad Grandy
reviews.text: Crew was first rate. Very attentive and helpful. Had a lot of gear for younger kids. Food was surprisingly good.  Really enjoyed our trip out to the crater. Even saw some whales

reviews.author: Sean Harrington
reviews.text: Amazing staff but if it is known before departure there will be zero chance of going to the crater that should be noted to guests for a potential refund. As others have noted the coral gardens were pretty barren for this kind of paid voyage.

reviews.author: Jessica Ouwerkerk
reviews.text: There were some aspects of this experience that were not exactly as expected, but the crew was fantastic and the whale watching absolutely saved the day on an otherwise dreary day at sea. I’ll never forget seeing the whales breaching and popping their heads up 5 feet off our boat- incredible!

reviews.author: chris mccusker
reviews.text: Even on bad day they found us a beautiful spot💪

reviews.author: Reeta Shandil
reviews.text:
We recently did a snorkelling tour with Four Winds to Molokini and it was amazing! The team is absolutely wonderful. They were attentive and kept a close eye on all participants.
They had tons of options for all levels including floaters, vests, bands, boards and even a glass bottom area if participants did not want to go in the water.
The food was also great. There were options for everyone.
The boat was large, very clean and my son (for the first time) did not get motion sickness!
I highly rec

reviews.author: Jennifer W.
reviews.text:
Our snorkeling trip on the Four Winds was still an amazing experience, even with the challenging weather conditions the island has been having. While we didn’t see as much ocean life while snorkeling as we had hoped, it was completely understandable and certainly not a reflection of the crew or the trip itself.

The boat was incredibly well maintained and spotless, which made the entire experience comfortable and enjoyable from start to finish. What truly made the trip special, though, was the c

reviews.author: A Guppy
reviews.text:
AWESOME tour and the snooba man was top tier. The photographer was also phenomenal!
Thank you to all from a bunch of albertans ! 🇨🇦

reviews.author: Blake Stalheim
reviews.text: We had a really great time even considering it rained pretty good for the last half of it. Plus seeing some whales is never a bad thing.

reviews.author: Brian Connolly
reviews.text: I have been on (roughly) 300 boat trips. I've lived on a boat. So, I'm fairly discerning when taking a snorkel cruise. I took the Four Wiinds III snorkel cruise with my 16yr old last week, and it was Great. The Whole Crew were helpful and professional. In particular, Captain Jenna was stellar. Informative - without droning; observant - which is critical for a captain, and pleasant as well. Highly recommended. Oh, and the food was delicious too.

reviews.author: Sadie H.
reviews.text: We were told Four Winds was the best choice for taking kids out on a cruise in Maui and after going out with them we couldn't agree more! The crew was awesome! The food was fantastic (better than the fancy restaurant at the Four Seasons). The crew were all so patient and helpful at the snorkel spot, the clear floats enabled the ancious kid to get out on the water and the clear window down below was a lifesaver for the little ones to watch their parent snorkel by and of course the amazing fish an

reviews.author: Susan Keenan
reviews.text:
We would have given you 10 stars ⭐️ It was an incredible experience and we hope to be back in the near future! The staff were attentive and provided  a first rate customer experience 🥰 it was a day full of gratitude and so much laughter - the whales were magnificent and the snorkeling & slide provided for spectacular memories!!! (International Women’s Day)
Our only recommendation is that the photographer was not very professional and only 1 group photo was taken - we are happy about cell phone

reviews.author: Adam Frank
reviews.text: Wife and I booked the AM Molokini Crater snorkeling tour, communication and info was great, the entire crew was helpful and full of information. Captain was great, we ended up getting some bonus whale watching as he stopped the boat several times for everyone to see and even hear the whales on an underwater microphone. We were served a nice light breakfast and a great lunch right on the boat. One of the crew does some underwater photos/videos that you can purchase for a very reasonable price. I

reviews.author: bhavna yasas
reviews.text:
Had an amazing afternoon with the Four winds whale watching and snorkelling tours!
What a way to end our stay here in Maui- Naomi and Jessie were awesome and especially patient as I don’t swim.
They patiently helped me out and got me into the water snorkelling twice!
The cherry on the top was the awesome whale watching - thanks to Cap Kiwini and his awesome crew for an unforgettable experience!
Hope to visit again sometime! Mahalo 🙏🏽

reviews.author: Chris Boeholt
reviews.text: The crew on this boat takes the trip from great to exceptional.  I couldn't have asked for a better snorkeling tour of the crater, and my 11 and 8 year old girls haven't stopped talking about it.  Thank you for your patience and professionalism.  This is a beautiful location with plenty of tour boats, but I've never seen a crew work so smoothly and diligently to maximize the experience for every customer.  Thanks again, and well done.  We'll be back!

reviews.author: Renae Tieman
reviews.text: The crew was FANTASTIC. Words cannot describe how AMAZING these guys were. I have NEVER snorkeled in my life and am NOT a good swimmer at all, while my husband is a regular. They took the time with me to guide me and accommodate my needs without making me feel inadequate. They were AWESOME at finding the whales, the captain was an AMAZING sailor (I get seasick on docks and had no issues! *I did do some preparation but still not even queasiness). They were so friendly and went above and beyond to

reviews.author: Tracy
reviews.text: Great snorkeling tour but was disappointed we only went to one snorkeling spot.  We had plenty of time to do two and the weather was good.   Other than that, great, helpful staff, not a giant boat so not tons of people.

reviews.author: Maegan Reid
reviews.text: Everything about this boat was wonderful. The crew was super kind and accommodating. The food was delicious. The snorkeling was amazing and we even got to see a baby whale and its mother preaching on the way back. Super accommodating for my 6 year old with the floating device and my baby loved the glass bottom. I definitely recommend and can’t wait to come back.

reviews.author: M. Kroetch
reviews.text: The Four Winds was beyond our expectations with delicious food, knowledgeable, fun, and helpful crew and lots of added value to our experience with stops for whale sightings, listening to the whales and even little tattoos for the kids towards the end of the trip. Our kids were never bored and we felt very safe putting them in the water with the crew helping set us up for success with a brief snorkel class which was a big help to our 6 year old and they knew exactly the right sizes for everyone

reviews.author: Kenneth Law
reviews.text:
Our family had an awesome time, went with our 6 and 2 year old. The crew was super friendly, they provided us with all the gears for snorkeling. Our 2 year old didn't end up going in but the 6 year old had a blast. Definitely recommend renting the wetsuit.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Chris Davis
reviews.text: My son and I did the snuba option and loved it.  We will do it again.

reviews.author: TVideo
reviews.text: It was windy enough that they should have cancelled or offered to reschedule us. We bought the sunset whale watching trip since many years ago we loved seeing whales in the area, but there was zero effort given to finding any whales. No mention of whales, no "naturalist" on board. We sailed over to the cliffs by the highway and tucked into a cove for snacks, then turned around and headed back for the harbor. The sun set a little after 6:30 when we were already back at the dock.

reviews.author: traveler5005
reviews.text: I was here the week of and just after Kona 2 storm.  I booked the the tour to Lanai trip. Weather necessitated a late departure and slightly earlier return and skipping the snorkeling portion.  The company was up front about this and offered us an option for a refund or to reschedule the day before departure.  I am glad I went. I got to see La’nai.  The Chanel crossing between the islands was extremely choppy. On the return it was a good 40 minutes of 10’ to 16’ rollers. It was intense. Call it

reviews.author: maymary20
reviews.text: We were on the Lana’i trip yesterday Tues. after the weekend storm. Captain Mark did an amazing job of driving the boat to keep us dry & while the weather wasn’t ideal we still saw  a wonderful whale breach, dolphins, & a large manta ray ! Thank you to the polite & kind crew that  served us delightfully😊

reviews.author: ahne8
reviews.text: Wow! This company has it down. I have been on so many boat tours throughout Hawaii and the Caribbean and have never had such an organized and care-free experience. From getting onto the boat, to the service, to serving lunch, they had it all under control. We had a fantastic day and would go again in a heartbeat.

reviews.author: BeccaPuste
reviews.text: We had the best day with this fabulously fun crew!  They were knowledgeable, helpful and always kept it fun!  The snorkeling stop was amazing at the island - the sea turtle stop was fun!! The whale watching was magical. The food was outstanding - great breakfast - homemade salsa and the lunch was perfection. I didn't have the ice cream but heard it was great.  Amazing facilities. Plenty of room for all. A memory I will cherish  very very memorable unique experience!! Thank you to the trilogy tea

reviews.author: barneysbeans
reviews.text:
This sunset dinner and whale watching trip was the highlight of our 2 weeks in Maui. 
We sailed out of Maalaea Harbour on a lovely evening in a beautiful catamaran piloted by Captain Sierra and accompanied by a lovely crew of young ladies, who acted as deckhands, barmaids, waitresses and amateur whaie experts. Lots of space to sit with a much smaller group than I had expected. No overcrowding as in many other boats that we had seen. 
There were plenty of whale encounters and a very generous 5 co

reviews.author: T3390OIsuem
reviews.text: Hands down the best day ever!! Captain Brian and crew were fantastic and they took such great care of us! The 2 snorkeling sites were fantastic and my son's Snuba experience beyond compare! So fun having an underwater photographer capture the fun! Food out of this world delicious too! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Maukala
reviews.text: Best whale watching trip on Maui! Great captain and crew, Raquel and Chris driving and keeping us and the whales safe, and Justin serving the super food and drinks, which were complimentary on this trip. They were all professional, funny, kind, and all full of aloha, which is always appreciated. We found some active jumping and slapping whales and enjoyed a lovely couple of hours on the water. We had an easy launch and landing on the beach and even saw a sea turtle as we left. The only downer wa

reviews.author: GoPlaces66418734466
reviews.text: Trilogy 1 was captained by a very experienced blue-water sailor, the personable Katie.  Crew were Tiger, Clay, Zach with young newcomer, Becca.  I chatted with all of them and found them friendly and welcoming.  This must be a well run business since all have been with Trilogy for around 10+ years and seemed happy.  Crew are not floating waiters.  They are experienced in and around the boat and water, familiar with equipment, with Maui and all of the sea life you will encounter.  The Catamaran h

reviews.author: L7359HHnicoled
reviews.text: We had two trips with trilogy during our week in Maui. The first was Discover Lana’i, the second was a sunset whale watch. Both were INCREDIBLE. Our trip to Lana’i was on one of the windiest days, and the ocean was pretty crazy. We were still able to see a bunch of whales, and saw a pod of dolphins in the bay. Captain Katie was so good and so knowledgeable. The lunch on Lana’i was so good. The rest of the crew was fantastic (Zach, Harrison, photographer Sam). Captain Mark on the sunset whale wat

reviews.author: jobeyonekenobe
reviews.text: This review is 12 months in the making to get my words and thoughts across ( plus busy work schedule) Captain Riley of Trilogy Boat Company, Captain, Seaman, Host, Honouree of the Congressional Medal of Honor Society for Bravery exhibited by him and his crew during a rescue of survivors during to Lahaina conflagration, humble man and just all round good bloke! - Will be you leader if you’re lucky enough to be on one of his boats trips on Trilogy. I suspect as he’s third generation Trilogy owner

reviews.author: NYTravelingAddict
reviews.text:
We loved all our Trilogy whale watching trips! We went on 3 during our vacation. It was really nice that a lot of seats had little tables with cup holders. I wish the bench in front of the netting did too, but that's because I was trying to balance my kids' food and drinks in one hand while holding a camera in the other.

The staff was really on top of everything. They make sure you're fed, have drinks and are comfortable. They're knowledgeable, friendly and somehow everyone is funny and kept us

reviews.author: L5193SCwilliamn
reviews.text: This is my second trip with this company and it rocked! Both times I went on their "discover Lani excursion "...Both were great ! Super professional crew. They texted step by step instructions on what to expect.  We not only had a freshly prepared BBQ lunch, but had numerous tasty snacks on the boat! Saw some whales and learned a little bit about Hawiian history.  If you're heading to Maui, it's definitely worth your time to take a trip with them! Mahalo  TRILOGY for the great experiences!

reviews.author: Kathy A
reviews.text: Always a wonderful time with Trilogy!  The crew was great shout out to Mark and his team (I hope you win the toaster 😁), we were so lucky to see mother and calf pairs and a baby breech.  Drinks, food, scenery oh my!  What a wonderful sunset cruise

reviews.author: hyfurukawa808
reviews.text: Whale watching with Trilogy Excursions is a great experience. The two-hour trip let us see numerous whales - moms and babies (which are so cute and frisky!) The crew - captain Amanda, Clay and Catherine (?) - are friendly, knowledgeable, and service-focused. Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: NotFarAway
reviews.text: Took a catamaran tour to Lana’i with Trilogy from Maalea. Incredible trip!  Saw whales, wonderful private beach for snorkeling, great food.  The best part was the crew.  Zach, Zach and Chris did it all.  Ran the boat, fed us well, told us stories of the islands, got us outfitted at the beach, were our lifeguards and snuba guide, bartended and got us home safely.  They really made the day.  This is our fifth time using this company over several years and they continue to be the highest quality ou

reviews.author: 513gorda
reviews.text: First rate experience on excursion to Lanai. Great food, awesome service and so many staff to help you get safely in and out of the water on Lanai. They left nothing wanting. Snorkeling was good, saw whales and spinner dolphins. Boat was very clean and staff friendly.

reviews.author: 920stevenh
reviews.text: Excellent day and loved every minute of our day with Trilogy 5 crew.  Attention to detail and making our day special.  Thanks Captain Nick and crew!!!

reviews.author: Olivia B
reviews.text: We had an AMAZING time! The crew were extremely knowledgeable, friendly, and attentive. One member (Clay) was very accommodating towards my dietary needs. Everyone went above and beyond. Food was great and everything was organized. Harrison told us lots of info, Captain Nick was great, and the bartender was friendly.

reviews.author: I1573PIalans
reviews.text: My wife and I want to commend the crew of the Trilogy and especially Captain Mark who went out of his way to assist us in re-scheduling our trip to a later date because of rough seas.  Mark is very personable with a good sense of humor and provided a nice narration of the trip including a history of the company.  We were able to view whales and dolphins and he stopped the ship for us to observe them.  I also want to commend crew member Zack for his attentiveness and help.  I first sailed with Tr

reviews.author: Sal Pena
reviews.text: Great day next time we will book two whole days!!! Crew was great and lunch was awesome. Saw lots of turtles 😍

reviews.author: Cyndi Kleinhans
reviews.text: Captain Turtle and his crew were fantastic. A wonderful experience!

reviews.author: N K
reviews.text:
If not this, then what is a 5-star experience?
We did a 5-hour snorkeling excursion to Molokini and had an amazing time. Both breakfast and lunch were delicious, and I especially appreciated that lunch was on the healthier side.

The staff were professional, attentive, and very safety-focused. I was a bit anxious about snorkeling since I’m not a strong swimmer, but their seriousness about safety really reassured me and made the experience enjoyable.

The boat was not overcrowded, which made a bi

reviews.author: luke schmid
reviews.text: Very friendly staff. Great food, drinks and an amazing sunset with plenty of whales

reviews.author: Jeri Hampton
reviews.text: We just returned from our Molokini excursion with Trilogy. What a fun day! The crew was amazing and Captain Brian was so much fun. The food they served was top notch. We went to Molokini one other time with a different boat company. We thought that Trilogy was a way better experience. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Rhonni Kowalski
reviews.text: Best whale watching experience! Best boats, boats crew, would give more stars if I could!

reviews.author: Brenda Blaisdell
reviews.text: Hands down the best snorkeling experience I've ever had! The crew is awesome and are a well oiled machine! Jason was awesome at calming my nerves for the snuba I tried for the frist time. Food, dessert and overall experience was amazing. They think of everything, including,  water, drinks, ginger ale, sunscreen that is better for ocean and dramamine for motion sickness! Don't book with anyone else but Trilogy!

reviews.author: Nolenator85
reviews.text: The Trilogy Discover Lana’i tour far exceeded expectations.  The catamaran was clean and comfortable and had plenty of space for all of the passengers. The captain and crew were absolutely delightful. They accommodated my dietary restrictions easily and I felt very confident in how they handled everything.  Everyone was great with our 3 young kiddos and made them feel comfortable and included and gave them such a great experience.  It was a perfect way to end our trip.  I would come back to Maui

reviews.author: Marc Shepard
reviews.text: Everything was great. Tropical fish, sea turtles, a ray and a small shark were the highlights. The hot lunch, mai tais and beer were amazing. Great crew.

reviews.author: nic groth
reviews.text: Great crews! Amazing experience with Trilogy. They really take care of you with food, drinks for all ages, and snorkel time.

reviews.author: Diarmada Seaimpín
reviews.text: Fun trip, lots of whales

reviews.author: Stacy Hillock
reviews.text: We had an INCREDIBLE experience snorkeling with Trilogy! They were fun, informative, professional, and hospitable. They have a 5 star rating for a reason. It was our first time with them but many others on the boat said they’ve been snorkeling with them for 10+ years. It’s pricey but it’s a beautiful 5 hour experience that is well-worth the money. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Sheridan Peters
reviews.text: Great service, great conversations, great people! Captain Turtle and crew made sure our experience was the best, reccomend to anybody. Meals 10/10 too!

reviews.author: Michael Cantwell
reviews.text: I was coerced into a 5 star review because they provided me with great service, a good view of whales, and excellent food and drinks.

reviews.author: Meg Frankovis
reviews.text: Our group of 9 went on the Discover Lanai snorkel tour. Our trip was planned shortly after some very severe rains on Maui which made swimming on most beaches unsafe. Trilogy did a fantastic job modifying the trip and finding an alternate safe location to snorkel. The experience on the boat, snorkeling, and lunch were all top notch. This trip was fun for the teens and adults in our group. I would highly recommend this Maui experience with Trilogy

reviews.author: Jackie Hanna
reviews.text: Couldn’t have asked for a better experience

reviews.author: Anjali Casey
reviews.text: Great trip - loved the staff and the boat was new and really clean

reviews.author: Carolyn Patterson
reviews.text: Our dinner sail on Trilogy II was superb!  The boat was beautiful and the crew was skilled, knowledgeable and friendly. The 5 course meal exceeded our expectations. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Lynn Bewley
reviews.text: 1st whale watching excursion since coming to Maui for the last 25 yrs! Trilogy was amazing Captain Katie knew what she was doing and where to take us. We saw so many whales! Thanks to the crew that took pics, served drinks and food. Definitely a good time and very nice catamaran.

reviews.author: TrevorI17
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing time sailing the Pacific, whale watching, dolphin chasing, and snorkeling. The staff was incredibly kind, helpful and wonderful in every way. The food on board was world class, literally best muffins I've ever eaten! The boat was not overcrowded and the atmosphere was always upbeat and fun. Great for families of all ages although probably best for kids over 10 as the snorkeling is a little intensive. We were out for over 5 hours. What a deal for the price!

reviews.author: domenicomY5871JP
reviews.text:
Captain Brandon was very professional and approachable. Mixed history, geography, and biology lessons into the entertaining commentary. 
Mates Joe and Kins (sp?) were courteous and quick to make the experience enjoyable. Thanks for a great time. Oh yeah, and we got to see whales!!

reviews.author: Julie051678
reviews.text: Firstly, the staff was a 10!!!! They made our trip fun and safe and educational!!! We were a group ranging from 3 years old to 63 years old and we all had a blast!!!!

reviews.author: Navigate30355764927
reviews.text: Crew was great and we got to see several whales!

reviews.author: bethanyr771
reviews.text: Great crew, awesome experience!

reviews.author: Greg F
reviews.text: Amazing trip!  Views spectacular, whales incredible and captain and crew friendly, knowledgeable and engaging.  I HIGHLY recommend this for ALL!!

reviews.author: 945cassieg
reviews.text: Unreal experience. Crew was incredibly knowledgeable and friendly. I’d do this every year we come here! I cannot recommend this tour, Sail Maui, and the crew we had enough!

reviews.author: kathrynbO6441YA
reviews.text:
Not listed for Sail Maui, but it was actually the Akialoa Sunset Sail 

The crew were exceptional…Captain Geoffrey from Franceland, and mates, Kanes & another busy sailor. I can tell you that after all passengers zoomed topside to view not 1, but 7 Humpbacks, the unnamed crewman mopped up a kids spilled soda, coating the galley floor, and rinsed the sticky liquid off customer’s flip flops.

The snacks and cocktails were hot, good and plenty. Captain pleased all, matching music to the crowd, assi

reviews.author: ashaa572
reviews.text:
Excellent Service!!
Very delicious food five star !!!
The best trip with Stunning Sunset !
My family and I are rejuvenated and energized. Building lasting memories and family bonding time . 
Will go again !
Maui Dreams do come True !

reviews.author: jillywiz7
reviews.text: My sister and I loved our Morning Whale Watch.  We have not been able to sail out of Lahaina Harbor before and we were happy to see that the harbor was back open.  We saw lots of whales and quite a few whales breaching near the boat!  The guides were very informative and happy to answer any questions.  This is our second time sailing with Sail Maui and we will definitely sail with them again.

reviews.author: 925robbp
reviews.text: Had an amazing experience.  The catamaran was so much fun and so relaxing.  We were able to see several whales which was truly amazing to see up close.  The Captain and crew were so great.  This was one of the highlights of our Maui vacation.  Loved being able to support the businesses in Lahaina.  Would highly recommend this excursion.

reviews.author: Lazuka
reviews.text:
As a Maui resident who has been on many whale watches and ocean excursions over the years, I can honestly say that Sail Maui’s Akiola is my absolute favorite. Every trip is beautiful, but this last outing was one of the best yet. We saw an incredible number of whales, and the entire experience felt special from start to finish. On top of that, it’s an excellent value and one of the best whale watch experiences on Maui for the price. Even if you don’t see whales, the trip is still worth taking.
C

reviews.author: amikem
reviews.text:
Took the Sunset on Akialoa out of Maalaea in February 9 trips and 9 trips this March. We scheduled for more dates but the weather made for cancellations. 
The trips were well done because of the great Captains, Geoffrey and Brandon, and the stellar work by the crew- Jantien, AJ, Jen, Ollie, Tam/Kim, Nate, Braxton and Joey and I believe there are a couple others. Everyone works hard to make these trips possible and they work long hours everyday.  Thank you to the reservations staff that worked ha

reviews.author: Adventurer801719
reviews.text:
The best snorkeling trip ever
Whales turtles everywhere!!!
Dustin was a great host!!!

reviews.author: Roam47129506899
reviews.text:
I can’t tell you how special our trip was last night.  The weather, flat water, clear mauna, whales all about.  While we didn’t happen to see any dramatic aerials, the entire vibe for the night was so good.  Something about all of the people… First your crew, Branden, Kelz & Joey.  💯guest focused.  They spent time talking to and teaching all the kids about whales. We witnessed them teaching the kids to love whales and learn about the importance of preserving their environments.  All while
atten

reviews.author: Camper35912782887
reviews.text: Captain Brandon and his crew were great! Jen, nate and the rest(sorry I forgot their names) were so attentive and helpful. We would definitely return!

reviews.author: Dreamer512336
reviews.text: We loved this sunset cruise so much we went a second night and it did not disappoint.  In fact we had more whale activity and probably some of the best crew possible.  Capt. Brandon, AJ, Jen an and Nate took such great care of us and were full of great knowledge about the area and whales.  We will do this again each time we’re back to Maui, loved it.

reviews.author: Channing B
reviews.text:
Captain Ciro & Jess (from Nebraska) were great hosts for our Saturday, March 7th Lahaina Community Whale Watch.  Mahalo to Sail Maui for caring enough about our Lahaina Community for setting up this free cruise.

From the time we checked in, we were treated like family, separated from the visitors cruise, and led on a sail that was relaxing, personal and very much different, in a great way, from a normal Whale Watch. Both crew and passengers were respectful and thankful for Sail Maui’s hookups.

reviews.author: buckylady
reviews.text: Great experience. Friendly crew. Knowledgeable.  Saw whales up close.

reviews.author: J7020KHpaulas
reviews.text: We sailed with captain Brandon, and his crew, Braxton, AJ and Joe on March 4th. This was by far one of our favorite excursions on Maui. The crew was great, we felt like they were truly in tune with the guests. It was a little cold that morning and when the crew noticed everyone was done snorkeling because it was chilly they redirected and we went whale watching. They had tremendous knowledge of the whales and behavior, especially AJ, who even pulled out a water microphone so we could listen to t

reviews.author: Kathy Kilbourn
reviews.text: Crew was excellent! Captain found lots of whales and scenery beautiful! We would do it again!! Great whale watching trip!

reviews.author: Matt Jereczek
reviews.text: Great whale watching trip with Captain Brandon, Joe and Kenzie! Got to hang out with a mama and baby whale. The crew was amazing 🤩

reviews.author: lance goldstein
reviews.text: Great day and great crew!

reviews.author: Janice Stanley
reviews.text: We had a wonderful time on a whale watching tour! Captain Brandon, Braxton, Jen, & Nate were a phenomenal crew. We saw a TON of whales and we even got to see some dolphins! We felt very lucky.  Highly recommend these folks!

reviews.author: Angie Affolter
reviews.text: Had a great time whale watching tour with Sail Maui!  They worked hard to make sure we got see several whales.

reviews.author: Ron & Mary Simon
reviews.text:
Very good experience.
Family of 13, age 2 to 80.
All had a great time

reviews.author: Tim Anaka
reviews.text: I did the Lanai tour and it was great.  Even with the wind that started to pick up, Captain Kevin found us a secluded cove for snorkeling.  Shout out to Bryce, AJ, and Jess who were attentive to and chatted with the guests.

reviews.author: Samantha R
reviews.text: We booked last minute since our other whale watching tour was canceled a few days before. We had a wonderful whale tour on the boat which also ended up being a booze cruise! The sights were great and they kept the drinks flowing. It was not over packed like the other boats which was nice. And crew was extremely friendly and great to talk to. We would sail with them again!

reviews.author: Patrick Clarke
reviews.text: Jess and Bryce were awesome. The captain took us straight to see the whales. Good food. Good times. Definitely recommend

reviews.author: Kellie Craig
reviews.text: Took our family out for whale watching and had the BEST time. The crew was so kind and knowledgeable and the boat had tons of room to move around, tons of options for places to sit (check out the back of the boat for the bench when it's hot or the galley for shade). The fruit was delicious snacks were amazing. Drinks were flowing the SECOND the boat was leaving and the whales put on a show! Such an amazing time! 10/10 recommend and make sure to go around sunset so the vibes are top tier! Thank y

reviews.author: Angie Craig
reviews.text: We had a great time on Sail Maui. I have three children that joined us on the boat, and the staff and captain was so accommodating, friendly, and knowledgeable. We all had a great time, and my boys even got to sit in the captains chair for a minute!

reviews.author: Seth McClure
reviews.text: These guys are awesome. Great boat, fun staff, wonderful food, and all the Maui Brewing Co beers you can drink. We really enjoyed our day out. Next time we're in Maui (which will hopefully be soon) we'll book with Saul Maui again.

reviews.author: Lyndel Melton
reviews.text: Crew were friendly, knowledgeable and helpful.  Captain Chloe got us in a great position to view a large pod of whales.  Comfortable boat and a nice number of guests that allowed for easy viewing.  Highly recommend Sail Maui!

reviews.author: Sean Patrick
reviews.text: It was ana amazing experience and the crew was top notch and just absolutely a delight than you

reviews.author: Amy Courneya
reviews.text: The staff and the boat were fabulous!  Open bar and appetizers were almost as good as the whales and sunset that night!  Definitely will do again when we return

reviews.author: Henry Garcia
reviews.text: Jan Tien was amazing!  She showed us around, took great care of us and kept us satiated.

reviews.author: Emily Paul
reviews.text: Top notch crew, boat, and overall experience. We found out about Sail Maui through HVG on YouTube and what a blessing that we did. We could not have asked for a better time. I especially love that they didnt pack their boat with people like the other tours do, made for a much better experience. Thank you Sail Maui!

reviews.author: Tayler Gudmestad
reviews.text: Brandon, Kenz, Birthday Joe, and AJ were an awesome crew!! Despite the rain we had an incredible time. I highly recommend Sail Maui and their awesome staff to anyone!! Highlight of our trip.

reviews.author: Linh D
reviews.text:
Our family had an amazing time!
Crystal clear waters, dozens of different reef fishes, friendly and happy crew.
We even saw spinner dolphins!  No whales or sharks.
My husband and I did SNUBU, first time, would definitely do again because it gave us a much better view of the wildlife.

reviews.author: Barbara D
reviews.text: Can't recommend Fairwinds enough! This is the 4th snorkel cruise we've taken with them in a decade. We always come back. Staff is courteous, friendly and all around good people. Boat is in great condition, bathrooms are nice. Not only did we go to Capt Cook for amazing snorkeling, they were in contact with the Hula Kai who let them know where some "dorsal fins" were spotted. We found a pod of spinner dolphins and had fun "racing" some bottle nose Dolphins. Food was great too (I was skeptical abo

reviews.author: saradG93GD
reviews.text: I came to Kona specifically for the Mantas so I researched loads of Manta Tours before choosing this one. After booking numerous locals told me I had booked the right one. It was professional and easy to find. They provide all snorkeling gear & wetsuits and all of the staff were cheerful and kind. Theres a private waiting area with a gift shop with plenty of souvenirs. The check in was quick and easy and the boat ride was about 10min. It took longer for the safety briefing than it did to get to

reviews.author: Chris G
reviews.text: Great experience!  Friendly staff, beautiful location and I would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kimberly H
reviews.text: This our second time doing the snorkeling experience- we have had a fantastic time every time! The crew is friendly and knowledgeable and the food delicious— and the snorkeling always a pleasure:) kids enjoyed the slides and high jump- thanks again!

reviews.author: I2984OQroseb
reviews.text: The experience was great but the allotted time for snorkeling was too short.  Need to add 30 minutes, so that everyone could enjoy the slides.  The hummus and sweet potato chips were delicious.

reviews.author: ErinD141
reviews.text: We had an AMAZING time snorkeling as a family. The whole experience with all the Fair Wind staff was exceptional. Highly recommend booking a tour with them!

reviews.author: 683alyseh
reviews.text: Fantastic crew and captain! Very professional and had a great time. Our child easily navigated the snorkeling plus loved the slides and boat jump.

reviews.author: lynneruns
reviews.text: This was one of the highlights of our Big Island vacation. The staff was super friendly, and very patient with people who were inexperienced at snorkeling. They offer options for people of all experience levels, from view boxes for those who are hesitant to even stick their face in the water, to float equipment for fun or comfort, all the way up to Snuba for those feeling more adventurous. The location at Kealakekua Bay is fantastic, and the trip to the bay is rewarding in itself. On our trip we

reviews.author: jessemN9145AX
reviews.text: We had such a good time aboard the Hula Kai with our party of 5. The food was delicious!! Because we avoid single-use plastic, we usually have to bring our own cups and utensils, so it was so nice to just show up knowing they supply all reusable foodware. The staff was friendly, the snorkeling was lovely, and we had so much fun speeding through the wind and getting sprayed.

reviews.author: Meander784539
reviews.text:
Breakfast Fabulous, lunch Wonderful,
Snorkeling Fantastic, Watching Fish Was Fantastic With Dolphins,Coral,Lots and lots of fish, spring water is cold Captian Cook Monument viewing.
Thanks Fair Wind!!!

reviews.author: Dream450042
reviews.text: Our Kona Coast Snorkel tour was a great experience.  It was a nice relaxing tour along the coast searching for marine mammals while being served beverages and breakfast on the way to our first snorkel location (chosen for the best conditions for the particular day).  We were treated to dolphin sightings at least 3 times.  Spinner dolphins doing their thing - spinning out of the water.  We were served lunch before our second snorkel at the Captain Cook memorial.  Lastly, another relaxing cruise b

reviews.author: pmckeow
reviews.text: This is the BEST Snorkle tour. All the providers have great tours. What makes this tour stand out is the boat and how they moor . You are sitting on top of fish galore! The dolphins came to play, not only out from the shore but right beside the boat. In addition the boat has easy access to the water,  slides and diving platforms plus inner tubes for playing. The captain and crew were exceptional. We appreciated the environmental orientation. The plant based food wasn’t my jam but the cookies wer

reviews.author: N4851IYannf
reviews.text: The snorkel cruise is so much fun that after my first adventure I had to take my sisters on it when they came to visit from the mainland, so I have gone three times! The crew is wonderful, very helpful! The Captain even gives a history lesson of the islands. I highly recommend it! It is fun for the whole family! I plan to go again whenever my family comes to visit me! It is just that awesome!

reviews.author: normanO5627PL
reviews.text: This was a truly amazing experience.  We were well briefed prior to going into the water, the staff were approachable and gracious.  Seeing the manta rays was absolutely incredible.  Words can’t describe!

reviews.author: KnitterBarb
reviews.text: The morning snorkel trip to Captain Cook monument was nice.  The catamaran boat was very roomy and the staff were VERY friendly, helpful, courteous and professional.  The captain provided some historical information about sites on the way to the bay that were interesting and when whales and dolphins were spotted, he slowed/stopped the boat to provide viewing opportunities from a respectful distance.  It was very convenient to pull right up in to the bay and exit the boat and begin snorkeling rig

reviews.author: thomas s
reviews.text: The snorkeling site was fantastic with crystal clear water and abundant fish. The vessel was pleasant to ride on and built for purpose. The crew and Captain were attentive, helpful, friendly and committed to ensuring that everyone had a great time. The food was delicious. The Hawaiian history lessons were much appreciated. This trip was the most fun that I have ever had snorkeling.

reviews.author: thomas s
reviews.text: The Manta Rays were fantastic and they get a 5 for being what they are. The crew of the boat gets a 3 for their bored, going through the motions performance. The naturalist gave a presentation on the natural history of Manta Rays which I could not hear at the back of the group as she was soft spoken  and did not use the boat's excellent PA system  which other crew members did use. Fortunately, there was a naturalist from another company in the water with his group describing what we were seeing

reviews.author: Anglkelly
reviews.text: We had an amazing time in this tour with Fair Winds!   They thought of everything to make this a wonderful experience for all.    The boat was well staffed and they were all super friendly and helpful.    The have everything you need from snorkel equipment to float belts to inner tubes.   My 8 year old freaked out when trying to snorkel so they gave her a view box that allowed her to keep her head above the water.   My mother has mobility issues and the steps into the water with railings allowed

reviews.author: 785kamit
reviews.text: Great tour.  Well organized.  Good equipment provided.  Nice meals.  Just show up and enjoy. Not too long.  Not too short.  Lots of nice fish to see,

reviews.author: Mari Tirado
reviews.text: Amazing snorkeling adventure! Our very first time, was not disappointed.  The crew was super helpful and amazing.  The coral reef was amazingly beautiful and soooo many varieties of fish. It was amazing! Thank you everyone onboard for making it a beautiful experience.

reviews.author: Francisca Alarcon
reviews.text: Una buena experiencia! vimos muchos peces, delfines y el staff preocupado por la seguridad de todos, gracias!!

reviews.author: Geoff Nisbet
reviews.text: We did a private chartered trip. It was wonderful: breathtaking snorkeling, including being 3 feet from a manta ray, dolphins swimming with our boat, delicious food, and fascinating historical information from our hosts who genuinely care about environmental impacts. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Holly Jacobson
reviews.text: We had a great time. The crew was very friendly and helpful and the snorkeling was excellent. Our child also loved the waterslide. Thanks for awesome memories!

reviews.author: James Bekins
reviews.text: I could write a lot but everybody recently has posted the same things about the dietary options and quality captain and informative and supportive crew. Mahalo, my favorite part of my Hawaii trip to be sure!

reviews.author: Molly Parker
reviews.text:
We’ve done alot of these kind of excursions over the years, and this company definitely stood out! ✨

The food was so fresh and delicious, no joke some of the best we had on our trip. I loved that they came around and served us and took our trays after. Instead of stumbling around and doing it buffet style, this was a great touch.

The staff was kind and helpful. We were able to spot a pod of rare dolphins and we pivoted everything so we could watch them. We also got some great snorkeling spots.

reviews.author: Melinda Schroeder
reviews.text: What an awesome adventure! The cove was perfect with such beautiful coral, urchins, and sea anemones. So many fish! We saw an octopus and a pod of spinner dolphins swam right by us. Breakfast and lunch were perfect, the crew was amazing, and we had a wonderful time!

reviews.author: monika cancilla
reviews.text: We had a spectacular time! The crew went above and beyond to make sure my disabled husband was able to go for a snorkle. Our kids LOVED snorkling in the actual ocean, and they couldn't get enough of the waterslides! The drinks were great (try the booch!) And the fresh pineapple and chips were a perfect snack. We saw tons of gorgeous fish, sea urchins and even a couple of eels. Thank you Makanakai, Joey, Cameron and the rest of the crew. You helped us make wonderful memories and were just so nice

reviews.author: Christine Thompson
reviews.text: Great tour!! We were booked one day, went out and it started storming so we had to turn back. They rebooked us for a few days later and we had great weather and a great time. Food on board is plant based/vegan and they accommodate dietary restrictions. We saw tons of great fish snorkeling on the active reef. Sometimes tour places have iffy snorkel equipment but theirs was great.

reviews.author: h awad
reviews.text: We had a wonderful experience with fair wind snorkeling tour. Everyone is very friendly and helpful , very accurate time schedule , they also offer a great breakfast and  lunch with variety of drinks. I enjoyed the glimpse of history and amazing marine life. They are prepared with all the gear, my 9 years old had a blast. I would strongly recommend if you are looking for snorkeling at Kona Big Island.

reviews.author: Sharon Shi
reviews.text: Me and my son had a great experience with this tour! Great food. Great manner! Smaller group!

reviews.author: Alfred Hansen
reviews.text:
Absolutely beautiful day to be on the water, meals were delicious and nice to have drinks provided and sun lotion.
Would do again and again.

reviews.author: Erin Holt
reviews.text: We had an AMAZING time snorkeling as a family. The whole experience with all the Fair Wind staff was exceptional. Highly recommend booking a tour with them!

reviews.author: Ivy Hope
reviews.text:
We had an absolute blast with Fairwind II at Kealakekua Bay! The snorkeling was world-class—the water was crystal clear, and we saw hundreds of tropical fish and vibrant coral.

But what really set this tour apart was the food. I usually expect a basic deli sandwich on boat tours, but Fairwind completely exceeded my expectations. They served a hot, fresh-off-the-grill lunch that was delicious! The BBQ chicken and burgers were juicy and flavorful, and even the sides were fresh and well-prepared.

reviews.author: Kathryn Brown
reviews.text: Our family of 5 had a wonderful experience with the crew on Fair Wind.  Our youngest is 5 and the boat had everything he needed to feel safe in the water.   Great breakfast and lunch.  Boat is comfortable, crew kind and helpful Also very much appreciate the work this company is doing to be a steward of this beautiful area.  Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: carey cross
reviews.text: The crew was fantastic, and the snorkeling was exactly what we were hoping for.

reviews.author: Discover202006
reviews.text: We enjoyed a quiet ride up the coast with dolphins and whales. The staff was excellent and took care of all our needs. We had a lot of fun and would recommend this to anyone.

reviews.author: 996tessp
reviews.text: My partner and I did the Waikīkī Signature Sunset Sail. Captain Chris and his 2 crew members were friendly, professional, and attentive. Nice catamaran with a covered seating area and bar. We ended up staying out on the water half an hour past our time since the sun hadn’t technically set yet. We also saw whales on our way back, and instead of rushing back to the pier they gave us a chance to whale watch. Nice little individual charcuterie boxes were provided along with great drinks. Plenty of s

reviews.author: kristinbX6844OZ
reviews.text: Captain Chris and his Crew Natalie and Clay were very informative and provided alot of information about the Whales. We were able to get some good videos and pictures. The bar drinks were amazing! We'd definitely book with them again.

reviews.author: Joni S
reviews.text:
The bust and crew were wonderful!! So accommodating with drinks and snacks!! Saw a number of whales….would loved to have been closer but laws are laws. 
All in all very satisfied

reviews.author: SundyF_12
reviews.text: We had a great time out on the boat with Captain Quin, G & Jeani. We were lucky enough to see a lot of humpback whales- a wonderful bonus! The boat was clean and the crew was exceptionally friendly and fun. It was a really good time.

reviews.author: Escape61529827784
reviews.text:
We actually did three tours with Hawaii nautical. Started with the whale watching in the morning, then snorkeling with sea turtles, finishing the night with the dinner cruise. The staff was awesome (same all day) and very fun to hang out with and chat with. We luckily were able to see a whale shark which made the evening that little bit more special, but enjoyed even hearing the safety briefing 3 times as captain chris put a funny spin on ch time. 

If you have the chance, don’t waste your time

reviews.author: lisamW2332SG
reviews.text: My husband and I had a fantastic time on this tour! Captain Joey and his crew were super cool and together they made the cruise fun and enjoyable. Not many whales, but we did see several brief sightings, still, enjoyed the day and the crew!

reviews.author: Extraordinary613170
reviews.text:
Sunset cruise was great.
Saw Humpback Whales and Dolphins.
Food and drinks were good.
Crew was helpful and friendly.
Clean boat.
We would go back.

reviews.author: solomonj762
reviews.text: We were so lucky in the trip that we took this February the 24th. In just over the 2 hours we were on the water with Captain QUIN, and cremates JESSY, and G.  we had the pleasure of sailing with a large pod of hump back whale many of which were breaching out to the water and some came up relatively close to the boat. Thanks to Hawaii Nautical and the amazing crew and captain we were able to witness these magnificent creatures in their natural habitat without disturbing them. This was our second

reviews.author: DebS1964
reviews.text: We (10 adults) had a great time on this tour.  Captain Quinn and his crew (so sorry, I’ve forgotten their names, although I think one was simply “G”) were terrific.  The boat was large and comfortable.  We knew they couldn’t guarantee whales but they did find them!  We even saw 2 breaching.  I would recommend this to friends and family members.

reviews.author: errolk921
reviews.text: Our Whale watch was the best trip of the season!! Whales were coming to us! We were literally surrounded by whales! Such a great experience! Captain Jesse along with the crew Jessy, Keoni, and Lily gave us so much facts that I never knew about whales and the ocean in general!! Overall great experience! Thank you so much!!

reviews.author: Carly L
reviews.text: Great sunset cruise! Friendly and fun crew. They caught fish from trolling off the back and  whale sightings. Perfect night with the family out on the water. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: guoj626
reviews.text: such a pleasant sailing! and we did see the whale! TWO! Spectacular! A must-have experience in Hawaii!

reviews.author: SteveA271
reviews.text: Well kept boat and friendly crew. An enjoyable length of about 2 hours. The captain positioned us very well to view the Friday fireworks. The meal and drinks were very good. Would do this tour again.

reviews.author: Brenda W
reviews.text: The overall experience was very organized, the boat was clean and comfortable and the crew was friendly and knowledgeable! While we did not see any whales we did see some spinner porpoises! All in all I would highly recommend this tour!

reviews.author: LahainaBound77
reviews.text: Great crew with a lot of information, plus got to see a whale breach and a lot of whales surfacing. The boat was clean and the drinks were good.

reviews.author: Stacey T
reviews.text: Friendly crew, clean boat, responsive. Beautiful view and put up the sails for a full experience. Bathroom was clean as well

reviews.author: Beau B
reviews.text: We actually took this trip twice. On Saturday, we didn’t see any whales and they gave us a voucher to come back. We rebooked for the following day and were able to see several whales. Capt Joey and crew did great on both trips, the drinks were delicious and you can’t beat the ride. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Crystal L
reviews.text: We had a great time on this whale watching excursion. The staff are awesome and you’ll definitely see some whales. They do a great job sticking around and anticipating the best locations.

reviews.author: 311jimy
reviews.text: Amazing Staff & Tour we were late and they made sure we were able to make it and enjoy the tour.

reviews.author: Angie L Chang
reviews.text: Perfect day on the boat with the family. We did the turtle tour. The captain and deck hands Natalie/Gretchen were all friendly,kind and professional. Boat was clan and well cared for. We had the best time!

reviews.author: Patricia Harper
reviews.text: We come to Waikiki frequently and always make sure to book a sunset cruise with Hawaii Nautical! The crew is always friendly, attentive and helpful. They make sure each passenger is safe, happy and has a fresh drink in their hand. The boat is clean and comfortable and just stunning with its sails unfurled! The views of Waikiki are stunning and on this trip we even saw a whale! I can’t recommend this company enough!

reviews.author: Sharon Grandy
reviews.text: Absolutely loved the trip! Everyone made it a memorable experience!!

reviews.author: Holly Dennis
reviews.text: Friendly and fun staff! Wonderful boat and memories

reviews.author: Katie Toole
reviews.text: 10/10 would recommend!! Had an amazing time snorkeling & sailing with them!!

reviews.author: Paul Dull
reviews.text: Nick, Nick, and Mikey took great care of my family. I really appreciated when one of them put my son in charge of watching the fishing pole. He stayed ready to reel it in. We saw an amazing sunset!

reviews.author: Ghaith Mansour
reviews.text: Such a beautiful surprise to an already awesome day. I knew we’d be going out on the water, but I didn’t expect to see the things I saw, The waters were so nice and so many different fish were swimming around us, The boat and captain were awesome. The crew was awesome very informative and kept us safe the whole time. I would never come here again without doing this over and over again  Made many beautiful memories with my wife and it was so worth the money  If you’re in Honolulu, I highly recomm

reviews.author: Dana Nelson
reviews.text: Fun boat and great waves! Sunset was beautiful and the service was top notch!

reviews.author: Anna
reviews.text: Great crew - lovely sail despite the wind. Sunset cruise was a good length for my family with tween boys.

reviews.author: Ashley Willemse
reviews.text: Crew was amazing! Was a great experience! Went out twice because the first day was too windy to snorkel but still a fun boat ride. The management made sure to take care of us and we got to try again a few days later.  Second time my husband was face to face with a turtle while snorkeling. Corrine is an all star. We loved her as Captain and then she was in charge of keeping track of all of us while snorkeling the second time. Exceptional tour. Highly recommend. Also so nice that it leaves from th

reviews.author: Sara Roy
reviews.text: What a great crew! Had a great time sailing to our snorkeling spot, saw turtles swimming and one surfaced, lunch was great, and drinks were delicious! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cole Gomez-Maldonado
reviews.text: Was really fun, even though we saw no whales the trip alone was relaxing and enjoyable. Since we didn’t see whales we got a coupon to take the tour again at any of their locations that doesn’t expire which was a very nice touch

reviews.author: Katie Sznewajs
reviews.text: We had the best time with Hawaii Nautical on our snorkeling adventure. The boat was gorgeous and the staff were attentive, very knowledgeable, and fun to hang out with. We took our three teenage girls and we all had a blast. 10/10 recommend

reviews.author: dane grzegorczyk
reviews.text: Excellent trip!! Half of our party went out to enjoy the boat ride and didn’t even experience the snorkeling and they still agreed it was one of the funnest parts of the trip! The crew was super fun and made the trip an awesome experience! If you want a relaxing trip on the water this is the way to go!!

reviews.author: Katherine Nygren
reviews.text: Loved our time on this catamaran! It wasn't overcrowded like others. They had nice charcuterie boxes for us, and the service was great. They accommodated my 83 year old mother as well. I highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Stacy Mogensen
reviews.text: Thank you for a wonderful experience

reviews.author: Navigator59187725729
reviews.text: Had an absolute perfect time with this boat tour. We couldn’t have asked for anything better. Captain Rob and Zayen were phenomenal hosts. They were fun, nice, knowledgeable and clearly experienced. We saw EVERYTHING from a pod of over 200 dolphins, sea turtles on the shore, and an assortment of marine life during the snorkel break. Lunch was surprisingly good and the food was amazing! The tour through the fishing village was impactful and enjoyable as well. We learned some great Hawaiian histor

reviews.author: WI_Kate
reviews.text:
Wow.  This was AMAZING. 

We debated between a helicopter and this adventure boat…. And I’m so glad we picked Captain Andys.  Our family (with kids 13,12 and 9) had THE BEST TIME. 

All of the reviews said this was the highlight of the trip, and it definitely  delivered.  We got lucky with 4 ft waves… and no seasick passengers on our trip.  Bottle nose dolphins, spinner dolphins, humpback whales, turtles and even a black tip reef shark.  

Our crew was outstanding.   Captain Keanu, Logan and bon

reviews.author: O4573VVelsab
reviews.text: Did the Na Pali raft tour with Capt Robert and Zayne. The ride was a bit rough but they made the experience fun and informative. Capt Robert was very skilled at navigating the waters - I felt safe the whole time. Zayne was very knowledgeable about the culture and history of the Na Pali Coast. We were served a tasty lunch/sodas. We saw lots of wildlife, even though we were not able to snorkel due to the conditions of the water, it was still such an amazing experience; and Capt Robert made up for

reviews.author: 754allisont
reviews.text: This excursion cannot be beat! We did the Na Pali Raft Snorkel Adventure with Captain Rob and Devyn and had the most incredible experience! They made it fun and exciting, gave us great history along the way, and took care of everyone on the boat - even my mom who was a non-swimmer who we convinced she needed to have this experience! Honestly, it put a perfect seal to our wonderful family vacation and we would repeat this again in heartbeat! So grateful for the family pictures they took to captur

reviews.author: PlanoJay
reviews.text:
We took a generic Andy's Napali coast tour 25 years ago and had a great time.

This time we did the sunset dinner Napali cruise. The seas were very very rough, however the staff did their best to keep everyone calm and comfortable. 

Once we made the turn back south and set the sails it's was much calmer. The food they served was actually very good. The filet was cooked perfectly and the potatoes very tasty. The drinks were ample and served for the duration of the trip. The staff was very friend

reviews.author: williamaJ8861OY
reviews.text: Our captains were Rob and Devan, Beautiful sights, wonderful vibes, super exciting boating and wonderful marine life. Our trip had some hiccups when my wife was feeling sea sick and had to throw up off and on, and Rob and Devan were super helpful and went above their job description. And helped out by offering drinks and snacks (take Dramamine if you even think you’ll get motion sickness). Also had some rain come in but both captain still made it really exciting. Sadly we didn’t get to go snorke

reviews.author: koolaidemans
reviews.text:
We had a great time on this tour, Maddie and Devon are da bomb 🤙 we took the 7am tour and saw whale tails/spouts, bottle nose and spinner dolphins. 
will definitely be recommending everyone who visits Kaua‘i to ask for them! 
10/10 experience

reviews.author: Tara M
reviews.text:
Aloha! We had an amazing experience with Captain Andy’s on their whale watching raft ride.
Captain Rob and Zalin were incredible, kind, professional, and so much fun. We were lucky to see humpback whales, and Captain Rob was always respectful while getting us as close as possible to the action.
Special mahalo nui loa to Rob and Zalin for an unforgettable day. We visit Kauai often and always recommend Captain Andy’s from the heart. ❤️ A Hui Hou Kākou!

reviews.author: X620XOpaulg
reviews.text: We took a Captain Andy's Snorkel and bbque Na Pali Coast boat tour in March 2026.  It was fantastic!  Great customer service and very well organized.  The scenery was beautiful and the food and drink was very good.  I highly recommend.

reviews.author: Paige K
reviews.text: We did the 6 hour Nepali Coast raft tour w/ snorkeling and it couldn’t have gone better. We had the pleasure of spending the day with Victoria and Zoe and they were fantastic !!! We were a family of 9 with young adult children and spouses/significant others and everyone said it was the best thing we had done all of our vacation !! Zoe was extremely knowledgeable about Hawaiin culture and tons of facts about the Nepali Coast. Victoria was the BEST boat captain ever!!! We were able to see a female

reviews.author: heidijU2296FQ
reviews.text: Wow! Totally impressed with this company! Friendly staff, excellent customer service. We booked a morning snorkel tour on the Northstar and Captain Kyler and Crew took us out on the perfect day! Stellar conditions, smooth clear water. We saw whales, dolphins, turtles, snorkled and took in the epic Napali Coast. Stunning! Lunch and service was excellent and we left with wonderful memories about this amazing adventure. Thank you Thank you!

reviews.author: S7534CArachelb
reviews.text: Absolutely loved the crew! Rob and Zalin made the boat ride fun and exciting! Na’Pali coast is stunning and getting to see humpback whales and spinner dolphins was a bonus. Almost a 5 hr trip including lunch, optional snorkeling, and a historic walking tour through the ancient Hawaiian fishing village. Would definitely recommend this tour!

reviews.author: Traveler819099
reviews.text: We had an awesome day, the morning tour with lunch, with Captain Larry, 1st mate Donnie, and crewman John.  We saw humpback whales, turtles, Hawaiian spinner dolphins, tropical fish, and the amazing NaPali coastline.  The food (coconut muffins, cheeseburgers, grilled chicken) from chef Jimmy was beyond expectations.  The whole crew was friendly, helpful, and welcoming and chill.  Cool island vibes and cold adult beverages and the amazing beauty of Kauai made this the highlight of week.  Worth ev

reviews.author: D3972KWmichelec
reviews.text: Whale watching raft tour with Captain Victoria and Logan was absolutely fantastic! We saw so many breaching whales and a whole school of dolphins swimming by us. A spectacular experience I will remember forever. A special thank you to the amazing crew, Captain Victoria and Logan- you two make such a great team and made our experience super fun and educational- and Victoria can drive that raft like a boss! 12/10 experience! If you want to have an amazing Hawaiian adventure, ask for this crew! 🤙�

reviews.author: jonmH5652AR
reviews.text: My wife and I had a great time sailing and snorkeling with the Captain Andy’s  crew. Captain Larry was very informative and shared lots of the island history with us. Crew Donnie, Jon, and Chef Jimmy were excellent; and while they prioritized safety, they also made sure everyone was comfortable and having fun. The food and atmosphere they created was magical. Can’t wait to come back!

reviews.author: S8840GHsandras
reviews.text: The sunset dinner cruise along the Na'Pali coast on Captain Andy's catamaran with Captain Micah was the highlight of our trip and the best thing we did during our week in Kauai.  The water was choppy that day which made it even more fun for us.  They were up front about conditions and offered passengers an out.  Captain Micah spotted 5 whales and stopped so everyone could enjoy them spouting and breaching.  He spotted 2 dolphins accompanying us for a few leaps.  The crew - Pablo (chef), John, Ti

reviews.author: Sherri S
reviews.text: What a beautiful experience!! The sites alone were amazing. Captain Andy’s crew made it even more enjoyable. From the Captain, first mate, and cook, all were committed to giving us the best experience possible!  There were about 35 on board and they knew us all by name. I seriously wasn’t expecting much from dinner on board a boat but they completely exceeded my expectations!  They took pictures for us, got us drinks and seemed to be genuinely happy to have us on board. The captain was very know

reviews.author: ElanaGK
reviews.text: We did the day raft trip to the Napali Coast. Our captain Maddie and first mate Zoe were absolutely amazing! Maddie has mad skills driving the raft and Zoe was very knowledgeable about all things Kauai! The water was a little rough and the swells high, but Maddie was in complete control and made us feel safe! The views were amazing! We were even able to go into the sea caves. We loved every minute! We saw loads of dolphins and several  whales!

reviews.author: K7871LYjoez
reviews.text:
We ended up using Captain Andy’s for two different tours. Our first was on the zodiac whale watching tour with Captains Rob and Zalin, both were full of information, funny and great behind the wheel. We were lucky enough to see a few whales and were blessed to find a pod of spinner dolphins. The boat was clean and well maintained always a plus if you’re looking for a more adventurous and fast paced way to find some whales. 

Our second trip with Captain Andy’s was the sunset dinner cruise. We we

reviews.author: Road468513
