reviews.text: We had a great experience with Capt Andy's Napali Zodiac excursion! Captain Rob and Zalen were an exceptional team. They were very friendly and fun! They even extended the tour to view whales spotted on. Lunch was fantastic and we had the best cookies ever. We slso lucked out with the weather in February and were able to participate in all the activities! However, their recommendation that you need to able bodied. I would recommend Capt Andy's to anyone.

reviews.author: Jordan Panich
reviews.text: Awesome!!! 1000% recommend!

reviews.author: Prov 4th Relief Society
reviews.text:
34/3/26 with weather permitting we had the best day on this adventure provided by captain Andy’s. 4 of us my husband and two daughters 17 &12 (there was a family with younger kids I think the youngest being maybe 7 or 8 he did great, but he was tired, as it does take energy to endure the ride). We choose the 6 hr raft tour.
We were up for adventure and looking forward to the what a tour like this could offer. Boy did it ever exceed our expectations! We have don several raft tours in other areas

reviews.author: Brittnie Sumko
reviews.text: We had the best time on our Na Pali raft tour! We had our 4 boys ages 6-14. The age limit is for good reason, our 6 year old did great but a year or two younger would have been difficult. This tour was a highlight for our family we saw whales, dolphins, seals and turtles. Sawyer and Jacob were awesome tour guides telling us all the ins and outs of the area. They took such good care of us. They were friendly and knowledgeable and made sure we stayed safe. They made this such a great experience. W

reviews.author: Alex Covert
reviews.text: Best boat tour I’ve ever been on. The staff was the shining star. Major thank you to Dane, Rolland, Jon, and Jules for exceptional service and an unforgettable Kauai boat experience. Our family will talk about this forever. Highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Peggy A.
reviews.text: Our Captain and the crew were wonderful... caring and interactive with explaining things,  sharing their stories and making the most delicious lunch (thick, flavorful burgers with fixings and sides. Grilled right there on the catamaran!). When I started feeling queezy, Catalina, the chef, gave great advice (stand rather than sit and let the wind blow on me). Worked like a charm and I got too enjoy the rest of the ride!  We highly recommend Captain Andy's!

reviews.author: John Underwood
reviews.text: What a great trip. Crew was amazing. Food is good. Beautiful.

reviews.author: Shawn Stuart
reviews.text: Had an amazing day on the Na Pali coast with Captain Maddie and Sawyer!  We had so much fun! It was so exciting, adventurous, and thrilling.  To see the coast the special way they showed it was perfect.  Couldn’t ask for anything better!  Good job!  Mahalo!

reviews.author: Dan Winter
reviews.text: Amazing experience!  Chase and Devin were great whale-whisperers; we saw a baby and mom, and both were very active for almost the entire two-hour trip.  Breaching, bobbing, tail-slapping, fin waving; all kinds of whale behavior!  Having cheerful and friendly guides was a plus.  They made three different groups of people feel like a team.  Outstanding experience.  Cannot recommend too highly.  MUST DO.

reviews.author: Melissa Cranney
reviews.text:
As always Captain Andy’s deliver!!!! Captain Baron, Chef Deon, crew members Katie and Timmy were so great to help everyone in our group. Food was delicious, and we had such a fun time on a fun , adventurous, windy day.
🤩

reviews.author: Jeannine Thompson
reviews.text: Great catamaran! Great food, great views but the best of all was the great captain, cook and crew. They made the cruise an adventure to remember. So kind, so intuitive, so caring, so fun and so polite.

reviews.author: Allison Testa
reviews.text: This excursion cannot be beat! We did the Na Pali Raft Snorkel Adventure with Captain Rob and Devyn and had the most incredible experience! They made it fun and exciting, gave us great history along the way, and took care of everyone on the boat - even my mom who was a non-swimmer who we convinced she needed to have this experience! Honestly, it put a perfect seal to our wonderful family vacation and we would repeat this again in heartbeat! So grateful for the family pictures they took to captur

reviews.author: Carl Koenig
reviews.text: First time in a boat ever I had a great time with Captain Andy's crew! Even know it was winter with rough waves the boat was gentle and I don't s not get sea sick. The views of the coast was fantastic and so was the dinner! We even got to see some late season whales.

reviews.author: Brittney Graham
reviews.text:
We had the best time on the raft expedition with Captain Robert and Devin—hands down one of the highlights of our whole trip. It was definitely adventurous (in the best way), and Captain Robert handled everything so confidently. We felt totally safe the entire time, even with the waves and getting in close to the caves. Devin was awesome too—so fun, helpful, and always checking on everyone and keeping the energy up.

Seeing the Nā Pali Coast like that is unreal. We went into sea caves, saw dolph

reviews.author: Debra Becker
reviews.text: This snorkel sail with Captain Andy’s was the highlight of our our trip! Our crew was professional and so accommodating. We had a great time snorkeling, followed by cheeseburgers in paradise, and fresh baked pineapple and coconut cookies. And then we cruised the coast in all of its lush and green splendor. Dolphins followed our catamaran back towards Port Allen. And then our Captain spotted a humpback whale and her calf. The whole trip was magical. We were on the Northern Star early morning to a

reviews.author: Matt Inama
reviews.text: Great little whale watching tour got to see some whales and tails!

reviews.author: Heather M
reviews.text: Had an absolutely amazing time on the star whale watch boat tour!!! Capt Thomas and his mates Jason and Kevin were amazing!!! We didn’t see whales as it was the end of season but we did see tons of dolphins. Highly recommend going!

reviews.author: Paul and Kim Shipley
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing cruise! Our family of 5, with 3 young children, loved the sunset cruise with Captain Thomas, Jason, Chef Rob, and crew last week. They were personable, professional, fun and really provided a white-glove all-inclusive dinner cruise. They were extremely attentive to my 9yr old daughter (shout out to Rob especially!) who was quite sea-sick throughout (of no fault of the company!) and made sure to make her as comfortable as possible. Even being sick, she still enjoyed seeing the

reviews.author: Ann Marie Robinson
reviews.text:
I'd do that again in a second! We went on the catamaran and every second was amazing. The crew is eager to help and are truly wonderful people. The food is delicious. The ocean is gorgeous and so is the Na Pali coast. Can I give it 10 stars?!
If you are prone to seaskicness, then you won't love it. Some in my party hated it and stayed rooted to the back of the boat the whole time.

reviews.author: Adam Dake
reviews.text:
Our experience with Capt Andy’s was absolutely incredible from start to finish. The boat was very nice, clean, spacious, and felt very stable and safe on the water.
​The crew was great; they were professional, knowledgeable, and went out of their way to make sure everyone was comfortable and having a good time. To top it all off, the food was great and much better than your typical boat tour fare. It was a highlight of our trip to Kauai and I can't recommend them enough!

reviews.author: carson h
reviews.text: The sunset dinner cruise was an amazing experience and reasonable price for the quality of food and service received!

reviews.author: H8704LFangiet
reviews.text: We took the Napali Coast by catamaran at the end of March.  The boat crew- Captain Cole, Colin, Paige and our personal favorite Pa a- were remarkable.  The customer service they provided during the tour was the best I've experienced.  Pa a knew every kid on the boats name within minutes of arrival and made it such a special and memorable trip (we are a week out from our trip and a day hasn't passed where my kids haven't mentioned missing Pa).  Paige had a smile on her face the entire tour and ke

reviews.author: 263kellief
reviews.text: Was a wild, exciting, so worth it trip!! Kaloha and Lily were awesome! They were knowledgeable,  fun and friendly! Just know for the raft experience,  be prepared to use your muscles and that it can be very choppy at times. Such a fantastic time. Saw dolphins,  wales, sea turtles and snorkeling with lots a colorful fish. The caves were amazing! Will definitely do again.

reviews.author: 243ipolitom
reviews.text: Our family had a great spring break trip viewing all of the Napa Coast cliffs. The staff was friendly and made safety a priority, especially for the kids. The highlight of the trip was when we saw a pod of dolphins and they slowed to let us look at them and the dolphins played in front of the boat. The only part that wasn’t great was the visibility for the snorkeling was low.

reviews.author: ashleygQ9009PQ
reviews.text: We took the morning tour and we had such an amazing spot for snorkelling and had dolphins swimming with the catamaran. The crew was fantastic, professional and friendly. The views of the napali coast were spectacular!

reviews.author: 311judih
reviews.text:
loved the cost of this  :)
the appetizers were perfect for a dinner :)
the crew were so kind and friendly :)
the gentle cruise and sweet whales were amazing :)
2 hours was perfect :) 
Not crowded at all :)

reviews.author: Explore58481948793
reviews.text:
Capt. Kea was cool and a great operator. We got to see whales and hang with the crew. Great service, drinks, chicken wings, pizza. They call it a snack, but you can munch enough that it’s a small meal. I suggest the Sunset-Whale Watching tour (available during whale season). Don’t bother dressing fancy. Wear your flip-flops. You’ll put your shoes in a locker on the dock and spend the cruise barefoot. 

GREAT experience for all ages

reviews.author: Meme C
reviews.text: Such an amazing tour, best way to see the Napali Coast. We saw sea turtles, WHALES, and soooooo many dolphins! Captain JC and her amazing team were so attentive and incredibly helpful. It was a great experience and family friendly! I loved my experience and looked forward to doing it again. Only con the food is not good. Like at ALL. But the drinks are good and strong <3

reviews.author: Sherpa826558
reviews.text: This was the 2nd time touring with Blue Dolphin Tours in less then 9 months. I first went July of 2025 a did the Napoli Dinner Cruise. It was unbelievable. I enjoyed the beautiful Coast line. The views were mysteriously beautiful. The ride was tough, the winds were up but the Sun was shining. The Best tour I have ever taken in Hawaii. The 2nd time traveling with Blue Dolphin was on 3/5/2026. I invited 4 other friends and family. This tour was different. The Captain of the Cateraman was a small g

reviews.author: the5spades
reviews.text: Super fun time! Weather wasnt great but they made up for it! Saw numerous whales 🐋 and spent a couple hours watching them!

reviews.author: lahirschi
reviews.text: We recently did the sunset dinner cruise. This is our 3rd time with Blue Dolphin and we are always happy with our cruise. Our captain was Jsea and crew was Dereyn and Pa'pa (spelling?). They took excellent care of the passengers. Being whale season Jsea made sure we stopped and checked out a show off whale for our viewing pleasure. Once again the meal was delicious and The Napali coast is amazing.

reviews.author: ericrI7512GD
reviews.text: Such a welcoming crew and an enjoyable time spotting whales and dolphins!  We booked this tour last minute and are so glad we did.  It was one of the highlights of our trip to the islands.  The crew on the boat was cheerful, knowledgable, and helpful.  We spotted whales quickly and spent several hours watching them surface.  Then we were joined by several dolphins who swam along side the boat for a good 20 minutes.  The weather was perfect, the water was beautiful, and the time spent on the wate

reviews.author: davenutzell
reviews.text: Captain Evan and crew Dereyn, Lily and Kalika were delightful hosts, informative guides, great sailors and good friends on this fabulous trip to Na’Pali. Snorkeling, whales, LOTS of porpoises and some of the most spectacular scenery you’ll ever see. Plenty of food and refreshments and good company by the crew and passengers alike. All in all it was the wonderful highlight on our trip to the Garden Isle!

reviews.author: janicebH631SW
reviews.text: We had an amazing time. The crew was so friendly and made our trip even better.  We had great food for lunch and cocktails while watching the whales.  I couldn’t have asked for a better time.  Thanks for a day of great memories.

reviews.author: 775nicholeh
reviews.text: What an amazing morning on our Napali Coast tour! An amazing and experienced crew that walked us through every step and kept us all safe and comfortable in the water and in the waves. Couldn't recommend this more!

reviews.author: cr00ksyc
reviews.text: This was by far the most amazing experience I have ever had in Hawaii. I highly recommend this boat trip and our crew was so accommodating and friendly! The food and drinks were great too! We saw dolphins, whales, and sea turtles! The NaPali coastline was the most breathtaking scenery I’ve ever seen. Life changing experience! If I could give it more than 5 stars I would!🤩⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.author: H3785SAevelynk
reviews.text: Captain and crew made this whale watching experience one of a lifetime. We followed a pod and not only saw many spoutings and glimpses of fins, but near the end of our trip a humpback whale breached about 30 feet from our boat! Breathtaking. Mahloa to Kai, Maddy and Zeke for their professionalism, kindness and sense of humor.

reviews.author: N5676HOrobertr
reviews.text: My wife and I did the dinner cruise on our last full day in Kauai, and the experience eclipsed our expectations. Captain J Sea and her crew were amazing. The captain had so much information and did such a great job sharing her knowledge of the island and various must see points. We had an opportunity to see a number of whales and the safety recommendations proved to be valuable. It’s a barefoot cruise, not an issue and the food and drink were plenty. The crew did a great job of taking care of us

reviews.author: Rebecca B
reviews.text: We went out for a morning NaPali coast tour this morning. Captain Cole did a great job going over safety rules and that we would face rough seas once we got on the north coast. He was an expert captain and did a great job explaining different landmarks, the ocean conditions, sea life, etc. Crew members Kawiki, Ruby and Pa’a were all amazing - friendly and helpful. We loved seeing the beautiful coast. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: kelliw499
reviews.text: Knowledgeable and fun crew. Would do again.

reviews.author: N9674VVstevek
reviews.text: Blue Dolphin Charters is Top of the line for tours on Kauai. We took the Catamaran tour of the Na Pali coast with Snorkling. It was the best tour reccommended by a Tour Booking agent. It was also reccommended by my Brother that took the Zodiac boat tour. Breakfast was great also the lunch that was served. We were luck to be there during Whale watching time. We saw 2 pods of Humpback whales. Blue Dolphin Charters garrenteed Dolphins. They delivered. On the way to the Na Pali coast the Bottle Nose

reviews.author: Angie Tanner
reviews.text: We took the Napali Coast by catamaran at the end of March.  The boat crew- Captain Cole, Colin, Paige and our personal favorite Pa a- were remarkable.  The customer service they provided during the tour was the best I've experienced.  Pa a knew every kid on the boats name within minutes of arrival and made it such a special and memorable trip (we are a week out from our trip and a day hasn't passed where my kids haven't mentioned missing Pa).  Paige had a smile on her face the entire tour and ke

reviews.author: Alan Acker
reviews.text:
We had an amazing adventure with Captain Joe & his Crew! Mahalo to all, with a shout out to Captain Joe for all the cool info shared, Zeke, Dylan & Kalani for taking great care of my family. The personal attention, details, & help, plus the interaction of the Crew, you can tell they really enjoy what they do and they give their all to make it a great experience.
So many great memories, snorkeling, was just the start, involving the Keiki, lots of fish and turtles. Then on to a large group of dolp

reviews.author: Christopher Blackwell
reviews.text: Our experience on the sunset sail with blue dolphin was amazing. Captain J. Sea, Vayden and Collin were outstanding. The trip was fun, informative but above all else I always felt safe. The crew were always willing to answer questions, take pictures or provide help if needed. An awesome way to start our trip on Kauai!

reviews.author: Alexis Bross
reviews.text: We had such a great time! It was so cool to see sea turtles and dolphins! The captain and crew made the trip so fun! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jarrad Cox
reviews.text: Once in a lifetime experience! The Nā Pali coast has some of the best views from the Catamaran! We saw dolphins and snorkeled with turtles. The crew treats you excellent, the food was good, and the captain makes the tour educational.

reviews.author: dream creators club
reviews.text: We had a great morning on the Blue Dolphin Napali Coast tour. Captain Kai was very informative so we knew what to expect coming up in the next part of the tour. Water was rough but my family enjoyed the bumpy ride. The crew, Vayden, Jordan and Ethan were extremely accommodating. Our tour had a large group of kids on it with alot of energy and I was very impressed with how the whole crew where very professional about reminding the kids to to follow the rules. There was several times where the kid

reviews.author: M. S.
reviews.text:
Amazing experience today with Ruby and Koko (haha, I'm so sorry, man)
Ruby is an excellent captain. Having a boat ourselves, the water she tackled today was definitely a testament to her skills and ability. They are funny, passionate, and knowledgeable. We never felt unsafe, uniformed, or lacking for more information. The tour was spectacular. We will always recommend them from here on out.

reviews.author: Megha Tak
reviews.text:
We did the napali coast boat tour in march end . Great vibe overall and absolutely recommend. We saw dolphins and almost saw a whale; staff is friendly and napali is so amazing.

That said couple things to keep in mind -

1. Dont have high hopes from snorkeling as water is choppy this time of the year
2. You will feel motion sickness for some times as waves are high
3. It rained for 30% of our time on the boat so not super fun then

reviews.author: Ronald Kretschmer
reviews.text: The crew were personable and helpful, the views were exquisite, and the food was pretty good as well. This is the one activity we will definitely do next time.

reviews.author: Marisa Geisler
reviews.text: We absolutely loved our tour with Blue Dolphin! Every staff person we interacted with was friendly and welcoming, and additionally the boat crew was engaging, safety-focused and top notch. The captain had lots of interesting information and stories about the local history and sights along the way. We did the Na Pali Coast tour, and got the chance to snorkel and see beautiful reef fish, saw playful spinner dolphins come right up next to the boat, and saw beautiful humpback whales breaching probab

reviews.author: Lauren Zuiker
reviews.text: I went on a snorkeling cruise with my family and some friends who were also in town. It was amazing. The water was too murky because of the storms so we didn’t get to snorkel. Even though we didn’t snorkel, we did a nice ride along the coast and we saw a ton of dolphins. The captain said it had over 100 dolphins! The captain and crew were very nice, and captain Joe was nice and really funny. It was truly an amazing experience.

reviews.author: Cheryl Brunk
reviews.text: We took two trips with Blue Dolphin while in Kauai; first a sunset dinner cruise with Kai, Zeke and Renee. Not only was the trip most enjoyable, but truly educational as well. (Exemplary, if I sum it up) We learned some new things about the area, in addition to enhanced information about the wildlife and cultural context. Super professional crew AND lots of fun!! Next, we took an afternoon/evening whale watch trip. I guess we struck GOLD, as we hung out with about 12+ whales for the entire trip!

reviews.author: Chris Silva
reviews.text: Wonderful 5 hr snorkel tour. Crew provided excellent service. Food was good. Drinks a plenty. Saw whales, dolphins, turtles, and fish!

reviews.author: Anne Harmody
reviews.text: The whale watching was incredible!  The service of the crew was amazing!  Zeke, Lily and Kai were great!  Good commentary on whales and general knowledge of the islands. Lily and Zeke were interactive, pleasant and very hospitable.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: William Hunt
reviews.text: Great crew! Nice boat. Snacks and drinks included.  Wear shoes with  soft soles and no open toed sandals or you will need to go barefoot.

reviews.author: Julie Thompson
reviews.text: My husband and I went on the whale watch tour and the sunset dinner cruise for our honeymoon.  I cannot express enough how much we enjoyed each.  Of course the whales and scenery were amazing and breathtaking but the crew for each excursion are top notch.  Their passion and knowledge of the whales and area is outstanding.  Most of all they made sure we were enjoying ourselves.  I highly recommend Blue Dolphin to anyone.  Mahalo, Julie Thompson/Thomerson and James Thomerson.

reviews.author: Jason Spade
reviews.text: Fantastic.  We had a blast even though it was rough seas. The crew was Fantastic.  Had a great time with Jordan!

reviews.author: Cheryl Brunk
reviews.text:
We took two trips with Blue Dolphin while in Kauai; first a sunset dinner cruise with Kai, Zeke and Renee. Not only was the trip most enjoyable, but truly educational as well. (Exemplary, if I sum it up) We learned some new things about the area, in addition to enhanced information about the wildlife and cultural context. Super professional crew AND lots of fun!!

Next, we took an afternoon/evening whale watch trip. I guess we struck GOLD, as we hung out with about 12+ whales for the entire trip

reviews.author: Lily Doyle
reviews.text: This was the most fun experience! The staff were excellent and made this experience even better. If you’re going to Kauai this is a must do!!!!!!

reviews.author: megk2015
reviews.text: We had an amazing trip yesterday. Saw multiple groups of whales, babies, moms and escorts. We were even lucky enough to see them breaching which was amazing. We also bought the professional photos which captured it better than we ever could.

reviews.author: danaaM1288SH
reviews.text:
We did have the opportunity to see a mother whale and her calf, which was special at first—but we spent about 45 minutes simply watching them float with very little activity. While the crew provided educational commentary, it felt like too much time was spent in one spot when we could have moved on to look for additional whales or more dynamic behavior.

We later came across another mother and calf pair, along with an escort, but only spent about 20 minutes there before heading back to the harbo

reviews.author: kaleidoscocious
reviews.text: Did a tour on one of the bigger vessels, Ocean Guardian. If you have mobility issues, choose this one or Ocean Voyager. No issues with seasickness though it was a tad choppy. It was high whale watching season, and we saw several whales. A playful calf at the very beginning was the star. I was really happy with the seats we got, but I noticed some people parked their cameras in prime spots along the bow at the start and didn’t budge… some people were complaining. Beside the bow, the best views we

reviews.author: Sally E
reviews.text:
Gebucht haben wir noch vor Weihnachten, da gerade Haupt-Walsaison ist. Alles hat super geklappt und alle benötigte Infos (und mehr) haben wir vorab bekommen.
Wir hatten wunderschönes Wetter und nur ca 15 Leute an Bord. Ein Wissenschaftler hat vieles erklärt und alle Fragen beantwortet. Es hat auch nicht an Buckelwale gemängelt - sie waren überall! Und Delphine, die mitgeschwommen sind. Es wurden Profi-Fotos gemacht und zum Verkauf angeboten. Getränke auch. 
Ein super Erlebnis.

reviews.author: traveler5005
reviews.text: I was here during the Kona 2 storm. Late season for whales. Torrential downpours, flooding, brown muck in the harbor and chop in the basin. Most other tours not running that Sunday and lots of other activities closed or out of commission.  I signed up on a whim as nothing else to do.  I expected nothing but 2 hours of rollers and rain.  The waters clears up off shore.  The rain stopped.  And most imports, we saw whales.  Great crew and spotter.  Definitely recommend PAC Whale.

reviews.author: Fearless22762286541
reviews.text: Great experience. Good guides and you can cheaply rent binoculars. Unlike whale watching on the East Coast you don’t have to travel far out to sea. The boat is large and comfortable and the staff were great.

reviews.author: P3339CKjasminem
reviews.text: Excellent experience overall booking, friendly staff, cruise guide were very knowledgeable and made the whole trip fun. Watched few whales and dolphins that day. Great excursion for family.

reviews.author: LIFamily2021
reviews.text: Great time got to see tons of dolphins and whales great time Sierra was so knowledgeable and made sure we understood and got to see everything great trip couldn’t have asked for anything more

reviews.author: X620XOpaulg
reviews.text: We took a whale watching tour on the Ocean Voyager with Pac Whale Eco Adventures.  We were disappointed!  We saw some whales in the distance.  Nothing up close.  We knew there were no promises that we would see the whales, and we accepted that.  Our disappointment was primarily with the vessel.  It was old, noisy and had inadequate seating for the number of people on the tour.  Additionally, the main reason we chose Pac Whale was because they had naturalists on board to provide information about

reviews.author: Josie679
reviews.text: We definitely had a good time on our recent PacWhale boat tour. Saw many whales (& dolphins) during our trip, and a few went right under our boat. Unfortunately, none were breaching but there were many good views. We especially liked our naturalist guide's (Ollie)  enthusiasm. He provided much information and insight about the humpback whales and their behavior. We also liked the fact that you are supporting the mission of the non-profit Pacific Whale Foundation in protecting ocean life through

reviews.author: psugnet
reviews.text: Maybe 4th or 5th time with these folks. Have done others, but these guys have biologists on board explaining a lot all day. 5 hours is just right, with 2 - 1 hour snorkel stops. Did plenty of stops for whales and dolphins too. Crew just looked after us the whole time…fun!

reviews.author: 163lynner
reviews.text:
Staff were knowledgeable (all marine biologists or naturalists), friendly, and helpful.  The best is that we saw lots of whales; mamas, babies, and escorts.

The trip included dinner and drinks.

reviews.author: irenewU5321XX
reviews.text:
Staff gave supportive and educational information.
We watched a competition pod of males for over 30 minutes seeing at least 6 head thrusts and 3 breaches.  We saw over 25 fluke up dives.
In my 19 years of coming to Maui, I always book with Pacific Whale Foundation, a non profit who serves and educates their community and the whole world.  I’ve never been disappointed.

reviews.author: Grace L
reviews.text: The experience was amazing with our dinner experience and our waitress being so attentive! We saw whales plus the crew was so knowledgeable about them.  We actually got the opportunity to listen to the whales in the sea !! Would recommend this trip !

reviews.author: X6394FLjoew
reviews.text: It was an unbelievable experience. Nicholas, Noah, Kirsten, and Will were exceptional in service and so friendly and engaging. They made the experience so wonderful. The food was great but the views and the service are rave worthy. I can’t recommend this any more. The experience was truly unforgettable

reviews.author: riddicb
reviews.text: This was our first time on a whale watching trip. WOW were we impressed. The guides on the boat were fantastic.  Very knowledgeable and receptive to everyone's questions. And the whales put on quite a show.

reviews.author: GrandTour14896007913
reviews.text: Excellent experience! Nice boat, good snacks & drinks. Listening to the whales was awesome. Adding music by Josh made it to relaxing and leveled up!

reviews.author: Mary1675
reviews.text: We did the two hour whale watch on the Ocean Voyager and had a wonderful experience. Leading up to the cruise, the reservation, confirmation, check-in and boarding processes were smooth. The boat itself was nice with inside and outside seating. Crew members were exceptional, ensuring we had many opportunities to see whales. I chose PacWhale in part because I knew we would learn about whales from their experts and I was not disappointed as we were educated throughout the excursion. Concessions ar

reviews.author: Ljschultz90
reviews.text: This trip was absolutely amazing!  They didn’t disappoint!  The Captain and crew were very informative and friendly!

reviews.author: H1599AEmeganw
reviews.text: We had am amazing trip! The guides were wonderful, knowledge, safe and fun.

reviews.author: Sanjay Bhatt
reviews.text: They provided one of the best tour in Maui. Really enjoyed trip with them and they made most memorable trip for us.

reviews.author: michele crissman
reviews.text: Best whale watching tour on Maui!

reviews.author: Cheri Blumenfeld
reviews.text: Amazing Day!!! Snorkeling, whales and family...I couldn't all for more

reviews.author: Jeanean M
reviews.text: A must stop to shop and to go whale watching.  We enjoy the sunset sail.

reviews.author: Lee Seonggye
reviews.text: Watching the whale was a great experience. Like to recommend to the others. Also the crews were nice. So you better go!!

reviews.author: Jenn Charlebois
reviews.text: We did a snorkeling tour to the Molokini Crater and the experience was amazing!! All of the crew were exceptionally friendly and you could tell that they all loved their jobs. Captain Andrew was super funny and very experienced. Even when we were tying up to snorkeling, he was really patient and the whole crew worked together to make it happen. We could tell that the diver tying us up was new, but the support from the Captain and the lead woman out front were fantastic. They were so supportive a

reviews.author: Mary Cunningham
reviews.text: Wonderful Stargazing Cruise!

reviews.author: Toby Neal
reviews.text: Sunset dinner cruise with whales! What a treat. Lots of whale activity to see, a clean and stable vessel, lovely staff and good food. We were lucky to have calm seas and low wind conditions!

reviews.author: Katie Robarge
reviews.text: 100/10 recommend the Pacific Whale Foundation for your ocean adventures in Maui. Absolutely the best experience each time - the crew is so passionate and knowledgeable, their boats are not over crowded, they’re so patient with kids - couldn’t be more impressed. Worth every penny and more

reviews.author: hey you
reviews.text: At the checkout, right before you enter your contact information there is a $3.50 donation box that is automatically checked. Instead of the customer determining if they want to donate they are making the decision for you. This place can't be trusted.

reviews.author: AB CD
reviews.text: 1/21/2026 1:15pm whale watching on Ocean Spirit was awesome. All of the staff were great, which helped make this a memorable experience. We saw humpback whales swimming, splashing, breaching, and slapping their tails. We especially enjoyed seeing the baby whales and listening to the whale songs, which were played live over the catamaran's speakers. Lunch aboard the boat was also delicious, and just the right amount.

reviews.author: Greg Matthews
reviews.text: A great morning of whale watching with entertaining and informative guides.

reviews.author: Tom Ferry
reviews.text: Overall good trip. 8am whale watching on the Ocean Voyager. 2 hours from launch to tie-up. Super friendly crew. Boat was 2/3 full (~70 passengers), a bit crowded to reliably get good views of whales. Saw about 6 groups of whales, 5-6 flukes, no breaches. Lead crew member/guy (Rich) on microphone was okay, but has no marine biology education, so his info was a bit superficial. Other crew members could have been more attentive in spotting; they missed at least two or three opportunities cause they

reviews.author: Anna Trout
reviews.text: Amazing whale watching experience with incredibly passionate and knowledgeable guides

reviews.author: Robert White
reviews.text: Excellent trip out, crew were very helpful and friendly, early in the season however saw plenty of whales

reviews.author: Rich Martin
reviews.text: These people care! Made sure we saw everything we could and kept us safe doing it! Good job team! We especially enjoyed Cooper's educational piece on board and Lauren showed us how to dive deep! 💯 recommended!!!

reviews.author: Sharon Marble
reviews.text: Wonderful Catamaran & Snorkeling adventure!! Awesome Store!! A must when visiting Maui. Kids time with a scientist. 10/10!!

reviews.author: Sfisher8
reviews.text: Had a great time whale watching, Cat and Andrew were amazing and very knowledgeable. Would highly recommend and can’t wait to go again!

reviews.author: chaneymills57
reviews.text: This was a great experience.  Saw whales and dolphins. Boat was great since it was small and just about 20 people. Whales

reviews.author: jennerwatson
reviews.text: So intimate! Our guides were friendly, knowledgeable and ooze love for all sea creatures. Nothing like a morning on the water with dolphins and whales. Take your non-drowsy motion sickness meds before you get there because you will float on the waves when you are watching the shows. Highly recommend hanging for lunch in Lahaina- this community is rebounding and it’s lovely!

reviews.author: Tour672095
reviews.text: Lexi and Megan were great guides. The boat ride was so much fun. Whale watching is a game of patience, timing, and luck; we did still get to see some whales of varying levels of up close. The guides were very knowledgeable and personable. You don't get very wet on the boat. Even though the company is small, they were very organized. Twelve people is the max I would recommend for a craft this size; we were snug on the raft, but not overcrowded. Overall, it was a great trip and I would highly reco

reviews.author: Karen E
reviews.text: We had a great time.  Our guides were knowledgeable and led us to several locations to see whales and we were even able to hear them

reviews.author: Lucy H
reviews.text: The business made sure we had a great experience while also showing great respect for the whales/dolphins.

reviews.author: Vacationer625550
reviews.text: The trip was good. I wouldn’t say great. I did appreciate that when an emergency came up last minute, they allowed us to reschedule. However, as far as the tour itself, I found it difficult to hear just about everything the captain or marine biologist were saying. They needed to speak louder or use a microphone. I would have appreciated more information on the whales and even getting to hear them more. I did request to hear them at one point and they put the microphone out for about 45 seconds.

reviews.author: SpringsTS
reviews.text: We did the whale watching trip during our trip to Lahaina. It was amazing, pretty small boat, about 12 passengers. Although it was very rough getting out of the harbor, we got down to the south coast of Maui pretty quickly, and found a humpback and her calf. Our crew thought the calf was likely under a week old, and since they were mostly on the surface, we could see a lot. Then we found a whale and a calf followed by a couple males, they came a bit closer to us. We had a treat when the males bo

reviews.author: Navigator108903
reviews.text: We had a great time with up close whale encounters throughout the trip. Jill and Una were very friendly and informative. We have been on several whale tours and would rate this at or near the top.

reviews.author: cjlrn
reviews.text: Great whale watching tour with this crew! Would recommend tour with them again!

reviews.author: Z5536MPlindseys
reviews.text: Experience of a lifetime!! Captain Derek and his first mate were excellent! The whales came so close to the boat we could smell their breath as the exhaled.

reviews.author: Navigate47629988792
reviews.text: Ultimate Indeed! It’s not everyday you get close up and personal with humpbacks. I was even able to take a selfie with a female humpback. Captain Johnny and Casey were extremely knowledgeable about whales. They were also dedicated in making sure we all had amazing whale encounters. And we sure did.

reviews.author: nozndaneo
reviews.text: What a gem! We had Captain Jill and Una manning our boat. We had the best experience and got up close to a number of whales. They were always on the look out, dinging the best opportunities and providing information about whales.  I would definitely recommend

reviews.author: tandih21
reviews.text: We saw SO many whales! They were showing flukes, slapping their fins and popping out of the water. Lainey was the guide and very knowledgable. We had a great time!

reviews.author: H8288KOanthonyk
reviews.text: Captain Jill got us so  close to the whales it was incredible

reviews.author: deanneo137
reviews.text: What an wonderful day with Captain Jill! She knew where the whales were and we got some amazing pictures! We would go again anytime we were there during season and would highly recommend the trip! Lahaina is coming back

reviews.author: skyew920
reviews.text:
What an awesome experience!
We were fortunate and saw many whales but the best part was when a mama and baby as well as their escort came right up to our boat and circled it- curious like.
The closest I have ever been to a whale in my life.
Great guides and great weather and beautiful whales- so glad we went!

reviews.author: Shiloh L
reviews.text: Amazing service. Everyone was very helpful and loved their jobs and these animals. I wasn’t sure if we would make it out since it was raining in the morning, but we did! Thankfully it stopped raining right before the tour started. We saw amazing whales thanks to the team. They even hurried to another whale that was playing in the water. It was amazing!

reviews.author: heartonfire87
reviews.text: If you are looking for an intimate experience with great information, this is it. The crew was great and the whales were fantastic. Bonus, there was shade on the boat so we didn't have to sit in the sun for two and half hours.

reviews.author: O1375GFangelam
reviews.text: The whole experience was great. The captain and the guide were very knowledgeable and kept the whole boat entertained. While it was windy and the water choppy (we were told it would be ahead of time) the captain did a fantastic job of getting us close enough without making the ride uncomfortable. Over all a great experience and would definitely recommend them to anyone looking for a great tour.

reviews.author: Jenna McGrath
reviews.text: This was our second time with Ultimate Whale Watch and it was just as amazing our first time.  The crew (Lilly and Lacey) were equal parts knowledgeable and fun.  We learned a lot- of course saw the guaranteed whale sighting - but also got to hear one singing and saw a pod of dolphins.  The boat is safe- but also makes the experience feel authentic and less commercial.  I love that they limit guests to allow for great views no matter where you are.  We’ll definitely be back!

reviews.author: Shersti Booth
reviews.text: This was by far one of the most favorite things we did in Maui!  Charley (hope I spelled her name right) and Chad were absolutely fantastic!  They answered all our questions and we all learned SO much from them.  We saw a couple moms and babies and many other humpback whales. We even saw a whale breach!  It was AMAZING!  The boat ride was so fun for our whole family (4 kids ages 17-8 yrs old).  It was truly unforgettable!  Thank you for such an amazing experience and we can't wait to go again ne

reviews.author: Megan Goril
reviews.text: Amazing experience! Lacey and Charlie were incredible! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Files Little
reviews.text: Good stuff dudes!!!!! Thank you for a great experience!

reviews.author: Tim Gessert
reviews.text: Ultimate Whale Watch is the only way to go!!! We did a small group whale watch and Captain Lacy was the best along with Charlie the Naturalist!!! These 2 make for a fun and entertaining tour!!! And you can tell that both of them truly care for the whales and most definitely enjoy what they do!!! Thank you ladies for an unforgettable experience!!!

reviews.author: Brandi Kolbe
reviews.text: The best crew ever! Charlie and Lacy were amazing! Very entertaining and knowledgeable!  Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Sarah Munzinger
reviews.text: Eine der schönsten Erinnerungen die wir von Maui haben werden. Eine tolle Crew und ein super Boot. Wir haben die Tour mit dem 6-er Boot gemacht. Es war perfekt.

reviews.author: Devon Pendleton
reviews.text: That was fantastic! Great, knowledgeable guides and incredible whale sightings.

reviews.author: Wade Loyning
reviews.text: Amazing experience!  Saw many whales!

reviews.author: Brittany Jefferson
reviews.text: Wonderful tour!

reviews.author: Claire Peery
reviews.text:
Best thing we did on Maui. The boats are low to the water for great views. We saw cows, calves, and bulls all in 2 hours

Wear a raincoat. You WILL get wet

reviews.author: Elena Uriel
reviews.text: MINDBLOWING. Unbelievable we share the same shore with this amazing creatures. Thank you Andrew and Charlie for this amazing, fun, respectful, and full of purpose activity. We find it actually mandatory ;)

reviews.author: Dustin Ciccarelli
reviews.text: Wonderful time with the family! Very knowledgeable and friendly! Thank you for the wonderful memories!

reviews.author: Chris Coleman
reviews.text: Amazing experience you should try it

reviews.author: Lorrie Soriano
reviews.text: Great whale watch! Capt. Mark and Marine Naturalist Casey were very knowledgeable and fun! I would definitely recommend this company for your whale watch.

reviews.author: Voyage03994664666
reviews.text: The staff was great. It appeared they were all happy to be there and cared about the boat and the guests. The pulled pork was outstanding!! Snorkeling was great too, we used their masks and fins and everything was great.

reviews.author: SuperSC
reviews.text: Ten out of ten on almost every aspect. The crew was amazing - so friendly but also safe and responsible. Shout out to Erika and Camille. The food was great - lots of breakfast options including scrambled egg, sausage, pastries and fruits. Fresh coffee and juices, too.  The snorkeling experience with multiple entry/exit points was awesome for going in and out of the water. The crew are lifeguards who go out to the perimeter areas on a paddleboard to watch everyone. It was just so good. We also ch

reviews.author: Diana L
reviews.text: We have been on several snorkeling boats with many crews. This crew works like a well oiled machine. Everyone seems to know their jobs and moves quickly to achieve each chore. The food  was tasty and plenty. Better than others I have had on tours. I liked that the booze was not flowing freely(you paid for alcoholic drinks). Lots of families with kids on the boat. They had plenty of snorkel equipment for everyone. I have never had a wetsuit available for my use($10/rental fee). Photographer took

reviews.author: constanceg861
reviews.text:
Fantastic!
Perfect for everyone in our family.

reviews.author: R3400UPnataliek
reviews.text:
We had a great time! Be sure to read your ticket carefully, you will need to arrive 30 minutes earlier than your ticket says. Also don’t forget to pay for parking. 

We had a great time. The staff was extremely pleasant, helpful, and all smiles. My kids greatly enjoyed snorkeling. They also enjoyed the slides. When you first arrive at Molokini it’s NUTS. Wall to wall people. Maybe wait 30 minutes and then go out. Crowd gets tired of snorkeling quickly. 

We did not get to go to turtle town bc th

reviews.author: standeek2018
reviews.text: Advertised two snorkel sites but only did Molokini. Didn't do Turtle Town.

reviews.author: PeteShari
reviews.text: Our group of 10 adults really enjoyed this cruise.  The food was really good, especially the rib dinner.  Drinks and service were top notch, but the whales stole the show!!  They were all around us, and so much fun to watch.  It was a beautiful way to spend our last night on the Island.

reviews.author: brendasO381UQ
reviews.text: The Calypso dinner cruise is a must-do!  The dinner is delicious,  the ride is smooth,  the music good and incredible whale- watching! The sunset beautiful.   The crew is top-notch.

reviews.author: D5060MWscottb
reviews.text: Captain and Staff were awesome!  The boat is very accommodating and the jumping platform and slides were a nice addition to snorkeling.  The food and beverages were good.  The whales were very active during our trip so the Captain made sure we had some amazing whale encounters also.  This is my second trip on Calypso and highly recommend it.

reviews.author: mandao517
reviews.text: Smooth ride, lots of turtles, staff was great.  Lot's of people on the boat but there was room for all.

reviews.author: bradjF3952EK
reviews.text: Great day in the sun with amazing crew and staff!!  Excellent snorkelling, whale watching and ability to swim with the sea turtles. Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Roam800669
reviews.text: Pleasant dinner cruise experience.  Food was tasteful and served warm, crew was pleasant and helpful, saw many whales in nearby waters.  Would definitely recommend if you're interested in a Sunset Dinner Cruise.  Captain Steve and rest of crew were terrific.

reviews.author: O3579GWjenniferp
reviews.text: The experience was fantastic. The crew was so friendly and the food was excellent. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: jackkF9901RD
reviews.text: They service us last on everything.. large tables that would likely tip higher got served first… not even close the the $450 we paid for a couple

reviews.author: shelleyhK2430UA
reviews.text: Second year doing the dinner cruise.  The dinner was so good!! Prime rib was delicious.  Whale sightings were kinda spotty all week on the boats.  Highly recommended!

reviews.author: 706bethd
reviews.text: We started with a double rainbow! Even with it being a rainy day, we were still able to snorkel at Turtle Town and though we couldn’t go to Molokini, the alternate destination was nice. Turtles, fish, and colorful reef could be seen. Whales could be seen almost the entire time from almost any direction you looked. The Calypso Crew was friendly and attentive. Highly recommend this trip.

reviews.author: Explorer822343
reviews.text: I highly recommend the Calypso snorkeling trip.  The crew is very helpful and friendly.  The boat is top notch with lots of room for seating.  There are many ladders in back with double railings to make it easy to get in and out of the water.  The hot breakfast and lunch were excellent.  This is the best snorkeling charter I have been on in the world.

reviews.author: X100ACC
reviews.text:
Calypso is a perfect craft for snorkelling and enjoying yourself! 
The multiple ladders into the water mean you can get in and out easily with no queue. There is all round visibility meaning everyone had great places for viewing of whales en route to and from Molokini crater.  The team were simply superb - helpful and kind, very alert to safety in and out of the water, fun to be with and very knowledgable.  I had a marvellous day, thank you team!

reviews.author: 941randid
reviews.text: Staff on board were wonderful.  Very attentive and helpful instructions given were thorough and helpful.

reviews.author: danielle_b1979
reviews.text: Great trip from the boat, food, crew and activities.  The turtles were for sure the best part…. molokini was good, but not many fish as i expected.  The trip was an amazing value…. Breakfast, lunch, snorkel gear, boat ride, so many whales in February, and two snorkel sites.  Totally recommend

reviews.author: Alt 45
reviews.text: Great fun

reviews.author: Cameron Wong
reviews.text: had a fun time on the ship. at $200 per ticket it was a little expensive for what it was, and because of the weather we couldn’t go to molokini crater. to make up they gave all adults free drinks. they made the best given the circumstances but still unfortunate we couldn’t make it out there

reviews.author: Teresa Hill
reviews.text: Amazing people. Amazing trip. We had the best time!

reviews.author: Luann Frank
reviews.text: We had a great time on the Calypso.  The meal and service was great and we even saw some whales on our dinner cruise.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: nancy folks
reviews.text: Wonderful ship and crew. Plenty of space to sit and move around. Crew helpful in spotting whales. Lots of fun. Great family excursion.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Bradley
reviews.text: Calypso was awesome! The staff, food, drinks and captain were fantastic! Everyone was so very helpful and accommodating! The boat and all equipment was very clean! When we return to Maui we will definitely book with Calypso again! Mahalo!

reviews.author: Kathy G
reviews.text: We had the best time! The crew were very friendly. The food and drinks were great!

reviews.author: Connor Leardini
reviews.text: Amazing. Got some of the best photos and experiences we could've prayed for. Can't wait to go again with friends.

reviews.author: Betsy Mundell
reviews.text:
Book your trip with Calypso Mau'i!
The boat is amazing! It’s large and roomy. There’s a seat with a table for every passenger. It made it so nice that we could eat our breakfast and our snacks and our lunch without having to balance our plates on our laps.

Excellent views. I highly recommend taking their cruise and snorkel trip during January. We saw so many whales! And it was wonderful that we stopped to watch the whales. The snorkel gear was in Great condition. The staff that served the food,

reviews.author: J Klein
reviews.text: We had a great time aboard the calypso. We did a trip to Malakini for snorkeling and added whale watching too and from. The crew was awesome. The food was GREAT! Drink (beyond the free stuff) was reasonably priced. The boat has like 10 staircases on the back so there’s no waiting get into or out of the water. Kids loved the water slides and jump platform. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Samantha Gutiérrez
reviews.text: Everyone is so nice, such a good experience.

reviews.author: Douglas Mcfarlane
reviews.text: Snorkeling trip, excellent trip, great staff, very well organized, very good equipment to work with various skill levels and ages. Highly recommended. Book thru "Boss Frogs" any location.

reviews.author: Becky Beck
reviews.text: Great trip. The crew were very patient with beginners and fun was had by all ages. There are 2 waterside and a platform to jump from as well as all the gear to snorkel. Lunch was good and even and ice cream for dessert.

reviews.author: Shay Peeler
reviews.text:
The time in the water was a blast! On board there was good food, friendly knowledgeable staff, and strong drinks.
Best day ever!

reviews.author: Kevin Gorman
reviews.text: The most amazing experience I ever had. The prime rib was cooked just right season very well. One of the staff on board named Macy made the experience even better. It is a must-do excursion while on Maui I  highly recommended it

reviews.author: kbadventure
reviews.text: Carlos and his team are great! He sets clear safety expectations from the start and then it’s time for fun! Dinner was impressive as was the staff. It was a windy night and they brought everything to us. The boat was well equipped with drink holders which helped a lot. It was pouring on the mountain and around us, yet the captain ensured we never got wet. This was a great sunset dinner cruise that we highly recommend.

reviews.author: tonisO4146HR
reviews.text: It was a great time! Great staff. Food was good. Beautiful sunset

reviews.author: SallysCorner
reviews.text: We had the best time! Crew was awesome, food was very good and Dolphins were out!

reviews.author: nevertoolate12
reviews.text: This was really an incredibly fun cruise day. You board the boat and they give you breakfast and lunch. The crew is so kind and helpful and fun but also make sure that you are safe. They take you out on about a 45 minute ride to a place that you snorkel ,  hang  and listen to music while snorkeling or lounging or riding on paddle boards and different rafts and equipment they set up for you. . It’s a fun lunch  , cash  bar and great music. I highly recommend this very fun day.

reviews.author: James T
reviews.text:
Spinner dolphins, flying fish, whales, Captain Cook Monument and sunset + multi course dinner and a free drink - a perfect way to spend an evening in Kona!

If you get seasick or motion sick, may not be right for you - take dramamine beforehand or bring with you if you think you might need it.

Crew and musician were all excellent and full of aloha!

reviews.author: williamj230
reviews.text: A wonderful cruise! Beautiful weather, interesting history, good food and a great sunset!

reviews.author: Carolyn H
reviews.text: Staff highly attentive! Always asking if things were ok, clearing plates from table etc. Then on our snorkel stop they were just as great! They will even bring you a drink out to the floatie! Bar service great & such a friendly staff all around!

reviews.author: BAPA1950
reviews.text: Went whale watching but the whales didn’t cooperate. That’s not the company’s fault. Saw a couple of small whale activity. Beautiful day on the water and met nice people. The staff was fine but nothing extraordinary.

reviews.author: E3887SWjenl
reviews.text:
A nice tour for mixed parties— kids can jump and slide, parents can relax on floaties or snorkel. Good food, but vegans beware— it’s a lettuce taro burger.
It was very yummy but the chips contain milk and the buns are brioche (egg) and we did communicate our dietary needs prior to the tour. That was a bummer.

reviews.author: Lynette N
reviews.text: It was great!  We did the Sunset Dinner Cruise on Valentine’s Day. It is our 50th Valentine’s Day together. I have a dairy allergy and they were totally accommodating to this!! We saw a school of spinner dolphins, flying fish and a whale!

reviews.author: CarolsThoughts
reviews.text: Good food and a nice atmosphere.  Not fancy, cuz who wants fancy in Hawaii anyway?  A little bit out of town, so yay, there is parking.

reviews.author: scottymcraig
reviews.text: The Body Glove team gave us the best experience of our trip.  Number one their boat is very comfortable and fun.  It was fast enough to give us an exciting ride, but comfortable enough that we didn't feel like we were going to fall off or had trouble holding on.  The team was super friendly and knowledgeable about the area as well as the dolphins and whales that we saw.  Not only did we get to see a lot of both of them, we actually found a spot where we heard a whale singing through the hull of

reviews.author: GeoffAnnabel
reviews.text: The cruise was fine, food basic but pleasant, crew friendly, sunset nice and I would rate it 4 to 4.5/5 but at AUD$290 for 3 hours, the value for money was poor.

reviews.author: Mickey J
reviews.text:
We took the whale watch tour today
 It was the best whale watching cruise I have ever had. We hade whales right next to the boat for at least 30 minutes. The naturalists commentary was great. Enjoyed it emensely. Saw lots of whales and some spinner dolphins.

reviews.author: John L
reviews.text: The crew are excellent and kept the drinks flowing. Be sure to go on the top deck or grab a table on the port side. The food was just ok. However the sunset view is spectacular. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: jennylO1224NO
reviews.text: This was amazing.  We saw 3 very active whales who breached more times than you could count, mama and baby plus companion.  Saw over 12 whales plus spinner dolphins putting on a show as well as bottle nose dolphins and flying fish.  Boat was comfortable upper and lower deck, shade or sun options. Staff was friendly and knowledgeable, parking just a few blocks from pier, easy checkin!

reviews.author: 250ryneg
reviews.text: Be careful on high wind days and taking their advice to continue the trip. My company booked an outing for 85 people, and the winds were high that day. I emailed BodyGlove to make sure the conditions would still be fine and if we should still take the tour, and was assured it would be "smooth-sailing". The entire trip was so rocky that we had multiple people throwing up onboard from seasickness and others lying down because the waves were so rough. While they cannot control the seas, a simple "w

reviews.author: christophermV5978GO
reviews.text: Body Glove Hawaii assured our company that there would be smooth sailing even though we had asked prior due to high winds. It was so choppy that many of our colleagues vomited from the back of the boat. When we asked Body Glove Hawaii to make it right, they responded that the conditions were smooth and safe... as if we hadn't just experienced it. We had to cut the trip short and return due to the waves; no refund of any kind was offered.

reviews.author: Connector751237
reviews.text: On our honeymoon and booked through our cruise ship. The staff are top notch! Boat is clean. Music is fun. Breakfast and lunch was delicious. Saw some really cool fish & coral, even some humpback whales.

reviews.author: vickyfV2716CF
reviews.text: This whale watch excursion was awesome! We saw so many whales. Two whales really put on a show for us. The captain said it’s the 1st time in 13 years he has seen what we saw today. Caroline was super informative and sweet! The Farmer’s from Texas

reviews.author: A D
reviews.text: We had a wonderful time with the Body Glove crew.   The musicians/historians were engaging and talented, the crew professional and courteous, and Sage is a fabulous bartender.   Food was delicious and beautifully presented.

reviews.author: Tina Brewer
reviews.text: Lovely personalized trip along the coast of the Bug Island.  Enjoyed learning about the history of Hawaii.  Would definitely recommend the company and the dinner cruise.

reviews.author: Bob Eggerichs
reviews.text: Great time! Great food! Great staff!

reviews.author: John Whalen
reviews.text: Staff does a great job to make the trip memorable!

reviews.author: Sue Cook
reviews.text: Fantastic time.  Food was really good and the service was excellent. Had a wonderful time!!!

reviews.author: Carol Bryan
reviews.text: My husband and I celebrated our 55th anniversary on Body Glove’s Historic Sunset Dinner cruise along the Big Island’s southeastern coast.  The crew was top-notch, the historian and musician worked well together, the meal was very good, and the sunset did not disappoint!  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Neil O'Regan
reviews.text: From the moment we checked in the staff was welcoming, friendly, helpful and attentive. The food was good and the service exceptional.  Snorkeling was fun! What a great day!

reviews.author: Mark Fordham
reviews.text: Fantastic experience. Great service. Friendly and attentive while letting the scenery be the star.

reviews.author: Tara Thorsvik
reviews.text: The talkstory was great, music was lovely! The food was good! I saw manta rays jumping, dolphin! The water was so different blues it’s all so beautiful! The service was great! The pina coladas were delicious!

reviews.author: Melissa Dotimas
reviews.text: Best dinner cruise ever. The whole staff was kind and professional. The food was amazing. The entertainment was outstanding!

reviews.author: Kathie Olson
reviews.text: Our morning snorkeling trip was the best! Channing and Cyler were very attentive to our needs. We will definitely go again!

reviews.author: Stephen Blackmer
reviews.text: I enjoyed my snorkel experience with the body glove crew.

reviews.author: McKayla Barker
reviews.text: Had so much fun, staff was amazing! CJ was the best bartender ever!

reviews.author: Conner Green
reviews.text: Staff is beyond amazing especially CJ!

reviews.author: Laura Nichols
reviews.text: Great staff, well prepared, nice breakfast treats once onboard.   Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Brent Nichols
reviews.text: The body glove catamaran is an incredible vessel with a kind and caring crew. A must stop for any water sport enthusiast while in Kona!

reviews.author: Joseph Velez
reviews.text: The absolute best cruise EVER!!! Literally from checking in to being dropped backed off, was non-stop F.U.N!!! The crew of body glove cruise was impeccable. Our host Leilani was super warm and welcoming, the historian was super knowledgeable and had hella jokes, the crew members all delivered our food and drinks without dropping a thing even when the waves were bumping (shout out to Chris!) and we truly had the best time. And last but not least our bartender I think her name was Maia? Was servin

reviews.author: Emily Singleton
reviews.text: Friendly staff, great experience all around

reviews.author: DayTrip00137892183
reviews.text:
Stefanさんが最高で特別なおもてなしをしてくれました！！景色のいいところに連れて行ってくれて、素敵な写真が撮れました！！

ご飯もショーも最高のクルーズです！

reviews.author: すし食
reviews.text:
Stephenさん親切にしてくださりました！！
一生の思い出が出来ました！！
サービスも料理も最高です！！

reviews.author: Seaside12022006458
reviews.text:
気さくな船長にたくさんの夜景と夕日を見せていただきました！
ハネムーンで来ましたが、美味しい料理と素敵な時間をありがとうございます
また来たいと思います！

reviews.author: Venture26195997989
reviews.text: キャプテンステファンさんに気さくに写真撮っていただきました。船内楽しく過ごすことが出来ました。料理も大変美味しく、量も適量でした。夕日が綺麗でしたが、その後の夜景も大変綺麗で感動しました。ハネムーンで来られているカップル、夫婦が多かったです。

reviews.author: Yeonjun C
reviews.text: 너무너무 특별했던 허니문 선셋 크루즈🩷 음식도 기대 이상으로 맛있었고, 바다 위에서 보는 선셋이 너무 아름다웠어요!!! 예쁜 사진 찍어주신 Stephen 선장님 덕분에 더 즐거운 경험이었습니다 추천해요!!!

reviews.author: Discover202006
reviews.text: My wife and I enjoyed excellent entertainment and the meal was so wonderful.

reviews.author: I8038WUdavidl
reviews.text: The entertainment was executed as if they were flight attendants on a plane. No urgency or passion, just going through the motions. The food was average, was a buffet line. The fish was undercooked, and the prime rib meat was like eating a piece of cloth. The caesar salad / pinto bean and macaroni salad was the best part. The free mai tai was nothing to write home about and the additional cocktail (I got an old fashioned) was poured only half full glass. We spent all of our time on the first dec

reviews.author: Terry B
reviews.text: Beautiful ship. Very organized and staff were super friendly. Many choices of entrees and food at the buffet.  For a short dinner show - it was performed well and super entertaining.

reviews.author: Journey63700033707
reviews.text:
Stephenさんがすごくたくさんおもてなししてくれて最高の時間になりました！日本語も喋ってくれます。写真もたくさん撮ってくれました。
ご飯もとても美味しかったし、風景もとても綺麗で素敵な時間を過ごせました。
悪天候でもとてもたのしめます。
卒業旅行には絶対行くべき！！さいこー！！

reviews.author: Curiosity34726165676
reviews.text:
キャプテンStephenさんがすごく優しくて、日本語も上手でたくさん写真を撮ってくれました！
綺麗な景色ととっても美味しい料理で大満足です。悪天候でも全然大丈夫です！
歌や演奏もすばらしかったです。
また行きたいです！！

reviews.author: NorthStar29525938232
reviews.text:
こっそり盛り上げてくれるキャプテンがいるので、新婚旅行でもおすすめです！
stefenありがとう！🫶

reviews.author: Pioneer04957624593
reviews.text: 素晴らしい船旅でした。ビュッフェも美味しく、フラダンスショーもとても素晴らしかったです。船長さんもとてもフレンドリーで、終始楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。素敵な体験をありがとうございました。慣れてない人は船酔いするかもです！笑

reviews.author: Coastal38626616562
reviews.text:
どの料理もボリューミーで食べ応えがあり、生演奏もディナーの雰囲気にバッチリで最高でした！
新婚旅行で訪れたのですが、特にキャプテンのステファンさんの接客が素晴らしく夜景バックに写真を撮ってくれたり日本語もペラペラですごく楽しかったです✨

reviews.author: _I6315BV
reviews.text: Stephen was amazing!! During in Hawaii, you should reserve.

reviews.author: Journey45377869089
reviews.text:
ローストビーフを目の前で切ってくれて、他のご飯もおいしかったです。
キャプテン、ステファンがすごくフレンドリーで素敵でした🤍

reviews.author: _T3443RP
reviews.text: スタッフのstephen がとっても優しく日本語で話してくれて嬉しかったし、おかげでいい写真とれて楽しかったです😊！！ブッフェのご飯もおいしくて景色もきれいで大満足です！！！！最高です！！！

reviews.author: Tour17158074204
reviews.text:
新婚旅行でハワイに訪れました🌺
花火が開催する金曜日に利用させていただきましたが、最高のディナークルーズを体験することができました✨
クルーの皆さん親切に対応していただきとても感動しました。
また、利用したいなと思っています！

reviews.author: 754yadanarm
reviews.text:
Breakfast is only banana bread and coffee. Don't even include the juices. Staffs are arguing in front of the guests. We didn't see a whale either. They offered to call the customer service to rebook but I am not doing it.
I wasted my half day and $85 per person.

reviews.author: laq314
reviews.text:
I had a good time in this cruise. Entertaiment, food and view is wonderful. Thank you to Christina too for  a great service.
I've done this activity many times but this is my first time to be in a Friday cruise. I really enjoyed the fireworks. But most specially the topnotch service of the staff. Again, thank you, Christina for making our visit memorable.

reviews.author: Relax41523324524
reviews.text:
新婚旅行で参加しました。
Stephen Youngさんのおかげでいろんな情報を知れてとても楽しかったです！
Stephenにまた会いにきます。最高の時間をありがとうございました⭐️

reviews.author: Julia Tyner
reviews.text: Great show , delicious food, highly recommend

reviews.author: Ethan Cassidy
reviews.text: Great performances and food, would come again. Pick the three-star course, it's literally cheaper and has good food.

reviews.author: Dae-hwan Wang
reviews.text: 좋은 서비스, 호불호 없는 무난한 음식, 공연 모두 좋습니다. 다만 5스타 예약을 해야 일행끼리 앉을 수 있고 코스요리와 분위기가 괜찮습니다. 그리고 불꽃놀이를 볼 수 있는 일자에 예약하는 것을 추천합니다. 신혼여행이나 기념일에 방문하기 좋은 곳입니다. 다만 종료 시간이 저녁 9시경이니 그 부분음 인지하셔야 합니다. 불꽃놀이 구경 때 날이 조금 추울 수 있으니 겉옷을 챙기는 것이 좋습니다.

reviews.author: Emi Monroy
reviews.text: Good view and food wasn’t bad. Service was not there. We sat down and we were the only ones who didn’t get our drinks until I asked the waiter 20 minutes after they attended other people. Didn’t come back to ask for more drinks or anything. Was disappointed since we didn’t have the drinks with the flower so my wife could’ve been apart of the fixing of the flower.

reviews.author: Rachael Mask
reviews.text: Highly recommended! The views and the show was amazing. Good food and staff. Thank you to our server Tina. She was  very personable.

reviews.author: かずひろ
reviews.text:
以前からサンセットクルーズに行きたかったので事前に予約してました。
滞在ホテルすぐから送迎があったので船までは🚢楽に移動できました。
料理はステーキやフィッシュ、チキンなどから事前に希望を申告出来ました。
前日食べたロブスターよりこちらのロブスターの方が美味しかったです。
日本語はなかなか通じませんが分かりやすい単語を使ってくれるので問題なく係の女性に注文できます。
最後にお祝いのケーキまで頼んでないのを頂きました。写真も📸三枚撮って貰いました。そういうサービスは聞いてなかったので非常に満足しています。良いクルーズが出来ました＼(^o^)／

reviews.author: Bill Hamil
reviews.text: Family of 5 returning for the 2nd time, Always good food and entertainment was great as well. Very nice wat to wrap up a great day in Hawaii

reviews.author: Ivana Tucakovic
reviews.text: Never seen a marina with such amazing clear water and tropical fish swimming around. Really amazing.

reviews.author: Theresa Russell
reviews.text: I lost count how many whales we saw on the whale watching tour. And the staff was so friendly. I highly recommend this tour and company if you are ever in Honolulu

reviews.author: さいたみ
reviews.text: 美味しいお料理をいただきながらショーを楽しめ、夕日もものすごくキレイで良い思い出になりました。

reviews.author: Lane Martin
reviews.text: The staff was very accommodating of my elderly parents and assisted us in joining my daughter's school group charter. Really appreciated their work and effort. Cruise was a lot of fun and food was delicious.

reviews.author: 修次メール
reviews.text:
初めてのハワイ、、初めてのサンセットディナークルーズ、、
新車バスで送迎！！
大海原を背にアラナモアナからワイキキ沖まで
ダイヤモンドを背に完璧な夕日、、
そして、、、これぞサンセットディナーって感じで、、、
何もかもが感動して今も、、目を瞑れば、、、
目に焼きついてしまいました😊

reviews.author: Joe G
reviews.text: Exceptional customer service 👏 and good food

reviews.author: Motorscout561
reviews.text: Keoki was great. A perfect tour!

reviews.author: N4881MGalicep
reviews.text: Uncle Turk was amazing and informative.  My family and I had a great time and enjoyed the city tour and then the Pearl Harbor experience.  Thank you Uncle Turk!

reviews.author: MakoGT
reviews.text: The tour was great and full of great info. The bus was super clean and on time. The guide was Nani Popolo and he made a great tour into a tour we will never forget. He is wonderful!

reviews.author: briangA7449TJ
reviews.text: Riding in double decker open bus was a fun experience however the bus was almost full when we boarded as we were the last on and the last off. It was humbling to experience Pearl Harbour. Turk was a very capable tour guide. This was our second tour with E Noa this week and both were great experiences.

reviews.author: Heedtripper
reviews.text: Efficient and appropriate length. Great use of a half day. RJ our driver and guide was responsive, respectful, and funny when needed.

reviews.author: hopesS5898KO
reviews.text: Duke was helpful and knowledgeable

reviews.author: 27deanac
reviews.text:
Very knowledgeable, great expression. Shared history of island and personal experiences.
"KEOKI"

reviews.author: 526renael
reviews.text: Keoki was a great guide and the food was delicious!

reviews.author: alexbS6474EH
reviews.text: Oh my goodness, for some reason we missed the “Orange Bus” and called them. The operator on the phone was the fantastic and the bus circled back to pick us up; we are very grateful - truly Ohana - nobody gets left behind!! Oli was amazing and provided great history about Pearl Harbour. Loved it!

reviews.author: Mariah J
reviews.text: It was great to get a tour of Honolulu, and our guide RJ was great!

reviews.author: S8139GFaaronj
reviews.text: We loved our trip to Pearl Harbour with E Noa Tours. Our driver RJ was fantastic, his local knowledge was incredible and the tour around the city was a highlight of our time in Oahu

reviews.author: josephfO4664ZX
reviews.text:
Our tour guide, RJ truly made the experience unforgettable. Their depth of knowledge was impressive—he didn’t just share facts, but brought each location to life with rich stories and context that made everything more meaningful.

What really stood out was his enthusiasm and energy. It was clear he genuinely love what he does, and that passion was contagious. RJ kept us entertained throughout with humor, interesting anecdotes, and thoughtful insights, ensuring there was never a dull moment.

If

reviews.author: Camper48593
reviews.text: Our tour was amazing.  We visited the U.S.S. Arizona Memorial and the U.S.S. Missouri. Our tour guide Nani kept us entertained and gave a great history lesson at the same time. I would highly recommend this tour.

reviews.author: Wendy M
reviews.text: Nani was absolutely amazing! So much great information. Made our day so much fun!! Will request him for any other tour we do! Best tour guide ever!

reviews.author: T9936CMseanh
reviews.text: The best tour ever. It was wonderful and breathtaking.

reviews.author: VivianC1248
reviews.text: We had an amazing time! Our tour guide (Turk) was incredibly enthusiastic and thoughtful. Everything was explained so clearly. Highly recommend!"

reviews.author: L229WQrobertr
reviews.text: Turk was great.  He was extremely knowledgeable and fun. We loved his personal touch.

reviews.author: F4282HSandrews
reviews.text: Had a fabulous tour with Nani Popolo. Nani was fun, knowledgeable and informative. Deliver a lot of information in a short amount of time during our tour through Honolulu. Pearl Harbor Memorial is a must do spiritual experience.  Facilities were well run and Navy officers and National Parks service staff were amazing.

reviews.author: Sylvain L
reviews.text: The visit was perfect and the pick up and drop off was greatly. Turc he know very well is story about Pearl Harbour.

reviews.author: 169braedens
reviews.text: It was really fun and Nani our tour guide was really good at telling the history of Hawaii and the days up to the attack at Pearl Harbor.

reviews.author: John
reviews.text: Great tour and experience with Oli yesterday.  His tour of Honolulu and explanation of Pearl Harbor before our visit was awesome.  Would highly recommend.  Shoooooooooots!

reviews.author: Laure Barthomeuf
reviews.text: We did a Pearl Harbor tour with Duke, it was perfect. Our guide was full of energy and stories. The schedule was perfectly planned (as an neurodivergent person it’s very important to me) and we had all the informations we needed. Plenty of time to do all the sites. I heavily recommend to book a tour with them instead of doing it all by yourself !

reviews.author: Paul Fenlason
reviews.text: We had a great tour. Our guide and bus driver was a beautiful black man and he did an amazing job. I would recommend it!

reviews.author: Agnimita Pal
reviews.text: Chico was great!

reviews.author: Colleen M
reviews.text: We went on the USS Arizona Memorial and city tour. We had a most enjoyable afternoon with our driver Shannon, the Irish Hawaiian. I highly recommend Shannon and this tour company.

reviews.author: Laura Beebe
reviews.text: We did the Pearl Harbor Memorial tour and the Memorial itself is wonderful. It is a very moving experience and we highly recommend going. We had two problems with our tour which is why we rated it a “3”. The first issue was that we expected an open air bus ride so we could see the sights. Due to lower numbers, we had an enclosed bus and that was disappointing. The second bigger problem was that we couldn’t understand our bus driver. He spoke fast and his annunciation was poor. He is a native Haw

reviews.author: Julie A. Galvin, PhD, LP
reviews.text: Oli was amazing!  We did the Pearl Harbor Tour and everything was great.  Oli was fun and personable and did a great job sharing Hawaiian culture, history, and information about Pearl Harbor with us.  He was efficient and on time and the double decker open air bus was a wonderful added surprise!  We highly recommend Oli and E Noa Tours!

reviews.author: Carrie Fowler
reviews.text: Momi aka Pearl was so wonderful! She was knowledgeable and helpful during our tour. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ashley Ziegler
reviews.text: Had a great tour with Nani Popolo!! He has the best bus and history lessons!!

reviews.author: Richard Center
reviews.text: Our driver Oli came on time to pick us up and gave us an outstanding history of Pearl Harbor. The only problem with this trip was it never stopped raining! Luckily we got to the memorial before it was shut down for weather. I do recommend not using open air double decker busses in this weather as we all got soaked and hurricane type winds blowing thru it. Bring a closed bus!

reviews.author: Jason W
reviews.text: Took a tour around Oahu with Big Jon. It was awesome. Big Jon really knows people. We had an autistic boy on the tour and the things Jon did to make it fun for the young man was just special. Big Jon is invaluable to your business because you can just tell he connects with people. Jon is just one of the best people and you can tell it’s genuine. Thanks for having us for the day! Until next time…

reviews.author: Naomi Powell
reviews.text: Wow.  Great communication and the tour was fantastic.  K2 our guide was the best.  An open air bus in the rain was a new experience for sure, but made for a fun adventure. Can't wait to do more tours with E Noa

reviews.author: Tina Summerton
reviews.text: Keoki was absolutely amazing — the perfect blend of informative and entertaining. He didn’t just guide us; he elevated the entire experience

reviews.author: Julie Wall
reviews.text: Pearl Harbor tour on day of a storm was made enjoyable by the shuttle drivers telling the history of Pearl Harbor. The afternoon shuttle back was enclosed instead of open air so we were out of the rain and wind. Driver took us back to our hotel instead of pick up location. Much appreciated after being soaked and tired.

reviews.author: Barry Randall
reviews.text: A must do if you visit O’ahu. Very humbling and moving experience made all the more enjoyable by our tour guide Nani Popolo, probably the best tour guide we’ve had anywhere in the world.

reviews.author: Troy Underwood
reviews.text: Their website and brochure were out of date and they didn’t pick up from our location anymore.    They refused to refund   Don’t recommend

reviews.author: Nathan Hudelson
reviews.text: We went on tour to pearl harbor. The guide “Turk” was great and very knowledgeable as a native hawaiian. Would definitely do this again in future!!

reviews.author: Melanie Cook
reviews.text:
Visiting Pearl Harbor amazing yet very humbling.
Feel honored to have paid our respects.
Driver Chico was incredibly knowledgeable and very enthusiastically entertaining.
Thank you Chico for making our day more memorable.

reviews.author: ginger dalton
reviews.text: Excellent tour. Takes the guess work out. Already had ticket to ferry. Moni was full of information and great sense of humor making the trip over more enjoyable!

reviews.author: Aggie Taualo
reviews.text:
Thank you Chico for a great tour today.
He was kind enough to wait for Six ppl who ran to the restroom before the tour started.

Great information about Hawaii.
I will definitely do this tour again when in town.
My group enjoyed your tour 👏👏👏❤️❤️
Aggie

reviews.author: Quest53141047061
reviews.text: ガイドさんがとても親切で説明も分かりやすく、景色を楽しみながらバスに乗れました。スケジュールもちょうどよく、無理なく観光できました。楽しい旅になりました！！

reviews.author: joymW323PI
reviews.text: Great tour. We'll worth the money. Marlon was a great guide.

reviews.author: chriscB4799QB
reviews.text: Marlon was great, tour was perfect amount of time. Pineapple ice cream was great,  North shore shopping and dining was fun. Beautiful little ride from resort strip

reviews.author: Z2230ESkimberlyc
reviews.text: Great tour to the Dole Plantation and North Shore! Marlon was a great tour guide! He was knowledgeable and made the ride fun.

reviews.author: stevengA1945JH
reviews.text: Patrick and Chris were excellent drivers. They were so full of information on the drive to Pearl Harbor and returning to our hotel. The driver from Pearl Harbor to Aviation Museum was also awesome!

reviews.author: Paradise67674178001
reviews.text: Lola was a great tour guide - very knowledgeable,  great sense of humor!  Stops gave enough time for photo opps and food.

reviews.author: adaorahe
reviews.text: Everything was amazing!! Lola is sweet, funny, and entertaining.

reviews.author: I3714MBbriana
reviews.text: Had an amazing tour of the island with Lola as our tour guide! She has great knowledge of the island and its history making this an enjoyable experience. Her cheerful / bubbly personality made this even more enjoyable. Highly recommend this tour for anyone with family or friends.

reviews.author: camilley2026
reviews.text: Lola was incredible. I had an amazing time even though I was solo. It was informative, interactive and HILARIOUS. I will be back in future with my kids. Thank you a million. 🌺 Extra thanks for the donuts.

reviews.author: Dawn K
reviews.text: The circle island tour with Lola was a fabulous way to see the island. Starting the day with yummy Poi Malasada and view of the east side of the island was amazing.
