She was so friendly and knowledgeable about the island and Hawaiian culture/history.  We had a great day and were able to see so many great places throughout the island. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.author: 428elysea
reviews.text: Lola was an exceptional tour guide and driver. She was attentive, full of historical information (even dates!) and adorable to boot. Lola is 1000/10!

reviews.author: 402jarenc
reviews.text: Lola is the goat! Funny and very informative which is perfect for the tour.

reviews.author: hopesS5898KO
reviews.text: She was amazing! Knowledgeable, entertaining, and a great tour guide!

reviews.author: Gregory L
reviews.text: Lola was an amazing tour guide and chauffeur. This tour was an excellent way to spend our first day ever in Hawaii.

reviews.author: lindakT7158MG
reviews.text: 🌺Aloha Lola! Your tour has been Absolutely Amazing! 🤩 My son & I enjoyed your knowledge and shares immensely! You made the experience memorable with history facts, local historical info and tons of chuckles- SO MUCH FUN! We will always remember that “Aloha will keep us out of trouble” Your fans from Arizona! OFA ATU! 😊🤙

reviews.author: lemonp616
reviews.text: Our driver was named Cindy I believe and she was very rude and unhelpful. Would use a different service next time.

reviews.author: Getaway03681104796
reviews.text: Lola was a great tour guide. She brought us some taro poi donuts to start the morning. Not only was she knowledgeable about each site, she also told us some great history of Hawaii.

reviews.author: S7933AUkellyf
reviews.text: Lola is fabulous!! Great tour!! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: danasY1481VR
reviews.text: Lola is the best! Highly recommend this tour 10/10! Very professional, knowledgeable, friendly and a great sense of humor! P. S. you MUST try the fish tacos and fish and chips at Haleiwa Seafood, GREAT recommendation Lola!!

reviews.author: adrianlR8132DL
reviews.text: Lola was a great tour guide and very knowledgeable of the island history, plus she provided taro doughnuts to all the guests!!!!

reviews.author: Maureen Hartin
reviews.text:
Lola was an amazing tour guide and a wonderful bus drive
She is so knowledgeable about history as well as places to go to on Oahu

reviews.author: Glenn Hubbard
reviews.text: Really enjoyed the tour. This was by far the best tour I've ever been on, and it's not even close. The tour guide was very informative, kind and entertaining. The bus was modern clean and comfortable. Would recommend all to use this company.

reviews.author: Cathryn Mezynski
reviews.text: Oahu circle tour wonderful driver guide Kimo Carter. Weather didn't cooperate. But a great day for a bus tour.

reviews.author: Emily Lockhart
reviews.text: Kimo was amazing and super funny! This tour was one of the best things to do while in Hawaii 100% recommend :)

reviews.author: Gabe Perkins
reviews.text: Excellent tour experience. Our guide was fun, knowledgeable and also a veteran.  Superb safe driving skills in rough traffic. Brandon, thank you very much! We are so glad we booked with you!

reviews.author: Harry
reviews.text:
Marlon Friendly Guide, but the Tour Was Boring

Marlon is a very welcoming guide with a soft voice and a constant smile. During the tour, he always counted the participants before leaving each stop to make sure no one was left behind, which was very thoughtful.

The first stop was an ocean viewpoint where everyone received a bottle of water and a purple donut. The next stop was a mountain viewpoint, followed by a visit to a Japanese garden. After that, we stopped at a place where you could buy c

reviews.author: Trevor Rowley
reviews.text: We took both the Dole Plantation/Halewai and Star of Honolulu trip with them on separate days. Both times everything was amazing. Guides were perfectly on time. Very friendly. I can't say enough good things about this company.

reviews.author: JAMES Hurley
reviews.text: Our grand circle tour with Marlon and royal star was great. Marlon kept us on time without rushing us and provided us with great inf on history and meaning of many words.

reviews.author: Terrence Howard
reviews.text: The tour turned out to be an overall great experience. I was reluctant to take a nine hour bus tour. Let's face it, that's a long commitment and eats most of your day.  Kudos to Tony, our driver and tour guide. Clearly he is a pro and helped to make my experience one of the best ever. I learned so much about Hawaii and managed to pick up a few new words of knowledge. His dry human and jokes are classic dad jokes. He managed to get a few laughs from me. And trust me, that is not easy. If you wish

reviews.author: Ronelle Dement
reviews.text: Mahalo Royal Star and Uncle Chris Miyaji for giving us a safe, fun, and educational experience. We appreciate you driving us to He'eia and keeping us safe as well as talking story with us and sharing your 'ike Hawai'i. We truly appreciate you and are grateful for your service. Me ka ha'aha'a- Ms. Ronelle, Mr. G, and Mr.Josh and nā haumāna.

reviews.author: Brooke Chandler
reviews.text: I went on the circle island tour and Marlin was our guide. He was very knowledgeable about the area and was able to give us a lot of information in a fun way. We were impressed with how organized the tour was and how clean the bus was. Having a restroom available was so wonderful as well.

reviews.author: Andre Hamel
reviews.text: We did the North Shore Haleiwa Express and Dole plantation and this was a thrill! Our guide and driver Chris was so nice and knowledgeable. Great experience!

reviews.author: John Recker
reviews.text: The tour was fantastic. Marlon gave my wife and I so much information about the island, the state, and everything we asked about was answered. He took his time with us and we really felt we were cared for. Excellent scenery. Would highly recommend

reviews.author: geneva lewis
reviews.text: I had a fantastic time with my daughter. Marlon the driver made the tour very special and a great experience.

reviews.author: Nikhil I
reviews.text: It was a really great experience. Lola was our driver. She was very knowledgeable and super nice, great and friendly attitude. The bus was well kept and clean. The tour was 9 hours but did not feel long or tiring. Good stops and great info along the way by Lola over the mic.

reviews.author: Carol Atkin
reviews.text: What a great tour we had with Marlon today on royal star tours. We went ariund the island from Waikii to the north shore. He was so informative on the history of Hawaii and a pleasure to talk with. He went out of his way with a few passengers who had difficulty getting on and off the bus. We will be looking for your tour company next year when we return. I hope we get Marlon again

reviews.author: Yesenia Chavez
reviews.text: Marlon the tour guide was a great tour guide. He gave the great history of the trip we took. Would dif book again

reviews.author: Julie Gasbarro
reviews.text: Wonderful tour guide. Tony's the best!

reviews.author: Fearless50618744412
reviews.text: Bad bad experience!  We booked for March 26 but got bumped to April 1 when we were not even going to be in Hawaii. Was able to cancel however and re-book for the following day Thursday, but again had issues.  We booked it for 8 o’clock and we didn’t get there until 1130 because of transportation issues we kept getting pushed back further and further.  Because of this, we had to cut the trip short because we had already made another engagement and in order to accommodate that we had tocut the tou

reviews.author: OllanA2
reviews.text:
The wife and I went on the January 23, 2026 tour.

I can't believe that I never went to Pearl Harbor on my many visits to Hawaii! It was a very memorable experience. Jeremiah (Cousin Miah), was our driver and tour guide. He was very entertaining and gave us a pre-tour and post-tour history of the area. He kept everyone awake on the tour bus by calling on us randomly and giving us some fun facts - I think that's what made us enjoy the tour more!

Once Cousin Miah dropped us off at the entry gate

reviews.author: johntL2262XI
reviews.text:
First off, our tour/shuttle bus driver was in a really terrible mood, and didn’t hide it, not to mention, very difficult to understand. Shadow Box = shuttle bus, Rose = Ross, but his mood did get a little better later in the day. 
Once we got to Pearl Harbor, I’d done this tour over 10 years ago and it was great, it felt more like pushing cattle thru a squeeze shoot. How many can we jam thru and collect their money. This time, I brought my two, teen and pre-teen, kids, and at 59 years old and ha

reviews.author: RahulGirotra
reviews.text: The details while booking are misleading !!! We could have better taken a taxi or Uber from hotel to Pearl Harbour… The bus just picked us and dropped us off at Pearl Harbour. USS Arizona tickets are NOT included as mentioned in the booking and we had to stand in a long “standby” queue,  something we could have done ourselves. There is no tour guide, nothing. Would strongly recommend that this tour should be avoided !!

reviews.author: jksmalley90
reviews.text: What a great tour! Our guide Summer was so informative and knowledgeable. We will definitely use this company and Summer as our guide again!

reviews.author: sbL2558UP
reviews.text: This was an amazing day! Summer made it such fun. She share incredible information with everyone. Summer is definitely the best tour guide we have ever experienced. Her guidance was perfect and helped us have the best experience possible. The Pearl Harbor tour was very emotional, educational and moving. Lunch was tasty and efficiently provided. The Polynesian Culture Center went beyond our expectations. Truly beautiful and informative. We definitely recommend this tour!!!

reviews.author: toddp14
reviews.text:
Awesome day  long day  saw it all at Pearl Harbor o  it is an experience 
Brian was the best  got us to and from safe and sound and the poi donuts were awesome   And the city tour an lookout was incredible

reviews.author: Nancy S
reviews.text: Summer with Aloha Tours is so knowledgeable. What an amazing experience. Everything was awesome. Pearl Harbor, The Polynesian Cultural Center, Dole Plantation, and Macadamia Nut Farm. Mahalo Summer!

reviews.author: phillips17
reviews.text: The driver was weaving in and out of traffic’s almost causing several accidents while talking on the phone. Most of information given was negative political blab. We did enjoy the places we went to

reviews.author: Denise G
reviews.text: Summer was an excellent guide. She was very knowledgeable about the history of the island. It would’ve been nice to ask more questions instead of her just continuously talking. The Dole plantation was a money grab,  it could be eliminated from this tour as we did not learn anything about pineapples, but saw a lot of pineapple merchandise. more time should be given to Pearl Harbor, there wasn’t enough time to see all of the museum. By eliminating the dole plantation more time could be spent at th

reviews.author: oryanag2025
reviews.text:
A fun trip around the Island chauffeured by Papa P..
Very entertaining,  Island history, and a few extras like humor and a mini musical concert put on by Papa P. himself.

reviews.author: teresasingleton915
reviews.text: The site is somber and uplifting at the same time.  Well maintained and beautiful.  We bought a tour package so our time was EXTREMELY limited.  I would love to go back but I will take my chances with a taxi or something.  $925 for just a couple hours at the site isn't my idea of a good deal.

reviews.author: phillutonfour
reviews.text: Our driver and guide Summer was excellent and fun, and her knowledge of local history was great. Seeing the Arizona Memorial was sobering and worth a moment to reflect. The USS Missouri was a big kid moment that I loved and was incredibly interesting.

reviews.author: chelseadF2383SA
reviews.text: This can simply be described as the tour from hell. I will say our bus driver ‘Papa P’ did the best he could with the circumstances that didn’t seem to be his fault. Started out being picked up over an hour late due to a marathon taking place that they were ”unaware” of.  This blocked access to major stops like diamond head and caused  other stops to be cut short due to time. Most of us were excited about snorkeling, when we made it to turtle bay the doors were stuck closed for a solid 15+ minut

reviews.author: Resort41904059202
reviews.text: Paid for the whole tour and the bus broke down for over 2 hours was stuck and when we got on the road unable to see over half of the places we paid for and expected.

reviews.author: 884stevens
reviews.text: Had a great adventure. Jorge was fantastic. He was so knowledgeable and ensured we would have a great experience. Told us what to look forward to seeing and how to get started beforehand to skip the big lines.

reviews.author: F4236HEkeithp
reviews.text: Started with bus being late.  They booked tour during a half marathon.  We didn't get to all of our destinations.   Bus broke down.  Door wouldn't open. No air conditioning. The activities we did make were cut short.  We really should be refunded our money because of the tour's lack of planning and faulty equipment as well as not providing what was paid for!!!  Everyone should receive a refund.

reviews.author: R889VEjamies
reviews.text: Cousin guy was the best tour guide! Super funny, friendly and very knowledgeable and made the experience very fun!! Would love to do it again :)

reviews.author: Jenna C
reviews.text: We had a great time. Summer picked us up from the airport and the company had arranged our flights from Kona. Summer did a great job explaining the history as we traveled to and from Pearl Harbor and we also explored the city. Would recommend!

reviews.author: jacquelinemF3509WU
reviews.text:
The Grand Circle Island Tour was amazing, as well as, our guide "Summer"
Oahu is a beautiful place.
This is definitely a must do.

reviews.author: Christopher McDonald
reviews.text: Jordan is AWESOME!!

reviews.author: Mary Jane Dorman
reviews.text: I was VERY DISAPPOINTED that Discover Hawaii Tours had changed our tour to a different tour, one day prior to our date.  Their reason was that they did not have enough people for this tour, (a possible change in tour should be an alert under the tours descriptions). I had highly suggested Oahu Mini Circle Island w/ Pearl Harbor Arizona Memorial for my 4 family members since my husband and I had done it 2017 and knew that they were on the more adventurous side. They missed exploring the rainfores

reviews.author: Preeti Mathur
reviews.text: Awesome experience!! The staff was assiduous and made our Pearl Harbor trip interesting with never a dull moment. Would love to explore more with them.

reviews.author: Claudia VdK
reviews.text: We took a great tour to Pearl Harbor. Our tour guide was very nice and entertaining. It was very interesting.

reviews.author: Wasim Bhat
reviews.text: I really enjoyed complete Pearl Harbor Tour experience with Discover Hawaii Tours. Would love to comeback and check out the Volcanoes next time.

reviews.author: Sarwar Ashraf
reviews.text:
Experience of a lifetime
I had NO IDEA how to go about the trip, what to do, where to start.
Luckily I contacted Discoverhawaii! (Dennis) was great. They organized all aspects of my trip so I did not miss the all the MUST sees!
Thank you for the excellent service.

reviews.author: Diego Delorenzi
reviews.text: Impresentables! Cancelé un tour con más de 72 hs de anticipación y todavía no me han devuelto nada. Vengo reclamando desde mayo... Una vergüenza.

reviews.author: Miriam Mireles
reviews.text: Don't book any tours with this company. They have the worst costumer service. I've been trying to get my money back for a tour that was cancelled for about a month now. They even told me to stop calling them. Honestly save your money people because this company is a scam they owe me over $1,000.

reviews.author: Joel VanLuven
reviews.text: Be careful with this one. If they cancel a tour on you, they will do absolutely nothing to refund the cost of the tour to you. In fact, they will try to make you jump through hoops - which I am still doing after a tour that their company cancelled in May of this year.

reviews.author: Chris Skender
reviews.text: My wife and I took a day trip tour from Maui to Oahu to see Pearl Harbor and the rest of the Island.  Cousin A showed us way more than we thought.  We had a great time and it was a beautiful experience.

reviews.author: Geoff Young
reviews.text: Like so many others our tour with these thieves was cancelled the day before we are due to go. Numerous calls to their office to get refund only to be told they will send me a check. I did not waste time as no company these days issues cheques for a refund so I immediately contact the credit card company and claimed refund. Strongly suggest not to book with these thieves. Go with someone reputable.

reviews.author: Brittany Ali
reviews.text: They cancelled our volcano tour and will not give us a refund.  They keep telling us the cheque is in the mail or their systems won't work for a refund!  They owe us $900.00+ USD.  We cant afford to be out that sort of money.  Total scam artists DO NOT BOOK WITH DISCOVER HAWAII!!!!  I would give 0 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Andrew James
reviews.text: We had a wonderful experience with Doscover Hawaii Tours! We did the Road to Hana. Our tour guide Stan was very friendly, entertaining and informative. The day was perfectly planned out. It was so nice to sit back, relax and enjoy the road to Hana without having to stress about driving it and knowing where to stop, and Stan was able to point out things we never would have known on our own. This was one of the highlights of our trip to Maui. We highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Julia ProsInc
reviews.text:
Better than expected! We started our with Keith who picked us up from our hotel and brought us the our first stop at Pearl Harbor. He was knowledgeable about the island and told stories about Pearl Harbor before we arrived. After this we went with a new driver because we were doing a different tour than others that were with us. We then were with Hana, he made our experience above and beyond. He talked about each stop and gave us history about the island and taught us several words/phrases.

Our

When I never received a confirmation email I called them and the tour was oversold.  I asked if there was availability on another day we could go and they said that one was oversold too.  They charged my card and said they would mail me a refund check.  A week later I call and no check had been mailed and I was told my credit card can be

reviews.author: Ashley Folsom
reviews.text: Ariel was VERY rude, even told us we couldnt use the restroom. We found out later that he cut the tour of Pearl Harbor short by an hour and a half!

reviews.author: M Lim
reviews.text: Our tour guide, Kanoi (sp?) was excellent. She was informative, funny, remembered everyone's names immediately, and kept us on schedule for the whole day.

reviews.author: Paul Corona
reviews.text: normally, when I go on vacation anywhere I always go on on my own and never plan much. When I visited Hawaii in 2014 for my son's re-enlistment I booked a Discover Hawaii tour on a whim and am so glad I did. Learned a ton and am so glad I was able to just sit back and enjoy rather than looking at maps all the time and trying to figure out traffic and parking! Anyone that goes to Hawaii should book a tour with you guys----it is MOST worthwhile!

reviews.author: Matthew

It was the circle the island tour that they booked. Actually the company booked it for them over the phone since they she had trouble booking it online. When they were at Pearl Harbor and were told lunch would be on the base my mom said they were to have

I booked the Ocean Voyage March 2026 for our family and no one really enjoyed it from kids to adults. Our guide had very low energy and was very quiet. First you ride on a trolley over to the beach area to get on a small boat. Our guide shar

reviews.text:
Had a fantastic afternoon with my teenage daughter. Luke our guide was amazing. He was professional, polite, knowledgeable and nothing was too much trouble.
The vehicles are great fun to drive. 
You get to see a lot of film locations, as well as learn about the history and culture. 
I would highly recommend this 3 hour Deluxe Tour 
Just a word of advice, it's very dusty so wear appropriate clothes and sun cream. I would highly recommend wearing their goggles and not just sunglasses.  
Luke also

reviews.author: A2138YZdonnaf
reviews.text:
My daughter (teenager) and I had a lovely time. Our guide was Brett, she was very polite, professional and knowledgeable. We were hacking for around 1 hour 40. You can see the coast, through the trees and out in the open. You don't go past any film sets i.e Jurassic Park but the scenery.  Is amazing. The horses were lovely and we didn't have any issues
I would highly recommend this tour
Remember to wear proper footwear, long bottoms, sun cream and bug spray 😁

reviews.author: xochi45
reviews.text: So much fun, the time flies as you are visiting such a beautiful place. I learned so much about the area and saw the most gorgeous mountains up close. The tour takes you to some really cool movie sites and you definitely get a feel for being in Jurrasic Park.

reviews.author: alisonk511
reviews.text: Our tour guide was Andy. He was excellent. He had a passion for his job and this place. The 2.5 hours flew by. We all were very happy with everything we saw. Andy made our experience special. Mahalo Andy!

reviews.author: Chella1
reviews.text: Absolutely worth it! The views were beyond beautiful and the tour was great. We did the Jurassic Adventure Tour. Our guide was awesome. She was funny, took great photos (on our cameras) and very knowledgeable. I 100% recommend this excursion!

reviews.author: hollyk435
reviews.text: Tanner our tour guide was one of the best. He had such amazing knowledge and we learned so much.  I would 100% recommend going on the jurassic park tour.  My kids loved it so much, we watched the movies to see where parts of the video were on the land.  Go enjoy it for yourself.

reviews.author: chaparro79
reviews.text: tour guide Doug was so knowledgeable and the experience was filled with laughter and joy throughout the entire group onboard.  Awesome pictures everyone making memories.

My family was the last on. I am handicapped and use canes. I sat in the back on  driver Vaiai’s side over the jump in a slashed seat no padding over the hump. It was his last run of the day so he really didn’t care to provide a better experience. My eyes were at the level of the bottom of the wind

reviews.author: Navigate52762932968

reviews.author: brandonhS2007DX
reviews.text: E-Bikes were so the move! It was so fun (and so easy!) to ride around the mountains on our own e-bikes. We saw a bunch of the same spots as the other tours (e.g., movie stops), but our group was smaller and the experience was way more enjoyable if you are physically able. The e-bikes make it easy, so don't worry about effort. Price seems high, but it truly is a beautiful and fun experience. Food is also pretty good—I really enjoyed my shrimp poke bowl, truly! And the transportation to and from W

reviews.text: trip got cancelled due to weather, it looked like it would have been a good experience

reviews.author: O3323IErodrigop

reviews.author: anncV3075HK
reviews.text: The place is beautiful.  My daughter and I would tour the grounds even without having the movie references.  It was a gorgeous day after having torrential rain and wind two days before hand,  The staff was great and our tour guide was fantastic.  We would come again.

reviews.author: cheyennemchaney
reviews.text: We had an amazing time on the UTV Raptor Tour at Kualoa Ranch! Our guides, Ku'ulei and Jeren, were fantastic. They were incredibly knowledgeable about Hawaiian history and shared so many interesting stories throughout the tour. You can tell they genuinely care about the land and culture, which made the experience even more meaningful. The scenery was absolutely beautiful and the whole excursion was so much fun. Highly recommend this tour if you're visiting Oahu!

reviews.author: Markfromthe414
reviews.text: Amazing experience, top to bottom.  By far the most fun I've ever had ziplining.  The views were phenomenal and the ziplines themselves were great.   This was of my favorite parts of my trip to Hawaii.    Would return 100%

reviews.author: Brittney129
reviews.text: Vaughn and Cina were AMAZING!! They were both super personable, fun and outgoing. We were a bit late for our check in time and they were flexible with our late arrival. Super fun experience!!  Thank you again Vaughn and Cina!!

reviews.author: joeyl588
reviews.text: It was ok! Very expensive for what it included and disappointing that you could get out and walk around in only 3 spots! The most expensive tour but didn’t see to include as much as the side by side tour or even just the movie tour. The other tours seemed to be ably to go in way more locations and get out much more and explore! Also we weren’t allowed to bring our special needs sons wheelchair and he cannot walk so I missed out on a lot as it was to much for my husband to carry him around! Defin

reviews.author: Mike Fillman
reviews.text:
We had a blast on the Kualoa Ranch deluxe UTV tour. Sarah, our tour guide, was very friendly and knowledgeable and knew how to to take the best pics/videos! The scenery is beautiful and it's cool to see where so many films were made.

I was expecting a corporate experience, but got quite the opposite. The ranch owners are stewards of the land and do a lot to preserve it and contribute to the community.

We highly recommend the deluxe tour for a smaller group and more sites and time to take pictu

reviews.author: v Sim
reviews.text: We did the Movie sites and ranch tour. Vina, our guide was amazing. She was friendly, knowledgeable and very engaging. It was a blast seeing all the places our favorite movies were made. We were even lucky enough to see a pod of whales too. Worth every penny we spent. Note: we all had lunch in the store at the ranch it was around $15.00 for the plate lunches and the meals were good and with plenty of food.

reviews.author: Karthik Jeet
reviews.text: Movie Sites and Ranch Tour experience is good. I was told by the staff whenI called before booking that pregnant woman can opt for this Movie sites and Ranch tour but it is very bumpy ride. My bus driver took lot of care but still it is very bumpy as road is uneven, unpaved has lot of gravel. So I would NOT recommed this for pregnant women.

reviews.author: Jenny Detrisac
reviews.text: Cool spot if you are a movie buff.  A bit of a tourist spot.  Nice people who work there.

reviews.author: Colton Black

reviews.author: Colton Black
reviews.text:
A great experience. Traveling through the scenes of many big movies, probably lots you didn't know were filmed there either. We took the Movie and Ranch tour. Our guide, Taylor was funny and offered great insight to the history of the ranch, island, and the film locations.

Make sure to book ahead online

reviews.author: chadly
reviews.text:
Zipline tour!
Highly recommend we had a fantastic guide, Ellie, she was amazing super friendly and was able to ease my family into being more comfortable into trying this for the first time.
Definitely would want to return and try this again and props to our guide Ellie!

reviews.author: Trevor Andrews
reviews.text: Too busy

reviews.author: RA Jen

I’ll edit my review after those months are listed and I have completed my activity as these administrative deficiencies have cast doubts on future services. I’m optimistic they will get things sorted out.

reviews.author: Ken Reimer
reviews.text:
An absolutely unforgettable experience! The Jurassic Adventure at Kualoa Ranch was hands down one of the highlights of our trip — stunning scenery, iconic movie locations, and a tour that truly makes you feel like you’ve stepped into Jurassic Park.
The real standout was our guide, Ioane. He was incredible — knowledgeable, engaging, and brought amazing energy the entire time. You can tell he genuinely loves what he does, and it made the whole experience even more fun and memorable.
One of the fun

reviews.author: Robert Paul

reviews.author: KOFKOF
reviews.text: A beautiful ranch with lots of crops and many filming scenes and props from American movies. At high altitudes, you can enjoy unparalleled sea views and the magnificent Hawaiian mountains. You must visit Hawaii once while you are still young. （ 🏃A traveler from China )

reviews.author: Shannon Montgomery
reviews.text:
Review is mainly for the ATV tour, although the entire property is wonderful!!
My husband and I had the best time on this tour! I would come back and do it again! The views, history and knowledge you get out of it is priceless!

Biggest shout out to Naui  and Nalu our guides- we love them and hope to tour with them again! These guys deserve a raise!

reviews.author: yonatc

reviews.author: veraj392

Ropes was a fantastic work out. The ladies at check in were

Our zipline guides were both personable and knowledgeable- I felt very safe the whole time and really enjoyed all the zips. There were 8 people in our group (3 families) so we all got to chat and get to know each other a bit. My aunt has some mobility issues, so

reviews.author: M9977FJbenjaminc

Very personable and related well with both kids and adults in our group. They made it fun for everyone. I was a solo member of the tour and they took time to get to know me and ensured I had fun. The best part is there are several other activities you can do on top of the zip line. I will definitely come again and try something else. The s

I wore my cellphone lanyard to take photos on my own, but I have to admit that they know how to take good photos.
The park is not big but it’s well organized & well maintained. It is good to spend a quality 2-hour time with fami

Did the Extreme Tower…rock climbing…50’ free fall and superman jump.

I’m 54 female and enjoyed the workout. It was not easy…rather challenging but I’m so proud of myself for doing it all. It was super fun.

My children almost 11 and 12 years did it too!

Our guides were amazing Katie and Holly were extremely upbeat…informative…helpful and fun…❤️🙏🌅🏆🎖🥇🎉

Leilani in the gift shop is so sweet…

What am amazing place and ppl.

Worth every penny.

Everything is conveniently located, including the gift shop with drinks and other necessities for purchase. Would suggest applying sunblock and bug spray before starting. They also offer ATV rides, an adventure

reviews.author: Natalie Truong

Making sure to keep the experience fun while safe at the same time! I enjoyed zip lining for my first time and will 100% recommend it.

reviews.author: Kathleen Higginbotham
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about our adventures here. We ended up doing the following tours and I have to call out our guides in parentheses below because they were so good;

Firstly the grounds were very clean and we were greeted immediately. Secondly Good

reviews.author: Jamiyah Afful

reviews.author: Jenny Sun
reviews.text: We had the most amazing zip lining and adventure course at Coral Crater! Alexia and Katie took great care of our group during our six zips- they were funny, charming, and entertaining and the ultimate professionals. Junior and his colleague were amazing looking after us during the adventure course. Highly recommend Coral Crater- we can’t wait to go back!

reviews.author: Ute
reviews.text: I came to do 3 Zip Lines and ended up doing all 6 Lines. The employees were very helpful,friendly and knowledgeable. I hade the most fun ever.

Went with the family .

reviews.author: Arianna Tubbs

We came all the way from California to celebrate our dear friend Sierra’s bachelorette trip!
We had Celeste as our instructor and it was an absolute blast with her! I know we made her work day a memorable one! With one of our girls screaming Celeste! Celeste will get it cause she laughed so hard!

If you book here requests for Celeste her guidance, patience and full of laughter was something we loved!

reviews.text: Excellent guide. Great ATV adventure.

reviews.author: Jan L
reviews.text: Leone was an excellent tour guide to Waimea Canyon. He is knowledgeable on Hawaiian history, the language, the plants, and was a very good driver.

reviews.author: hrnsn
reviews.text:
ハナウマベイは予約が大変とのことで利用しました。
予約の心配がないこと、現地での行列をスルーできることを考えると、概ね満足。

しかし、時間を守ってくれなかったのが残念な点でした。
余裕を持って集合場所に到着したものの、知らされていた出発時間になってもバスが現れず、15分ほど遅れてバスが来ました。
とても不安な時間を過ごしました。

帰りのバスも、時間を守って行ったにも関わらず、次のバスに回されました。
どれくらい待つのかたずねても、すぐ来るから待って、と言われるのみでここでも不安を感じました。
結局次のバスが来るまでもまた15分ほど待たされました。

reviews.author: D_Andre_33
reviews.text:
What an absolute amazing tour! 
Georgia was amazing and gave the tour extra character. 
This trip is definitely a memorable one and highly recommend!

reviews.author: 996tessp
reviews.text:
My partner and I booked our trip to Oahu through Costco Travel, and Roberts Hawaii was the shared airport shuttle service provided. The large coach buses were nice, clean, had comfortable seats, and were air conditioned. The shuttle service from our hotel to the airport at the end of our trip was excellent.  The shuttle was right on time, and the bus driver was professional and friendly. 

The reason behind my 3 start review is for our experience getting picked up at the airport. We were given s

reviews.author: lorilF4661RV
reviews.text: Cousin “Elaine” was a fantastic tour guide as part of our princess cruise.  She was very knowledgeable and had a friendly personality and was a joy to speak with during our tour.  I would highly recommend her and her tour.  She asked us to refer to her as cousin Elaine and considered everyone family.

reviews.author: sach c
reviews.text: Not worth it. These guys ditched my family and myself after they didn’t give instructions on pickup. We waited at the kiosk and no one was there. Their rep continued to lie and didn’t offer any help. Left us stranded.

reviews.author: doncardi
reviews.text: Bay is beautiful but the rain made for a lackluster day. Admissions fee is reasonable. Robert’s Hawaii was very confusing for departure times. Waited for over an hour for pickup due to poorly communicated schedule changes. Got soaked to the bones. Needed a better day.

reviews.author: sophierI9709OR
reviews.text: My husband and I chose this tour because we could start and end in Oahu where we were staying but get a full day on the Big Island. The Volcano National Park was a big reason we went with Robert's Hawaii tours. Our tour guide Grover was informative from the first moments we interacted and didn't stop with his facts or information until he dropped us off in Kona. We were lucky enough to see Kileaua erupt shortly after arriving in the park and watch it progress as we explored more of the park. Gro

reviews.author: Roving591586
reviews.text: Great driver! Easy access for wheelchair user! We had one of the big green buses with a functioning lift at the back of the bus. Our WONDERFUL driver, Lisa, knew how to use the lift and was ON IT with getting us onboard safely and quickly. Lisa is also a knowledgeable, funny, and caring tour guide. You get more than a shuttle ride! Roberts Hawaii sends you to the gate of Hanauma Bay with an employee, and she (apologies for not catching her name) was a passionate proponent for ADA access, working

reviews.author: lisamW2332SG
reviews.text: Our guides name was Ray and our driver, Claude, they were the best! Ray was warm, personable and gave us a magical tour that my husband and I agree, was one of our best tours we did the week we were there! Loved every second! He even sang "What a Wonderful World" for us, which is my favorite song of all time!

reviews.author: Sightsee560851
reviews.text: This was PERFECT. We were shuttled from our hotel, skipped the lines at admission, and didn't have to worry about not getting a spot in the park. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: charlespI3098YN
reviews.text:
Last time we played the ticket game, paid for parking, sat in line for 45 min, watched the video, and finally made it to the bay. 

This time we booked with Roberts Hawaii,  and it was so much better!!!! Pick your pickup location, pick the time, jump on a comfortable air conditioned bus, WATCH THE REQUIRED VIDEO EN ROUTE, and walk straight down to the bay! No waiting in line at all, and the staff was friendly and service oriented!

I 100% will book again and have zero reservations recommending t

reviews.author: M2349QXamandaf
reviews.text: I was somewhat disappointed with the trip as every stop had a 15 or 20 minutes limitation- hardly enough to get off the bus and back on. We viewed some beautiful views but several of the stops seemed more like merchandizing than actual learning about Hawaii.

reviews.author: dalerineh
reviews.text:
My husband and I did a Grand Circle tour of Oahu yesterday. It was great !
The bus was on time, very comfortable and also super clean, and the pickup spot was very close to our hotel. Simon ( I hope I spelt your name right) our guide, was very knowledgeable about his subject and we learnt a lot, he was also relaxed and very easy to talk to with good local insights. There was only one other group with us on this tour, they left us halfway through the day to join another Roberts tour so we had an

reviews.author: NorthStar07483361693
reviews.text: We had a great time! Convenient pick up! The bus ride was fun and I learned something new! Everyone is friendly and I would do this again!

reviews.author: robertwD8308HM
reviews.text:
I rate the Hollywood Movies and Waterfalls tour in Kauai tour as very good. 
Our driver Claude did a great job. Ray, our tour guide was fantastic. He does not use a script. He is very knowledgeable. He displays a kind and professional demeanor. He made the tour very fun and enjoyable. The tour was much better than I had anticipated, thanks to Ray. 
We traveled by sites where scenes from several movies and tv shows had been filmed. The tour also included a short stop for lunch consisting of a sod

reviews.author: Russ911
reviews.text:
We had the pleasure of spending the day with two excellent tour guides as we explored the beautiful island of Kauai and learned about the interesting history of movie making that has occurred over the years.  
First of all tour guide Ray did an outstanding job.  He was friendly, professional and FUN.  His personality enhanced our experience in every way.  Driver Claude was the perfect complement to Ray.  Fun, personable and above an excellent driver.  Our safety was his number one priority.  The

reviews.author: naomih110
reviews.text: We really enjoyed Hanuama Bay and didn’t have to worry about booking tickets, finding parking or wasting time. Everyone at Robert’s Hawaii was super kind and professional. The electric shuttle is top of the line and was on time both ways. All in all totally worth the added expense.

reviews.author: Tourist21256546775
reviews.text: Everywhere in Hawaii was beautiful and fun, but Hanauma Bay was the absolute highlight that I'll remember for a long time. It was so convenient to be picked up right in front of our hotel. Being able to watch the nature preserve orientation video inside the shuttle was a huge time-saver! After a long day of snorkeling, being dropped off back at the hotel when we were exhausted was such a relief. I definitely want to come back here again!

reviews.author: Saahithi282
reviews.text: Aloha. Great tour. the tour guide and bus driver were so friendly and helpful. would highly recommend. mahalo!

reviews.author: Fabian Vasconez
reviews.text:
Great experience with Roberts Hawaii!
Roberts Hawaii provided excellent, punctual service, picking us up and dropping us off at Hotel La Croix. Our first bus driver shared interesting facts about Waikiki on the way to Hanauma Bay, which made the ride even better.

Hanauma Bay was beautiful, with plenty of colorful fish to see. It was also great not having to worry about parking or trying to secure a reservation that sells out in minutes. Overall, a smooth and enjoyable experience. Highly recomme

reviews.author: Beth Green
reviews.text: Our driver was very kind and efficient once we got to him.  The text I was sent told me to meet him at baggage claim 31.  No one was there.  I called and they told me the text information was old and where to go. I found the driver.  If my phone had died or I did not have one this would have been more of an inconvenience.  The need to update ther information.  That said, our driver was great.

reviews.author: Francisca Alarcon
reviews.text:
Lo pasamos increíble! reservamos con ello y nos aseguramos nuestro cupo en Hanauma Bay! Nos pasaron a buscar cerca de nuestro Airbnb y nos despreocupamos totalmente del transporte y estacionamiento. Todo el staff muy amable! Mahalo for everything!
Saludos desde Chile

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: Friendly driver, comfortable and air-conditioned vehicle. Timely arrival (waited only 10 minutes at airport). It made the journey far more relaxing.

reviews.author: Cherlyn Clark Seamster
reviews.text: Service was great! Drivers and agents were very personable. Would definitely use them for my next trip.

reviews.author: Laura Hanley
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable tour guide. Knew all the best sites for photos in the park and took us several great places all over the island.

reviews.author: Noelle Yuen
reviews.text: Great experience. Pick up and drop off was easy and on time, with location that was close to our Waikiki hotel. One of their buses broke down in the afternoon and they were able to put us in another bus so that we were not delayed on the way home.  We got the 8:45am pick up and 3:15pm drop off so that we could have max time snorkeling, and this worked well for us. Recommend packing a lunch because the cafe is up the hill from the beach.

reviews.author: Julie M
reviews.text: Pick up from airport took a little longer than expected. We waited at the pick up spot about 30min. But the pick up from hotel was great and timely. Would book again.

reviews.author: Adam Ruggles
reviews.text: Roberts provided safe and efficient rides to and from the airport.   The drivers we had were safe and friendly.   Mahalo

reviews.author: Kevin Bagley
reviews.text: I’ve used Roberts several times on visits to Honolulu.  Never had an issue.  Very timely service.

reviews.author: joe c
reviews.text:
Great service
I use them every time I go to Hawaii.

reviews.author: Ridwan Khan (Riddy)
reviews.text: Good, friendly service

reviews.author: 阿里山
reviews.text: The driver is very friendly and very nice.

reviews.author: R Scott Goodfellow
reviews.text: When we were dropped off, the driver said when we are being picked up to wait over there and I questioned him to say exactly what he meant and pointed to an area about 20 x 30 feet square.  After he pulled away I noticed that the space was for bicycles and scooters that could be locked to metal posts. So when we were ready to be picked up a week later the bus didn’t see us and left because we were supposed to be an additional 75 ft further beyond that spot. We had to call customer svc to get ano

reviews.author: sach chopra
reviews.text: These guys were late picking us up and then gave the wrong instructions for pick up, weee not help and left my family and myself stranded.

reviews.author: Savannah Johnson
reviews.text: Our tour guide Mike arrived on time, checked us in on the bus and headed out. He was very knowledgeable about the sites we visited. The bus was clean, A/C, and comfortable. Mike provided a keepsake water bottle filled with water for the tour. We visited Pearl Harbor, USS Arizona Memorial & etc around the island! We drove to the top of the mountain and were able to see the entire island. Such a beautiful site! Thanks Mike!

reviews.author: baurzhan sellard
reviews.text: Wes was awesome. Funny, kind, and knowledgeable! Pearl Harbor itself was a good experience with a lot of cool WW2 artifacts and great memories with the USS Arizona and the USS Missouri. If I get chance to come back to Hawaii I’ll definitely book with you guys again and hopefully Wes can be the tour guide/bus driver again!

reviews.author: Tina Evans
reviews.text: Great tour of the city.  Driver did a wonderful job telling you about everything.   Even explained about the language and the alphabet, how the letters are pronounced.   Pearl Harbor was a must see.  Lots of information and monuments to those who were lost.

reviews.author: Leslie Waters
reviews.text: What an amazing adventure

reviews.author: April Pooler
reviews.text:
Our driver / tour guide Gar was AMAZING!!!
Of course we loved and appreciated going to theAZ Memorial ❤️🇺🇸💙

reviews.author: Chris Seiner
reviews.text: Lani was a wonderful driver and guide.  She very knowledgeable and entertaining.

reviews.author: Mark Oppelt
reviews.text: I paid for the island package from Oahu to the big island to see the volcano. Our guide was excellent very courteous and knowledgeable. However, the park was closed. Apparently the guy did not know that and I paid a lot of money for nothing. I got to see some waterfalls And black sand beaches, but they should’ve known that the volcano national Park was closed. The website says the visitor center is closed. I’m not sure what they mean by that because the park is closed the visitor center at the v

reviews.author: Jennifer Wilson
reviews.text:
Loved the places we seen, needed more time, was really rushed at Pearl Harbor.  The tour guide was all about HIMSELF and all HIS family had done, actually was a turn off

The tour for the Island tour was absolutely amazing and we had THE BEST tour guide.  He made the day fun and knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Ken Nelson
reviews.text:
The trip was well organizing from beginning to end.  We flew in from Kauai and had 0 problems with the travel and meeting the tour shuttle.  Rey was a GREAT host and very informative.

Having the tickets/passports for each destination printed and organized for everyone was awesome as well.  Rey did great job explaining each site and keeping us organized and moving.

Lunch was great.  The extra waters provided to us was great as well.

Do note it is a LONG day, especially when flying in from anot

reviews.author: Tracey Buffington
reviews.text: Road to Hana and Haleakala Sunrise tours were excellent! Our tour guides Salesi and Preston were wonderful!

reviews.author: FLORENCE BRIGHT
reviews.text: The guide was very courteous, and he was very knowledgeable about the history and landmarks of Hawaii. He was very informative about the places we stopped at and the places we passed by during our tour and an excellent driver.

reviews.author: Justin Ray
reviews.text: The tour was well planned. Our driver, Kimoke'o was knowledgeable, entertaining, and communicated expectations well.

reviews.author: Bea
reviews.text:
We used Polynesian Adventure Tours for two full days of touring on Oahu through our travel agency, Collette, and the experience was excellent from start to finish.

The first day included Pearl Harbor National Memorial, downtown Honolulu, and the National Memorial Cemetery of the Pacific. Our driver that day was absolutely hilarious. He shared personal stories and perspectives that helped bring the history, culture, and conflicts of the islands to life in a way that felt human and memorable. Bet

reviews.author: Richard Metcalf
reviews.text: It was great except the loud screeching every time Mike would hit the brakes!

reviews.author: Deborah Schildbach
reviews.text: I enjoyed the entire tour at Pearl Harbor. Every part of it, from beginning to the end taking the ferry to the Arizona Memorial. The hostess was informative and the tour was extremely educational.

reviews.author: Devilsdoor
reviews.text: My wife and I had a wonderful day tour with Kailani Tours leaving from Kona Hawaii and heading south.  We stopped at a local cafe for coffee,  a wonderful bakery, black sand beach where we saw sea turtles, then up to Volcanoes National Park for a crater rim walk and a great lunch included with the tour.  From there we went to Hilo where we saw Rainbow Falls, stopped at Big Island Candies (great shortbread and chocolate), a local farmers market  then back to Kona on the Saddle Road.  The tour van

reviews.author: stalbansroamer
reviews.text:
Just a few comments…

Plus points
1. Nice tour, good driver/guide (Derek), comfortable van, relaxed vibe
2. Restaurant meal was good although the alcoholic drinks were expensive and the service was unexceptional
3. Walking through the amazing lava tube at nighttime

Minus points
1. The volcano chose to be pretty inactive on the day we visited
2. The sky was overcast so we didn’t get dark-sky star viewing
3. Unresponsive customer service from the tour company prior to the trip - outsourced to the

reviews.author: 757ro
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding full-day tour experience in Hawaii. The day started perfectly — they arrived early, and we didn’t have to wait at all. From the very beginning, everything felt well organized and thoughtfully planned.

Our first stop was a charming local coffee shop where we sampled their homegrown blends. Just outside, in the garden, we were able to pick and taste fresh fruit directly from the trees. We then visited the southernmost doughnut shop in the U.S., which was a fun and unexpected

reviews.author: NanR111
reviews.text: The best money I spent on Hawaii, an incredible day!!

reviews.author: scottv448
reviews.text: Thia was awesome! Personable and fun to hang with for half the day. I have been on tours on the islands but I love how she taught us new things about the Big Island.I hope to go on another tour on my next trip to the Big Island. Coffee tour was fun. Malasadas, black sand beach, turtles,checked out  the volcano,lava tube,got to hold tephra, yummy lunch at Volcano House, fun stops at Big Island Candies,Farmer's Market(Kula Shave Ice was a hit!) and Rainbow Falls. Towel service,snacks, and drinks a

reviews.author: joelY8916RZ
reviews.text: Tour was very good. Derrick was an excellent guide. Explained everything very well. Safe driver. Van very comfortable. Provided plenty of restroom breaks. Restaurant dinner was very good. Could have used some mustard or mayonnaise on sandwiches for picnic lunch. Could have used a second video on ride home. Otherwise it was an awesome experience.

reviews.author: Explorer759303
reviews.text:
Our group of four friends booked a tour with Kailani because this was our third time with them and the previous two were perfection. And speaking of perfection,  this was our second time with Grant, tour guide extraordinaire!
   Grant pulled up at our condo’s doorstep in a nicely appointed Mercedes van and from that moment on, we were in for a fun day of adventure and discovery! It was wonderful to not have to worry about driving or making any further arrangements. Since it was a private tour, G

reviews.author: fredmP8289AJ
reviews.text: Outstanding Guide, Toby. Very knowledgeable, considerate, and humorous.

reviews.author: audreysA2045ER
reviews.text:
Derek was an excellent guide- never rushed, and very knowledgeable. He went above and beyond to ensure we got to see the volcano erupt, even leading us through the woods at night in the rain to a private lookout. So so grateful we got to travel through the park with him! 

Outside of Derek’s great work, itinerary was great and van is lux. And $300 is pretty good for a 12hr day including 2 meals.

We were disappointed the tour did not have all that was promised… no hot towel service, no all day s

reviews.author: RobinM1903
reviews.text: Very poor! Our excursion was cancelled by the company on January 5th. Per their policy we were entitled to a full refund. 5 weeks later we have not received any refund. Been told it’s under review. Paid $1180.24 4 months in advance. Unfortunately being forced to seek legal action for non-payment. Will not recommend ever going with this company. I paid in good faith and expected to be treated the same.

reviews.author: F5828SUjamesr
reviews.text: Great experience! Great overview of the entire Big Island!  Chris was a super knowledgeable guide who provided so many stories of life on the island. Stops at the coffee plantation, Volcanos National Park, Big Island Candies and Rainbow Falls, made for a perfect day. I highly recommend Kailani Tours!

reviews.author: monicapL4290TB
reviews.text: Toby is an amazing guide with lots of history of the area, great stories, caring and considerate. We would definitely use this company again. He did everything possible to ensure e could to all the tour safely and kept us on schedule. Thanks

reviews.author: SandlerAT_CC
reviews.text: We had a wonderful trip. The van was not over packed and felt like a private tour. Our guide Nico was born and raised in the area we toured and had tons of history and how the areas have changed over the years he has lived there. A full day and very worth every minute . Recommend this trip for anyone who wants to get the the a good view of how coffee grows, volcanoes have built the island or just get to know the southern section of the island.

reviews.author: 393yinh
reviews.text:
Our tour guide yesterday was extremely knowledgeable and informative.
Grant shared a lot of interesting background information and explained everything clearly, which made the experience much more meaningful and engaging. You could really tell he knew the area very well and was passionate about what he was doing.

Overall, it was a great experience and we learned a lot.
Highly recommended!

reviews.author: lowellh2026
reviews.text: Our tour guide Paul was amazing from the moment we arrived throughout the entire trip.  He was extremely knowledgeable.  We were in a group of 9 which was perfect.  Length of trip was good.  Paul did a great job at letting us know the schedule and what to expect. Overall a great experience.

reviews.author: OnAir29060016939
reviews.text:
It was a fun trip, a breathtaking experience seeing the volcano area.!!!
But in the future it would be worth taking a tour that would stop at the other point of interest. We took this due to some mobility issues.
But the trip was worth and tour guide was excellent. I think his name was Paul.

reviews.author: mindidayton
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful experience. Paul was a fantastic guide. He shared so much information about the island from history, geology, botany and volcanic.  We would highly recommend this trip and ask for Paul!

reviews.author: Audi W
reviews.text: Fantastic experience, wonderful guide, delux accommodation and great food. Our guide Paul was able to accommodate a disparate group’s needs

reviews.author: 1cjj
reviews.text: This was a great tour for our short time on the island.  Derek was amazing. He was able to balance our desire to linger and the schedule.  Coffee was generous at several stops.  Lunch at the Volcano House was a worth the price and the view was beyond description.  Made the best of a rainy day!  Bring along extra cash for chocolates and bakery items!  Ask for Derek -- he made the day!

reviews.author: Steve B
reviews.text: The weather didn’t cooperate and we caught Kilauea between episodes, but we enjoyed our day with Thia who taught us everything we needed to know about volcanoes

reviews.author: Kay Aralyn Roberts
reviews.text: THIA and BRANDY were absolutely amazing today ! They were both so knowledgeable and we learned so much from both of them. We really had the best day ever and experienced a huge variety of different adventures including sampling coffee,  exploring lava tubes and volcanic fields, sea turtle watching, and seeing rainbow falls! Best tour guides ever !

reviews.author: Helena Weeks
reviews.text: Thia made our tour an awesome experience. My family and I had a great time with all the stops and she was so knowledgeable about the whole island, including history and folklore. She’s also well versed with lots of facts about the plants (my husband had some interests with that topic). Our group of 8 people included 3 teenagers and a grandparent and everyone was entertained! We did a private tour of the Volcano Explorer Tour. Highly recommend it, especially with Thia!

reviews.author: Kevin Wong
reviews.text: Derek, our guide took my family of four (2 boys aged 11 and 14) on a first class 11 Hour tour of the Big Island, complete with the Volcano National Park, Rainbow Falls, Black Sand beach, malasadas, the best coffee, Hawaiian chocolates and cookies at a special candy shop.  He picked us up in a very comfortable air conditioned sprinter van with snacks and sodas and water.  I dont know how he does it, but Derek has so much knowledge of the Big Island and was able to explain and answer all of our qu

reviews.author: Jim Greenway
reviews.text: This was a great way to see the volcano and several other spots on the island. Good pace with plenty of rest stops for bio breaks and treats. Thia, our driver guide was great.

reviews.author: DisappointedButNotSurprised
reviews.text: Tour is great, as long as you're ok with knowing that tour owner treats his employees like absolute garbage behind the scenes.

reviews.author: razvan vaida
reviews.text: We had a great time on our volcano tour. Grant is very knowledgeable about the history of Hawaii and the geology of the volcanos. Time just flew by. Our original group tour was cancelled because there were not enough participants so we had to upgrade to a private tour. It all worked out well in the end.

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: Was picked up on time for the tour. Thia  was our guide and she was outstanding. It wasn’t the best of days since the weather was a little wet but Thia changed things around to keep us drier. She knew a lot of the big island and answered everyone’s questions. She pointed out points of interest that we could do when not on the tour. She was well liked by all of the businesses that we stop at. It was a great day thanks to Thia. You have to go on this tour.

reviews.author: Mansi Bindal
reviews.text: Thia was fantastic! Best your guide we have had. We learned a ton, the snacks were great. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Mary Paraskevopoulos
reviews.text: We experienced many of the island’s highlights and our guide’s knowledge of geology and island history gave us a very rich experience. Grant explained people and events in such detail and with such passion for his subjects that they came to life so vividly.

reviews.author: Ching O
reviews.text: Grant was awesome! Our first time in the Big Island and we learnt heaps from Grant. Absolutely loved every bit of the 11 hour day!

reviews.author: Naji Pitts
reviews.text: My wife and I had an exquisite time on the Big Island Adventure. This tour was the highlight of an already amazing vacation, made even better by our tour guide Grant Mitchell. Grant embodies the aloha spirit - warm and generous with his wealth of knowledge about the island. We had some amazing food, sampled delicious local coffees and candies, strolled the black sand beaches, saw sea turtles, hiked waterfalls, stared down a volcanic caldera, and strolled through a lava tube. All the while gettin

reviews.author: Donna G
reviews.text: Toby made this tour!  So excited to share his lifetime experiences and knowledge about the greatness of Hawaii.   Great easy going personality, and great concern for our comfort and safety.,  Definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Elin Miller
reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic tour!  We'll do it again!

reviews.author: Luke Pepevnik
reviews.text: Grant was an amazing tour guide

reviews.author: Tricia Heath
reviews.text: I was scheduled for an all day tour of the Big Island. It did NOT disappoint! What a day! From a Hawaiian coffee plantation to the Black Beaches of the Southernmost part of the USA seeing turtles basking in the sun, malasadas, included, and the Volcanoes National Park, hiking through a Lava Tube, the steam vents, and watching Kilauea spurt out a bit. Lunch at Volcanoes Lodge was included. Off to Rainbow Falls in Hilo and a Hawaiian candy maker. The day was enhanced greatly by our tour guide/educ

reviews.author: Stephen Werner
reviews.text: Grant Mitchell was a delight and very informative

reviews.author: Swagata Mitra
reviews.text: Very good trip, awesome,   Grant is Great....

reviews.author: Ty D
reviews.text: Grant did an amazing job. He definitely deserves a raise. Grant was so knowledgeable and funny. Definitely makes you feel like family and has a wealth of knowledge about the island and the tour. My family and I enjoyed the big island tour with him and a small group of others. Grant was very accommodating and fun. I would highly recommend seeking him out as a guide when you book with Kailani Tours. Please don’t seek out any other tour guide company, Kailani Tours is worth it and the best.

reviews.author: Celeste Broadhead
reviews.text: Grant was awesome! He deserves a raise. So funny and knowledgeable and inclusive. I was only here for a three day trip and this made the whole thing worth it because I got to see the whole island in a day! Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Rosann Perrotta
reviews.text: Grant was a great tour guide!  He shared facts, insights, stories, and jokes throughout the day!  We couldn’t believe the day passed so fast and we enjoyed every minute of it!  Especially, impressed how he managed to include the 9 year old in the group!

reviews.author: G5318DTlorrainep
reviews.text: Joe was our amazing tour driver. He had a wealth of knowledge. Valley was great to work with. Would highly recommend this trip to everyone. The sites were amazing!

reviews.author: DA284ever
reviews.text: The Road to Hana tour with Valley Isle Excursions was absolutely incredible! Our guide was knowledgeable, friendly, and made the long drive feel effortless and fun. Every stop revealed something amazing—lush rainforests, cascading waterfalls, black sand beaches, and charming little towns. The scenery along the way is just breathtaking, and having an expert guide meant we didn’t miss a single hidden gem. The pace was perfect—relaxing but packed with unforgettable sights. I can’t recommend this to

reviews.author: 6jenellw
reviews.text:
This tour was a highlight of my trip. The tour guides were informative, knowledgable, and professional. I also appreciated the communication ahead of the tour - not too many emails and the phone call ahead of the pick up to let me know they were almost to my pick up location. 
This was really the best way to see the sunrise at Haleakala since they manage the driving (with their expert driving, I did not get car sick!) and get the small tour group to the viewing area ahead of most other groups fo

reviews.author: Wanderer177122
reviews.text: What an incredible experience on our Road to Hana tour with Malia as our trusted guide.  The tour was amazing!  More beautiful and educational than we could have imagined.  Malia had us learning the Hawaiian language, many fun facts about the state, folklore about the road to Hana and much more.  Valley Isle Excursions took care of our every need from the time we booked the trip until they dropped us off at the end of the tour at our condo.  We were treated like 'ohana (family).  We would highly

reviews.author: Z8266UJheatherc

reviews.author: tracyjP3881PA
reviews.text: We mostly loved this tour.  Seeing the sunrise over the crater was a once in a lifetime experience. Unforgettable! The bus picked us up on time at the hotel although there was a bit of miscommunication regarding where to meet at the hotel.  The tour guides were so friendly and super knowledgeable.  We learned a lot about the volcano and we appreciated the warm ponchos that were provided! I was also pleased that ginger chews were handed out for motion sickness since the drive up the volcano had s

reviews.author: stalbansroamer

Indeed, as Paula, our driver/guide, pointed out, the rain meant that the waterfalls were even more spectacular. Our guide was pretty spectacular too; she gave a really good explanation of what we saw with some very interesting background history and colour, as well as expertly navigating the long and winding road than led …. to George Harrison’s old house on Maui ! (Note: it wasn’t part of the tour but Paula tol

reviews.author: steveni817
reviews.text: Had an exceptional tour with this group. Tour size was small enough (9) that good attention was provided to each visitor and all questions were answered when asked. Tour guide (Malia) was just recently hired but is a local who knows the route and is very familiar with all the stops and Hawaiian  lore that is associated with them. Stops were made with adequate time to take pictures, purchase souvenirs, and explore the location. I highly recommend this company if you want to spend a day exploring

reviews.author: 441lynettee
reviews.text: Had a wonderful trip with Malia, who is a Hana resident and well-versed in the trees and plants of the rainforest as well as all the fabulous attractions on the Road to Hana. Lots of fun and a beautiful trip!

reviews.author: 380chandab
reviews.text: Fantastic tour of the road to Hana with Travis as our guide!! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: W1741WJlisac
reviews.text: Words can’t describe how wonderful Paula was on the Road to Hana Tour this week. Although pick up at our hotel was 6:15 a.m., I wasn’t ready to end our time with Paula at drop off (dark thirty). She shared so many details/stories while driving the 106 curves safely, stopping for our breaks, serving our yummy lunch, AND respecting local drivers. Highly recommend this company for your touring interests…they know the roads!

reviews.author: DougV400
reviews.text: IMO driving the road to Hana is more fun when someone else is driving.  Our driver/tour guide, Paula, was amazing.  She constantly provided excellent commentary and great stories.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Tripper4141
reviews.text: Fantastic trip! Jeff and Everett were friendly, and knowledgeable. The ponchos were awesome keeping us warm. We had dresses for the cold, but they were still helpful. The ginger chews were a nice touch. Breakfast was very good and fast. Highly recommend this tour! Worth getting up for!

reviews.author: sal0tet
reviews.text: Awesome! Great tour guide, very informative and kept us engaged throughout the tour. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: J-Seagal
reviews.text:
A week before our trip to Maui I had a question about changing into swimsuits for our scheduled Road to Hana tour and sent an email to the company.  I received a reply within 30 minutes.  The answer was Yes, one can change into swimsuits during lunch before the black sand beach visit and then change out of them at a stop after the waterfall stop to be dry for the ride back to the hotels.  

A few days before our tour I received an email confirmation that included other useful information, such a

reviews.author: FarAway23825344372
reviews.text: We had an excellent experience with Derek as our driver/tour guide! He was very knowledgeable and personable. The breakfast and hot lunch was delicious! If you reserve this tour, be sure to request Derek. He will go above and beyond to exceed your expectations!

reviews.author: SueS131
reviews.text: We arrived on Maui during torrential rain and Govenor declared and emergency. Unfortunately, our reservations were the next day and it was rainy and windy. We didn't see sunrise, but was still a great trip due to Everett and his great stories and info. We saw NeNe (state bird/goose) and some pretty scenery when we came down off the mountain. Plenty of potty stops. They provided fleece ponchos and ginger candy (for the twists and turns of the road) and water. They also had an AED & oxygen which i

reviews.author: Audriann L
reviews.text: The tour company was extremely organized and picked us up at 2:45am on the dot at our hotel. The communication was excellent. The tour included entrance to the park and a hot breakfast at the Maui tropical plantation! Our tour guide Jeff was very knowledgeable. Would definitely do this again!

reviews.author: D7205XVstephenp
reviews.text: Malia was our tour guide and driver, she was fantastic, and as a resident of Hana, she was able to really give us a great experience.  Easily worth the price.

reviews.author: Judith Dwyer
reviews.text: This was amazing! There is no where on earth like the road to Hana. Valley isle’s Customer service was great and the bus was clean and well maintained. But the highlight was our guide Malia - she made this a truly special day, she is the best- funny, warm and a hell of a driver! She made our group feel like family and we had so much fun together -10 out of 10, not to be missed!!!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Emberton
reviews.text:
Travis made our Road to Hana tour an absolutely unforgettable experience. From start to finish, the entire day felt immersive, authentic, and thoughtfully curated. We weren’t just sightseeing, we were truly experiencing Hawaii.

Along the journey, we got to see sea turtles up close, which was incredible, and Travis shared so much rich history about Hawaii that added real depth and meaning to everything we saw. His knowledge and storytelling made each stop feel purposeful and engaging rather than

reviews.author: Lorraine Purvis
reviews.text: Joe was our tour guide on the Road to Hana tour. He and the tour were absolutely amazing. I would recommend this to anyone.

reviews.author: Richard Hamilton
reviews.text: If you like riding in a 14 person van for 8-10 hours then this is the tour for you. Now that I have that out - let's talk about Valley Isle's version of the Road to Hana: our driver lacked enthusiasm - was low energy which didn't help our group of 10 get energized by this LONG tour. He said he drove it on average 5 times a week which may have caused the lack of excitement. The name on his ID was Richard but he went by a Hawaiian name I don't recall. My review is a summary of the 10 of us. There

reviews.author: Laura Zych
reviews.text: Great excursion

reviews.author: Helen Herning
reviews.text: What an incredible experience on our Road to Hana tour with Malia as our trusted guide.  The tour was amazing!  More beautiful and educational than we could have imagined.  Malia had us learning the Hawaiian language, many fun facts about the state, folklore about the road to Hana and much more.  Valley Isle Excursions took care of our every need from the time we booked the trip until they dropped us off at the end of the tour at our condo.  We were treated like 'ohana (family).  We would highly

reviews.author: Tim Sharrar
reviews.text: Excellent tour! Justin was our tour guide. He was great.

reviews.author: Mollie Sharrar
reviews.text: Our Road to Hana excursion with Justine was great! Our day started out rainy and we were a bit apprehensive about going, but we had sunshine and beautiful scenery, with a great guide. We saw so many things: rainbow eucalyptus trees, waterfalls, several types of bamboo, a black sand beach, turquoise lagoons, with incredible shorelines, and beached sea turtles. We had a nice breakfast on the way and a great lunch in Hana, while stopping for warm banana bread and shave ice. Walking through a lava t

reviews.author: patrick sweeney
reviews.text: WOW ! Incredible experience on the Sunrise tour. Our drivers were local and extremeley friendly . Sharing their history . Very informative and attentive . Breakfast was fantastic . 5 stars is not enough !

reviews.author: Mary Weaks-Baxter
reviews.text: Loved the experience! A must-do for any trip to Maui!

reviews.author: Jerry Shengulette
reviews.text: Your embarking on a bus tour that could run 9 to 12 hours. The scenery is going to be spectacular. You know that; it's Hawaii, the scenery is a large part of why you came even if you only go back and forth from the airport to your resort. It's all about your tour group and the guide. Our guide, Derrick, was spectacular. He immediately told us that he was going to treat us like family. His knowledge of the island was top-notch and he made a generous effort to relate his information to his own fam

reviews.author: Donna Kaiser
reviews.text: The Road to Hana is a famous road trip that is mentioned any time Maui is explained to new-comers.  Luckily we chose to let someone else do the driving.  This tour provided not just an opportunity to see specular views, but our guide Malia, showed us how connected the people are; how they try and support one another any way they can.  Malia made the tour feel very personal, as she shared her experiences and stories about growing up in Hana.  The peoples’ attitudes to maintain the natural environ

reviews.author: Florencia Diaz
reviews.text: El parque nacional notificó inundaciones y mal clima y la empresa no canceló el tour, llamé un día antes para preguntar si se cancelaba y dijeron que no. Pasaron por mi y llovía. Viajamos con lluvia, llegamos y seguía lloviendo, no se vió nada y llovió todo el día. Tampoco ofrecieron reembolso o hacer el tour otro día.

reviews.author: deborah bennett
reviews.text: Had a great experience with our guides Abe and Jeff. The sunrise was amazing.

reviews.author: Carol Hokaj
reviews.text: Our guide/driver, Derrick, was punctual , a very skilled driver and very knowledgeable, not only about The Road to Hana but also all of Maui and Hawaiian culture. We learned new things even though we have been coming to Maui for many years. He took his time and treated all of us with care and respect. He created an "ohana". He knew the best rest stops and even provided toilet paper when needed ;) We would recommend this tour to family and friends.

reviews.author: John Kreutter
reviews.text: My wife and I went on the Haleakalā sunrise tour on 3/6/26 and it was beautiful and well worth it. Our 2 tour hosts were Jeff and Brad. They were both great hosts. They gave us points of interest and history along the way. Thank you Valley Isle for a terrific morning.

reviews.author: Mike Swanson
reviews.text: Overall an ok experience. Sunrise was spectacular. However, tour guide started off tour with a safety briefing that included a pointed push for tips, with a recommended amount. (At least 15%...like a restaurant he said, twice). Breakfast was mediocre. Served cold, rushed, and poor quality (think cafeteria bacon and powdered? eggs). No real information given by tour guide throughout experience, so it maybe better to think of this as more of a shuttle service vs tour. Hotel pick up and drop off wa

reviews.author: Anna Berardi
reviews.text: Sunrise was amazing. They made the experience as comfortable as possible and we were there to get front row seats to the morning show. Loved all the tidbits we were peppered with about Maui, culture and nature along the way. Breakfast was so yummy, too!

reviews.author: Sherry Williams
reviews.text: Joe was very informative and thoughtful.lunch was good.

reviews.author: Lisa Dixon
reviews.text: The " Road to Hana" tour with Valley Isle Excursions was a fantastic experience. Our friendly driver/tour guide Derrick was amazing. He was very passionate about showcasing to us, Maui's beautiful culture, landscape and history. Derrick made sure we didn't miss out on a great photo opportunity and nothing was a problem for him. It was a 12 seater bus, which was very comfortable. Overall, a day in paradise that we will never forget.

reviews.author: Storyteller827307
reviews.text: Randy was great! He was friendly and knew the best places to stop along the way. After waterfalls and black sand beaches, we even saw sea turtles. Our group had a wonderful time with him.

reviews.author: Rachel M
reviews.text: My husband and I actually did this before and came back with family this time and did it again.  We’d never do Hana any other way.  Our guides/pilots Scott and Chris were amazing and everything was very beautiful, informative, and professional.  Breathtaking black sand beach!  Thanks again

reviews.author: Robert K
reviews.text: Scotty provided great information during our ride to Hana and was great at giving us the timing for the perfect picture of the vistas and waterfalls!  We definitely would go again someday, but might consider helicoptering one way to make the day not as long.   It was a great day of sightseeing and learning!

reviews.author: Q9693FRleef
reviews.text: Our family (5) did the Road to Hana Deluxe Tour with Temptation Tours as an excursion from a NCL cruise. It was great! Our guide Ray was awesome. He kept up a running conversation with the group (8) for the entire 7.5+ hour tour. He was friendly, polite, and very knowledgeable about Hawaii’s history as well as modern developments. We saw a lot of beautiful sights including quite a few waterfalls. As a plus, the van was very comfortable.

reviews.author: smrbiloxi
reviews.text:
Randy was outstanding
Great service

reviews.author: lauriecL1645DW

Our road tour was very informative.  The van was not thoroughly cleaned before we got in, and I was sitting next to the trash can in the back, which had some odor.  Our guide was quite knowledgeable about Maui, and what we we were seeing, providing historical and geographical knowledge.  Our one piece of feedback is they

reviews.author: brianvA3398ES
reviews.text:
From the start, Ray was punctual, organized, and incredibly easygoing, setting the tone for a relaxed and enjoyable excursion. His knowledge of the route, local history, and hidden highlights added real depth to the experience.

What stood out most was his professionalism and foresight. He gave clear, timely guidance about what to expect at each stop, ensured we were always prepared, and paced the day perfectly so we never felt rushed or delayed. Every stop felt intentional and well-timed.

Midw

The trip was a Nazi g. Our driver Ray was so informative and engaging. If you have a chance to take this trip with him don’t miss it.
Best part of our holiday adventures

You are so kind, funny and genuine!

Thank you Arya for a wonderful experience. 
The newly weds!

reviews.author: K4973DRtimz

reviews.author: karenhF1550US

reviews.author: tamarahC7671HB
