reviews.author: Christinem1313
reviews.text: What a great tour! Randy, our tour guide was fantastic. He made the trip so fun and enjoyable. We leaned so much and he listened to us. The provided lunch was delicious.

reviews.author: jerrylaco59
reviews.text: Gayle was quite exceptional and very responsive to our needs on a very rainy day with difficult driving conditions. Her expert driving skills and demeanor kept everyone comfortable and carefree. We were in good hands and her ability to gauge the weather for the most optimal time for lunch sheltered on the beach under the pavilion, opposed to the park walk down to the beach with no shelter. Her timing was perfect.

reviews.author: D T
reviews.text: Randy was an awesome tour guide, so super friendly and such a great driver. We had a blast heading out there and back together. So many lovely stops and chances to drink in all the beauty of the rainforest.

reviews.author: Brad Weiss
reviews.text: Gayle was a fantastic tour guide, loved how knowledgeable she was about the history of the island and her sense of humor!

reviews.author: Susan Godfrey
reviews.text: I took my second trip with temptation tours this time with my sister. Great local company. Our driver, Randy was calm, friendly, and a safe driver. We had a wonderful day.

reviews.author: Whitney Hamilton
reviews.text: Randy was our guide on the Road to Hana tour last week and I cannot say enough great things about him and this trip! He was courteous, knowledgeable, entertaining and incredibly accommodating. The luxury van was comfortable and Randy made sure we had everything we needed from snacks and drinks and even ginger candies for those of us who got a little green around the gills on the curvy roads. He ensured everyone got a chance to see and experience the highlights along the Road, including sea turtl

reviews.author: Deniz Yilmaz
reviews.text:
Our Road to Hana experience was absolutely incredible, and a huge part of that was thanks to our tour guide, Gayle. She was an amazing driver — confident, smooth, and made us feel completely safe the entire journey. That alone made the experience so much more relaxing and enjoyable.

Gayle went above and beyond by taking photos of us at different stops, which we truly appreciated. She was kind, sweet, and incredibly knowledgeable, sharing fascinating stories, history, and local insights througho

reviews.author: James Sigsbee
reviews.text:
We can’t say enough great things about Scott Ferguson and our Road to Hana tour.

He was excellent with his knowledge and details of the area as well as his driving skills and photography.

Scott taught us new techniques on taking pictures with our iPhones and served us lunch on white table cloth — a three course meal, second to none.

We highly recommend Scott to anyone who is interested in making memories of a lifetime.

Thank you Scott and Temptation Tours!!!

reviews.author: Maria-Anna Galitzine
reviews.text:
Gail has an intimate knowledge of the root the nature and the history of road to Hana.
We recommend her!

reviews.author: Thomas Young
reviews.text: We had a fantastic day on the road to Hana with tourguide Ray!  He was knowledgeable, fun, interesting to listen to and a very safe driver, which is SO important on this twisty drive to Hana!  It was a nice way to go....leave the driving to someone else and if you can request a driver, ask for Ray!!

reviews.author: Walter Drouin
reviews.text: We did the Road to Hana tour through Princess Cruise lines, who partners with Temptation Tours today and it was absolutely amazing. The luxury limo van was super comfortable, the stops made along the way were excellent but most importantly, our guide, Ray, was AMAZING!! Not only was he super knowledgeable but took the time to get to know us throughout the journey. By the end of the day, it felt like we were saying goodbye to a long time friend or family member!

reviews.author: Lyndsay Stramel
reviews.text: Had a great experience on the road to hana + helicopter tour. Paul was a wealth of knowledge, pointed out all of the best photo ops and provided a safe journey along with a simple yet great picnic lunch.  My only feedback was in regards to the booking process. Our confirmation never mentioned who the helicopter portion was through (therefore we had no idea where to check in on arrival to the heliport). Additionally, there could have been better guidance on what to bring/not bring. We didn't need

reviews.author: Ashton Patterson
reviews.text: My wife and I went to Maui for our honeymoon, and one of the excursions we booked is the “Ultimate Road to Hana by Land & Air”. We had a pleasant experience from beginning to end. Our trip started off with our pilot, Chris, who was very warm and inviting. He made the ride very smooth & fun. We were then greeted by our tour guide, Scott, who gave us a lot of information on everything about East Maui, and Hawaii as a whole. He was so knowledgable and he offered to take so many wonderful photos of

reviews.author: Jasmine Collins
reviews.text: My husband and I took the Hana Road tour and picnic. The guide (Randy) had ginger candies to share, made sure everyone felt comfortable, and stopped at all restrooms along the way. The van was roomy. We didn't care for the provided lunch, but we survived until dinner. Wai'ānapanapa Park was incredible, but the guide rushed us a bit, having us spend an unnecessary fifteen minutes standing in the parking lot near the van when we'd rather have had that precious time at the beach, instead. Overall,

reviews.author: Molly Collier NP Collier
reviews.text: Safe, competent driver Gennaro, who was also a fantastic tour guide. Told stories, talked thru the history and natural history of the area. Took us to see the gorgeous views of Hana, green sea turtles, lava tube, black sand beach and waterfalls. A great day.

reviews.author: Jeff Hysen
reviews.text: We had a fantastic trip! Scott was our guide on the road to Hana. He was knowledgeable, thoughtful, and attentive. The sites could not have been better. After a delicious lunch, we flew back in about 30 minutes and the flight was smooth and easy. A great day with Temptation Tours.

reviews.author: Kayla Holcomb
reviews.text: Our experience with Temptation Tours was through our cruise with Norwegian Cruise Line, and they by far exceeded our expectations. Our driver Adam was a fantastic driver, incredibly knowledgeable, and accommodating to our party. We were on a private passenger van, and I can't recommend this option enough! reviews.author: Alice Boulds
reviews.text:
Fabulous trip.  Our guide, Scott Ferguson, did an excellent job.  I highly recommend this excursion.  Money well spent on a great lifetime memory!
Step 2

reviews.author: John Beall
reviews.text:
Jan and took the Temptation Tours ultimate Hana Experience.  It was awesome starting with a delightful breakfast at Marcos.  Then off to our adventure with Paul J. Brown as our driver/guide.  He turned out to be the ultimate Maui Renissance man with knowledge of geology, ornithology and much more plus a knowledge of the best view and photo opportunities.  We would see other groups fly by hidden gems such as a grotto, while we stopped to look.
While on the road we ran into another Temptation Tour

reviews.author: Mandy H
reviews.text: My husband and I booked the Premium Hāna Picnic. Randy was our tour guide and tour guide trainee, Andreas was there too. I told Randy that I was sensitive to motion so I really appreciated Randy’s gentle driving taking the turns. The lunch was great an

reviews.author: Patrick Reed
reviews.text:
We did the road to Hana and helicopter ride on the return.  It was a great helicopter ride and the van ride back was good with a very good guide name Ray.

My wife and I can check that box and say we have been to Hana to see black sand beaches a handful of water falls and some beautiful sea scapes

A good way to go to Hana and not drive urself

reviews.author: C Barnes
reviews.text: The Sky Trek tour was fantastic and well worth the cost.  The drive to Hana in the limo van with Ray was fun and exciting. Ray provided a wealth of knowledge about the area and stopped for us to enjoy some wonderful places along the way as well as serving us a nice lunch right on the beach. The helicopter ride back was incredible and again, our pilot, Marco, shared knowledge with us about sites from the air. Lastly, I would like to send a big thank you to Carmella in the Temptation Tours office

reviews.author: Sarah Mizrahi
reviews.text:
We booked the Road to Hana tour with Temptation Tours Maui, and it was hands down the highlight of our honeymoon! Our guide, Sue Hopkins (aka Surfer Sue), was absolutely amazing from start to finish. She picked us up right on time and made the entire day unforgettable.

Sue’s driving skills were top-notch — we never once felt unsafe or carsick, even on the winding Hana roads. Her knowledge of Maui’s history, culture, wildlife, and local stories was out of this world. You can tell she’s been doin

reviews.author: O2577RHcarolineo
reviews.text: INCREDIBLE! Guides were amazing. They helped my kids overcome fear of heights. They shared island history. My kids and I all say this was the pinnacle of our Hawaii vacation (which is saying a lot - we had a lot of adventures!).

reviews.author: 384kellir
reviews.text:
We had an absolute blast at Kohala Zip Line Adventure! There were six of us in our group, and it ended up being one of the highlights of our trip. The guides were incredible—so fun, knowledgeable, and made everyone feel completely safe and comfortable the whole time.

The course itself was beautiful, with amazing views and a perfect mix of excitement and scenery. Everything was very well organized, and you could tell they really care about giving people a great experience.

We were laughing the

reviews.author: stefanied703
reviews.text: Four of us “older” adults went ziplining for the first time and had a blast! Tammy and Brogan were excellent guides and made sure we all felt safe! We live on the Big Island and will definitely recommend this trips to our future guests.

reviews.author: Freedom554063
reviews.text: Excellent time with very knowledgeable and reassuring tour guides Jake and Kodie. It was a beautiful experience with safety being their main concern and having a fun and exciting experience. Would definitely recommend doing this experience. Can’t wait to go back and take another tour with Hawaii Forest and Trail..

reviews.author: 846shaym
reviews.text:
Our experience with Kohala Zipline was absolutely outstanding from start to finish. Daven and the entire guide team were knowledgeable, incredibly professional, and created an environment that felt both efficient and extremely safe. From the initial safety briefing through each platform and landing, everything was handled with care and clarity.

If you’re like me, it can be hard to know from online reviews whether an adventure activity truly prioritizes safety. I can confidently say that Kohala

reviews.author: Cmccarley2010
reviews.text: Great time! Worth the money and time. Great way to have an "adventure" and see beautiful countryside. The guides, Decker and Dane, were excellent! Felt very safe. Learned about local land and things important to Hawaii. Lots of laughter. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: 211mariamh
reviews.text: What a fun experience! The bridges were scarier for me than the zip lines. It was made even better by the great crew. Willy was awesome on the drive and during the entire experience and Decker was also cool on the zip lines.

reviews.author: cyndi2026
reviews.text: Ziplining with our guides Tami and Davin was a great experience! The courses were beautiful and exhilarating, and safety was paramount at every moment. We not only had a fun time, but we also learned about the Hawaiian culture and history from our delightful guides. They also captured many great photos of us! Highly recommended for all ages!

reviews.author: 293toshaw
reviews.text: This zip was a blast!  We loved that not only did we get to ride great lines,  we also got to cross cool bridges and repel! The tour guides, Brogan and Davyn, totally made it! They have great instruction, we're super helpful and confident,  and offered so much knowledge of the island,  history and other great things to do,  we just wished we had gone on this experience first! 5 out of 5! Would absolutely recommend!

reviews.author: 744leahb
reviews.text: Amazing experience! Great guides. Felt very safe. It was fantastic. Huge props to Davin and Brogan.

reviews.author: Q2981URginag

Best zipline we’ve ever done! Thank you to our guides-Tammy and Brogen !

reviews.author: 97meenas
reviews.text: It was really fun and safe.. Tammy and booboo are really good.. Had a wonderful experience and must try one when you visit big island

reviews.author: Michy_MoG
reviews.text: We had a WONDERFUL experience with our group guides Cody and Davyn.  They were so knowledgeable about the course, their duties and local history.  We learned so much, on top of feeling very safe and having a really great time.  Who knew we'd be getting so much fun history and factoids!?  We would highly recommend you book this adventure. Communication was excellent, and navigating was very easy.  They also have a lovely gift shop with great items, so bring your credit card!  Thank you so much, K

reviews.author: Linda R
reviews.text: Learned a lot about the area.  The guides were professional and we all felt safe.  Great sense of humor too. Repelling off the last platform was fun.

reviews.author: Y4721TZkimberlyn
reviews.text: Loved the zipline and the guides were so nice too, it was a great family adventure! We would definitely recommend this place!!!

reviews.author: Global56377970745
reviews.text: Best experience and it's one checked off my list. The staff was very helpful. Both experienced conductors were very knowledgeable and they informed us of all the safety and how important to stay informed in all zipline and bridges. Very helpful and fun sense of Humor. Nothing but positive attitude. Decker and tami were very fun to be with.  Would definitely go again.

reviews.author: RED945
reviews.text: 60’s plus Couple. From the moment we walked in all the staff were friendly and helpful. We might have even met THE Auntie Aloha upon arrival. The scale they have you weigh-in on is also gracious 😂 Our tour guides Rogan and Nick were patient, encouraging.  In addition, on the ride up the mountain our guides provided historical facts and some histories of Hawi and surrounding towns. Such a bargain for the adventure. Truly loved our experience 😘

reviews.author: emilycA8114XG
reviews.text:
I've been on a number of zipline tours in different places and this was one of the more professional and organized tours. Our guides were Decker and Boo-Boo. The safety talk was thorough, with enough humor. I appreciate that they laid a very strict rule that they would remove us from the tour if we touched the carabiners. More zipline tours involve zip, walk, zip, walk, while this had a bunch of fun bridges to get us between the ziplines.

The lines had a plastic sheath, which resulted in a smoo

reviews.author: sallyjA8806EW
reviews.text: There were 8 of us and we all had a great time. It was a fun memorable afternoon. Boo-Boo and Davin were wonderful guides - professional, friendly and so knowledgeable. Definitely recommend Kohala Zipline Adventure!

reviews.author: Aeron Walton
reviews.text: We had a great day in the trees with Kohala Zipline! Auntie and the staff at the office were top-notch, even calling the day before to confirm our reservation and offer a few last minute tips and tricks for the experience. Our guides Decker and Codi were awesome, explaining everything  in detail, while also remaining personable, informative, and extremely positive! Safety was the top concern, and 3 out of the 4 of us being first time zipliners, we were all comfortable from the first zip! The bri

reviews.author: Stephen Boateng
reviews.text: An absolutely thrilling experience for the whole family! From the stunning scenery to the heart-pumping lines, the Kohala Zipline delivered on every level, . Our guides, Decker and Bubu, were phenomenal. They had a natural ability to put everyone at ease right from the start, and their safety instructions were clear, thorough, and easy to follow. They genuinely inspired confidence, even for those of us who were a little nervous heading in. The entire experience felt safe, well-organized, and inc

reviews.author: Geoffrey Young
reviews.text: Dane and Tami were amazing guides. Ages 10-50 all had a blast. Highly recommend this trip. Fyi,  they are discontinuing this course and will be opening a new one. Soon.

reviews.author: Cara HBH
reviews.text: Man, are you in for a treat if you’re lucky enough to have Cody and Daven as your guides! Funny, kind, knowledgeable and professional. Our Zipline weather and location were perfect! It was so green and lovely.The city of Hawi was also an absolute gem. The hospitality in the restaurants and shops was top notch. Would 100% recommend

reviews.author: Samantha Walker Tam
reviews.text:
We had the best time on our Zip & Dip Tour with Wilson and Tam! We knew this was going to be a great experience, but every part of the tour exceeded our expectations.

Wilson was so knowledgeable about not only the history of the island, but also the local wildlife populations and natural sciences.

Tam made us feel so safe and secure on the ziplines and we had all the information we needed to have a great time for our first zipline experience.

The zipline course is in a beautiful valley surrou

reviews.author: Richard Miller
reviews.text: We have enjoyed many zip line adventures on several Hawaiian islands.  But Kohala Zipline, located in Hawi, has been the best!  Our guides, Davyn and Andrew, were spectacular!  Davyn provided excellent instruction before we started our adventure and Andrew made sure the equipment we used was safe and properly fitted.  The tour included lots of great, really fast zip lines and 5 cool suspension bridges, with a fun rappelling experience to finish the tour.

reviews.author: Ruth Alli
reviews.text: Excellent adventure made all the better by having Dane and Koby as our guides on rhe zip and dip. Cannot recommend enough.

reviews.author: Makenzie Collier
reviews.text: Had an absolute blast with Tammy and Brogan guiding us! Never doubted the safety of myself or my equipment for even a moment and Tammy was so forthcoming and knowledgeable about the history and culture of the Kohala area. The shop selection is functional and stylish. The photos taken on the trip are worth it! We had such a great time and 10/10 would do this trip again

reviews.author: Keesha Dolbec
reviews.text: The day was amazing, lot’s of zip line to do, different bridges to cross. And the swimming at the waterfall was a fun experience for sure. Plus our instructor Willy love his job and it shows. Really great guide. I will definitely do it again😊

reviews.author: Chad Hill
reviews.text:
What makes or breaks an experience for me is how I’m treated, and the employees here were truly fantastic. The young ladies at the desk were polite and accommodating, and our driver, Ernie, couldn’t have been better.

The people we spent the most time with were our instructors/guides, Derek and Broggen, and they absolutely made the experience. The ziplining itself was great, but their attention to safety, their sense of humor, and their deep knowledge of the island took it to another level.

I c

reviews.author: AJoy2 Teach
reviews.text: Jake and Koda took great care of us. They were awesome! Usually activities last no where near what they claim to, but this was LOTS of zip lining and super fun. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Teddi Earles
reviews.text:
Absolutely worth it!!

Our guides, Decker and Brogan, were absolutely amazing!! Their first priority is safety, without a doubt. Their second priority is making sure you have a fun, well-informed, all kinds of side notes experience. On the trip up, which the drive is less than 20 minutes, Decker told us all about the different animals, the land, Hawaiian people, EVERYTHING! Both guides made sure everyone was good on every zip or bridge before moving on. Jokes, laughter and so much fun! It's like

reviews.author: Samantha Hua
reviews.text: Great experience and so much fun.

reviews.author: Jackie Payne
reviews.text: For someone who is afraid of heights, this was by far one of the best zipline experiences. The tour guides were wonderful and incredibly patient, which made the entire experience feel safe and enjoyable. The views were absolutely beautiful, and the experience itself was unforgettable. I would highly recommend this to anyone, even those who are nervous about heights

reviews.author: Jeff Engel
reviews.text: I thoroughly enjoyed my self on this zip line trip. I found the zip lining was fun, but also enjoyed walking over the hanging bridges in between the zip lines. For me, it was like an added bonus. Our guides were professional and kept everything very safe. Thank you to our guides, Dekker and Nui for a fun outing, and also for the jokes, laughs and entertainment along the way. 😁

reviews.author: Jeannie Jewell
reviews.text: What a fantastic time! The best ever zipline experience! Not for the faint of heart, for me a real adrenaline rush! Beautiful views! Super guides, fun yet very professional, they took their jobs seriously, so I could relax in my fear!! Highly recommend Kohala Zipline!

reviews.author: Ted Gaul
reviews.text: Our party of 3 had a great time with Davin & Boo Boo. We did a Zipline previously on another island and that was almost like a backyard playset, where Kohala is the real deal. There was a single member in the group that was blind and the guides did a fantastic job getting get her through it. There are so many fantastic things to do on the BI and normally wouldn't pick a Zipline, but will say that this one is worth it.

reviews.author: Ross Ambrose
reviews.text: An out of the way adventure for anyone 8 to 70!   We had so much fun, learned a lot, were challenged and the entire group had such a great time with each other.  The guides were amazing with a focus on safety and fun - in that order.  If you have teens; this is a definite plus for them and if mom and dad do not want to go they would be well taken care of on this adventure.  Great scenery, some exercise mixed with possible personal challenges.  Groups are about 8 in size; so you meet each other!

reviews.author: Sandi Frelly
reviews.text: We had a wonderful time! The guides were just the sweetest and made the whole experience even better. The lines were so much fun! The bridges to the lines were an experience all their own. We had a great time. Over 5 stars easily!

reviews.author: Aaron Feitner
reviews.text:
David and Boo-Boo did a phenomenal job hosting us as we gallivanted about the treetops. We were able to make great memories and experience nature in a new way.
Highly recommend!

reviews.author: N5950FAjanets
reviews.text: We had a fantastic time on our ATV tour!  Guides were friendly and knowledgeable. A wonderful trip!

reviews.author: 669cadeh
reviews.text: This UTV adventure was a blast. The machines were top notch and the guides were awesome. Beautiful scenery with multiple picture opportunities. I felt the price was a good deal for a 3 hour tour with no hidden fees which is always appreciated 🤩. We went in the rainy season so the trail was muddy but that was just icing on the cake. I hope to do this again on my next trip to Kauai.

reviews.author: gruss
reviews.text: This was an incredible tour. Beautiful scenery, informative guides and better UTVs than most companies offer. Josh Stone was extremely welcoming and knowledgeable about the area. I would love to do this tour again someday and would recommend it to everyone!

reviews.author: christeng2015
reviews.text:
BEST TOUR EVER!!! So fun and full of adventure for the family! All ages will love it!
Joshua and Kyle were the best tour guides! So full of knowledge and fun! They truly made the day so great! I highly recommend this tour to see the beauty of Kauai and have fun! The waterfall swim at the end was gorgeous and refreshing! Amazing way to end the tour!

reviews.author: Z8266UJheatherc
reviews.text: Our favorite thing we did in Kauai!! It was so much fun! The trails are bumpy but made it so much fun! The prettiest views with great guides that had a lot of good history to tell. We would highly recommend to anyone looking for some fun on their vacation.

reviews.author: Meme C
reviews.text: First time trying ATV and it was incredible! From the moment we entered the lot —everyone was extremely kind and truly embodied the Hawaiian spirit! We felt so safe and supported with our expert guides and look forward to returning again :) We did the Ultimate Ranch Experience (intermediate course with STUNNING views !!!). This tour has some of the most breathtaking scenery Kaui has to offer. Shout out to our amazing guides, Kyle and Cousin Dave! They were incredibly kind and very knowledgeable

reviews.author: M5104TEjohnf
reviews.text:
Great fun! We did the waterfall tour. 
Swam at the end. 
Wear dark old clothes that can get dirty! 
Tour guides were super fun and informative.
My city friend was not as enthusiastic about an atv adventure but did ok. 
Overall super cool!

reviews.author: C5987YOjessem
reviews.text: We did three of the islands over 3 weeks and did all kinds of excursions - boats, helicopter, road to Hana, the summit for sunrise, swam with manta rays - you name it we did it.  This ATV tour, with a waterfall plunge at the end, was epic. You’re not just driving around a ranch. It’s challenging and scenery is incredible. Our tour guides, marlin and giggles, were amazing! Knowledgeable and funny! They made the experience! We will definitely come back again.

reviews.author: 503gregorye
reviews.text:
If you’re heading to Kauai and looking for an unforgettable experience — this is it! A fun adventure is waiting for you from the moment you hop into your own side-by-side. Getting to drive it yourself while exploring the breathtaking sites of the island makes the entire experience feel even more exciting and personal. Everything was absolutely top-notch — organized, seamless, and full of energy.

Be prepared to get dirty… and I mean really dirty! If this is a last-minute trip and you didn’t pack

reviews.author: B9377RQtiffanyp
reviews.text: Our ATV tour was a blast. We got the thrill of riding/driving the ATV's through the mountain paths and terrain, and the peace and history of the beautiful stops we made along the way. Our guides were full of information and a fun time. I always enjoy heaing the history of the land and people. Safety was taken seriously, and our entire group had a great time. I would do this trip over and over again.

reviews.author: Meander24810555971
reviews.text: Not the best weather on 2/10/2026, but the most fun and exhilarating adventure, driving an ATV across beautiful pasture land, into the hills at Kipu Ranch. Our excellent guides, Kyle and David, also led us to incredible views of Kalapaki Bay and sacred Kipu Kai Bay. It was an interesting learning experience as Kyle shared his knowledge of the history of each area and educated us on how to safely maneuver our ATV over challenging terrain. This bucket list adventure is highly recommended for local

reviews.author: HNLfoodieinparadise
reviews.text:
This is the adventure of a lifetime in Hawaii to check off your bucket list! From the initial steps of checking in at the front desk until the completion of the adventure, the staff were informative and helpful prepping us. Our tour guides Kyle and David were exceptionally knowledgeable, entertaining and down to earth in sharing their aloha spirits.

Kyle handled our group with TLC, humor and made us feel like his ohana while explaining the Hawaiian historical facts and many Hollywood movies fil

reviews.author: A7536IKlornah
reviews.text: What an amazing experience! As a local from Kauai, we rarely experience tourist activities! However this experience was exceptional because of our articulate, knowledgeable and kind guide who ensured safety and a fabulous adventure for All.  Kyle and David were friendly and genuine guides who shared the spirit of Aloha! I would highly recommend this activity to all locals! It was beautiful terrain and our guides went above and beyond to share the history of this place as well as fun facts about

reviews.author: IzziePlayer
reviews.text: Great fun! The tour guides were very experienced, did a great job with their instruction, and ensured everyone had a safe ride. They also were very knowledgable about the area and shared very interesting history of the island. I was very thankful they supplied us with goggles and bandanas to block all the dust, which is a must-have. The views were amazing! I highly recommend! It was very bumpy, so if you have any injuries or back issues, I don't recommend doing this.

reviews.author: chismosac
reviews.text: I love ATV riding so this was a must! When we went, we got to see a mountain this island only gets to see 10-15 times a year. Our tour guides Joshua & Merlin were so funny, kind and informative. They gave us so many facts about the island and pointed out the scenery seen in movies! I felt very safe the entire time with the instruction of Joshua and Merlin. The only downside was waiting on slower riders :( but that is not something they can control. It was a pretty easy trail overall. I will defi

reviews.author: Renee E
reviews.text:
We did the ATV at the ranch for my birthday and had the time of our life’s. My husband drove and said he couldn’t stop smiling. 
Best side trip we did. We had Joshua and Marlin and they went above and beyond!

reviews.author: Connector68362461941
reviews.text: The tour guides were very welcoming and friendly. The trails itself were alot of fun ans we had a great time. I recommend Kipu Ranch!

reviews.author: winnyis
reviews.text: Super fun time!!!  Our guides Giggles and Kaimana were super friendly and kept the tour going at a good pace.    Expect dust, mud and lots of bump trails.    We enjoyed it!!!

reviews.author: 71LJ
reviews.text: Don’t miss this one! Our guides, David and Cousin Kyle, were awesome, entertaining, and kept things moving. We loved it!

reviews.author: Meghan P
reviews.text: We really enjoyed this tour! It was the perfect amount of time, the side by sides were surprisingly comfortable ! I expected to be jarred by the massive ruts and tree roots we drove over but felt fine the entire trip. The landscape was beautiful! Our leaders were local and very knowledgeable about the surroundings and history.  We ended at the huge bamboo grove and waterfall which was perfect. They have snacks but my husband and I brought a picnic lunch and came early.  Dress to get dirty!!

reviews.author: Laura Edwards
reviews.text: We had the best time ever!! David and Cousin Kyle were absolutely amazing! Told us so much about the land and island. Made sure we had a great experience! If you’re in Kauai and looking for amazing adventure and people you have to do this tour.

reviews.author: Tiffany Hischke
reviews.text: Our guides were awesome, David and Cousin Kyle!  The views were beautiful and it was fun learning some history of the land as well.  The waterfall swimming was a perfect way to end the tour.

reviews.author: Aaron Monroe
reviews.text: We had a phenomenal experience. The ATV waterfall tour was a major highlight of the entire trip. Our guides, Joshua Stone and Brother Marlan made us feel like family. The views were absolutely stunning!  I highly recommend this tour for a guaranteed core memory!

reviews.author: Kim Randall
reviews.text: Awesome tour with Joshua Stone and Kyle!!!  Both ensured all members of the group had a safe and thrilling ride.  Great offroad trails with lots of bumps, scenery, and opportunities to get extremely muddy. :-)  We really appreciated the stories and advice about the island as well. They also took fantastic family photos with some mad camera skills. Thanks, guys, for a great experience!

reviews.author: Carl Koenig
reviews.text: Had a great time riding with the Kipu Ranch crew through an amazing scenery. This is accessible to people who have driven SxSs before and first timers like my wife.

reviews.author: Audrey Pike
reviews.text: Excellent experience!  Fun for all ages, tour guide was knowledgeable and easy to follow ! Thank you !!

reviews.author: Walter Rivas
reviews.text: We visited in March of 2026. The tour itself was great with a couple stops along the way to explain the history of the land / island. We had David and "Cousin Kyle" as our tour guides and they did a great job leading the crew and taking us on some fun trails while also ensuring we were safe at all times. Highly suggest booking this tour if you're visiting the island!

reviews.author: Maarya Shaaban
reviews.text: We had the best time on the atv ranch tour. Our guides David and Giggles were fun and knowledgeable. Loved learning about the history of the land. Beautiful property!

reviews.author: Nick Torpea
reviews.text: Amazing experience, well worth it.  Beats the snot out of you but a blast at the same time.  Tour guides were friendly and fun. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Clare Marshall
reviews.text: The Joshua Stone and Marlin duo was the BEST. Joshua did not hold back on the course and is a light to all who are blessed to be in his group. If I have any advice for anyone reading this #1: do the Kipu ranch waterfall expedition (coming from a college student, the $200 was worth it). #2: Ask for Joshua and Marlin (you can't have a bad time if they are your people). and the ladies who gave me my bandana were great. Great people, great vibes, and a face full of mud = 10/10.

reviews.author: paul bane
reviews.text: An excellent off road adventure even for experienced riders. We loved it.

reviews.author: Emily Schramm
reviews.text: We had the best time on our tour. The property is stunning, the tour is awesome and the staff is so great. Would absolutely do again!

reviews.author: Brian Terry
reviews.text: From start to finish staff was very professional and informative. Our guide took the time to talk about the history of the ranch and the heritage of the Hawaiian people. The ride was exciting and at times a little scary but never out of control. We would highly recommend to anyone and getting a little muddy was fun also.

reviews.author: John Oberwortmann
reviews.text: Our tours at Kipu Ranch are always exciting and I enjoy learning things about Kauai.

reviews.author: Andrew Sager
reviews.text: Phenomenal. It was raining throughout and in the opinion of most on the tour it made it all the more fun. Kai and Marlon were awesome guides.

reviews.author: Jamie Rodgers
reviews.text: We went on the ATV tour during a complete downpour. We were drenched and covered in mud by the end tour, but had a good time. It was fun and interesting. The guides Giggles & David did a great job!

reviews.author: Anne Harmody
reviews.text: Get ready to get dirty!  This is a Must do on Kaua’i!  So much fun!  Marlin and Cousin Kai were fun, adventurous and filled with great information about the ranch and Kaua’i!  The trails were awesome rugged, rocky and muddy. The Kawasaki machines were so much fun to drive!  Mahalo!

reviews.author: Matthew H
reviews.text: Great outfit! Beautiful ranchland, stunning views. Staff offered interesting history, encouraged a good time, and ensured safety. Highly recommend. We booked the Ultimate Kauai.

reviews.author: Emily Sexton
reviews.text: We had the best time! Highly recommend to anyone visiting Kauai! The entire staff was so friendly and knowledgeable. A trip we’ll always remember!

reviews.author: Rebecca Dubois
reviews.text: We had the privilege of touring Kauai with Doug yesterday and honestly, this experience was the highlight of our entire trip to Hawaii! Doug was terrific - he showed us so much of the island during our time, shared stories of the history of the island, its culture, and people.  He brought us to see the canyon, the beaches, and even brought us to try shave ice when he heard that we had not yet had a chance to try it!  We thoroughly enjoyed our visit to Kauai and plan to be back in the very near f

reviews.author: Hung Nguyen
reviews.text:
Doug the tour guy is so detail on his tour and very happy that we booked this private tour with him. It felt like we are VIP. He's got a mini van and my wife and I, along with another was on this adventure with Doug. We did so many stops and he actually gets out explain the surroundings and also takes really good pictures for us. If we are back on this island we would 100%  book him again.
Henry and Thi

reviews.author: David Ferry
reviews.text:
Doug was a wonderful tour guide. He is extremely knowledgeable about Kauai and its history and a great story teller. His tour encompassed almost all of the road from the northernmost tip of the island past Hanalei to the western area and the spectacular Waimea Canyon. He knows the backroads as well and showed us some neat things off the beaten path.
I would recommend planning your excursion with him early on in your stay because it will give you a really good sense of Kauai and all there is to s

reviews.author: Dean McDonald
reviews.text: The best way to see Kauai is with a tour by Doug.  You can sit back and  look out the window without having to worry about traffic or directions or even where to go.  Our Waimea Canyon tour with Doug was exactly what we wanted; a friendly, personable and knowledgeable tour guide.  He provided an unforgettable experience with his enthusiasm and information.  His detailed sharing of facts, island flora, customs, history, and culture gave us an appreciation of Kauai, the land, the people and Hawaii

reviews.author: Stephanie McSheehan
reviews.text:
Our two-day tour with Doug was hands-down the highlight of our entire trip to Kauai — and truly one of the best travel experiences we’ve ever had. From the very first moment, it felt less like a formal tour and more like being shown around by a beloved family member who deeply loves his home and wants you to fall in love with it too.
Doug took us all over the island, thoughtfully crafting each day so we could see breathtaking sights, learn the island’s rich history, and fully experience the magi

reviews.author: David Schmidt
reviews.text: We had a very enjoyable time with Doug on the Waimea Canyon tour. He is friendly and knowledgeable about the beautiful garden island of Kaua'i. His enthusiasm to share this island with others is obvious from the stories he tells and the information he provides. I highly recommend this tour when you visit Kaua'i!

reviews.author: Rohan Bagli
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of going on a tour with the Kauai Tour Guy, and it was an unforgettable experience! From the moment we started, his knowledge and passion for the island shone through.

We kicked off the tour in Hanapepe, where I learned about its connection to Lilo and Stitch. It was such a fun way to connect with the local culture! After that, we explored the stunning Waimea Canyon, stopping at scenic photo areas that offered breathtaking views—perfect for capturing memories.

The h

reviews.author: Lisa Levy
reviews.text:
Fantastic Kauai Tour with Doug!

Doug picked us up right at the cruise terminal and gave us an amazing six-hour private tour of Kauai. His comfortable van fit the four of us perfectly, and he was happy to stop anytime we wanted—coffee, restrooms, or photos.

We saw the highlights, including the beautiful North Shore and Hanalei, plus several waterfalls. Doug shared great insights about the island’s history and geography and even took photos for us.

Best of all, he got us back to the port with p

reviews.author: denise nagel
reviews.text: It was a truly wonderful day with Doug. He was prompt, knowledgeable and very pleasant to be with. When unexpected road work came up he quickly pivoted to an alternative route. He also showed us beautiful views and a great lunch. I would highly recommend Doug should you ever find yourself looking for a personal tour in Hawaii

reviews.author: Leigh Anne Terry
reviews.text:
We had a wonderful day with Doug touring the Waimea Canyon!  He was fun, knowledgeable, extremely funny, and took us to all the must see spots!
It was great to have someone there who could give us local lore as well as spot on recommendations as to what to have for lunch (hint… Try the Portuguese bean soup and don’t miss out on the cornbread).  I would definitely recommend Doug to anyone who wanted to enjoy the beauty of the island without having to worry about getting behind the wheel and doing

reviews.author: Michelle Rick
reviews.text:
Our tour of Kauai with Doug was the best!
His knowledge of its history, culture, flora, geography and geology was incredible.
We enjoyed his tidbits of the island's points of interest, ie. numerous films movies and music.
Doug is so informative while still being entertaining and fun.  We relied on his suggestions and we were not disappointed. It was a  fantastic day!

reviews.author: S Tillie
reviews.text:
We visited Kauai last week to celebrate my husband's 75th birthday and booked a 2-day private tour with Doug. Letting him handle the driving was one of the best choices we made — it allowed us to sit back, enjoy the scenery, and learn more about the island.

Doug picked us up at our condo in Kapa'a and took us around the southern part of Kauai. We saw Hanapepe’s Swinging Bridge, explored Koke’e State Park and Waimea Canyon, and stopped at Kalalau Lookout. Lunch at Koke’e Lodge was tasty and rela

reviews.author: steve hirshfeld
reviews.text: First thing to do when You Plan your Trip to Kauai is to sign up with Kauai Tour Guy. Having been to all the other Hawaiian Islands, Kauai for us was the most special. It is filled with extraordinary beauty, dramatic terrain and a tapestry of colors and views that even exceeded our own imagination of what this trip would be like. So much is packed into such small spaces where at one point you are at the Waimea Canyon and the next you are looking up at the cliffs of the Na Pali Coast from a catam

reviews.author: Terry Allen
reviews.text:
Great tour , highly recommended - 5 Star . Very professional and knowledgeable. Great being able to chat with someone who knows their stuff.
Karen & Terry.

reviews.author: Margarida Miguéis
reviews.text:
Doug was great
Had these tours (2 days), booked with Doug, since one year ago
Didn’t disappointed. We loved it
Aloha
A Hui Hou Doug and Kauai
Hope to see you again,soon

reviews.author: Kathy Goldman
reviews.text: We had an amazing day with Uncle Doug doing his 6 hour private Hanalei Bay North Shore & East Side Tour on Kauai!! He is so passionate about sharing his plethora of knowledge and history about this beautiful island. We stopped to see waterfalls, beautiful beaches, a Hawaiian Heiau (Temple), the Kīlauea Lighthouse and National Bird and Wildlife Refuge and so much more. For lunch, we went to a spot with several food trucks and had an ocean view seated at a picnic table. At Doug’s recommendation, w

reviews.author: Michael Van Schelven
reviews.text: We booked the full day Waimea Canyon tour with the 'Kauai Tour Guy' and it was as advertised.  Doug was both knowledgeable about the island, its geography and culture, and entertaining!

reviews.author: Cheryl Graney
reviews.text: We had the unique experience to have a private tour of Kauai with Doug from The Kauai Tour Guy. Doug had a wealth of knowledge about this beautiful island.  From historical facts to anecdotal stories, he is very engaging. He gets a feel for your interests and will make sure to point out areas to return to on your trip. It was the perfect length of time for us. He is very down to earth, and it is obvious that he loves his island home!  Money well spent. Cheryl & Kevin Graney, Jamul, CA

reviews.author: Glenda Hawkins
reviews.text: Uncle Doug is an A+ Tour Guide. His knowledge of Kauai is amazing. My family (age 7 to 70) was super impressed with his ability to connect with all of us and to make sure that each of us had a wonderful time. If you want to see Kauai through the eyes of a local, book Doug!!!

reviews.author: Nancy Stansbury
reviews.text: My daughter and I did the 6 hour Waimea Canyon/Wailua Falls Tour and had a glorious day. We also got to see Hanapēpē and a magnificent view of the Napali Coast. Since we had previously seen the Spouting Horn, our tour guide, Doug, took us to the Kauai Coffee Company. Really appreciated being able to do that. I can’t say enough good things about Doug. He taught us so much about the natural surroundings, the history, and also provided us with helpful information about other places to see and local

reviews.author: roryw259
reviews.text: My wife and I were disappointed. You do go underwater, you do see some fish and coral, but there's not very much. Don't expect to get a view any where near what you see from RV shows or even YouTubers who snorkel. Most of the 'corals' are some minimal growth on artificial reefs the company has attempted to build up over the last 3-4 decades. Very little is there that has built up naturally over a long time period. We just didn't see a lot of variety or quantity. It was too expensive for what we

reviews.author: 525jeromeh
reviews.text: This is an amazing excursion. The staff from beginning to end was totally a class act. To the captain and the moderator thank you for your professionalism and exceptional customer service onboard. On our next visit to Honolulu we will be doing this again.

reviews.author: curiosityseeker19
reviews.text: This was perhaps the most fun adventure I had in Hawaii.  It's a 100 foot custom made submarine that goes down to about 100 feet deep.  It's located on a long pier at the Hilton Hawaiian Village 'Waikiki Beach Resort.  This hotel has everything a complete city in its self and seems to be the perfect place to stay.  One rides a boat that shuttles you to the submarine out in the ocean.  Going down the ladder isn't too hard and I'm speaking as a handicap person.  Once submerged the submarine passes

reviews.author: mattm316
reviews.text: This is our second attempt to go on this adventure. Both times the tour was cancelled after we arrived due to long-existing weather conditions. Do not bother buying this unless you want to waste your time and lose your money. Do better!

reviews.author: 515ervint
reviews.text: The experience was like no other its was very interesting and amazing to see the world under water.

reviews.author: Jennifer_b_TX04
reviews.text: Saw sharks & sea turtles! Super cool, low-key experience. Highly recommend, especially if you're near the Hilton resort!

reviews.author: Tanyajo22
reviews.text: We had a great time and we loved seeing all the fish.  We would definitely do this again.

reviews.author: 467ruchim
reviews.text: Great views, thorough tour guide and overall very professional!

reviews.author: X8011YOgenes
reviews.text: Wonderful experience.  Highly recommend it.

reviews.author: carol b
reviews.text: This was truly fantastic.  The cost was affordable and definitely worth it.   The staff who we brought the tickets off were terrific  friendly and professional.  The staff that ran the Atlantis submarine were professional, friendly and really  fun to listen to, heaps of info as well.   Would highly recommend

reviews.author: 665elisham
reviews.text: I tagged along to Hawaii on my boyfriend’s work trip. This was the perfect solo excursion, while he was busy with a meeting. I saw sharks, sea turtles, eagle rays, and I’ve been on a submarine now! So f’ing cool!! My boyfriend was jealous when I was telling him all about. Ladies, make your boyfriends and husband jealous and book this now!

reviews.author: richardkB1336RR
reviews.text: Better then we thought it would be great people running the show and really know what there talking about and very nice helped everyone every step

reviews.author: ramtripadv
reviews.text: We took Atlantis submarine tour in Honalulu and fully enjoyed. It was a well coordinated trip with good commentary and some great underwater views, good for people of all ages

reviews.author: K8035ZFstephenf
reviews.text: Wife had a great time.  Got to see several nice things, Shark, Turtles, lots of fish.  See life 100' under water in comfort.  Nice little boat ride out to sub also.

reviews.author: Tour18839626728
reviews.text: This was the highlight of our trip! Saw loads of different fishes, eels, and even sharks! However, I did not use this company. If you go to the place to book directly it is MUCH cheaper! You can find it on the beach near the Hilton Hotel complex.

reviews.author: SWilson10
reviews.text:
IT WAS FUN! The submarine was comfortably large, much like being in a small airplane, so no issues with possible claustrophobia. And the viewing windows are large so that adds to the comfort.
We didn’t see anything extraordinary but it was fun to see the bottom of the ocean. I don’t play in the ocean so this activity gave me the rare opportunity to be in the ocean and still feel safe. We saw a few objects - part of a plane, s sunken ship, and some other things the company had placed in the water

reviews.author: ViagemSemEscalas
reviews.text:
O blog Viagem Sem Escalas esteve em Oahu, no Havaí, e tivemos a oportunidade de viver uma das experiências mais incríveis da ilha: o passeio com o Atlantis Submarines Waikiki. Saindo do Hilton Hawaiian Village, o ponto de encontro é super organizado e prático, e a travessia de barco até o submarino já começa a criar aquela sensação de aventura.
O submarino é moderno, silencioso e totalmente climatizado, além de ecológico, movido a bateria. Assim que descemos, a imersão é de tirar o fôlego: o fun

reviews.author: West_Laurel
reviews.text:
We saw fish closeup, without getting wet, on a submarine ride in Honolulu harbor with Atlantis Adventures.  We even saw a shark!  Lots of fish were hanging out at a couple of old ships which were sunk on purpose to create artificial reefs.

Boarding the sub is similar to boarding a commuter liner, one of those airliners that's too small for a jetway.  However, boarding the sub is much less irritating.  We rode a boat from Waikiki out to the sub.  Once at the sub, we climbed down the stairway (al

reviews.author: grzrgorzw
reviews.text: For us it was unique experience which otherwise wouldn’t happened, boat dive to ocean floor which was around 100 feet wher we get to saw some ocean life and several man made structures. Overall great experience with friendly staff and informative guide.

reviews.author: Sean D
reviews.text: Unique.  Chance to go in a submarine might not happen again. Tour guide was fun and jokes were cheesy. Would recommend for all ages as long as you can climb a ladder.

reviews.author: Holly Dennis
reviews.text: Unique way to do something chill away from the sun. We went at 11am and there were only a few other families.

reviews.author: SRLV702
reviews.text: The Tour was great , the crew was fantastic the adventure under the ovean was awesome. 🐠🐟🐢🐚🪸🐡

reviews.author: Craig Johnson
reviews.text: Ride out was dolphins, sea turtles and whales spouting! The sub was amazing!! Turtles, rays, jacks and sharks 😎🤙🏿 best thing to do in all of Honolulu

reviews.author: Marya Bei
reviews.text: Just had the most epic experience diving deep into the Pacific Ocean on the world's largest tourist submarine! it was truly awe-inspiring!

reviews.author: Matty Frost
reviews.text: Great experience! You get to explore the reef up close. The staff is great, ready to help, and answer your questions. Definitely worth doing, I mean, you get to go on a submarine!

reviews.author: deep shrestha
reviews.text:
Marvelous experience. The staff are very friendly and helpful. Narrator is very knowledgeable and funny. This is actually the best value in town for entertainment.

Been here a few times and will repeat.

reviews.author: Ashley B
reviews.text: We had a great time, especially my daughter!We saw some spinner dolphins while boarding the shuttle boat, and we saw so many fish and beautiful coral! Only bummer we hadn't considered is that when you go down that deep, you cant really see any color... but thats  just science, not the tours fault. We loved seeing the two shipwrecks as well! The crew did a fantastic job.

reviews.author: Karen M
reviews.text: We had never been underwater in a real submarine before and decided to try this. We are not scuba divers but had been on several snorkeling adventures viewing beautiful corals and colorful fish. This trip offers the opportunity to see the coral and the fish ( plus a few shipwrecks) without getting wet or being fearful of swimming in the ocean. We enjoyed the new experience of traveling under water to a depth of more than 100 ft, viewing tropical fish, corals, shipwrecks, and learning the history

reviews.author: Billie E
reviews.text: Amazing tour of the reefs with a knowledgeable tour guide and great crew!  Would recommend this to anyone.  We actually saw two ship wrecks and a tiger shark while down, and went past 100 ft deep   Very cool

reviews.author: Safari761436
reviews.text: Very cool being underwater but a bit disappointing there wasn't a lot to look at (some fish but none too exotic, a couple ships that had sunk, spare tires and other junk on the ocean floor) and the non-stop talking by the tour guide (with so little substance about what we were seeing) interfered with the experience, plus the trying-to-be-cute musical selections (Baby Shark? Jailhouse Rock, which I still don't get?) were just annoying. I was hesitant to write/post this but the experience could be

reviews.author: Tamara M
reviews.text:
It was a very exciting trip. We went down 107 feet to the bottom of Kailua Bay. We saw a white tip shark, yellow tangs, butterfly fish, and lots of other reef fish among the two shipwrecks.
The crew was very nice.

reviews.author: I3222CNsandis
reviews.text: Our family found this to be a great experience. Our group ranged from 12 to 72 and we all enjoyed it very much. We would do it again.

reviews.author: pelton12
reviews.text: Sub was fun, tripadvisor didn't honor their price match guarantee.    12 hrs after buying here I found the tickets for the same show  available to the public for $50 less per person.   Submitted to TripAdvisor and they refused to refund even though it fits into their price match guarantee.   Did not use any coupons.

reviews.author: michaellW9072PF
reviews.text: I like to snorkel, but my husband does not.  Seeing fish through the comfort of a submarine window was our compromise.  The staff was so knowledgeable and gave lots of information about each kind of fish and coral we were looking at.  It was beautiful, and we were extra blessed to see several sharks and bottle-nosed dolphins that day in addition to a whole array of smaller fish and schools of fish.  I was surprised when friends said they would be nervous knowing they were deep under water.  We c

reviews.author: Greg S
reviews.text: This was so amazing.  We highly recommend it to anyone.  Was longer and deeper than we had expected.  We even sat on the bottom of the ocean at 105' deep.

reviews.author: Curious08040557522
reviews.text: A little underwhelming unless you’re really into submarines, shipwrecks, and seeing the ocean floor at 100ft. We didn’t really end up seeing much more of the coral reef or wildlife than you can see snorkeling on this island. Price was a little steep for a 1hr experience. But it was still a cool experience and my partner who was a little more into it had an absolute blast.

reviews.author: SIEGBERTX
reviews.text:
Die u-boot Tour war große Klasse, wir haben so was das erste Mal gemacht.
Wir sind mehr als 30 Meter in die tiefe gegangen & sind begeistert.
Wir haben kleine & große Fische ( auch einen Hai )  das wunderbare Riff, Schiffswracks & die Unterwasserwelt in allen Farben gesehen.

reviews.author: pameladB8339TS
reviews.text: Great experience! Crew was professional  and made us feel very safe! I understand there may be more fish activity in the mornings, if you are condering this event, but it’s all good anytime of day!

reviews.author: LivinGreat808
reviews.text: Took my 6 year old son on this adventure, he really enjoyed it and I did too. We have done a lot of the activities on the Big Island and this one is unique. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: sharonkr2025
reviews.text: Meh. Starboard side had far fewer things to look at. It was comfortable enough and clean enough but the value for the money wasn't there.

reviews.author: tomrF9320KW
reviews.text:
Wow, what an incredible experience! I'm still reeling from the sheer diversity of marine life I witnessed. The coral reefs were absolutely teeming with a kaleidoscope of colorful fish, each one more vibrant than the last. Schools of them darted and weaved through the water, creating a mesmerizing, living mosaic.
But the real highlight, the moment that truly took my breath away, was encountering an eel! It was such a thrill to see one of these mysterious creatures in its natural habitat, graceful

reviews.author: 653SallyP
reviews.text: This really felt like a once-in-a-lifetime experience. I am never going to go scuba diving. Snorkeling is fun, but I only see the marine life and coral from above, since I stay at the surface. But the submarine took us underwater, and we had great visibility for seeing the coral reef, the fish, and the shipwrecks (absolutely teeming with life!)... we even saw a spotted eagle ray and its baby! It was an amazing experience, with a guide telling us what we were looking at and explaining the stories

reviews.author: ricklV492AG
reviews.text: It was amazing, knowing that we were 109 feet under the ocean! You always wonder what it looks like from down there! The submarine is comfortable and air conditioned. The guides are very knowledgeable and have interesting stories to tell! It was a fun time!

reviews.author: TheDayDreamerTravels
reviews.text: Overall, this excursion was very enjoyable. The crew was friendly and knowledgeable. The submarine was clean. We saw lots of fish and the shipwrecks were very cool. Everyone in our group (ages 18-52) had a good time.

reviews.author: erictL9839HD
reviews.text: Awesome safe experience!  Saw shipwrecks and lots of fish.  Didn't feel unsafe at all.  Would recommend this for both adults and children.

reviews.author: Bill S
reviews.text: A submarine underwater tour isn't something people do all the time. The crew were friendly and knowledgeable. Plenty of fish to see along with the reefs. I wish the  tour was longer with more of the wrecks around the island. The spinner dolphins played around the boat coming back from submarine.

reviews.author: Maren Bahler
reviews.text: Overall we enjoyed this tour. I would highly recommend if looking for an excursion that doesn’t involve heights or actually getting wet in the water! We saw some neat ship wreckage and wildlife in the ocean!

reviews.author: Yavor Mladenov
reviews.text: It's worth a try, don't miss it.

reviews.author: Roberta Chastain
reviews.text: Definitely disappointed.  There were no colors in the coral at all. We did see a few yellow, black and white fish. My sister and I were not able to sit together. I think the sub was too crowded. The sunken ships weren't anything impressive. $160.00 per adult was overpriced for what we saw or didn't see. The staff on the boat that took us to the sub were very friendly. We went on March 9. The weather was beautiful. The best part of this adventure was seeing all the dolphins as we were going to th

reviews.author: Diana Herrera
reviews.text:
Amazing experience! 💯 totally recommend it
The entire experience was great, staff was very friendly and kept logistics very smooth and organized.

reviews.author: John C
reviews.text: Seats do not line up with windows and they are somewhat uncomfortable. Fortunately, our sub was not crowded so everyone sat in every other seat. If full I I would not have slightly enjoyed. Seeing a couple of old shipwrecks was also cool.

reviews.author: nishant jonnala
reviews.text:
Overall, we absolutely loved the tour! My 3 and 7-year-olds had a blast—they enjoyed it on a whole new level. We saw so many colorful fish, a few shipwrecks, and beautiful coral reefs. Since I don't know how to scuba dive, this was truly the best way to experience the underwater world. It was worth every penny!
I’m usually claustrophobic, but I felt very comfortable the entire time. The interior is spacious and the air circulation is great. The sub went a little more than 100 feet deep and does

reviews.author: Frank Brill
reviews.text: Cool. We were over 100 feet down (107, actually), saw 2 shipwrecks, and many fish.

reviews.author: Allison Welch
reviews.text: Great family activity, we went with ages 4-65 and all had great time. Get to see as much as scuba diving but without having to get cold and wet! Well run and organized tour

reviews.author: Jonathan Mc Geough
reviews.text: This is an amazing experience for young kids. When the crew says its scuba diving without getting wet they are right! Seen amazing fish and sunken ships for artificial reefs even a reef shark. The crew was fantastic from the beginning of the trip to the end.

reviews.author: Ray
reviews.text: Nice and friendly crew and enjoyable tour. Good size of people and seemed kids friendly. 5 min boat ride and no seasick at all. Will recommend!

reviews.author: Laura Moya
reviews.text: What an incredible experience! Totally smooth with no waves (big bonus for those if us who get seasick). The captain and crew were friendly and very informative. We saw lots beautiful fish, coral, shipwrecks and five sharks! Truly amazing, I would definitely do it again!

reviews.author: Jason Jacob
reviews.text: What a great experience! An amazing expertise for he family - the kids loved it. We saw so many fish - including sharks! Jason was a great host - informative and loaded with dad jokes ;) A highlight of our trip!

reviews.author: Vir G
reviews.text: A fun ride to 105ft below ocean surface.

reviews.author: Shay
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful! We seen multiple shipwrecks and many wonderful fish. The operators were phenomenal and they did very well to narrate and inform you on everything through facts and storytelling. We have another booked for cozumel!!

reviews.author: Charles Clevenstine
reviews.text:
Very nice experience and a definite plus where my son was free.

Staff was exceptionally nice and safe and proficient

Tour was interesting and informative

This is an activity that I would recommend without hesitation

***Parking can be a little issue, but little issue

reviews.author: nicolebfamily
reviews.text: We had an amazing time on the submarine water scooters. The Captains and staff were all very helpful and kind. We saw so many fish and turtles. Very easy activity to do for all levels. Tip them well they deserve it!

reviews.author: Discover03775410548
reviews.text: Great time with great people! Its a very cool experience and recommend you do this if you are here!

reviews.author: V9122QLmichelleb
reviews.text: When we arrived, we noticed that ours was the only boat leaving the harbor. There was a strong wind and white caps on the water. The water was far too choppy to be out. Half of the people on the boat vomited. When I had an opportunity to use the submarine scooter, I was held at the surface for so long that by the time I started to descend, I was extremely nauseated. I repeatedly vomited in the helmet (it was exactly as gross as you can imagine) and had to discontinue. I’m a certified scuba diver

reviews.author: billb884
reviews.text:
An incredible adventure. The Team at Oahu Submarine Scooter was very helpful. To ensure everyone had a great experience. All visitors were buddy up with a Skilled Submarine Scooter employee.
It was a great a experience.

reviews.author: C646BGbillb
reviews.text: An incredible experience !!. Beats any type of snorkeling event. The Island Water Team are just incredible. The Team ensures we are all safe and enjoy a great experience seeing fish and turtles.

reviews.author: breannaa659
reviews.text: All the staff are extremely nice and reassuring. We had a great time and would recommend this to anyone and do this activity again! Save some money by booking bundles of activities through the Island WaterSports Hawaii Center, as these activities can get pricey. The boat ride and experience were about 2 hours long; the time flew by. There were a number of other groups on the boat as well, but not crowded at all. Snacks and drinks were provided, and the boat was clean and dry.

reviews.author: S9454MHarthura
reviews.text: It was a awesome experience! Almost as amazing as watching the birth of my children!! I cannot recommend enough! The staff is wonderful and really makes it unforgettable!  Everything was amazing! Cannot wait to get back and do it again!!

reviews.author: Dreamer02019336487
reviews.text: Best experience ever! Worth the cost. The staff was great!

reviews.author: 448tanyah
reviews.text: Great experience! I was nervous at first but the divers stay with you the whole time. I saw so many cool fish and turtles too!

reviews.author: cristinabV4809VC
reviews.text:
This Submarine Scooter Adventure was hands down the best activity we did in Oahu, and we did six different excursions during our trip. It was the very first thing my husband and I did for my birthday, and we seriously considered doing it again before we left. We only didn’t because we ran out of time.
Our boat had 14 guests and 3 incredible staff. They take guests out in small groups of six, and while waiting for your turn, everyone has the opportunity to snorkel. They provide all the gear inclu

reviews.author: karenronhoge
reviews.text:
We had a fantastic time scootering around the reef! The experience was incredible—we were surrounded by schools of fish the entire time we were underwater, and we even spotted a sea turtle. Having a fish-feeding net attached to the front of the scooter made the interaction even better.

The guides were excellent and very attentive. They provided thorough instructions before we boarded and gave us a final review right before we descended, which made us feel completely safe and comfortable breathi

reviews.author: FlyingOutofNYC
reviews.text:
Our family of three adults and two teenagers enjoyed the journey to a reef right off the shore of Oahu for the unique scooters -- we were surrounded by fish. And we also jumped on the Sea-Doo scooters, which was a highlight of our trip to Oahu. The motorized vehicles let us soar through the water and even leap out of it like dolphins.

What really impressed us was the large number of people who were dedicated to our safety. There were people on the main boat, on a support boat, above the water,

reviews.author: tim t
reviews.text:
Did the submarine scooter activity and what an amazing experience it was. Our boat had 29 people on board and every single person on that boat was amazed by the experience of scooter submarining.

The team at Island Watersports makes sure one diver is with each participant underwater at all times. They take amazing pictures which you want to get to purchase to have the memories forever. They are very reasonably priced as well! 

The amount of fish right in front of your face while underwater is

reviews.author: G6639VPkimberlym
reviews.text: We originally scheduled this because we knew it would be a tour underwater that my husband could do (heart patient), it turned into something we all loved.  The staff and scuba divers (1:1) were great.  They constantly checked in to make sure we were all ok.  The only thing i wish was offered was smaller groups so you can stay down longer to possibly see more variety of fish/turtles. Also, possibly consider either including the pics in the cost or less expensive for families instead of per perso

reviews.author: joannepB5366JI
reviews.text:
Excellent adventure 
Staff was very nice and professional 
Water was beautiful and fish were everywhere! We had a great time!

reviews.author: 848deec
reviews.text: Cool experience with friendly crew.  We saw a ton of fish and a sea turtle.  The guys provided detailed instructions to make us feel comfortable.

reviews.author: Safari66561173462
reviews.text: Beautiful clear water (the clearest of any of our snorkeling trips so far), but with much stronger current, so be aware.  Also, though being in the mini subs was cool, it was also EXTREMELY LOUD!  If you have noise sensitivity you at least would want earplugs.    The pressure change with descending can also cause some queasiness.  There were also no other boats around us so it was far less crowded than most of our other sites!(For reference we started with a site on the North Shore, then swam wi

reviews.author: Jordana L
reviews.text: This was my husband’s choice of activity for our vacation. I was absolutely terrified of going out in the open ocean and the crew did a great job at reassuring me of the procedures of getting on the submarine scooter. Once I was inside and saw all of the fish and turtles it was such a cool experience. I 100% recommend even if you’re a little nervous about it, you will never experience the tropical fish literally eating from your hands and being up close to the giant sea turtles. This crew is fan

reviews.author: Megan B
reviews.text: If we come back to Hawaii I would definitely book this excursion again! Coming from Texas it was absolutely 💯! The crew made it a wonderful experience! And saw tons of fish and turtles! It's worth the money! If we had time I'd go on it again while we ate here!  Thank you!

reviews.author: DonnieNTammy
reviews.text: Aloha! What can I say... Family & Friends together in Hawaii on a beautiful day, doing a unique experience, it was GREAT! The entire team was so friendly, and extremely patient with all of us trying something new and different.  We were a party of 5. My nephew was nervous but they got him down on the first attempt and he's ready to do it again. HE LOVED IT!  My husband and our friends thought it was a blast.  Very Cool!  I am extremely claustrophobic so the first time down I panic and had to com

reviews.author: Gopinath Timma
reviews.text: Great experience. Very helpful staff for non swimmers

reviews.author: Elenamancha9908 Mancha
reviews.text: We did the under water scooter tour and had an amazing time and the best crew, very safe for non swimmers!

reviews.author: Richard Miller (Dutch)
reviews.text: Even though the water was murky today (after 2 weeks of rain… ugh!), the trip was amazing and the sub scooter was a lot of fun. All the crew were professional and entertaining. They took safety seriously but made the whole trip fun! Thanks!

reviews.author: Jolina Lulualii
reviews.text: 10/10 experience would definitely recommend for anyone that wants to try something new. The staff is funny, friendly, welcoming, caring and informative they even gave us advice for different places to visit on the island. They made my cousin feel safe and even offered her a swim cap because she didn’t want to get her hair wet and would check on her throughout our time with them. They also offered snacks & water while on the boat. Plus snorkeling gear while you wait for the different groups if yo

reviews.author: Taylor Troutman
reviews.text: A wonderful experience super fun worth the experience we saw turtles and much more

reviews.author: Michele Grieser
reviews.text: These guys are amazing. If you get the chance check them out. Professional, fun, and friendly. Tons of fun and viewing the wildlife this way is fantastic!!!! Thank you for the superior once in a lifetime experience.

reviews.author: Brenda Van Daalwyk
reviews.text: We had a blast. The staff was so friendly and helpful and we had a great experience.

reviews.author: Lateefa Carter
reviews.text: Just simply amazing very professional team, this was my first time ever in life doing something like.  With this team Island Water Spots Hawaii being very professional. Somehow it didn't feel like my first-time I became a pro real fast with this team. No matter how old or young you are and love water fish God's creations. I guarantee you'll enjoy this sport. I was mad my time was up lol. It's a site you must visit for sure!!!

reviews.author: Timothy Smith
reviews.text: This is one of the most fun and beautiful things I’ve done on any vacation. I’ve been telling everyone about the scooter sub. I’m looking forward to doing it again when we get back to Hawaii.

reviews.author: Christina Moon
reviews.text:
I had such a fantastic experience with Island Water Sports Hawaii! This was my second time doing the submarine scooter and snorkeling tour — my first time was so memorable that I knew I had to come back again.

The instructors and staff were super chill and helpful. They really prioritized safety and gave clear, thorough instructions, which made me feel comfortable and confident the entire time. Everything was well organized and professional. We were able to see multiple sea turtles and so many

reviews.author: Sheryl Varga
reviews.text:
The 4 of us has a great time.
We saw a lot of beautiful fish and a turtle

reviews.author: Samantha Schiff
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about this place! I went with my grandmother and my mom and we had an absolutely incredible day. The staff were kind and accommodating, they were also funny and easy to communicate with. It’s different than I was expecting, but it was better than anything i could have imagined. We saw a ton of turtles and so many different fish. The boat ride over was stunning (I highly recommend you sit at the front of the boat and face forward, there’s space to put your feet in

reviews.author: Tanya Hollaway McCalpin
reviews.text: Great experience! I was nervous at first but the divers stay with you the whole time! There were so many cool fish and turtles too!

reviews.author: Lavanya Desai
reviews.text:
We had a memorable experience.
It’s a great opportunity for people like me who cannot swim to experience the joy of being in water with fish 🐟.
The divers were very competent and attentive towards us.
Highly recommended to try .
Water was too beautiful 😍

reviews.author: A Z
reviews.text: Was a great experience, no need to know how to swim. The staff explain things well and is very patient and organized . While you wait for your turn you can swim in the ocean they have many things for you to use. Life jackets and all equipment is free to use.

reviews.author: Caireen Rhoades
reviews.text: I’m afraid of swimming and am not a water person so I was so anxious. These guys made it SOOOO worth it!! After it’s done I’m super glad I did it. If you have a chance, definitely do this.

reviews.author: Jessica Carteret
reviews.text: The experience was amazing. If you haven't done it, you definitely should. The crew was awesome. I can't say enough of how amazing they were with all their help and their knowledge

reviews.author: Jeff W
reviews.text: The scuba scooters is something no one should skip.  Looked a little intimidating at first but each scooter has an assigned diver that stays with you in the water.  An awesome experience where fish will swim all around you.  I suggest anyone looking for an activity in Honolulu should definitely book this one.

reviews.author: Diesel Kim
reviews.text:
물 밑은 고기들이 있었고, 신기했습니다.
하지만 가압된 공기로 호흡할 때의 주의점이나 이에 대한 적절한 대처가 전혀 없었습니다.
심지어, 가압된 공기 때문에 과호흡이 온 상태에서 탈출을 요구 했음에도 불구하고 다이버 본인의 편의를 위해 보트 까지 스쿠터를 끌고 가고, 바로 부상시켜서 탈출 시키지 않아서 너무 힘들었고, 투어 내내 구토를 하느라 그날 하루가 엉망이 되었습니다. 그 누구에게도 추천하기 어려운 투어 입니다.

reviews.author: Jasmine Merriweather
reviews.text: Definitely worth it! I can’t swim and was still able to accomplish snorkeling and submarine scooter while feeling safe!

reviews.author: domenicae643
reviews.text: Best day with the best captain and crew we fought a tuna and over 30 fish. I wish everyone could experience this!!!!!!!

reviews.author: Jeanette S
reviews.text: My first time on a deep sea fishing charter. The crew were awesome!  supportive and informative, walking me through how to land the best fish of the day a 56 inch mahi mahi! We caught 13 fish, including 3 Aha tuna and 3 strikes from  a marlin. The captain and crew are a tight team, always working, finding the fish, changing up lures and bait, all to get us the strikes and into the chair. It was an amazing day, bonus whales and dolphins! The dolphins were right beside and under the boat. The boat

reviews.author: renatafW5610HO
reviews.text: Amazing experience! Never had before. We would like to have something like this in Brazil. Amazing crew. Certainly would do it again. Very profissional!!!!!!!

reviews.author: Saskia S
reviews.text:
Eine unglaubliche Erfahrung mit einem unfassbar netten und kompetenten Team - der Kapitän fand die besten Stellen und eine Menge Fische, die wir mit (einiger) Hilfe und positiven Ansporn  der Crew aus dem Wasser holen durften. Alle Crewmitglieder waren top!

Wirklich sagenhaft und einmalig - und mit insgesamt 13 Fischen auch extrem erfolgreich - wir hatten also zusätzlich auch noch etwas Glück 😓

reviews.author: jonm876
reviews.text: The captain and crew were great.  It was a rough day at sea but we still had success.  All 5 passengers caught Mahi-Mahi and some caught two. Special shout to the crew; captain Russel, Austin and Jake.

reviews.author: IsmaelG656
reviews.text: Una experiencia que dura toda la vida. La tripulación realmente se esfuerza para conseguir pesca. No es un paseo en lancha. Es un día de pesca. Muy agradecido. Llevo mis recuerdos e imágenes de lo que pesque. Recomendado para amantes de la pesca.

reviews.author: nicolehE6696GM
reviews.text: Tout était parfait. L'équipage nous a donné une cours sur la pêche pendant que le bateau quittait la côte. Tout a bien été expliqué. Le bateau était propre et il y avait même des couchettes et une toilette, de même qu'un endroit à l'intérieur ou on pouvait aller se reposer sur des banquettes. Mais le mieux était de rester à l'extérieur et profiter de la vue. Comme on part tôt, on assiste au levée du soleil. On a pêché 2 merlins et c'était fantastique comme expérience!!! L'équipage est là pour no

reviews.author: sylenzr
reviews.text: Big shout out and Mahalo to the crew  Jake, Austin, and Captain Russell! These guys are extremely professional and know what they're doing. There's a reason they catch a ton of fish (see photos)! The boat was extremely clean and comfortable (inside cabin is air conditioned). When it came to catching fish it was amazing to see the crew spring into action to set everything up for you to reel in the monster fish! Why should you book with Magic? Because nobody wants you to catch fish more than the c

reviews.author: 961tammyd
reviews.text: We didn’t go on this tour . It was cancelled LONG before it happened with no reason why? I’d love to review it, if I could! So disappointed!

reviews.author: B6241QDchrisw
reviews.text: Fishing trip of a lifetime! Everything about this trip was perfect. The boat is top notch, the captain worked hard to get us on the fish, and was super pleasant to fish with. The deck hands, Jake and Austin, worked their tails off all day and were awesome to hang out with. If I ever fish in Hawaii again it will be aboard the Magic.

reviews.author: 673stephanieh
