reviews.text: Entire crew and personnel were easy to work with and very friendly. They all made the day perfect along with the great weather! Thank you Russell, Jake and Austin. Hope I spelled your names right!

reviews.author: William E
reviews.text: I want to start this off by saying the crew on the MAGIC was outstanding! If I hadn’t caught a fish all day long, I would still given them 5 stars! …However we put the smack down on the fish which made the trip just that more rememberable! The waters were sure rough, It made for a hard day of sitting up straight but at the end of the day we brought in 4 TUNA, 5 MAHI , and my PB MARLIN !  I couldn’t have been on a better boat !

reviews.author: justinfO3333SG
reviews.text: Was a fantastic trip! Captain Russell knows his stuff! Austin and JJ were the hardest working deck hands I have ever seen! Trip of a lifetime! Dispite being seasick the whole time, will plan another next time we come to Hawaii! 100% recommend!

reviews.author: vigasang2016
reviews.text: It was a great experience for the family. We spent a total of just over 8 hours on the water and the kids loved the experience of seeing the fish. The weather was great that day, the kids were able to take quick naps (they have beds on the yacht). We weren't expecting to get fish since we didn't pay the "KEEP YOUR CATCH" rate, but we were told that even shared charters get a few lbs of fish. We grilled it up the next day and it was amazing! Would definitely recommend this at least once for peopl

reviews.author: T4816WRdanielac
reviews.text: The captain, crew and boat were phenomenal! The boat was vary well kept and accommodated more than all our needs & comforts. They captain and crew were GREAT informative, attentive, hardworking, welcoming, and all while staying on task. Professional fishermen! They did get us on the fish and we did land some good catches.

reviews.author: Y9442JEandrewm
reviews.text: Great captain, crew, and operation. Fishing started off good then slowed way down for a few hours. The captain never stopped searching for birds, debris, or any other signs of life. The crew worked hard and  made sure to explain what we were doing and why and were glad to answer any questions. Ended the day with a blue marlin, 8 mahi, a wahoo, and 5 skipjacks.

reviews.author: SlashAndHook
reviews.text: Had a great day on the water with Magic Sportfishing! Captain Russel and crew - JJ and Austin, put us on the fish and kept the bite going all day. Seas were a bit bumpy, but the Pacifica 50’ was solid and cut through the swells with no problem. The boat and gear are top of the line and superbly maintained! Simply can’t say enough about the courtesy and professionalism of this outfit. If you’re looking to fish with the best, look no further. Tight lines!

reviews.author: 109lloydc
reviews.text: Great day fishing! Hoped for Marlin got plenty Skipjack Tuna though. Captain Russell knows where to find them crew JJ & Austin were very professional. At times we were going from one pole to another reeling in fish after fish. At the end of the day the ice box was so full the lid could barely fit on top. We caught 39 total.

reviews.author: Rambot808
reviews.text: Captain Russel, JJ and Daren were our crew. As with all deep sea fishing there are long periods of nothing coupled with moments of sheer excitement which would best describe our trip. This crew was extremely professional and courteous. They allowed us free reign of the boat and boy was it a good time. I highly recommend these guys for all you charter fishing needs. We scored on a few Aku, mahi mahi and a monster 130 lb yellow fin! Hana pa’a !!!

reviews.author: Kathleen B
reviews.text:
Unbelievable fishing day today and the captain and crew worked hard at it!  My husband and I have fished all over the United States and this was by far the best charter trip that we have ever been on.  We have fished from Florida to Alaska.  
This was the first marlin and yellowfin trip we have been on and it did not disappoint.  The captain and crew took the time to ask what our goals were for the day.  We loved the one on one attention we received .  If you are looking for an awesome time and

reviews.author: Olivier Vetter
reviews.text:
We had an incredible trip with Dusty and Austin on the deck crew—they were outstanding: professional, attentive, and always ready to help. The captain runs the boat with military precision, keeping everything spotless, organized, and comfortable for guests.

They always find the fish, though you should know you can’t keep them—that’s how they keep the trip affordable while covering their costs. The captain was relentless, hunting non-stop, and it made for a long but thrilling day. When the fish

reviews.author: Laurie Mendiola
reviews.text: The Boat was impeccable, clean. The crew members were polite and professional and gave us good instructions but we never got to use any of it. Spent the entire day on the boat and only had 1 bite. I felt like it was a waste of money and an entire vacation day in Hawaii. My whole family left feeling so disappointed. We didn’t even touch the rods. Just know if you book this you may spend the money and time and come back empty handed. No guarantees  you will catch anything and don’t forget to take

reviews.author: Holly Siebert
reviews.text: We had the lovely opportunity to go on a shared charter with Jake, Austin and Victor. It was a lovely day out on the water with great company taking care of us, educating us and helping us reel in a marlin! All of the crew made us feel welcomed and at home. This charter was the highlight of our whole trip! We highly recommend this company and we look forward at coming back in the near future!

reviews.author: J B
reviews.text: We went out and fished hard all day for tuna and marlin, had the boat to ourselves but no fish ,  all the equipment including the boat was immaculate super clean, I don’t blame them for the no fish  it’s just part of fishing, would have been nice if they could have put the girls with me on something just so they could catch a fish. But overall a great experience crew was fantastic and professional. I recommend them.   Captain is very friendly and kind.  Kendall good people to go out with

reviews.author: John Caldwell
reviews.text: To anyone going to Hawaii wanting to do an offshore fishing trip. I would highly recomend Magic Sport Fishing in Oahu. Great crew that works their butts off and a captain with over 40 years of running this boat  We had a slow day at first and once we found the fish they made sure that we stayed to make sure we got what we needed. The boat is older but spotless and handles big seas well. So look them up when you’re thinking about coming to the island. But remember with the trade winds there can b

reviews.author: Drrooiid
reviews.text:
March 26th, 2025 was one of the best days of my life thanks to Magic and its crew. Jake and Austin performed like a well-oiled machine, providing instruction and encouragement, doing their chores as a team while the captain found the bait and then the largest fish I've ever reeled in. First, a 95 lb. Marlin, then 3 Mahi Mahi tuna ranging from 27 to 39 pounds.

It was an awesome, 10 hour day that I'll never forget!

reviews.author: Michelle Carskaddon
reviews.text: Had an absolutely fantastic time.  Jake and Austin were so patient with our 13-year-old son.  They do everything possible to find fish and got our son on a nice Mahi Mahi.  Thank you for a memorable and amazing day on the water.  The crew truly loves what they do, and it shows.  I highly recommend booking with Magic, it was worth every penny.

reviews.author: Ming @ Mak N Ming
reviews.text:
Great experience. First time fishing and the crew Austin and Jake were really helpful and supportive. Great guys to spend a day out at sea with.

Go with friends or solo. I’m looking forward to going again even though I was sea sick.

Just make sure you clear your day because we booked a half day but ended up being out all day.
Caught lots of mahi mahi!!! And it tastes way better than frozen mahi. Specifically the texture.

reviews.author: Stan Bunstock
reviews.text: We went out on the beautiful Pacifica Sportfisher Magic, with the more than able Capt. Russell,& excellent crew of Jake,& Austin...on Wednesday the 5th of March...there were 5 of us....and we ALL CAUGHT FISH!   The bite was on,& we hauled in 7 Mahi Mahi...2 Bulls,& 5 Cows.....all good sized fish....these guys( the Crew) know what they are doing....doesn't matter if you're new to Sportfishing, or been doing g it for 20 years....this crew is going g to do their darndest to get you hooked up...THAN

reviews.author: Jared L
reviews.text: We had an incredible time on our fishing trip! From start to finish, the crew (Capt. Victor, Austin & Jake) were professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly friendly. The boat was clean, well-equipped, and comfortable, making for a smooth and enjoyable ride. Our captain knew exactly where to go to find the best fishing spots. We reeled in 3 nice sized Marlins! This was truly an unforgettable experience, and we can’t wait to book another trip. Highly recommend this charter to anyone looking for a

reviews.author: Katie Morris
reviews.text: We booked an exclusive charter for our family who were visiting us from the mainland and we had the BEST day ever! Captain Russell and deckhands Jake and Austin were absolutely incredible. They are serious about catching fish yet also keep the mood light and positive! They worked extremely hard on our 12-hour day, coaching each of us through our “chair” experiences. Russell is constantly scanning the waters and skies and knows exactly where to go, where to be, at the right times. Our boat caught

reviews.author: chris freebury
reviews.text: Wow! What an amazing day of fishing ! Captain is great, deck hands were amazing ! Hard working guys for sure and they love their job ! Boat is in great shape and you can tell it is very well maintained! As for the 4 stars instead of 5, my biggest reason is not allowing guests on the top deck. I was looking forward to that and it was a big let down that they don’t allow anyone on the top deck. That’s the best place to hang out on a boat like that! The other bummer is they don’t offer or supply an

reviews.author: Austin Jacquillard
reviews.text:
Bottom line up front: BOOK THIS CHARTER!
This is the 2nd charter I've taken here on oahu while living here for 2 years and I wish this was the first because this set the standard! Everything about today was absolute perfection!

Captain: Knows what he's doing and will ALWAYS put you on the fish!

Deck hands: Amazing, knowledgeable, patient, kind, charismatic, and extremely friendly!

Boat: As comfortable as the Hylton Hotels, even when the waves are rocky!

Took my father and brother on a trip t

reviews.author: Arthur Jacquillard
reviews.text: Just got back from fishing on the magic. What an incredible experience this was! Captain Victor and his two deck hands Austin and Logan, worked continuously hard all day to put us on fish and landing them in the boat. We ended up bagging a beautiful 120lb Ahi and a magnificent 130lb blue marlin! 10 outta 10 would highly recommend anyone to book a trip book it with the magic. You want a memory? Make it with Magic! Mahalo!

reviews.author: Susie Adams
reviews.text: Wow, I can’t believe it. I completely got swindled. I paid just about $2000 and they didn’t even put the poles in the water. Most expensive boat ride I ever paid for. I’m a very experienced deep sea fisher woman I’ve been to many different countries all over the world Fishing and this is the poorest experience I ever had ever. I wouldn’t recommend anybody to take them or consider losing their money what a shame. I understand it’s called fishing and not catching but you can’t catch any fish if th

reviews.author: Trevis Stiles
reviews.text: Had an absolute blast on this charter! Hands down the BEST charter I have done! The crew are professional and really know their job. The Captain is awesome and knows where the big fish are. We caught 4 massive blue marlins and a skip jack tuna. 10/10 highly recommend this charter! Thank you Magic Sport Fishing for the awesome experience!

reviews.author: Baz Pro
reviews.text:
Great boat and very professional crew. The captain certainly didn’t skimp on fuel as we trolled all day, he was determined to catch us a big one. The only comment I have is that it was a bit too much of an overkill, we used mostly 130lb pound reels and broom sticks, even when they switched to smaller skirts, really Wicked Tuna Stuff!  I just wish they mixed it up a bit. Most of the target species can be caught on smaller stand up gear.
I would not hesitate to book again when I’m back in Hawaii i

reviews.author: Dilan Jivan
reviews.text: Great day out with captain Russell, Jake and Austin were great blokes very friendly and caught some nice tuna(aku’s) that day, very comfortable boat, I highly recommend anyone who likes fishing to go out with these guys, will definitely go again if I come back to Honolulu, thanks guys

reviews.author: rws1588
reviews.text:
Great trip aboard Magic today on 5 August with Captain Russell and crew.

Boat and gear are all in excellent condition, and well maintained.

Got 3 nice skipjack and a solid small marlin on my trip.

Captain worked the birds and water really well to put me on some fish.

Totally enjoyed the experience and would recommend Magic and its crew to anyone.

I have caught fish on 6 continents and been with a lot of different charters in various countries.

Magic is a top-notch operation.

Thank you for

reviews.author: Tour116657
reviews.text:
Don't book this company! Unreliable! Unprofessional! No show! No call!  They take your money and leave you hi and dry. They did a great job of ruining my guests anticipation of a great island fishing trip!

Other reviewers say there are no seats on board and that you have to sit on the edge of the boat the entire time.

The boat is dirty and there isn't a bathroom door.

They are prone to no shows.

The captain is distracted and on the phone the entire time.

DO NOT BOOK

reviews.author: vinceh816
reviews.text: Amazing experience. Searched internet and made calls for over a month to make the right choice. Tony always replied with honest, but upbeat answers. It's difficult to make a choice from afar, but Tony said the right things. He put us on fish and knew how to assist us to successfully land fish. The deckhand, Patrick was very good as well. We're going back. Bucket list fish (Mahi Mahi) off the list.

reviews.author: michaelsJ1560NW
reviews.text: I just wanna say thanks to boom boom Sport fishing for the excellent trip that we had. I wanted to thank Captain Joseph and mate Liam for most awesome experience with my son grand kids and son-in-law. I used these guys a couple times and always caught fish. This time we caught over 100 pound blue marlin which is in the picture so thanks again guys. I’ll use you next time I’m back.

reviews.author: 17emmaleek
reviews.text: Just went fishing today for my birthday - and had such an incredible time! Thank you so much to our captain Kaika and Mikey for helping make the day so special! (also shout out to Bruce for being such wonderful company) We caught lots of tuna and some mahi mahi - it was a day I’ll never forget! We will 1000% be coming back again soon to catch a marlin!

reviews.author: N5525GRmelissam
reviews.text: My wife and i took the family to Hawaii for vacation and I booked a 8 hour private trip with Tony for 6 of us. Man what a great decision! From the time i first spoke with Tony on the phone till the trip was over, Tony felt like a long time friend.  I was impressed with the size of the boat, we all had plenty of room to roam around and be comfortable and everything was nice and clean. Tony and his first mate Steve were incredible the whole time, informing us of fishing and the history of the area

reviews.author: amandamP2574TM
reviews.text: Absolutely great fishing trip even though us girls got a little seasick it was still a great time. A major highlight of our trip worth every penny.

reviews.author: 885vincem
reviews.text: I was so excited and looking forward to the fishing trip.  I chose Boom Boom after  researching and seeing the reviews.  I was severely disappointed with our trip.  Hooked into a fish early and lost it (that is OK).  Only other fish was a nice Mahi that another fisherman caught.  What really disturbed me was that during the 6 hr trip, the captain (it wasn't Tony) did not even pull up the bait to check on it.  When we were about to leave, all of the baits were chewed on which is why we did not ha

reviews.author: K8318XVtimm
reviews.text: This was a great experience. Tony and Jay were really friendly and very professional. Fishing is kinda like gambling so there is no guarantee for a catch. I was lucky enough to get the big prize and the only catch of the day with a 47 1/2 Mahi Mahi. Tony and Jay did a fantastic job at helping get it on the boat and ready to take home. Nice work Jay did on the filet job and it was fun watching these guys at their skill. The views were great and the nights dinner was delicious. Advice: Take motion

reviews.author: 938kristopherc
reviews.text:
Coming from Minnesota, the land of 10,000 lakes, as a family we do a fair amount of fishing. So, when we were able to put together a family vacation to Hawaii, celebrating a big year for many milestones for our family, a fishing expedition was a must. The price
Was very reasonable, especially for other  competitors. We took a six hour trip and reeled in 10 Mahi Mahis. They were very polite, nice, and knowledgeable. Would book again. Was a highlight of our vacation.

reviews.author: Delightfully_Davis
reviews.text: Sundance and TJ were great crew members, the boat was clean and well maintained. Good communication with the company. We wanted to do a full day charter but only 4-hour was available (our trip to Maui was cancelled due to wildfires so we booked last minute). We did the 4-hour afternoon charter and were disappointed that we didn’t catch a single fish… of course that’s always a risk you take on these types of tours. It was not the crew’s fault, they certainly tried their best. Just beware that you

reviews.author: jbw6502
reviews.text: Booked a fishing charter in advance for June 21 2023. Paid deposit and got a confirmation email for June 21 2023. The dock was an hour drive from our hotel in Honolulu. Arrived at dock A as instructed and the gate was locked. After waiting approximately 20 minutes we called the the number in email and the "captain " said they were already out with another group. He stated that he accidentally wrote us down for June 28th. We had all looked forward to fishing that day as this was the only day avai

reviews.author: ghertz
reviews.text:
Same thing happened to us that happened to Steven V in his review...except we did it for 8 long hours and nobody ever changed lures or pole position.  

So, simply telling our experience as it happened and letting others know…that it is possible to go on a 8 hour fishing charter in Hawaii and not catch one fish.

reviews.author: InSA2010
reviews.text:
I read the reviews and saw the pics for Boom Boom Sports Fishing and I was impressed and excited to book a private charter for my group. Owner of the charter -  Tony was really good about communicating where and when to meet. 

The day of the charter, the crew was on time and very welcoming. The vessel itself was also impressive as it seemed to have all the right equipment and deep sea fishing gear. I’m not a professional by any means but all seemed to look good. The crew even talked us into buy

reviews.author: ltdmkelly
reviews.text:
We had 2 marlin in the boat in the first hour of the trip. The waters were a bit rough but we continued on catching 1 mahi mahi followed by a yellowfin tuna. The captain and mate were awesome at guiding us with getting the fish in the boat.

My only dissapointment us catching over 200 lbs of fish and only allowed to keep 2-3 lbs. per person. They cut up the mahi mahi and shared it between us but refused to cut up either marlin. I understood that would be the case when booking the trip but that n

reviews.author: Janzei
reviews.text:
I hate to say it, but the overall trip was such a buzz kill. We had a 6hr trip booked for 2 of us and we brought absolutely no fish into the boat. I understand that sometimes with fishing you luck out, but with the amount of money it costs to even step foot on the boat you would expect a little more. 
The crew themselves were decently nice and friendly, but when the boat captain is dozing off while driving during your trip you start to question if it was really worth it. Not only did they basica

reviews.author: K7145VAkevink
reviews.text: The boat is disgusting. It looks nothing like the pictures. The inside looks like it hasn’t been cleaned in years. 6 inches of thick dust in the vents, dirty nasty microwave, leaking roof, gear strewn all over the beds and countertops. Wet cardboard soaking up water. Sink that doesn’t work, doors that don’t shut. No pride in this boat whatsoever. Hopefully if you charter this the captain will spring for live bait. You may want to ask in advance. We got stuck dragging lures for 6 hours without ev

reviews.author: Jennifer R
reviews.text: Our crew was awesome and super eager to get us a fish! Beautiful morning topped off with catching a huge Marlin! We saw Pilot whales and a sea turtle!

reviews.author: M6528OXloril
reviews.text: Hands down the best fishing trip ever! Captain Tony is a great captain he got us on our first marlin on my 50th birthday.  He's so personable, knowledgeable and he  is an outstanding person/captain.  J.T. His first mate goes above and beyond to ensure you know what you are doing.  If you are in Oahu and want to fish call Captain Tony!  Boom boom Fish on!!

reviews.author: Gina94086
reviews.text: This was our second trip with Boom Boom and it was another success. Caught a few tuna and had a great time with the crew. The crew is smart and hard working.

reviews.author: TraceD5
reviews.text: We have been twice with Boom Boom and have had a blast both times. Tony was very helpful in setting up the trips and getting us emails with the confirmation. The captain and 1st mate were very nice and helpful showing us amateurs how to get the lines in and land the Marlin. Will use them again when we come back to Oahu. Thanks again!

reviews.author: Tucker Rowlinson
reviews.text: I went on a 6 hour shared charter and it was a great time! We jigged for the first hour or two and then trolled for the remaining time. We caught 2 hefty mahi mahi and a nice skipjack. On charters like this you end up working with the mate more than the captain - Tony was nice to chat with and direct when a line needed to be cleared, and the deckhand Patrick was super friendly and attentive. All in all a great time spent out on the water with a pleasant group :)

reviews.author: Jody Ferchaud
reviews.text:
Don't book this company! Unreliable! Unprofessional! No show! No call! No text! No email! They take your money and leave you hi and dry. They did a great job of ruining my guests anticipation of a great island fishing trip!

Other reviewers say there are no seats on board and that you have to sit on the edge of the boat the entire time.

The boat is dirty and there isn't a bathroom door.

They are prone to no shows.

The captain can be distracted and on the phone the entire time. Make sure you c

reviews.author: Vic White
reviews.text: Didn’t have a good time fishing. Captain said fishing is good in the afternoon and I went along with it. Spent $1200 and not one bit. Money hungry and not someone I would trust again. I thought about not doing a rating but I feel like people should know.

reviews.author: keith marett
reviews.text: We had such a great experience with Boom Boom. Captain Joe and deckhand Liam were awesome. Super knowledgeable and know how to catch fish. We were lucky enough to land a 150lbs Blue Marlin when, after talking to other people that went on different boats that day, caught nothing. I will definitely be back!

reviews.author: The American Patriot
reviews.text:
Pros: Nice people. They tried to find fish for our group.
Cons: Boat is dirty, messy, & cluttered. Smell of exhaust in the cab made it unusable.

reviews.author: Kobe Stacey
reviews.text: As soon as we stepped on the boat I could tell the crewman had no idea what she was doing and knew nothing about fishing. The captain Tony was on the phone 90% of the time not wanting to even talk. Tried to get some knowledge and could barely hold a sentence. Felt like an absolute burden to them. Trolled with lures way to close to the boat and slow all the way out to the spot but they reeled the poles in and we went the same speed as we were trolling for another 30 minutes before we got to the t

reviews.author: Brice Stacey
reviews.text: Wow experience ever.  They don’t talk to you, of course never caught a single fish.  Paid for 4 hours $1000 bucks and took us fishing 1/2 hour literally fell asleep.  Save your money pick someone else.  Terrible for kid.

reviews.author: Kevin Jones
reviews.text: We did the 8 Hour morning charter on Christmas Eve...Mahalo to IkaIka and the rest of the crew.

reviews.author: Louis Garciano
reviews.text: No fish good crew

reviews.author: EdgeMasterMork
reviews.text: Had a great time with the guys and caught some good yellowfin. The boys on the boat are great. Definitely worth going if you’re thinking about it!

reviews.author: Kaden D
reviews.text: Phenomenal 4-hr trip with Captain Tony & legendary first mate, Joe. Both were extremely welcoming, and not only knew how to put us on the fish, but were also able to create an enjoyable & relaxing atmosphere on the blue. If you’re looking for an authentic island fishing experience, look no further, Boom-Boom’s got you.

reviews.author: Bryson
reviews.text: I asked for corporate because they roasted my son and they put a 6 year old on the line and when I asked the owner it was an 18 year old would not recommend and they asked me to show my face when my son… don’t recommend

reviews.author: Ryan Aikman
reviews.text: What a great trip! Capt Kaika and Mikey were amazing, super helpful and friendly and put us right on top of the fish! 10/10 will book through Boom Boom again!

reviews.author: Inter Fleet
reviews.text: Amazing experience from Tony and Joe. Got a 140lbs marlin. We took turns to get the fish up and it was a lot of work. The trip was from 5am to 2pm. Also caught a tiny 8lbs Ahi tuna that Joe fillets and allowed us to take home. Overall amazing experience highly recommend. If you are sea sick bring medicine. It’s on the pricy end but the overall experience is worth it.

reviews.author: Emmalee Kent
reviews.text: Just went fishing today for my birthday - and had such an incredible time! Thank you so much to our captain and Mikey for helping make the day so special! We caught lots of tuna and some mahi mahi - it was a day I’ll never forget! We will 1000% be coming back again soon to catch a marlin!

reviews.author: Marcus Johnson
reviews.text:
I missed the original email that Tony sent me and luckily he called me to schedule personally. I felt immediately comfortable  around Tony and crew there.
Easy directions and all ready to go when I arrived. I have never had a bad experience with a true professional guide and I wasn’t disappointed.
Everything I needed/wanted to know was explained to me. Great vibes and we got to create the experience we wanted to have.
Not to mention I got to reel in a monster yellow fin.
Thanks for the great exp

reviews.author: Chaka Jones
reviews.text: The cornerstone of any good business is communication. This is something that this company is missing. They had me chose between 5 dates and then never communicated the date and time I was supposed to be getting on the boat. I got no call and no email, I just got hit with a random text and charge to my bank account. I feel if you can text what was wrong with a call prior. If it had not been for the text message the morning of, I would have never got in contact with them. I’m sure the trips they

reviews.author: Quinten Larkin
reviews.text:
Captain Tony & Chris took great care of us.
Caught 6 Marlin. What a great trip. Can’t wait to fish with Boom Boom again.

reviews.author: Paul McCarthy
reviews.text: The trip was a highlight of a lifetime, Tony doesn't have experience he has wisdom. The way the crew worked together was a well oiled machine. They helped, explained, and encouraged our group. The fish was a bonus. I cannot thank the group enough! If we are ever lucky enough to return Boom Boom will be our fist stop. Thank you for creating a memory that will last a lifetime for our family!!!!

reviews.author: 42-TravelCheetah
reviews.text:
Well. The crew was a SOLID 5 STARS.  Organized. On time. Helpful. Friendly. Alot of people on the boat, but I felt we were all well Managed. The cleaning of the catch, and dividing up the trolling catch was a plus. 
The 3 star rating comes from the office team. I booked this through the hotel, two days before the charter, I get a call from the company office directly. They said they couldn’t get a hold of the concierge, but they had an issue with our reservation that was scheduled to leave Monda

reviews.author: Beartowgotee
reviews.text: Save your money. It’s not the boat or crew or captain, they were top notch. It’s the quality of fishing on Maui, those are days long gone. I was the only one to catch a fish. A whopping 5 inches!! Fish California waters. Cheaper and better action. Take a snorkel cruise, cheaper and less frustrating

reviews.author: U8288TJangeld
reviews.text:
This is our 2nd time going on Strike Zone (1st time in 2015). The first trip was phenomenal- we caught so many fish & the crew caught 2 Ono. We gave away some of our fish because we couldn’t eat them all. The crew shared some of the Ono with everyone - we tipped really well because we had the BEST time & they gave us a little extra 😉
This time was a great experience as well - crew was super nice (Slip 40 - Jake & Adam were super helpful!) We left the harbor & trawled for big fish before stoppin

reviews.author: KipK20
reviews.text:
Captain Dana, Jordan and Carl were knowledgeable and kind with a group of “pond” fishers.

It was not a bountiful day for any of the crews out that day, yet we had two catches worth keeping. And bless them, they made us feel like we “helped”. We were there for the experience, 3 women from Nebraska used to fishing at lakes and ponds.

We caught and released some pretty fish, and got to join in on when their trolling yielded a grey snapper and Ono, it was so cool to see they had a flag to communic

reviews.author: SpacklerC
reviews.text:
The vessel was clean and the crew was good.  This was a 4 hr trip.  I would estimate we spent maybe 30mns fishing, the rest of the time spent traveling to and from the fishing area and then chasing the fish.

Not sure worth the cost of the trip.  There was 20 on the boat, 3 small fish caught.

reviews.author: paulsD8220BA
reviews.text:
I went on the 6 hour fishing trip, The crew are great, very knowledgeable about where to fish and very helpful while fishing.
We did 4 hours trolling 2 hours bottom fishing. I caught 6 snappers bottom fishing the boat caught a Tuna and a Uku, everyone shares the big catch. The crew cleaned and fillet the fish so I brought home more than enough to eat.
 well worth the cost, i will definitely do this again when back in Maui.

Mahalo Adam, Jack and Jordon.

reviews.author: W7741IGbriant
reviews.text: We had a great time with Captain Jordan and deck hand Adam (Beenie). We didn't have any luck with any big catch, but came home with 17 fish in our group of four and the other groups caught at least 10 if not more. Thank you Jordan and Beenie

reviews.author: bobsN8085G
reviews.text: Great experience overall. Didn’t catch anything on the deep sea fishing part, but almost everyone caught something bottom fishing. Nothing huge except for a nice size Crevali ?

reviews.author: williamlO2155LH
reviews.text: Had a great day on the water with Strike Zone! Jordan is a very engaging “Driver of the boat”, his description, very knowledgeable about the area and worked hard to get us the best fishing experience. We also got to see many whales! The crew was also amazing and took great care of us and made certain we enjoyed the day!! The fish were delicious as well!!

reviews.author: gabe S
reviews.text: My friend and I were scheduled to go out with Strike Zone on a shared combo fishing charter.  We both got to the harbor at 6am excited to go fishing except no crew was at the boat.  We received no text/call the day before letting us know that the trip was cancelled due to high winds. We waited until 7am and called the company.  They claimed that they tried to call to inform us, but no calls were received on my phone.   To me that's unprofessional and I will not be using this company for future f

reviews.author: Benjamin B
reviews.text: Had a great time bottom fishing on our tour. Every one on the trip caught at least one fish bottom fishing the crew stayed busy getting all the fish off the lines and on the way back they cleaned all the fish and cut them into filets for us. Thanks for the great experience Derek, Jack and Jordan.

reviews.author: kellylR9573KC
reviews.text: Had a fantastic day with Derek, Jack and Jeff! We caught three different species of fish. We shared the catch amongst the boat ( this was clearly explained) this way everything is fair and everyone gets to try a bit of everything! These fellows run their butts off to ensure everyone has a wonderful time! Worth every penny!

reviews.author: B85SNheatherf
reviews.text: They advertise you get to keep your catch. They wouldn't let us take all of our catch and they said we took 1 bag of our fish more than we should have, They followed us to our car screaming at us and physically prevented us from leaving by standing behind our car. We had young children with us that were terrified. They continued this and they demanded we give them all of the fish back so we get none. Just to shut him up and so we could leave before he got violent we gave it back. Keep in mind we

reviews.author: S8461DMricharde
reviews.text: Find someone else! Overall it just wasn’t worth almost $400 for two people who were expecting to learn some fishing techniques and have a more exciting experience. What we ended up getting was 3.5 hrs out of the 5.5 hours you’re just trolling (basically cruising at slow speed with lines dragging behind the boat) and then they pick 1 out of the 15+ people to fight the fish, if one hooks on. I understand this is not a private charter, but NOWHERE in their description does it say you spend over hal

reviews.author: P1332MCmarcoc
reviews.text: Having been out on a few boats, this seemed like great place to try—but not much was caught. Of the 16 on board, about 6-8 fish were hauled in averaging 7 inches in size. The troll out and back was a bust. The crew did have some poles of their own without a bottom weighted pole rig—which they yielded three larger fish. Keep in mind, any big fish caught by the crew gets a lottery draw who gets to reel in—this makes your chances pretty slim to catch a big one of any size. The crew was decent and r

reviews.author: Bob D
reviews.text: The crew was polite, helpful, and friendly. I would definitely recommend an outing. The catches while bottom feeding were minimal. Plenty of bites, but only about 5 smaller fish caught from about 11 anglers. We were very lucky to feel in an Ono that was about 40 inches and while I reeled in a 6 ft. sandbar shark! The crew was calm and helpful among all the excitement. Have a great time!

reviews.author: Y9480WLrhondab
reviews.text: We had the best time. Right from the start the staff was super friendly and knowledgeable and took great care of us. From coaching my mother in law how to reel in a 4 ft mahi mahi, showing us a whale that was breaching and helping with our fishing poles when going bottom fishing, it was the best experience!! Highly highly recommend. We did the 6 hour fishing and we’ll worth the money!

reviews.author: 123allysaf
reviews.text: This was extremely fun. Great crew, on the spot, awesome experience. Everything went off on cue, the crew was courteous and helpful every step of the way. We had the most amazing time. Thank you Capt Jay, Carl and Dana!!!

reviews.author: Maxyne R
reviews.text: We booked with Sue just a couple of days before our excursion.  We did the four hour sport and bottom fishing tour.  There were two captains one of them was John I don't remember the others name.  Both of them were great they were all around the boat coaching and chatting with everyone.  Most people were able to catch at least one fish and the crew operated bonus rods. If one of the bonus rods got a fish a random number was called to come reel it in. Numbers were assigned at the beginning.  I wo

reviews.author: JandK1422
reviews.text: We just returned from a 6-hour trip with Junior, Derrick, and Jack. First, we had a great experience and would do it again tomorrow. All three worked extremely hard to make our experience enjoyable, put us on the fish, provided great humor, and filleted our fish OR scaled and cleaned the smaller ones. Contrary to other reviews we left the dock promptly and returned shortly after our 6 hours. The boat was clean, the gear was decent, and they provided snacks and refreshments.  We caught 5 sport fi

reviews.author: Mark Klaus
reviews.text:
Took my two boys (ages 7 and 9) on the 6-hour combo fishing trip. The crew was great — really patient with the kids and knew their stuff. My 7-year-old reeled in a Mahi Mahi and was thrilled. We also caught triggerfish and yellowspotted trevally. The crew prepped everything and we cooked it that night back at our resort. That part was awesome.

The issue: we were booked on the Rascal but got switched to a much larger boat with no heads up. The boat was supposed to max at 6 passengers but had 8.

reviews.author: Joaquin Arroyo
reviews.text:
Came for a fishing trip and got a whale watching trip 😂 I had a good time still, crew were responsive and actively tried to get us to spots where the fish were grouping.
We were provided snacks and drinks as well as safety and handling instructions for if big fish got hooked.
3 catches for the trip, 2 being real keepers and not many bites for all otherwise.
Would definitely give it a go if you come in the summer - fall months.

reviews.author: Paul Grossman
reviews.text: we took a fishing trip today. Staff was helpful, courteous and engaging. Coming from someone with an extreme operational background watching Jack was amazing. Interacting with guests, yet managing and operating the entire process at the same time. What a fantastic experience.

reviews.author: Sarah Ziegler
reviews.text: We did the four hour fishing trip with our three kids and had a great time! The crew was professional, fun and friendly! Almost everyone on the boat caught something and we were lucky enough to see whales! Would recommend!

reviews.author: Christopher Daniels
reviews.text:
Crew guys Karl and Jordan were great. They were helpful, professional and enjoyed talking with them.

What is not advertised is that you’ll be fishing with 16 other people on the boat. You’re basically shoulder to shoulder and if any of the trolling rods hook up it goes to a lottery system with a number being drawn.

This was the first paid charter fishing trip I’ve ever been on that I didn’t catch anything. There was maybe 10 fish total caught bottom fishing out of the 17 of us.

Felt like just

reviews.author: Lori Munnerlyn
reviews.text: We had the best fishing trip ever! The captain and crew are fantastic! Ten out of ten recommend Stike Zone! Not only is the crew very experienced and helpful, they share a tremendous amount od local legend and history.

reviews.author: Elisabeth Fuller
reviews.text: Really great crew! Had a great time, first time bottom fishing so fun! Would definitely recommend strike zone!!

reviews.author: Danny Duran
reviews.text: Spend a bit more and avoid this one..

reviews.author: michele frederick
reviews.text: Super disappointing, starting at 0700 for bottom fishing they trolled for an hour we were offered granola bars or chips and soda (cheap) we then turned around in a circle fishing in the exact spot for 90 minutes or so.  Never leaving our poles in for more than 20 minutes at a time.  Next was trolling for an hour back into the harbor.  I love fishing but will not pay for this kind of trip again

reviews.author: Will Natter
reviews.text: The crew was cool and the experience was generally enjoyable, although we spent 2 of the 4 hours trolling to a spot to drop fish and caught nothing during the trolling period. What was incredibly disappointing was a representative of the company told us a restaurant at the harbor would cook the fish that we caught. This was important consideration in deciding to do the experience, as we had evening flights and could not return to our Airbnb to cook the fish. Upon getting off the boat and receivi

reviews.author: Maria Moisa
reviews.text:
ON 7/29/25 I BOOKED A TRIP OUT ON THE BOTTOM FISHING THAT I WAS TOLD LEFT AT EXACTLY 7:05am THE LATEST..

MY GRANDSON AND I GOT THERE BY 6:15am WAS TOLD TO BE THERE NO LATER THEN 6:30am AND IF LATE THE BOAT WOULD LEAVE WITHOUT US AT 7:05am.

WELL AT 7:26am FOUR PEOPLE THAT WERE LATE THAT SHOULD UP WITH STARBUCKS COFFEE AND BREAKFAST IS WHEN WE LEFT..

SO THE PEOPLE ON TIME SAT WAITING FOR THESE LATE ANGLERS  FOR THE BOAT TO MOVE..

SO I THOUGHT OK WELL WE WILL STAY OUT ABOUT 30 MINUTES LATER SO

reviews.author: Amanda Dosh
reviews.text: Husband and two teenagers (M14 and F17) went out with the strikezone team. They had a great time and raved about how awesome the captain and crew was. Will definitely do this again next time in Maui.

reviews.author: Kent Hinchcliff
reviews.text: It was a good experience, but not what I expected. I expected more than what we had. Still, caught some fish though! The current was just too strong I guess.

reviews.author: Wyatt Ferguson
reviews.text: Went with them for bottom fishing and trolling for big game. Both experiences were awesome each of the crew members are super cool we caught 2 ono the first trip on the way back to the harbor and 2 Mahi on the way out the harbor the second trip. Definitely book with them if you love to fish.

reviews.author: John Le
reviews.text:
My grandpa first time to Maui and all he wanted to do was catch a big fish!  These guys made it happen.  While we know it’s not guaranteed, it was a bonus for sure when his number got called.  The whole crew was awesome, kind, and fun to be with.  They were knowledgeable and helpful throughout our 4 hour combo trip.

Thank you guys for a memorable time for my grandpa!

reviews.author: Jeremy (OigMan)
reviews.text: Wife and i did the 4 hour combo trolling and deep sea fishing and had a blast. We trolled for an hour out to a good fishing spot where we moved around a few times and caught a bunch of little pan fish, mostly blue stripe snapper. Between the two of us we caught 7 fish, 4 of which were worth keeping. Most people caught at least one i believe but remember it's called fishing not called catching. Trolled an hour back to the docks but unfortunately didn't have any luck there. Crew was awesome even g

reviews.author: Dan Frazier
reviews.text: Had a great time, crew was very friendly and knowledgeable. The combo charter was very enjoyable and had a good variety of different fish that were caught

reviews.author: Jae Cano
reviews.text: The crew was beyond knowledgable! We caught some snapper fish and others on the tour caught surgeonfish. Our tour was in early February and was basically a whale watch as well! We saw SO MANY whales. We appreciated that the crew cleans the fish for you to take! I wish tipping was set up with something like Venmo as many travelers keep limited cash on hand.

reviews.author: Nathan Roesler
reviews.text: Fantastic day on the water with 5 Mahi Mahi boated.  Painless to schedule as Adam was very helpful.  Captain Joel and Jake are great guys and absolute pros on the water.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Chris Boaz
reviews.text: Wow! The best sport fishing charter I’ve ever had! The reservation process was super easy and informative. Captain Fuzzy put us on the fish and deck hand Ekolu effortlessly put the fish on the boat. Its nice to see these men genuinely enjoying what they do! Mahalo!

reviews.author: Adam Creditt
reviews.text:
Booked my trip with Adam last minute. Hes  knowledgeable and got us in with 2 days notice on an 8hr trip.

Captain Joel had us ontop of fish ALL DAY long. Jake was great on the deck and was sure every fish made it aboard.  In our 8 hours we pulled in 8 Mahi as a group and at the end of the day I was able to get a Blue Marlin headed back. Very professional and experienced group!!

I cannot recommend this company enough, thanks again to the team. We will be back, and they will be our first call!!

reviews.author: Bill
reviews.text: These guys are the best, great communication leading up to date and we crushed it with 8 mahi-mahi the day of.

reviews.author: Jeffrey 3
reviews.text: I been deep sea fishing around the world and sometimes it’s disappointing. This day Captain Fuzzy Did not disappoint! We departed promptly before first light. Mate was well organized. We started by catching live bait halfway to the fishing grounds with whales breaching all around us as first approached. Once we had enough live bait we went to captains preferred location and like clockwork we were trolling with catching everything from bull dolphin to mahi mahi to baby big eyes. When it time to r

reviews.author: Bruce Fensterbush
reviews.text:
Captain Joel and his First Mate Jake took 6 of us out on a beautiful morning. We trolled on the way out but had no luck. Then we switched to live bait (mackerel) we caught earlier and the game was on! We ended up with 11 Mahi Mahi on ice on the way back. As it turns out, our boat had the best day of any leaving the Ma'alaea Harbor that day! All of us shared in the catch as well taking as much home as we wanted (all fileted by the Captain himself).

If you want a great fishing experience with fol

reviews.author: Matt Miranowski
reviews.text: Calm dark morning headed out with positivity and expectation, Joel and Jake did not disappoint great captains, and we be eat fish tonight.

reviews.author: Dan Heck
reviews.text: Awesome time with the guys today!  We brought home two giant Mahi Mahi and a Marlin.  Fuzzie and Emily were an awesome crew!  Definitely knew the fishing there!  Thanks guys!

reviews.author: matthew dionne
reviews.text: Great trip! Very well organized with lots of communication. You will leave earlier than all others but will definitely be rewarded with this crew. We worked hard and brought in 4 large Mahi Mahi and saw other crews get none! Great way to start a week in Hawaii with fresh fish for the week. Would definitely do it again.

reviews.author: Kristi Lancaster
reviews.text: We had an amazing time! 6 mahi and a marlin! Captain Keola was great at navigating the waves and finding the fish. Jake was strong and a great teacher on how to pull the fish in. We’d fish with these two again!

reviews.author: Nick C
reviews.text: Excellent customer service and phenomenal fishing

reviews.author: Duane Beauchamp
reviews.text: Limited out the crew was awesome and they shared some good fish with us

reviews.author: Joe Fishler
reviews.text: We had a great time fishing. The captains were very knowledgeable and friendly. We caught seven mahi-mahi.

reviews.author: Tyler Brubach
reviews.text: I recently had the misfortune of participating in a subpar sunrise boat ride. The vessel was excessively noisy and unstable, while the captain exhibited unfriendly behavior. However, the first mate demonstrated kindness, albeit seemingly driven by financial obligations. In contrast, Adam, the salesman from Finest Kind Sportfishing charter, delivered an exceptional performance. He encouraged us to view their recent catches online, although I harbor doubts regarding the authenticity of the footage

reviews.author: Alexia Natan
reviews.text:
Their second review page FYI they have two:
Wow! What a waste of time
Mr. Adam is a fantastic sales person! This review has nothing to do with catching zero fish, there is 8 hours on a rocky boat where no personality or holding a fishing rod for more than 15 minutes is included in your $1,000 fee. Please save your money and spend it on a nice snorkeling trip or throw it in the toilet and save yourself 8 hours of boredom. I’m all about a great business and this trip had me thinking you can pack 3

reviews.author: Stvooh
reviews.text: Best boat I’ve been on by far. Keola and Ekolu as a crew are second to none and when I say they did everything possible to get us on the fish I mean it. The boat is beautiful, too, clean and modern with excellent top rated gear. If you are choosing who to go with, do yourself a favor and make it these guys…you will not be disappointed.

reviews.author: Chad May
reviews.text: Amazing trip. View of the sunrise set the tone. Crew was awesome. From the time we left they put my 10 year old on bait fish right away, caught a couple tuna on the way to the Mahi mahi hole where we ran slap out of baitfish. Then they hooked us into a marlin which was the fish of a lifetime for our 17 yr. Old. What a great trip. Thanks guys.  It was a day of memories that won’t be forgotten.

reviews.author: Rob McPheron
reviews.text: Dave and crew are next level. I choose them for our dream of billfish hunting while in Maui. Not only did they come through they were committed to making the experience unforgettable for my two boys. My 13yr old put a 175lb marlin in the boat, as a dad this trip couldn't have been any better.

reviews.author: Tim Higdon
reviews.text: Great owner, spoke with him day before dive in person.  Very knowledgeable and respectful.  Did not get a chance to go out with owner, but felt good about the captain and crew assigned to us.  Greg people, recommend very highly

reviews.author: Brad Sanford
reviews.text: Pretty rough experience.  We showed up 15 minutes early, just in time to be yelled at and belittled by the guy in charge of booking, he was likely the most unprofessional man I have ever encountered.  The Captain and First Mate were nice guys but pretty much trolled us on a 10 hour circle.  They didn't hunt or try different things, but seemed content to just cruise, not really caring if we caught fish or not.  Finest Kind was the biggest bust of an otherwise amazing vacation.

reviews.author: Granitejohn
reviews.text: We had a wonderful day fishing with Humbdinger on December 16. Everything went very well. The captain and mate worked very hard and were very nice. My wife, son and I landed two blue marlins and a nice-sized mahi mahi. Overall, it was a great day and I highly recommend this boat.

reviews.author: TinaHk23
reviews.text: An outstanding deep-sea fishing charter! The crew was incredibly attentive, respectful, and genuinely focused on our success. We reeled in an impressive number of fish, thanks to their expertise. Highly recommend for a rewarding and enjoyable trip.

reviews.author: peyang2025
reviews.text: Capt Brett has decades of local fishing knowledge and will do his best to get you on the fish, top notch gear & great crew, can’t really ask for more. Will be back whenever I’m in the area

reviews.author: Marlin1308
reviews.text: Captain Brett and mate Noah did a great job for us. My grandson, Alex, caught his first Ono (wahoo) and yellowfin tuna. We have enough fish for our entire trip now. I have been on a lot of charter boats and these guys know what they are doing. The boat is a twin engine fishing boat. Very comfortable. It doesn’t have A/C but you are in Hawaii. I would say their prices are reasonable. Don’t go cheap! I always do 8 hours. You come to Hawaii for the possibility of catching that prize fish. Another t

reviews.author: DORMANCH
reviews.text: Brett and Noah hustled for over our booked time and we have fed our party of 17 fish for 7 days.  They worked together seamlessly and kept us all engaged.  3 adults + 3 16yo boys had a day they will never forget.

reviews.author: jillbB6388BS
reviews.text:
What a great adventure! My son and I went on the 6 hour fishing trip. He wanted to catch dinner and I wanted to catch a blue marlin. We both got what we wanted! 

The boat was well kept and clean. One complaint I have heard was that it doesn’t have air conditioning. This is true, but they have multiple fans inside to keep you cool and comfortable.

This was an amazing experience and I plan to come again in October and bring my mother.

reviews.author: RJbnmt2015
reviews.text: My mom and I have always wanted to do a deep sea charter and picked humdinger due to the reviews and we’re not disappointed! Captain Brett and his crew Noah did great showing us the ropes and we landed a tune and a marlin on a six hour charter.  We are already planning for next time!

reviews.author: EatsPasta9610
reviews.text: My husband wanted to do a fishing excursion but not with strangers. This was a perfect option, one price booked the whole boat. Brett and Noah were friendly and knowledgeable and the boat was just the right size and in great condition. Unfortunately we didn't catch anything, but I'd absolutely recommend these guys!

reviews.author: jjlovelaw
reviews.text: Captain Brett and Noah were friendly and easy-going, and definitely knew what they were doing. They put us on the wahoo, even though the fishing report had not been real good. Very positive experience, and the boat is an amazing classic.

reviews.author: pbox1975
reviews.text: What a great start to the day!  Fabulous fishing on a beautiful morning. Great crew and wonderful family excursion. Will definitely be back.

reviews.author: everythingo2024
reviews.text: Amazing charter! I read hundreds of reviews before choosing Humdinger. Im glad I did my research, these guys are awesome. We caught some fish and had a great experience. They never stopped working to get us on fish. The boat is spotless clean and very well kept. They took care of our fish putting them directly on ice, then filleted everything and packaged it for us. From my research, this is one of the only boats that lets you keep your entire catch if you want. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: trvsnolen
reviews.text: Brett and Noah were a fantastic, knowledgeable crew. They were fun to chat with and got us on fish. If we come back we'll definitely book with them again.

reviews.author: scottrQ5846FN
reviews.text: Fantastic working with Captain Brett and Davey. Super quality guys to hang with. Not to mention, worked like a dog to find and get on fish. I was able to bring in one blue marlin, so it was great to see one of these elusive creatures next to the boat. Great at educating and informing their clients, and answering any questions you might have. Sunrise over the volcanoes were amazing, as well.

reviews.author: docmomx
reviews.text: My son and I enjoyed our fishing excursion immensely. The captain and mate were incredibly friendly, skilled and helpful. This will be our preferred vessel for future Big Island fishing!

reviews.author: jackdJ6370IZ
reviews.text: The captain and the crew were fantastic. I’ve been deep-sea fishing off Virginia and off the Carolinas and I’ve never had a crew that was more experienced or expert. They made sure we were ready for anything at any time.  I got about a 10 pound tuna which was really good eating and my brother caught 175 pound billfish which we released after a horrendous fight.

reviews.author: Navigate37851781748
reviews.text: There were five of us who went out on Humdinger. This was everyone's first time and it couldn't have worked out any better. We caught 6 shortbill spearfish. The boat, gear, captain, and crew are all first rate. We were extremely lucky to have been able to book with Humdinger. Thanks so much Brett and Ryan!

reviews.author: raymondburns1969
reviews.text: They didn’t stop trying to catch fish until we were pulling into the harbor and there were only two lines still in the water when we got another fish could not have asked for more

reviews.author: Mark M
reviews.text: Had a mahi hooked up and boated in the first 15 minutes. But alas lost all the other bites! Still had a blast. Lost a spearfish, tuna and marlin. The marlin was on for quite a while and got almost to the leader when it started dancing and threw the hook. A nice day with a great captain and deckhand.

reviews.author: Damagak
reviews.text: My Family visited the island in February of 2024, and had a fantastic time on the Humdinger. I would recommend it to anyone who loves fishing or just being on the ocean!!!

reviews.author: tocompton
reviews.text:
My son and I had a great time with Brett and Ryan.
Had Several Drive byes with Marlin but no takers, Other then a Barracuda.
Seen Humpback whales, false whales, Tigershark, while we caught bait. 
They stayed out a extra hour trying to get us hook up, with the unfavorable weather. 
We will be Fishing with these guys next time
we are here. 
I recommend this private boat that let's you keep your fish,  even if it's a Barracuda.
The Comptons from Idaho.

reviews.author: Ashley Houston
reviews.text: Humdinger is an amazing and comfortable boat! Capt Brett and his crew Noah are very knowledgeable about fishing Kona waters! We hooked 2 Marlin and had a great day in December! Noah is like the Marlin Dundee, wrestling the big ones to the boat while you’re reeling! He’s such a hard worker and loves what he does! Couldn’t ask for a better crew on the Humdinger!

reviews.author: Brian Linford
reviews.text: I had a great trip last week. We didn't bring any Marlin in the boat in a 3/4 day trip but could tell Brett and Noah know what they are doing. I will definitely book again the next time I'm in Kona.

reviews.author: Ashley Sockpick
reviews.text:
We booked a 10-hour private fishing charter with Humdinger Fishing and had an unforgettable experience. Due to weather in Alaska, we needed to reschedule our fishing day, and the process was incredibly easy. The team was responsive, accommodating, and flexible, with no additional charges or pushback, which we truly appreciated.

When we finally went out, Captain Brett and deckhand Noah were absolutely amazing—friendly, engaging, informative, and genuinely invested in making our trip special. We

reviews.author: devin bodine
reviews.text: Captain, and crew, were friendly and always moving to try and catch fish! Boat was well maintained and comfortable, while the crew had a great attitude and kept the positive vibes all the way through the day. Will definitely fish with them again and would highly recommend to others. We had great conversation, and an amazing day of fishing!

reviews.author: Michael Kephart
reviews.text: Had an incredible time out with Captain Brett and Noah. They offered so much knowledge on fishing the area, ensured we were ready to get strapped into the fighting chair, and got us on two great fighting blue marlin. Fantastic views all day, great conversation during downtime and we got to learn a lot about marlin fishing. Highly recommend to book with humdinger for your charter. Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Phil Carrell Jr
reviews.text: This was definitely the fishing charter of lifetime.  Captain Bret and Noah were on the boat and were amazing.   We had the best time.  They are professional fishermen and did a wonderful job

reviews.author: Mark P. Fisher
reviews.text:
Magical.
We caught fish. Took naps. Ate and drank.
Viewed the scenic coastline.
Felt cared for by top-notch crew. Highly recommend. 5 stars.

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: What a great experience with Humdinger’s! The boat and the crew are first-rate, we will definitely fish with these folks every time we visit Kona - they’re the BEST

reviews.author: Chai Toren
reviews.text: So much fun!  They were great and made the trip well worth it!   Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Jessie Thomas
reviews.text: This is a very fishy boat. Fished on it twice over the years both times I caught huge Marlin

reviews.author: Everything Outdoors
reviews.text: Amazing charter! I read hundreds of reviews before choosing Humdinger. Im glad I did my research, these guys are awesome. We caught some fish and had a great experience. They never stopped working to get us on fish. The boat is spotless clean and very well kept. They took care of our fish putting them directly on ice, then filleted everything and packaged it for us. From my research, this is one of the only boats that lets you keep your entire catch if you want. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: Rachel R
reviews.text: Noah and Davey were awesome. Great trip on the water, and got to see a Blue Marlin. Highly recommend this experience with them!

reviews.author: Scott Rathje
reviews.text: Fantastic working with Captain Brett and Davey. Super quality guys to hang with. Not to mention, worked like a dog to find and get on fish. I was able to bring in one blue marlin, so it was great to see one of these elusive creatures next to the boat. Great at educating and informing their clients, and answering any questions you might have. Sunrise over the volcanoes were amazing, as well.

reviews.author: Rebecca English
reviews.text: Great time aboard the Humdinger Sportfishing Charter with Captain Brett and deckhand Noah!!  The atmosphere on the boat was professional, respectful and no time was wasted! The boat was extremely clean and well maintained.  My husband was able to reel in this Shortbill Spearfish thanks to Captain Brett and Noah!!

reviews.author: Carrie Kendig
reviews.text: 3rd time out with Brett and crew always a fun adventure. The Humdinger is our “go to” fishing charter always amazing!

reviews.author: Dj Fultz
reviews.text: Great crew, very fun people to fish with,   good time on the water, thanks for the experience !

reviews.author: Jack Harroun
reviews.text: Had a fantastic time with my family.  Brought my Wife with my 2 kids 8 and 11. The Captain and Mate were great with them and the kids loved it. The boat is comfortable and very well maintained. As an avid fisherman you could really tell that these guys knew what they were doing; especially when we got into the fish, rapid fire catching!!! I will definitely book with these guys again.

reviews.author: Akai Smith
reviews.text: My family visited from the mainland so I wanted the best experiences for them. Brett and JJ are amazing. Brett was a knowledgeable captain and JJ is fast, kind, and helped reel in an 800 lb female Marlin for a 79 yr old man that just made his top favorite moment of his life. The boat is an older boat as mentioned on the website but we were kicking all the brand new boats butts w our crew getting our huge catch. We got great video footage and photos. This was the highlight of the trip and we did

reviews.author: William Nattrass
reviews.text: 100% recommend! One of the best times my husband and I have ever had. Planning a trip soon back to Hawaii! Will be booking again. Thanks guys for the best time!

reviews.author: Shaun
reviews.text: Brett and JJ were so fun to go out fishing with.  We went and caught bait and then they put us on the fish!   These guys are professionals and provide a great day on the water,  my kids and I had an absolute blast.  Thanks a lot guys, tight lines!

reviews.author: desereen2026
reviews.text: Trip was awesome, exciting and informative. Sawyer was an amazingly hard worker the whole 6 hours we were out he didn’t stop working. While we were trolling Sawyer explained the reason for fishing the way they do, explained lures and exactly how the fish were attracted to the boat and lures. Captain Dee was very nice and also informative. All around great experience! Would definitely recommend, none of the 4 of us had ever fished the ocean before. What needed to happen when there was a fish on w

reviews.author: brucet62
reviews.text:
Captain Dee and First Mate Sawyer are top notch guys and great fishermen. My wife and I had such a great time. 
We saw Pilot Whales, Hundreds of Dolphins and flying fish. 
All of that was great, but the best part was the actual fishing. 
We first hooked up on 550 pound Blue Marlin. Fought him for a little and he broke the line. 
We kept on fishing and landed 2 more smaller 200 pound Blue Marlin. 
We definitely got our monies worth!
You gotta book with High Noon!!!

reviews.author: philcU6026GV
reviews.text: We chose High Noon because we wanted a private boat that was family friendly. We had our 9, 13, and 16 kids with us. Captain D and Sawyer were exceptional. Sawyer taught everyone how to use the fighting chair and we were ready to catch the big one. We didn’t have to wait long!  We hooked a spearfish and our 16 year old jumped in the fighting chair to bring it in. He had a great time reeling it in and Sawyer was a great coach. He took care of everything and even gave us recommendations on how to

reviews.author: C3717OSrobertf
reviews.text: We arrived early to find Captain Kevin and Jason already preparing Kuuipo for our days adventures! We spent some time catching the bait we required and began fishing just as the sun began to rise. These 2 fine Gentlemen showed us immediately how seriously they take fishing! Perfectly maneuvering Kuuipo to maximize our chances!! Shortly into the day we had a strike and the battle began with a beautiful 6 foot Striped Marlin. With Jason’s guidance and Capt Kevin’s expert boating skills we managed

reviews.author: kethorman
reviews.text: We went deep sea fishing on one of our visits to Kona and had a terrible experience with a crew that was arrogant and rude. They weren’t interested in giving advice or teaching and told us if we caught anything they were going to take the catch for themselves. Our experience with High Noon was completely different. Captain D and Sawyer were helpful, extremely knowledgeable and willing to show us the ropes. We took our 9, 8 and 5 year old with us and they were kind and respectful to us and our ki

reviews.author: Dustin D
reviews.text:
We had a great time with Captin Kevin and Jason. They are two real guys who are fun to be around. They wanted to put us on fish just as bad as we wanted to catch some. We got lucky and were able to catch some. The boat was awesome,  and we will definitely be fishing with them again. 

They ran a great boat and I can't say enough good about them. 
10/10 would recommend.

reviews.author: Y8659DFmichelle
reviews.text: This was the highlight of our trip to the Big Island for our 17 year old daughter. She got  to reel in and land a 130 pound blue marlin. Though it was the only fish caught, Captain Kevin and deckhand Jason were amazing at making the trip memorable. From letting us sit up with Kevin while heading out to Jason giving her the blue marlin "brag flag," they made it a trip of a lifetime. Jason spent time showing us how to rig up the sabiki rigs for baitfish as well, which we caught a few of prior to h

reviews.author: Zane C
reviews.text: I appreciate the captain rescheduling our trip with another boat, but we had zero communication from him on the situation.  This boat is in need of a lot of repairs.  I am not sure I would have fished on it after seeing its condition.  Apparently, there was an engine issue a couple of days before, but we were never contacted.

reviews.author: BuffaloMediaGroup
reviews.text: We booked High Noon Sportfishing Charters this past early March for a 3/4 day trip.  That trip quickly turned into a grandiose adventure with plenty of action!  We first landed a beautiful native spearfish and the icing on the cake ended up being a 446. lb. Pacific Blue Marlin, which was landed by my wife Chrissy.  This was her first time sitting in the reel seat on a deep sea trip but she was determined.  The guides were downright amazing in their coaching and instruction.  There are really no

reviews.author: msmith54836
reviews.text: My husband and I took our two children (8 and 6) out on High Noon for a private charter. It was the best fishing experience we could have asked for. Within an hour, my husband was strapped into the fighting chair ready to reel in a blue marlin. As Judah was setting him up, we got a second bite with another blue marlin. I was not planning on partaking at all but they set me up to reel it in. We were able to successfully reel in both marlin! Captain Tamara and Judah were so helpful and knowledgabl

reviews.author: lakeo2020
reviews.text: We had a great trip with High Noon Charters. We arrived at the dock early and Capt. Dee was ready and away we went. Captain Dee gave us some options for the day unlike other companies we went and caught some bait and we where off fishing. The options we choose paid off we did a 3/4 day we caught 2 short billed spearfish. Thank you High Noon Charters.. I will be back!!! Joe Vergnetti

reviews.author: josephmX6913KT
reviews.text: Wasn’t the best day for fishing, but they still made it pleasurable. We did catch a nice Mahi Mahi which was a great thrill. I’ll be back again and again because these guys can fish and are fun to be with.

reviews.author: julilm2021
reviews.text:
“Dinner and a show.”  That’s how Captain Dee Bradford’s deck hand Judah, a savvy fisherman in his own right, described the hope for a successful fishing trip in Kona waters. That is exactly what my husband and I experienced. High Noon guide service just gave us the fishing experience of a lifetime. 

We are curious people and enthusiastic about fishing, so we leveled up and booked this private half-day charter rather than go on a shared boat. On our way to Marlin water, Captain Dee and Judah tol

reviews.author: itsjustmeesh
reviews.text: The guys were great and the boat was wonderful. My biggest piece of advice for potential customers is this: make sure you are comfortable viewing the trip as a pricey boat ride that you may or may not catch fish on. So, if you don’t catch any, it’s not as tough. We had been looking forward to 4 hour private charter trip for a couple months, so it’s was pretty heartbreaking to not have a single bite or ever even hold the rods. Of course, they can’t guarantee fish. But, when signing up for a fishi

reviews.author: 4444Jake
reviews.text: We have used High Noon 3 times and have only landed one fish. I completely realize that you really cant control what the fish do but you can control the boat and your crews performance. The new crew does not appear as knowledgeable as the previous team. The boat inside the cabin was a mess. we were told that the bathroom did not work so you had to relieve yourselves over the sides of the boat, however when the crew needed to use the restroom it apparently was working fine. The captain had her do

reviews.author: 168shawnb
reviews.text:
Great way to spend time on the ocean! The crew was very helpful, knowledgable, and personable, not to mention skilled at finding fish!! The boat had all amenities and was great for single, or multiple people. 
Thanks Captain Tara and Jymie for great days on the water.  Highly recommend the High Noon

reviews.author: katiemdent
reviews.text:
We came on the High Noon with relatively high hopes given some of the positive reviews. I wish we would have paid better attention to some of the negative ones.

The trip started off on a strange note — definitely a sign for the rest of the experience in hindsight. We were running 10-15 minutes late due to some unexpected traffic and texted the company to let them know. It was a private charter, so we figured it wouldn’t be the end of the world since we were the only group on the boat. When we g

reviews.author: marcusrP570HK
reviews.text: Capt Tara and Jameson, thank you for an awesome trip.  30 mins in and were  hooked up.  Way to go!  Wanted to get my son a chance to reel one in, and we did!  2 wahoos in less than a hour.  Thats how it done!  Bang bang with highnoon!  CHEERS!

reviews.author: 0528tinal
reviews.text: My husband and I chartered a fishing trip while on our first trip to Hawaii.  Tara was our captain and Jamison was her first mate.  We couldn’t have had a better fishing experience!  The day was beautiful, but the crew was better!  Tara is a highly experiences captain and is very knowledgeable of what fish are biting, where they hit, and knows what she is doing.  If you are looking for a fine boat, great crew, and a fabulous day of fishing, give Tara a call!  Hubby hooked a tuna and I reeled in

reviews.author: C G
reviews.text: My son and I enjoyed the experience, as Captain Tara and first mate Jameson were welcoming, friendly and easy to strike up a conversation with.  We talked about the various strategies with the type of fish we were targeting, and they were more than willing to educate us on the depths we were fishing and the fishnets that we spotted from time to time.  We picked a nice 200lb blue marlin early in the day and received very good coaching from Jameson as we fought the fish and successfully brought it

reviews.author: Tes Rogers
reviews.text: Best experience ever! Captain Dean and Sawyer put us on them. We would love to go again, if only we had more time!

reviews.author: Josh Dykstra
reviews.text:
The bite was a little slow due to the full moon, but after some time of trolling we were able to switch to bottom fishing. Be ready, because when they hit the fun and work begins.
Would recommend this charter. Although we did not meet Capt. Shawn, Capt. Arthur was great and fun to be around for our trip. I would definitely recommend you check them out if you’re ever in Kona!

reviews.author: Nick Nickolov
reviews.text: Wanna catch a Marlin? Go with Captain Dee at High Noon! We had a blast and our 15 year old son reeled in a 200 lb Blue Marlin. Sawyer was  awesome teaching us all about deep sea fishing and the various species of fish in  Hawaii! Date: Feb 18, 2026.

reviews.author: To3kn33 Roybal
reviews.text: As a complete rookie to sport fishing it's easy to get overwhelmed with as many charter companies as there are Cap'n Dee is a knowledgeable skipper and the price for sport fishing you just can't touch world class waters and fish ......the deckhand sawyer is quite possibly a walking encyclopedia of knowledge and skill very cool crew and such a great time although we only caught some bait fish......which I did eat ......because don't waste what you catch.......we had a blast and it wasn't for lack

reviews.author: Tyler Kramer
reviews.text: Captain Dee and Sawyer are great. Both very knowledgeable and knew what they were doing the whole time. Very professional. Not only did we catch fish, but we saw three pods of sperm whales, false killer whales, pantropical spotted dolphins, and pilot whales. It was quite the adventure.

reviews.author: Von Ditti
reviews.text:
We had the time of our lives with Captain Dee and Sawyer. If you’re looking for a charter with world class fishing, look no further.

Captain Dee and Sawyer are incredibly knowledgeable and friendly. By the time you’re done fishing on High Noon, you’ll feel like you’re part of their family.

We can’t wait to come back to Kona and fish with these guys!

reviews.author: Tyson Mckane
reviews.text: Had an amazing time. They were very knowledgeable along and good about safety. Very professional. Went home with 2 ono pretty awesome day these guys were amazing.

reviews.author: Kevin Gayson
reviews.text: Pros!

reviews.author: Jonathan Corbett
reviews.text: Caught the fish of a lifetime! Sawyer was a great mate and capt Deen!

reviews.author: Philip Cordaro
reviews.text: We chose High Noon because we wanted a private boat that was family friendly. We had our 9, 13, and 16 kids with us. Captain D and Sawyer were exceptional. Sawyer taught everyone how to use the fighting chair and we were ready to catch the big one. We didn’t have to wait long!  We hooked a spearfish and our 16 year old jumped in the fighting chair to bring it in. He had a great time reeling it in and Sawyer was a great coach. He took care of everything and even gave us recommendations on how to

reviews.author: Cindi Kaup
reviews.text: The fishing experience on High Noon was out of this world! Captain Dee has been been Hawaiian fishing for 30 years, before GPS and all the electronics they have today. He knows his boat and the waters like the back of his hand. His young deckhand Sawyer has fished marlin all around the world. I’ve seen a lot of deckhands but I’ve never seen one so geared up and gung ho to catch a fish in my life! The gear and the lures are top notch. Sawyer is very techie and takes a lot of pictures. And it does

reviews.author: Bryant Liles
reviews.text:
Captain Dee and Sawyer were great.
Worked hard trying to put us on fish. Sawyer did a great job not only taking care of us, but keeping us involved and explaining all things fishing, as well as some neat Hawaii info!
Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Mike Marsh
reviews.text: This was one of the most exhilarating experiences I've ever had! Dallas (captain) and Sawyer (1st mate) made this trip unforgettable! I will definitely book with High Noon again! Thank you, gentleman, for a fantastic morning! Mahalo

reviews.author: Donald Grassman
reviews.text: Pulling in a 500 pound Blue Marlin was an awesome experience!!! The crew was very knowledgeable and worked the lines nonstop to get us the best experience possible.

reviews.author: Sharon Corbin
reviews.text: The nicest charter people EVER. They went above and beyond. Great conversations and education. They fished beyond our expectations.  Would Highly recommend.  Jet and Noel were so involved and assisted my big family on making this a great experience.

reviews.author: Royal Panda
reviews.text: We had never booked a fishing trip before, but we picked High Noon because we talked to Captain Dee on the phone. We were absolutely impressed with Captain Dee and Sawyer as we fished and had a great time. We caught a blue marlin that was about 100 lbs. Sawyer coached us through fighting the fish and bringing it to the boat. He even got a great video of the action! We 💯 percent recommend this company. Sawyer highly recommended a manta ray tour which was also a ball. Thank you for the great time

reviews.author: Chad Houchen
reviews.text: I had the time of my life fishing with captain Dee and his deck hand Sawyer! They put us on fish after fish! It was such a laid back experience! I honestly would recommend the high noon fishing experience to anyone.

reviews.author: paul pfeifler
reviews.text:
Absolute greatness,   On a slow day of fishing for the fleet. Capt Dee and first mate Sawyer. Did everything they could to get me on fish.   Switching from bottom fishing,  to live bait trolling to lure trolling, they attempted everything they could to find the fish.    Ended up catching live bait, 1 small to medium Marlin, 1 large Uku (green job fish)  and had another bigger marlin on the line for a split moment.

Capt Dee.  Was great with communication from the first call, answered all questio

reviews.author: Martha Bredeson
reviews.text: We had a great day out on the water with Captain Dee and Mike! If you want to go deep sea fishing, go with these fellas! Our party of 6, mostly teens, had a great time catching dinner and a Marlin!!!

reviews.author: David Marsh
