reviews.text: Captain Dee & Sawyer were first class . It was a pleasure to fish with them . I was able to catch 2 fish & the Blue Marlin was a dream come true . They both are very knowledgeable & did everything a customer could ask for to put me on fish . I hope to be able to fish again with them in 2025 . Thank you gentlemen for an amazing day .

reviews.author: charltonm2026
reviews.text: Ohana Fishing Charters was amazing! We caught several ahi tuna and a blue marlin. Took home some fresh fish to eat as well. Captain Wendell and his deckhand Kailana were great, knowledgeable, and worked hard to get fish on the lines and in the boat. the owner Brit was great to work with as well. Would highly recommend to anyone wanting a great time fishing out on the water. No notes. 10/10!

reviews.author: AdventureSpuds
reviews.text: Just got back from Kauai and a charter with Britt and Kaulana.  Trip was great!  Water was a little rough,  but Britt got us on the fish. Only 4 on board that day but we all landed. Would certainly recommend and go again. Mahalo Ohana Fishing Charters!!

reviews.author: 886crish
reviews.text:
We had a GREAT time on our fishing trip.  Captain Wendall and his first mate, Kalana were top notch in their fishing skills.   And Julius (the boat mascot) was the perfect addition to our trip.  
We also enjoyed the knowledge and conversations with the crew about the island and surrounding areas.  
Our trip was very successful—landing a smaller fish (though big for MN fisherman) we then landed a 60+ yellowfin tuna!!  
We also loved the whale activity we experienced.  Highly recommend and will be

reviews.author: A3871UQjamesg
reviews.text: We had a great day on the water. We booked a half day trip with Brit from a friend’s recommendation for 2 of us. About half way through the trip we had a double hookup on Blue Marlins. Capt. Wendell and deck mate Koulana were great hosts.

reviews.author: D2168TEcharlies
reviews.text: What a great time. I’ve been on numerous charters in the past, and Ohana fishing charters was as good as any I’ve been on. I’ve done enough fishing to know you should enjoy the fishing even when the fish are not found. But we were able to experience a rare moment with two marlin on line at once. Despite the natural commotion to get em in, the captain, Wendell, and his mate had us working together to make it happen. Highly recommend these very personable guys who had us experience a better than e

reviews.author: ryanmN8615NP
reviews.text: Britt the owner was great to work with setting up the trip and Wendle and Kalani got my boy and I on the fish including an 80lb Ahi (Yellow Fin Tuna).

reviews.author: L7204PTivana
reviews.text:
Awesome first experience deep see fishing with the nephews off the coast of Kauai off Nawiliwili harbor with Ohana fishing charter.
Thanks to Captain Wendell, Kaulana, and their assistant Miniature Dachshund Julius.  We had a blast catching mahi mahi, and the excitement was off the charts! Captain Wendell really knows his stuff and made sure we were all set up for success. Kaulana was super helpful too, always ready to lend a hand and keep the good vibes going. Highly recommend these guys. Can’t

reviews.author: 510timk
reviews.text: Had a great day on the water with Lance and his mate.  Landed one Marlin and a few other fish.  While fishing can be hit and miss Captain and Mate were fun to be with as waiting for fish to bite.

reviews.author: brucet62
reviews.text:
Captain  Wendell was a joy to fish with. So laid back and cool. Very knowledgeable.  Deckhand Kalana was so good with handling the gear and the fish. 
Both super nice to us guest. 
We will definitely use these guys again. 
We caught an out of season Wahoo/Ono. Good eating. 
Thanks Wendell and Kalana!!!

reviews.author: L011y
reviews.text: We went out with Captain Britt and Kaulana and had a blast. We caught a bunch of bait fish and then one of the people on the boat caught a huge yellowfin. We had fun and the crew was amazing and so nice.

reviews.author: Compass341419
reviews.text: What an amazing adventure! Britt and Kaulana  were great!  Very safety conscious for my pregnant wife-but did not take away from the fun of the trip!  Fishing was phenomenal, and the weather was flawless.   Perfection!   We both had a great time!  Highly recommend you take a chance on these guys!  They made us feel like Ohana!

reviews.author: 534teddc
reviews.text: Ohana provided a fantastic fishing experience.  Safety and fishing techniques were reviewed up front.  We all caught nice fat Skip Jack Tuna which put up a good fight.  Captain Wendell, his doggie companion Julius and first mate were all entertaining.  Julius gets ecstatic when the reel begins to spin.  The blue water off shore is breath taking.  Thanks for a great charter.  I’d do it again.  Tedd and Julie

reviews.author: daleandmonika
reviews.text: My son and I booked a six hour charter with Ohana and we were thoroughly impressed. The crew were very knowledgeable and conscientious of everyone’s needs. Brit was very personable and open about his fishing techniques and we learned a lot from him as well as his captain and deck hand.  Best of all, we caught fish!

reviews.author: Amber A
reviews.text: Captain Wendell, Red and their adorable pups Bento Box and Julius were amazing!! They were fun, knowledgeable and very professional!! We truly appreciated that they didn’t give us false hope about catching anything since is fishing is fishing. However, with that being said we did catch a Mahi Mahi. It was so much fun!! I would fully recommend going fishing with them!! Thank you gentlemen for a great experience!!

reviews.author: A3312KOsarak
reviews.text: I’m in Kauai with my 15 year old son who LOVES to fish and we had a great experience today! Captain Wendell and Red were awesome with my son (along with the other 2 guys on our boat). My son caught a yellow fin and so did the other 2. Everyone was super helpful, nice and patient and my son was super excited and had a great experience! I was worried about getting sick but we were fine. Great morning, thanks!

reviews.author: W6802QLjeffg
reviews.text: Britt and Red were amazing. Awesome environment.they were fun and joked around with us. When it was serious time they were serious when it was waiting for the next fish they kept it light.  Bento the on board fish inspector and encourager when your arms got tired from fighting the fish an added bonus. Would recommend them to anyone looking for an awesome time.

reviews.author: 556chiarak
reviews.text:
We went on July 4th 2025 and did the 6AM - Noon charter. 

The experience was amazing!!! Our captain was named Wendall (plus Wendall’s sweet pup Julius) and the other crew member was named  Chris. They were both awesome and did an amazing job helping us catch fish as well as keep things fun! In total there were 4 people fishing (including my husband and myself) 6 people on the boat in total. There was PLENTY of room for us to walk around, stand, even lay down. We were on the water for 6 hours an

reviews.author: ashleypU7119GN
reviews.text:
This was such an amazing adventure for our family.  Captain Wendell and Chris were professional, educational, and fun! 

We booked the private boat and it was worth it!  They catered to all our needs…including helping our kiddo when he got sea sick.  

They were patient with beginners and tried to get the whole family involved in catching the fish.

I would definitely book with these two again!

reviews.author: Andy and Stacy S
reviews.text:
Disappointing Experience - Wouldn't Book Again Without Asking Key Questions

Our family of five (two adults and three kids) booked a private charter with Ohana Fishing Charters on June 24, but they called to reschedule due to weather conditions and moved us to June 25. We appreciated them being proactive--at first. However, after comparing wind data from both days (both had 10-15 mph winds from similar directions), we're not convinced the conditions improved meaningfully.

Despite our excitement

reviews.author: joybO3405WB
reviews.text: I took my two sons and grandson age nine on a morning charter with Ohana Fishing 6/17/25. I have booked charters out of New Jersey, San Diego, Cabo, and Kona and i have to say this is the BEST Charter I have ever been on. Weldon and Brit make a great team. They know where to go to find the fish and how to catch them once you get there. They are very knowledgeable and made our trip memorable and fun. We caught six Skip Jack tuna and one Spearfish Marlin in four hours. I highly recommend Ohana Fis

reviews.author: Heather Bisbee
reviews.text: Kalana and Wendall were amazing!  Such a fun day out on the boat.  Incredible local guides who are very knowledgable and great with kids as well.  Having fresh mahi Mahi for dinner was da bomb!    See you next time....Mahalo a nui!

reviews.author: Todd B
reviews.text: My second time with Ohana and Captain Britt, this time with Kaulani, and we a great day (especially since we got fish this time)! Shared the boat with a super nice couple from Maine for a six hour adventure. Everything with Ohana is easy and relaxed. The “aloha” on the boat is great - lots of story sharing and conversation. And how can you go wrong with two yellowfin at the end of the day!! Definitely feel like part of the Ohana! Mahalo nui loa Ohana!! I will see you next year!

reviews.author: Doug Hewitt
reviews.text: Our group had an absolute blast! Wendell and Kaulani were great and fun to hang with for the day. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: K G
reviews.text: The hospitality is top notch! These guys do their job well, and provided a decent amount of Tuna at the end even though we didn't catch anything ourselves. We have been eating fresh Ahi tuna since we left them! We loved the experience and saw over 15 whales spouting and jumping in the water! This is a must do in Kauai!

reviews.author: Ken Lillie
reviews.text: Me and my girlfriend went for a 4 hour fishing charter and it was well worth it she caught 2 fish and a delicious yellow fin tuna that we got cooked up into fish fajitas! The crew were amazing our captain Wendell was knowledgeable and it was a blast getting to learn how they fish, what types of fish they see regularly, and what lures they use. Kaulana was an amazing fisher it was astonishing watching him grab a Ono and get it on board safely, and seeing him untangle lines while we had 2 fish on

reviews.author: Mario Lopez
reviews.text: Incredible fishing charter to book on Kauai! They were very helpful and knowledgeable about the different species you can catch around the island. The boat was very well maintained and perfect for catching nice sized fish. Highly recommend anyone who wants to catch some good fish in Kauai. I’ll definitely be booking Ohana Fishing Charters when I come back to the island!

reviews.author: Kris Dockery
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and organized crew. They kept it fun and upbeat.

reviews.author: Dave Coming
reviews.text: These guys offer the best private charter. Great at finding the fish! Lots of fun and hands on the best!!!

reviews.author: Bob Ziemanski
reviews.text: Captain Britt… your guys Lance and Kaulani took us on a fishing trip of a lifetime!  9 Mahi Mahi, 2 Ono and a massive Yellow Fin Tuna to cap off an absolute EPIC fishing trip!!! Mahalo!!!  You guys rock! #bestfishingcharteronkauai.

reviews.author: Mackenzie Robinson
reviews.text: Great staff and great catches. Would recommend!

reviews.author: Cuinn Fey
reviews.text: Very kinda, responsive, and helpful with booking the charter. Great fishing charter. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Celeste Benedict
reviews.text: My husband went with Ohana Fishing Charters on Oct 11, 2025 and had the best day ever. He really enjoyed the crew and caught two fish. He came back so happy. I would highly recommend

reviews.author: Sue E.
reviews.text: Even though the weather was terrible with rain half of our trip, the captain and deckhand made it enjoyable. We got to know them and the other couple on our trip and they did their best to find the fish. We ended up catching a 6 foot shark which we had to let go due to it being illegal to catch in Hawaii but it was fun and challenging to reel it in!

reviews.author: Christian Luciani
reviews.text:
Had an amazing time with Ohana Fishing Charters! The captain and first mate were incredibly knowledgeable about the waterways. Gave me
Local information on stuff to do as well. Highly recommend to anyone wanting to fish and have a good time

reviews.author: Terri Snider
reviews.text: Didn't really want to write a review but after calling and trying to express to Britt on how they made us feel on our fishing trip and him raising his voice at me and accusing me of only wanting my money back! No that wasn't the reason behind my call at all! I called you Britt to talk to you about how you made us feel as customers! There were 4 of us that chartered a private 6hr trip 2 of us not seasoned fisherman 2 that have spent there whole lives fishing and hunting we know it's not a guarant

reviews.author: Craig Driscoll Helmstedter
reviews.text:
Our day out on the water with Ohana Fishing Charters was phenomenal! Captain Wendell,  with crew members Kalani and a pup named Julius made the entire trip unforgettable. Their knowledge, professionalism, and genuinely friendly nature made us feel right at home from the moment we stepped aboard.

The excitement of the day was reeling in two beautiful Mahi Mahi and one Ono—truly a thrill! The crew guided us every step of the way, making sure we had the best chance at success while also keeping th

reviews.author: R Baier
reviews.text: Looking to have an epic day of fishing with a stellar captain and crew then you MUST book with Ohana Fishing Charters! Captain Britt really knows what he’s doing and Kaolani was a blast! Captain Britt knew just where to take us and we were pulling them in within 20 minutes of hitting the spot! Just to add to the fun was sweet little Boy the dachshund! We had such a great day on the water and a catch of 4 yellowfin and 3 skipjack tuna was amazing! Thanks Captain Britt, Kaolani and Boy for an awes

reviews.author: Melissa Nash
reviews.text: We loved Ohana! We’ve done several fishing charters around the islands and this was by far the best one. Britt and his first mate were great - super knowledgeable and personable. My husband was pumped about the whole thing. Thanks Ohana!

reviews.author: Kristina Sells
reviews.text: The Raddest Crew With The Most Positive and Amazing Vibes! They Tried Very Hard To Get Us A Catch On A Quiet Morning, And I Caught My Dream Fish, Mahi Mahi Baby!!!!! They Filleted The Mahi Perfectly and We Ate On That Fish All Week! Catching is always A Gamble, but this crew will try everything in their power and knowledge to get a great catch. Incredible people, Great Music, Ginger Ale and Other Beverages Just Incase on Board, Very Thoughtful!  Hope to visit again soon and plan to go Fishing ag

reviews.author: Nick Mcvea
reviews.text: Fun experience. Definitely recommend

reviews.author: Sarah McVea
reviews.text: We had an amazing time fishing with Go Fish Kauai! Caught 5 fish and got to take some fresh tuna home for sashimi! Chas and Ty were great captains/guides and made sure that we had a great time. Highly recommend and will be booking them again next year! Book it - you will not be disappointed!

reviews.author: Zach Tevis
reviews.text: Captain Ty worked hard to get us on the fish!  Chaz was an excellent mate and filled the cooler. We had a blast, must do in Kauai

reviews.author: matt Wilhelm
reviews.text:
Went out with Go Fish Kauai and had an awesome experience. The crew was super friendly right from the start and made it clear they were going to do everything they could to put us on fish. You could tell they really knew what they were doing and took it seriously.

They went above and beyond the whole trip—constantly adjusting, working the lines, and keeping us in the best spots. It paid off big time. We ended up landing two blue marlin, one of them over 150 lbs, which was unreal.

On top of tha

reviews.author: Timothy Petrusha
reviews.text: Excellent trip. Captain and crew were very knowledgeable, fun and cared about providing a good experience for us. The boat was clean and in good shape. Fishing gear great. Thanks for a good trip, we will return.

reviews.author: Thomas Callaghan
reviews.text: My wife and I booked a six hour shared trip on our honeymoon; Anthony and Tyler did great work for us and the other guests and wound up landing three pretty rad yellowfin despite some pretty rough water. Will absolutely be booking another trip when we go back and can’t recommend highly enough.

reviews.author: Nick Hemmesch
reviews.text: I would give these guys 10 stars if I could .From the time of booking to the catching and cleaning the fish . Class act

reviews.author: Cheryl Marshall
reviews.text: Captain Tyler & Deckhand Anthony took us out on a fun trip today! We had a huge marlin on for a while that put on quite a show. The boat was very comfortable and the crew worked hard to get us on fish. We came back with a nice bag of fresh tuna for dinner. Great experience! Cheryl & Michael

reviews.author: Craig Netzer
reviews.text:
We had a great experience and were graced by the presence of Gina herself, and outstanding crew, Tyler and Chaz. A great day on the water picking up Skip Jack and yellowfin tuna. It just happened to be a great day to see Whales everywhere as well
They have a very clean well kept boat with a professional and energetic crew. I grew up here fishing, and sometimes it can be hit or miss but these guys are legit-  they find fish. Go Fish!

reviews.author: Beau Nordahl
reviews.text: I’ve been trying for 10 years and I’ve booked 12 trips to catch a trophy! These guys checked all the boxes and fulfilled the dream of catching a fish of a lifetime. Our group mentioned we wanted a big/trophy fish and a couple hours later we landed a 140 pound yellowfin. The crew was very knowledgeable and fun to fish with. 100% would recommend to anyone who wants to have a good time and catch good fish. Forever thankful. Mahalo!!

reviews.author: Juko
reviews.text: Great experience Chazz and Tyler are great I’m telling you best around they need a raise, the only problem is I needed advil for my arms from reeling those bad boy fish in

reviews.author: Kris Schreibvogel
reviews.text:
Friendly and knowledgeable
Caught fish when no one else did!

reviews.author: Josephine Davis
reviews.text: Go Fish Kauai did not disappoint! I am a 34 year old Colorado resident and this was my very first ocean experience. As such this adventure was absolutely epic. It was evident that Chaz and Ty know what they are doing. Their rigs on the deck were impressive in and of themselves, capable of hauling in some serious fish. Those boys knew what lures to trade out and stayed on top of what was biting. Initially a little more explanation of what lures we start with and why would be fun however once we k

reviews.author: Realtor, Levi LaRowe
reviews.text:
Big thank you to TY and Chaz at Go Fish Kauai! 🎣
We had an absolutely amazing trip and caught a ton of fish — yellowfin tuna, skipjack tuna, and to top it off, my wife landed a big marlin! Everyone had an incredible time, nonstop action, and an unforgettable adventure.
So glad we chose this charter — truly top-notch. Highly recommend Go Fish Kauai!

reviews.author: Joe Sheppard
reviews.text: Awesome experience! Captain put us on the fish and talked us through what to do. Fish On!!!

reviews.author: Jacob Bilhartz
reviews.text: This was my third time on a charter with Go Fish Kauai (4/2023, 9/2024, 1/26/2026), and there's a reason I keep coming back.  Ty & Chaz gave us a great trip.  They clearly know what they're doing and our boat had a good haul today, but they also made sure that we had a good time throughout regardless.  This charter will continue to stay on my list for when I'm here.

reviews.author: Cheyenne Babcock
reviews.text: Ty and Chaz took us out and worked hard to get us on fish despite challenging conditions. I am so looking forward to poke and grilled tuna for dinner! Thanks guys for all your help!!

reviews.author: Gracie Rice
reviews.text: Easily one of the best fishing trips ever! Tyler & Anthony were so great! Very hard working & personable guys! The boat was super clean & well taken care of - definitely a sign of great crew! We ended up extending our trip because we were having so much fun. I walked on the boat and said “I have to catch a mahi” and that is exactly what they made come true.. AND then some! Great day 10/10 recommend.

reviews.author: Patrick McClurg
reviews.text: Killer experience! If you’re trying to decide which charter to go with while here in Kauai, pick these guys. 100% professional and had us on fish in the first hour. They were able to filet the yellow tail and recommend taxidermy options. Very knowledgeable and seasoned. Do the 6-hour or 8-hour option, you’ll be glad you booked the extra hours. Ended the trip with 10 total in the cooler

reviews.author: 909katharinej
reviews.text: We had a nice time with the semi-private surfing lesson in Waikiki! There were only 3 of us in the group. Peter was our instructor, and he made the two-hour session fun and educational. The lesson felt very personalized, and the competitive pricing made it even better.

reviews.author: Rianne615
reviews.text:
The instructor Gavin very patient with us over weight novices. Paddling out is very hard. These surfers are very strong. Remember to bring tip money or you can Venmo. The water is shallow and there are coral rocks below so no head first diving. Winter is time for baby waves so good for novice.
All equipment included.

reviews.author: KENNETH H
reviews.text: Peter was the perfect instructor for our 9 year old grandson.  He was patient and kind. Our grandson was able to stand up, caught several good waves and wants to surf again!

reviews.author: Leah S
reviews.text: Staff and instructors were really friendly. Your safety is their utmost priority. We enjoyed trying our first surfing experience. Kudos to Zarra and her staff for taking care of our group.

reviews.author: Dream31580350803
reviews.text: Good explaining, nice people, great experience for beginning surfers. The movie in the beginning is a fine way to learn fast!

reviews.author: jessepI8605ED
reviews.text: The perfect entry learning experience! Super fun and thorough with excellent guidance the whole way through!

reviews.author: Cheyizz13
reviews.text: Charlie & Keaton were very attentive to guide my son’s (Jaris) first attempt to surf in Oahu’s Pacific Ocean. Tq for going the extra mile in your service!

reviews.author: rohitkT3368RP
reviews.text: Had a group session for surfing lesson. It was a great time. Instructor Kalani is great with instructions. I was able to stand up and ride a wave a little by end of the day. Satisfied with the experience and will highly recommend.

reviews.author: levim950
reviews.text: I highly recommend these lessons for beginners. They break things down simply before you go out to the water and review everything again on the water. The water itself was perfect for beginner surfing and the perfect temperature.

reviews.author: 淳森
reviews.text:
知らない人もいますが、有名なハンス　ヒーデマンにサーフィンを教えてもらえます
私はサーフィン歴45年ですが、彼女に教えてもらう目的で参加しました
日本語は使いませんがわかりやすく丁寧にレッスンしてくれるので、初めてでもサーフボードの上に立てて感動します
お薦めです！

reviews.author: U2165OHalyssam
reviews.text:
We had an incredible time at Hans Hedemann Surf School in Waikiki! From start to finish, the experience was smooth, welcoming, and so much fun. A huge shout-out to our instructors, Niko and Peter, who truly made the day unforgettable.

Both Niko and Peter were super knowledgeable, breaking everything down in a way that was easy to understand whether you were brand-new to surfing or brushing up on your skills. Their passion for the sport was obvious, and their teaching style blended clear instruc

reviews.author: Tourist00896026857
reviews.text: Great experience. Staff was  awesome. Beginner friendly. I was able to stand before the end of the lesson. Great gear! Also good recommendations

reviews.author: 126maryannen
reviews.text:
Super easy check-in at the office. You watch a quick water safety video, and they go over all the lesson options—group, private, or tandem. The instructors help you figure out what’s best for you. It’s only a quick 2-minute walk to the surf spot, and they already have the boards waiting. Another short paddle out and you’re good to go.

All the instructors are awesome. We love Kalei and Niko, and Charlie is my favorite!

reviews.author: Sophie F
reviews.text: This was an amazing experience.  The instructors were super encouraging.  Nico was an amazing instructor and gave the best tips and feedback. Worth it!

reviews.author: 935kashyapd
reviews.text: My 13yo son and 9yo daughter got private surf lessons from Luis and Charley. They had an absolutely fantastic time. It was their first time surfing and they are hooked, especially my daughter. She wanted to go back again the next day. Do not miss the photos. While we thought we could just take some videos from the pier, which we did, those drone photos and videos are something else. Totally worth it!

reviews.author: D7729IB_
reviews.text:
今回は30年ぶりのサーフィンに挑戦しました！不安な気持ちとまた波に乗りたい楽しみな気持ちでレッスンを申し込みました。

担当はkalaniさんでした。
日本語で対応して頂けて、とても説明が分かりやすく、フレンドリーで話しやすくて不安な気持ちはすぐに無くなりました。
そして海やサーフィンの事をとてもよく知っているので何よりも安全第一で、初心者の方にもオススメです！

私は思っていたより体力が落ちていて最初は波に乗ることも難しかったんですが、kalaniさんのおかげで段々と感覚を取り戻してきて最後の方は波に乗ることができ、ホテルに戻ってからも達成感と爽快感でした。
もっと体力を戻して、来年は息子と一緒にkalaniさんのレッスンを受けたいと思います。

reviews.author: Go641797
reviews.text:
2 hours for the first lesson was great to not tire out.
Gavin was a patient instructor.
Had a good time!👍
Planning to work on more practice.

reviews.author: Fleur1234567
reviews.text:
I booked a private lesson on an impulse at short notice. I went directly to the shop (round the corner from my accommodation) to book. Since I was travelling alone, was a beginner surfer and am older,  meeting the staff gave me a better feel for the company than just checking out the website.
They were super friendly and approachable and dealt with my questions and booking quickly and efficiently. 
The shop has long-sleeved tops and 'river' shoes for customers to borrow for lessons. After a shor

reviews.author: ciam406
reviews.text: Wicked experience! Highly recommend HH, had a blast and most certainly will be back. Great staff, friendly and knowledgeable. If you want a great experience while in Hawaii, HH surf school will not disappoint!

reviews.author: 嘉豪 刘
reviews.text:
这是我第一次学冲浪，整体体验非常好。教练性格沉稳、有耐心，讲解得很清楚。整个过程中我都觉得安全、被照顾得很好。

课程安排得很有条理，我也成功地站上了板子几次，那种感觉很棒。沙滩很美，浪的大小刚好，团队也很专业、乐于帮忙。

在夏威夷学冲浪的话，这是一个非常适合初学者的地方。

reviews.author: Yumi
reviews.text: 8歳の英語が話せない子どもがサーフィンをしたいというので日本語を話せるインストラクターさんを探して、こちらのKalaniさんにたどりつき、プライベートレッスンをしてもらいました。とても優しく気がきくインストラクターさんでぜひまた受けたいです。本当にありがとう😊お店のスタッフさんもみんな優しく素敵な方ばかりでした

reviews.author: Angela Lin
reviews.text: Luis and Sergio were great instructors! Kids said they had a blast, was very fun, very easy to learn. Highly recommend the photo package especially for first timers. Everyone on staff is extremely friendly and lovely to work with, made the otherwise pricey experience feel worthwhile. 🙂

reviews.author: Trent Olson
reviews.text: This is a wonderful business with great staff. They offer hands on lessons with knowledgeable staff that will help you out. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Verf
reviews.text: I mist so much surfing will be back soon from canada quebec and take the same instructer snowbording for 45 years and miss mor surfing its in m'y blood i mo now take care every one

reviews.author: Mathias Detjen
reviews.text: It was a Great experience. Hans and his team were very clear and helpful. We enjoyed this activity very much and would book again

reviews.author: Jason Gao
reviews.text: Niko was the best teacher. I was already surfing 20 minutes into the lesson. The shop had amazing and caring people too!

reviews.author: Emily Stefanich
reviews.text: Had a great time as a first time surfer! Charlie was an awesome instructor and was super helpful and chill. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Tyler VanHuyse
reviews.text: The staff and especially Charlie, our instructor, were very friendly and knowledgeable. Also very fun and energetic. Beautiful day at Waikīkī Beach, highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Zane Jones
reviews.text: I had a wonderful time with this school.  Very professional, kind, and patient.

reviews.author: Jasmine
reviews.text: We were trying to decide where to go and are so happy we chose Hans! Charlie and Peter were amazing instructors, definitely would recommend!!

reviews.author: Sydney Elizabeth
reviews.text: I had a phenomenal time at the Hans Hedemann surf lessons!! Charlie and Pete were so thorough, kind, and made us feel so comfortable the entire time. I had never surfed before and was nervous, but shortly after we started, I felt good!! We purchased the photo package and the photographs and videos turned out looking great!! All of the staff here are so kind and I would love to come back again soon. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.author: Owen Blair
reviews.text: Charles was an amazing instructor and the surfing was a blast!

reviews.author: James Edmondson
reviews.text: We wanted to get the kids surf lessons, but we didn't plan ahead at all. They got us in with a private instructor as soon as they could and the kids loved it. I liked that they had a classroom for prep instruction before headed out to the beach. And the instructor was fantastic. One of the highlights of our vacation.

reviews.author: Ollie Hashimoto
reviews.text: Instructor Charlie barely gave any help or instruction and was quite rude when I asked any clarification questions

reviews.author: Kenneth Sewchand
reviews.text:
I purchased a lesson for my teenage daughter. The experience from start to finish was extremely positive from check-in, safety briefing, and to riding waves.

Strongly recommend!

reviews.author: vicki
reviews.text:
a really disappointing experience with this surf lesson.

We were a group of three students with one instructor. One of the students had prior surfing experience, and the instructor chose to paddle extremely far out into deeper water just to help that one person catch bigger waves.

As a result, the rest of us were left behind. I had to constantly paddle out to follow the instructor into deeper water, which was exhausting and unnecessary. In a one-hour session, I only managed to catch two waves,

reviews.author: Eric White
reviews.text: Where to start? From the first phone call to wrapping up, Noah, Dakota, and Elijah were incredible to work with! My two disabled children had private lessons and they were taken care of - individualized lessons, advancing based on their comfort level in the water, and super focused on safety. The photo package was reasonably priced and the pictures were amazing. Can’t say enough about these guys and the whole operation. Definitely will come back!!

reviews.author: Pragadeesh Kumar
reviews.text:
Just the best and patient and friendly bunch of instructors!! I lost my GoPro in the middle of the ocean and thought it was gone forever until Owen pulled a miracle and found it for me!
Make sure to ask for photos as they take the best action shots!!

reviews.author: Jason Birkle
reviews.text: One of the most fun experiences we had as a family in Hawaii.  Tyler and Dakota were great instructors and all of us stood up on the boards. Highly recommend this shop for lessons or to rent any beach equipment you need.

reviews.author: Lester Tanquilut
reviews.text: NOAH was awesome! Great experience for our crew. We all got great waves and got to stand for most of them :)

reviews.author: David Sooch
reviews.text: Noah was a great instructor. We had a blast

reviews.author: Scott Rothman
reviews.text: So much fun! Jamie calmed my daughter’s nerves and got her standing up on her first wave! We surfed in a quiet spot away from all the Waikiki crowds. The photos were a nice touch too

reviews.author: Doug Briggs
reviews.text:
I want to thank everyone at Beach Candy Waikiki/School of Surf. I popped in early each day this week about 10mins before they actually opened so I could grab a couple of chairs and head down to the 12 Coconuts AA meeting that started at 7am. I was never turned away and everyone was very friendly and helpful.
Note, might want to have the staff check the pouches of the chairs upon return. I forgot an item (shoes) in one of the chairs and we could not find them the next day. We went thru like 80 ch

reviews.author: Shelly Hopper
reviews.text: Ella O was AMAZING... very friendly, polite, and helpful!! Love her!

reviews.author: Michael Lee
reviews.text: We took a lesson with Tyler who was awesome and a great teacher. We were up and riding on our first try! Great time. Highly recommend. Thanks Tyler!!

reviews.author: Deborah Brandes
reviews.text: Tyler was awesome!  It was a lot of fun.  Was is very a very good lesson.  He’s super chill, nice and talented!

reviews.author: Claudia Reynolds
reviews.text: Kili was a great teacher and Kai was lovely!

reviews.author: hewitt lemmerman
reviews.text: Noah was an amazing instructor. Big recommendation

reviews.author: Emily McDonald
reviews.text: Our 9yo son did a private lesson and had a wonderful time! We were originally booked during the Kona storm but the team were amazing and rescheduled to a safer day and made my son feel safe even though he was a bit nervous! He did amazing and had so much fun 🤩

reviews.author: Jordan Roth
reviews.text: outstanding. loved the guide.would do it again. beware of coral.

reviews.author: Noah Klev
reviews.text: Great for beginners

reviews.author: Jack Nolan
reviews.text: Awesome experience. Our instructor, Reid, did a great job.

reviews.author: Lindsay M
reviews.text: We had a great experience.  Koa did a great job teaching my teens and they were up and surfing in short time.  I would definitely reccommend.

reviews.author: Adventure492930
reviews.text: The absolute best experience! We had two younger children and they were amazing to work with. We all got up on the boards and the instructors were very patient and helpful with all instructions. It was a beautiful day and a memory we will cherish for years to come (seriously wish I had a photo of my son for you all to see the big grin on his face when he got up the first time!!). Thanks for a great day and a great first time surfing!!

reviews.author: 988ericm
reviews.text:
Had the best time learning to surf with Kane he was amazing a true Hawaiian waterman and expert surfer
If you want to learn to surf on your first outing and get up on your board quick this is the place to go
So professional courteous and knowledgeable he read the waves like someone in a movie and he put us on the perfect wave each time
They will set you up at your own pace and move you around on the waves based on how you are doing so you get the most from your experience the better you do the b

reviews.author: Carolyn J
reviews.text: A great day of surfing! They booked us last minute and took out a bunch of kids with mixed skill.  Kala did a great job. Everyone had a lot of fun and grew their skills.  We would definitely work with them again!

reviews.author: Escape79314
reviews.text: Amazing surf experience! Surfed Chun’s and Puaena pt. alongside honu and anuenue. Kala, Kekai, Kane, Nakoa and all the instructors are excellent, knowledgeable watermen who really know the North Shore waves and breaks. They put safety and fun first while helping you learn and improve. Les recomiendo esta escuela de surf 🏄🏽‍♀️ 🌊 🤙🏽!!!

reviews.author: Craig K
reviews.text:
⸻

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Our family had an amazing surf lesson with Kala—hands down the best surf lesson we’ve ever had in Hawaii. We’ve taken lessons on past visits, but this experience was on a completely different level.

Kala was incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and encouraging, and did an outstanding job tailoring the lesson to each family member’s ability. From safety and ocean awareness to technique and confidence, everything was explained clearly and calmly, which made a huge difference—especially for

reviews.author: cobaltcat4
reviews.text: My four kids (Ages 10-19) loved their surf lesson. They were all up and surfing within minutes of getting in the water with Anton’s instruction. Even though there were big waves that day, they found a great safe area of the beach. I highly recommend.

reviews.author: johnhB7223QV
reviews.text: Had a great time with James. He helped the 3 of us ride the best waves in the world on the north shore. By the end of the class I felt I had the basics of surfing and was riding the waves as far as I wanted. 🤙

reviews.author: marenm397
reviews.text: great learning experience! our instructor was very nice and helpful and he made sure we got the most out of our time. all three of us caught many waves with help from our instructor.

reviews.author: 81isaack
reviews.text: I had a great experience with North Shore Oahu Surf School. Our instructor helped us get out and surf some good waves, and gave us recommendations on places to eat afterwards. Would book again!

reviews.author: Nancy K
reviews.text: From beginning to end, from scheduling to surfing, North Shore Oahu School was the smoothest experience of our vacation! We came from Austin, TX with 0 experience in surfing and Kane and Maikai (sp?) got both middle age parents and 3 teenage kids up on surf boards in our first hour! Honestly, it was the highlight of our first time in Hawaii.

reviews.author: jessicamE8619JI
reviews.text: Mai Kai was awesome! Informative and encouraging. When the other partu wanted to give up he encouraged her to face her fears at the end of the day we all had an experience we will not forget. Thank you!

reviews.author: G6421LTkellys
reviews.text: Both instructors were a great time for our small group. They were informative and I felt self the entire time. Kane and Mika were great!

reviews.author: Imanlevine
reviews.text:
Went out with James, and my wife went with Kala. They really take care of you and do so much more than a school normally does. Will go back to them every time.
Caught sooooo many waves and they really helped me paddle out.

reviews.author: 264peiyunt
reviews.text: My husband and our two kids take lessons from Kala, Kane, and Mitch. All of the instructors are wonderful to work with. They not only make the lessons super fun, but they are also knowledgeable and take safety very seriously. Since there are often other people in the ocean, beginner surfers can sometimes struggle to control their boards and accidentally surf towards others. However, the instructors always stay one step ahead to ensure everyone’s safety, which I greatly appreciate. My daughter sa

reviews.author: 676atticusp
reviews.text: I had a fun time learning to surf with Kala of North Shore Oahu Surf School! He was friendly and super helpful!  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: N4331EAkend
reviews.text: Surfing with Kane was awesome! He's a young dude but don't discount his lifetime of experience. He knows his stuff for real and he's a great teacher. I'm a fairly nervous person, trying new things is awkward, but his chill vibe & friendly personality immediately made me feel comfortable. Every time I came back from a try at a wave (and fell off lol), he gently suggested small tweaks to correct my form or timing or whatever I needed. The next try I always felt more confident and I could feel the

reviews.author: leannemB8896BS
reviews.text: Had a great time surfing with the family. Instructors were friendly and patient with us non-surfing Canadians. We were at Chuns reef. I was a little nervous about being scraped up by the reef because it is fairly shallow but we were all fine. Wear protective footwear and plenty of sunscreen! It hurts when the back of your knees are burnt! Thanks North Shore Surfing. One of the highlights of our trip!

reviews.author: stephanielB7255JX
reviews.text: I booked our surf lesson about 6 months ago when planning our trip to Hawaii. Based on the great reviews I decided to go with North Shore Oahu Surf School. Communication was great. They reached out the day before to let us know where to meet our instructor. The day of our lesson, Kane our instructor called to instruct us where to go at Chuns Reef beach. Kane was awesome! Showed us the basics then we paddled out. The wind would kick up which made it difficult to paddle out. Many of times he would

reviews.author: brentj560
reviews.text: Kekai and Kane were excellent instructors.  We really enjoyed the experience and would highly recommend North Shore Oahu Surf School.  Mehalo!

reviews.author: Brandon Chong
reviews.text: So much fun!  This was the first time our boys have been surfing, and they had a blast!  James was our instructor, and he was great!  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Marta Bukmeier
reviews.text: Great experience for my 16 year old daughter. Definitely a highlight of our time in Hawaii. Kane was a great instructor and she was able to get up and surf within minutes.

reviews.author: chelsea
reviews.text: Kala was amazing!!! He was so patient and kind! Im so glad I was able to catch a wave! Kimo was an amazing photographer and got some great shots of my husband and I. We had so much fun. Thank you guys!!

reviews.author: Banks Bradley
reviews.text: Kala was an awesome teacher and made sure me and my wife had a lot of fun and were able to catch some waves 🤙🏼  also Kimo took some awesome pics - thank you guys,

reviews.author: Paul
reviews.text: Kane was an incredible surf instructor—patient, encouraging, and clearly passionate about what he does. He made the whole experience fun and easy to follow, and had me catching waves way sooner than I expected. If you’re learning on the North Shore, you couldn’t ask for a better guide! 🌊🤙

reviews.author: Rui Lin
reviews.text: Great instructor that allowed me to pick it up quickly for my first time surfing and in such a beautiful area.

reviews.author: Nolan Kessinger
reviews.text:
We loved our instructor! They were super attentive and adjusted everything based on our experience level. They clearly knew the area really well and even switched locations based on the surf conditions, which we really appreciated.

They were also very easy to work with — we didn’t book our lesson until the night before and they had no issue accommodating us. Everything was smooth and professional.

Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Kerry Luiso
reviews.text:
We loved our lesson with North Shore Oahu Surf School! We did a semi-private lesson and were pleasantly surprised by how affordable it was compared to lessons in Waikiki.

We had taken a surf lesson once about four years ago, so we were definitely still beginners. Our instructor walked us through all the basics and then allowed us to progress at our own pace as we started to get the hang of it. He answered every question we had and was extremely knowledgeable and encouraging throughout the lesso

reviews.author: Molly Schuessler
reviews.text: North Shore O’ahu Surf School was the highlight of our trip! Our 7-year-old stood up on his first try thanks to his incredible instructor, who was patient, kind, and so encouraging. My husband joined the lesson too and they both had an amazing time. Everything was easy, fun, and created the best memories. Highly recommend North Shore O’ahu Surf School for families visiting O’ahu!

reviews.author: Lindsay May
reviews.text: Koa guided my teens from the start.  He carefully watched over them to keep them safe.  Snd they were surfing before long!

reviews.author: Charles Elsea
reviews.text: I had such an awesome time. I’ve never gone surfing before but they made the process so seamless. Awesome surf instructor! The area they take you to is so safe and so easy to Try for the first time. Hoping to start surfing back at home now!

reviews.author: Heather Curtis
reviews.text:
Having been our very first time on a surfboard and wanting to give something new a try during our time in Oahu, my family and I were nervous to give this a go, yet it was so very worth it!
Our instructor made sure that we not only had a great time, but were genuinely learning from each wave and staying safe. Shout out to Kekai for making our surf lesson a trip highlight. We are so eager to try catching waves again in the future! Mahalo to North Shore Oahu Surf School!

reviews.author: Eliza Volmer
reviews.text: We had a very large group of 9 and we were in the water and up surfing within minutes. The instructors were great and payed attention to everyone's needs! Great experience!!🤙

reviews.author: stefano pizzoli
reviews.text: Amazing experience on the North Shore! The surf instructors were fun, professional. They explained everything clearly, helped us catch our  first waves, and created a super positive vibe in the water. Highly recommend if you want to learn to surf while enjoying the beauty of the North Shore!

reviews.author: Dylan
reviews.text: Best board selection on the north shore! And super cheap for a 24 hr rental

reviews.author: cedric cadotte
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Amazing experience at this North Shore surf shop! The vibe is exactly what you’d expect in Oahu — relaxed, authentic, and full of true surf culture. The staff were super friendly and knowledgeable about the local breaks like Pipeline, Sunset, and Waimea. They helped me choose the right board for the conditions and my skill level without any pressure.

The equipment was in great shape, and the prices were fair for the area. You can tell this place is run by people who genuinely love surfing

reviews.author: Kevin Brooks
reviews.text: Afternoon lesson for our family of 4 (ages 8 to 50) and James and Nakoa were awesome start to finish. Perfect location that could accommodate various abilities. Parents and kids all had a blast catching waves and learning proper techniques to take with us, A+ experience. Mahalo to the School and James and Nakoa!

reviews.author: Sarah Goh
reviews.text: Super fun surfing lesson!! Would recommend for anyone who it's their first time!

reviews.author: Eric Mitschele
reviews.text:
We had the best time our instructor Kana was amazing he gave us  the most time in the water and his knowledge and expertise gave us the best waves to ride he got me standing up on my first run I would not look any further if your looking to surf as a first timer like us or an intermediate looking to get better
He took us out a little at a time and matched the wave size with how we were doing out there I will definitely use this school again
Please if your looking to get out there as a first time

reviews.author: Christine Shi
reviews.text: Mr. Kala was super kind and patient with our 6-year-old son's first surfing lesson! Our son had a blast and can't wait to come again!

reviews.author: Scenic07501397428
reviews.text:
Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy gave me and my two boys (ages 7 and 10) an unforgettable experience in Lahaina. From the moment we arrived, the team made us feel welcome and excited to get out on the water. The instructors were fun, patient, and skilled at teaching both kids and adults.

My two boys had never surfed before, and within minutes the instructors had them standing up on their boards and excited to keep going. They broke everything down in a way that was simple, safe, and confidence-build

reviews.author: J3283KUjeff
reviews.text: The 2 hour private lessons was fantastic. Starting with basics and balance, to actually catching 🌊 waves. Sierra was awesome. Couldn’t have asked for a better instructor for 11 year old first surfing.

reviews.author: osando10
reviews.text: I was so happy to join this surf academy. The staff was amazing and we got great pictures. It can be a tough work out but totally worth when you catch a wave. They were great with kids, very patients and supportive.

reviews.author: mjhayes17
reviews.text: We absolutely loved our surfing experience! They were great at communication on where to meet up and we absolutely loved Lee our instructor. Our boys are 11 and 15 and both loved it so much we signed for another lesson the next day! The best!! Thank you!

reviews.author: kelleyseverance
reviews.text: Our surf instructors with Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy were amazing. This is the second time we’ve used them and we wouldn’t look anywhere else. They were so great with all of our kids (ages 4-12). Had fun, joked with them and encouraged them. Our kids all had a blast! They tailored to each of their abilities. We were on vacation as a big family so cousins were surfing together. The instructors did a great job making it fun for all to do together.

reviews.author: thegiovannonefamily
reviews.text: We had another wonderful experience! Enaldo and Steve were awesome teachers. Highly recommend. We’ll definitely be back next time we’re in Maui!

reviews.author: Jennifer J
reviews.text: My husband, mother in law, aunt and I had a group lesson with Lee who was not only professional and fun but also made sure we were safe and successful. All four of us (who are in our 30s and 60s) were successful at catching the waves 🏄‍♀️🏄‍♂️, even for our first time surfing! Ric, their on site photographer was amazing as well. Definitely don’t sleep on getting your photos. We highly recommend the whole experience.

reviews.author: kboyda1
reviews.text: Fun time the semi private lessons were well worth it. Great communication, easy to find, and the pictures were a great add on.

reviews.author: ClayCamSurfing
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible experience with Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy! The instructors were super friendly, patient, and incredibly skilled—perfect for first-timers. My 12-year-old had never surfed before and, with expert coaching, caught his first three waves—on a big day at Guardrails! As a parent, I was so impressed with how safety-conscious and attentive they were. They gave him space to have fun but were always close by and ready to help. It made all the difference. Truly the best surf school i

reviews.author: Nathan G
reviews.text: My wife and I did the 2 hour semi private lesson together. Tavner really really knows what he is doing. My wife and I were both able to get standing multiple times and catch waves. This is something that we would 100% do again if we came back to Maui.

reviews.author: sarasC8471TR
reviews.text: Communication was great and we knew exactly where to find our instructors. The instructors were super patient and great with my kids. They obviously knew what they were doing and had all kinds of helpful tips. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: Roam623346
reviews.text: I highly recommend Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy to anyone looking to learn how to surf.  My daughter and I had Lee as our instructor and he did an excellent job providing us tips after each run to improve our chances of catching the next wave.  He did everything within his control to help us catch as many of waves as possible, and very quickly we were able to ride the waves without as much assistance.  Lee was friendly and fun to spend our lesson with too!

reviews.author: Kristy K
reviews.text: We LOVE Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy!  We are repeat customers from 2023 and the kids loved it so much on this trip that we surfed twice in one week.  The booking process is simple and they are very responsive.  The instructors are AMAZING!  They are great at teaching you to surf but also kind and so much fun!  Lots of love to Lee, Kayla, Chad & Philippe.  They were great!!

reviews.author: M9327LRmelodys
reviews.text: Had so much fun! Instructors (Lee, Philip, amd two others who's name I can't remember) and photographer (Ric Larsen) were very personable 🙌🏼

reviews.author: bgiddens2025
reviews.text: The company was very accommodating despite a last minute reservation.  The instructor was incredible and both of my daughters loved the experience.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: katecarleton
reviews.text: Great experience for the whole family! Instructors were friendly, knowledgeable, and great with our kids! Thank you!

reviews.author: Mallory K
reviews.text: My husband and I had never surfed before but we both caught several waves and Inaldo was an awesome instructor! Rick took photos of us and he really made us look like we knew what we were doing in them! They do not have a shop since it was lost in the fire, but they were very prompt in communication and operate right from the surf sites which made it easy to get right in the water. Highly recommend this company for surfing lessons!

reviews.author: Explorer23812648928
reviews.text: My 14 year old had the best time! Excellent instructor, communication and overall experience. We would definitely return if we find ourselves back in the area.

reviews.author: P6848OBwilliamm
reviews.text: Amazing morning out with Royal Hawaiian. Steve and Lee were great instructors for our kids - really great lesson, funny, kind and the kids loved it. Ric took great photos and 100% worth purchasing. We are repeat customers and will keep coming back.

reviews.author: johnsonkendall
reviews.text: This surf school is the best on Maui.  Since the fire they have had to pivot from having a shop to moving between spots and they have not skipped a beat.  Even on slow surf days they can make it fun.  My 15 yr old daughter loves the time she gets to spend out on the water with this team.  Super welcoming and very much enthusiastic about teaching the sport they love.   Highly recommend - I have personally watched them get even the most timid adult riding waves with a big smile.

reviews.author: Ed Miller
reviews.text: Outstanding instruction.   Kids gotup the first time.  They were always with them building their confidence

reviews.author: Michał Aibin
reviews.text: Amazing team - had lots of fun! Kid friendly as well!

reviews.author: Kevin Harrub
reviews.text: Steve was fantastic!  Great teacher!  Had my son riding a wave on his first attempt!  Highly recommend Steve at Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy.

reviews.author: Nijika Grinham
reviews.text: It was a great experience. I was traumatized by surfing because of a bad experience in California, but this completely changed my perspective. Now I’m interested in surfing again and excited to learn more. Thank you so much for this amazing experience!

reviews.author: Bev Brauchler
reviews.text: Had a great time. Instructors were very good and friendly.

reviews.author: Justin Bradley
reviews.text: After waiting 32 years from surfing in West Australia, I can personally assure you the Steve and the crew are just exceptional at what they do. As a teacher, I can attest to the manner in which they help you feel comfortable, confident, and collected when out in the beautiful waters. If ever you are in Maui and have even the remote desire to pick up this graceful and beautiful sport, go no further than the Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy. The photographer, Ric, captured our experience in gorgeous de

reviews.author: Kasey Celniker
reviews.text: So much fun!!! 10/10

reviews.author: Patrick Rooney
reviews.text: We had two families of five, with kids ranging from 10-15, along with four parents. Most of us were first timers, and Steve, Lee, and Josh were fantastic teachers, great with kids and adults, patient, and super fun. Can’t say enough good things about the experience, and highly recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Will Miller
reviews.text: Amazing experience. First time surfing, Steve Lee and John made this one of the best experiences I’ve ever had on a vacation. They gave me amazing tips and tricks and got up and surfing every single time. I would highly recommend using Royal Hawaiian. They also got some incredible pictures of us that I will now have forever. Thank you to everyone involved. If I could give 10 stars I would!

reviews.author: Connie Baker
reviews.text: Steve was very attentive and helpful for our two boys, 15 & 12. They enjoyed it immensely!

reviews.author: Jenna Monkarsh
reviews.text: THE BEST EXPERIENCE EVER. LEE JOSH RICK AND STEVE absolutely made the whole trip to Hawaii i caught more waves than imagined! This would be the one to book!!

reviews.author: Lauren Hilton
reviews.text: Amazing experience!! Steve, Lee & Josh are the best! Such great teachers and Rick is an absolute professional on the camera.

reviews.author: Joe Picard
reviews.text: Lee was amazing great instructor and photographer was great . it was my first time and i can’t wait to do it again

reviews.author: Alex Aufdenkampe
reviews.text: One of my absolute favorite things we did in Maui! The instructors made it so easy for us to thrive on a surfboard and I felt so comfortable. Also the water and surrounding beach is 10/10!

reviews.author: Richard Tyler
reviews.text: We had a great experience - well organised - great waves and location.  Lee was a knowledgeable, experienced and encouraging coach.  Thanks very much !

reviews.author: Daniele Basile
reviews.text:
Sono stati fantastici i nostri istruttori, le foto spettacolari e l’organizzazione perfetta

Sono stati molto pazienti e ci hanno aiutato un sacco a fare surf come si deve

reviews.author: Nudhanai Lunchaprasith
reviews.text: We had a surf lesson with Felipe and he was awesome! Total beginners here, but he made everything super easy to understand and fun. He taught us the basics really clearly and we were both standing up after just a couple of tries. Felipe was patient, encouraging, and made the whole experience a blast. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Brice McFadden
reviews.text: Really great experience. Very helpful!

reviews.author: Hara Baleben
reviews.text:
A bit late review.I didn’t find the time till now.

Kea was great.
Very informative and patient.
It was my 1st time and was a fun day.
I will come by again and ask for kea.a great instructor.
Looking forward for another fun day on the water.

reviews.author: Brenda
reviews.text: I took my first surf class with Royal Hawaiian Surf and I had a great time, they were very knowledgeable and made me feel comfortable during the process, I'd definitely recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.author: 319marcelo
reviews.text:
What is a trip to Hawaii without surfing? I couldn’t tell you - because I made sure to try it.
As it was my very first time on a surfboard, I booked a two-hour lesson, and I was fortunate to have David from Surf Club Maui as my instructor. Our group consisted of four fellow beginners - perfectly sized, intimate group that made the experience both personal and incredibly fun. After a brief introduction to the fundamentals of surfing, combined with a few practice exercises on land, we headed strai

reviews.author: U8209BCmian
reviews.text: PLEASE TAKE A LESSON HERE!! this is definitely the highlight of my trip. i went with 3 of my friends & we had David as our instructor and he was INCREDIBLE!! his instructions were so easy to understand & he also gave us so many local recommendations. it was one of the best experiences of my life & i’ll definitely be coming back!!

reviews.author: Marlom F
reviews.text: It was definitely worth it, as someone with no prior experience surfing, it took me only a few tries to catch my first wave, and boy was that awesome!!! But It wouldn’t have been the same without the patience and encouragement of my trainer. Even though it was an open group lesson, it felt private, cause it’s a small group so he has the time to give you constant feedback. There’s also a photographer in the water taking very cool pictures of you, and they are worth the price. Incredible experienc

reviews.author: T8935AEdaphnem
reviews.text: The instructor and photographer were amazing! They split us into smaller groups, so you never felt overlooked. They always kept an eye on everyone, offering helpful tips and making sure safety was a priority. I would definitely go again!

reviews.author: Fahira H
reviews.text:
I had an amazing experience with this surf school.
My instructor Brandon was incredibly friendly, patient, and encouraging. He explained everything clearly and made the lesson both fun and confidence-building.

Everyone working there was welcoming and kind as well — from the introduction to the photographer, the whole team created a great atmosphere.

I would book this course again anytime. The prices are more than fair for the quality and experience you get.

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: jenniferfX7030SB
reviews.text: Good instructor just unfortunately too crowded. There were at least 2 other companies using this same beach. Almost every wave we were side by side another surfer, often limiting the surfing ride, this really impacted our experience.

reviews.author: B5750DGjacquelinem
reviews.text: My 10 year old son went and had a blast. His instructor was David and he had a group of 3 teens and my son, all kids got up and rode waves in. My son loved every minute of it. Leilani was the photographer and got some amazing shots. All around 5 stars for this crew. The price was excellent for the length of time they were in thw water and how many times my son rode thw waves in. It was a beautiful area to sit and watch thw lessons. Earlier is better.

reviews.author: joshwW1541WG
reviews.text: Surf Club Maui was fun and a great time! My wife and I never surfed before but our instructor, Brian, did a great job helping us learn. We were able to get up pretty easily and surfed multiple waves! Would recommend Surf Club Maui to anyone looking to learn how to surf!

reviews.author: 618ginid
reviews.text: Our instructor Frede was very patient and gave a thorough safety brief on land before we jumped into the water. The waters at Kalama Beach were gentle and perfect for beginners who are hopping on a board for the first time. We were able to catch some waves pretty quickly. Mahalo!

reviews.author: marikated2024
reviews.text: I signed up for three days worth of classes. I had only surfed minimally before and was excited for local guidance for my first time in Kihei as well as tips to improve my surfing. My instructor Bryan was a gem, very kind and good at building skills. Though it may seem pricy, I found it worth every dime. Felt confident renting a board and going out by myself after the lessons. Overall lots of fun and would recommend this to anyone looking to learn how to surf or just looking for a fun highlight

reviews.author: Peter H
reviews.text:
It has been a great experience (group of 5 ppl) for doing it the first time! The instructor helped to get to know the technique and to catch the first waves! I can just recommend it to anyone :)

Aloha 🏄🏽🤙

reviews.author: Daydream26640545271
reviews.text:
Wir hatten eine super Morning Surf Lesson mit Brian. Er hat sich ganz grosse Mühe gegeben auf jeden einzelnen Schüler:in einzugehen und wir konnten alle feststellen wie schnell wir uns verbessert haben. Danke dafür !
Können wir also nur aller aller wärmstens empfehlen 🤙🏼🌊

reviews.author: anniesC2058RY
reviews.text: Surf Club Maui did a great job!!! We signed our kids (14 and 12) up for a group lesson during our time in Kihei. The area where they provided the lessons is very beginner friendly. Their instructor (Pablo) was very kind and patient. They both had the opportunity to stand up and ride plenty of beginners waves. We enjoyed watching from the shallow water. All in all it was a great family morning on our trip.

reviews.author: Shokus
reviews.text:
The instructors were friendly and professional, they had me standing up and riding the wave in no time.

My first booking, the weather wasn't so good, but instead of taking the cash and providing a poor experience, they rebooked me for the next day.

I had so much fun, I booked a second session two days later!

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: libwhit2025
reviews.text: We had our 2 children ages 10 & 12 take a lesson at the 8am time slot and it was awesome.  Everyone was very friendly, helpful and easy going at check in. The kids were put in a group with one other family (6 total) and the instruction from Brian was fantastic.   They both loved it- caught so many waves.  2 hours was a perfect way to learn.  We hung out watching from the beach benches.  The location is on a great break for beginners and right across from Kihei Caffe for a post surf breakfast.

reviews.author: nickalosbryant86
reviews.text: My daughter and I took beginners lessons, they were so great with all the kids there. Super encouraging, patient and so much fun she had an amazing time. She cant wakt to go agian. All the staff were helpful and so easy going. We will be back on our next trip. Mahalo

reviews.author: fdnywife2018
reviews.text: We had a fabulous day learning to surf with Pedro!  He and the team genuinely seemed to care about us being able to learn and stand up, and we all did!  The excellent photographers placed in the water made the experience even better.  Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: F8265LDchristinat
reviews.text: OMG this was one of the BEST activities I have ever done! My daughter and I were first time paddle boarders. Our instructor Bryan was AWESOME. He was patient, helpful and full of great stories! He also helped us feel very safe and let us try things at our own comfort level. While we were out we saw turtles and spinner dolphins! One of the other team there came out and took a bunch of pictures of use out on the water. They were great and we bought them all! Such an epic adventure - we are already

reviews.author: occasionaltravelerNY
reviews.text: Had an amazing experience with Surf Club Maui.  I took a private lesson, which was great - I got to ride a lot of waves and received a lot of help.  It was a wonderful experience.  The group lessons also seemed to have a great time.  They give you a rash guard and swim shoes (its rocky, so you need them).  Everyone was nice and helpful.  You can also purchase a photo package, which allowed me to capture some nice photos of my time on the waves.

reviews.author: karenwA1627OC
reviews.text: Great experience! Instructor Brian , I believe, was awesome  and we got up and surfed a lot. Everything was provided which was a tremendous help since we are from Nashville.

reviews.author: Sister Squad #86
reviews.text: This is a must-do while in Maui. It was our entire group’s favorite activity. Brendan was the best instructor, so patient, knowledgeable, and fun! Sean captured the best photos of us riding the waves.

reviews.author: Georgina McNiff
reviews.text: Such a great experience with Willow as our instructor and Sean got some great shots! Professional, knowledgeable and fun. The adults rented boards and the kids got three days of group lessons with other kiddos. It built up their confidence in the water. Huge bonus that there dozens of sea turtles hanging out with us in the surf!

reviews.author: Marcel Olschewski
reviews.text:
What is a trip to Hawaii without surfing? I couldn’t tell you - because I made sure to try it.
As it was my very first time on a surfboard, I booked a two-hour lesson, and I was fortunate to have David from Surf Club Maui as my instructor. Our group consisted of four fellow beginners - perfectly sized, intimate group that made the experience both personal and incredibly fun. After a brief introduction to the fundamentals of surfing, combined with a few practice exercises on land, we headed strai

reviews.author: Emma Hermine Adolphi
reviews.text: We surfed with Brandon and it was an exceptional experience. Great waves, saw turtles and wave and great instructions in really small groups. Fantastic pictures were taken and it was just a really great lesson all in all

reviews.author: Jan Paul
reviews.text: Bryan was an excellent surf instructor for my 5-day lessons in Kihei. He’s an awesome guy—patient, clear with instructions. I learned about techniques, wave reading, and building confidence. Lessons were fun, safe, and perfectly paced. Highly recommend him or anyone at Surf Club Maui if you want a great surf experience on Maui! Will plan to be back for sure with a friend and I will have him do surf lessons with Surf Club Maui.

reviews.author: Semona Amaral
reviews.text: Bryan and the team are amazing. They make it easy to understand and patient.

reviews.author: Rebecca Quinn
reviews.text: We had a great lesson with David and our photographer Lei (Maui Dream Photography) was awesome and gave us helpful tips as well! We would absolutely book another session with them.

reviews.author: Evan Smith
reviews.text: Bryan was a great instructor! I had a blast and he was great at finding the best waves and critiquing my technique so I could get better. The whole process to sign up and get surfing was easy too

reviews.author: Shilo Chislett
reviews.text: Me and my friends had a surfing lesson with David and we had the best time! He was so laid-back, patient, and I think we learned a lot considering we never surfed before. We saw so many turtles, and he even gave us some extra surf time at the end. We would definitely do this again if we’re ever back in Maui!

reviews.author: Drina Domic
reviews.text: 10/10 recommend this spot for beginner surfers. We had a blast with David and John!!! They made it so easy and fun for us to catch waves!!

reviews.author: Ren Andres
reviews.text: My husband and I spontaneously booked this during our time in Maui as part of our honeymoon and it did not disappoint. Instruction was great, vibes were immaculate, and we had a really great time and caught a lot of waves for our first time ever on a surfboard. Our instructor Bryan was not only a good hang, but thorough and attentive in teaching us and did a great job making sure us newbies stayed safe. So glad we booked this!

reviews.author: Jon Marker
reviews.text: David was a great teacher helping everyone get up and experience surfing.

reviews.author: brianna Araque
reviews.text: We had David as an instructor and he is amazing!! It was our first time surfing and he made sure we were safe and gave us the best experience you can ask for. I would 100% book with them again and we bought pictures that came out amazing as well, would recommend getting them. Super friendly, truly a 10/10 experience. Run don’t walk, definitely coming back!

reviews.author: Theresa Koszulinski
reviews.text: We had the best experience surfing today! Brendan was an awesome instructor. Seriously couldn’t have asked for a better instructor. And it really was the best location to surf for beginners. The waves were perfect. The water was a great depth. We had sea turtles swimming around us. My son is young so they started with tandem surf and then he even caught a couple waves on his own. It really was the best first surfing experience! I’d give them 10 stars if I could. Thank you all!

reviews.author: Lindsey Whiting
reviews.text: Brain was a great instructor easy to find on land and in water the with his pink hat! Highly recommend doing the group surf lesson!  My 12 year old daughter got up the 1st time! Vicky took great pictures to capture all the great memories! They made a great team!

reviews.author: Diego Dasilva
reviews.text: Hands down the best surf school in Maui! Super friendly, great teachers and overall positive experience.

reviews.author: Tiffany Ruiz
reviews.text: We had such a knowledgeable instructor and had an absolute blast!!

reviews.author: Jack Rainey
reviews.text: Great experience! I went in never having caught my first wave before. By the end I had lost track of how many waves I caught and was starting to work on higher level things like tricks and turning. Brendon was a great instructor and the waves were very nice.

reviews.author: jimdG2363KN
reviews.text: Stella was a wonderful guide and kept us entertained for about 3 hours! She really knows her Hawaiian culture and food scene. This tour was full of delicious food and was really well put together. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: J6655UBjd
reviews.text: Stella is very knowledgeable and gives so many good tips in addition to the tour she’s leading. We had a lot of fun, she accommodated our food restrictions so well, and we had a wonderful afternoon! Definitely add this to your list of things to do!

reviews.author: sheiladK5575JB
reviews.text: We had an amazing time with Stella. The tour she put together was fabulous. Terrific food choices and her knowledge of the history of Hawaii was super interesting. I would highly recommend her.

reviews.author: BlueHoo
reviews.text: I've been to Waikiki a number of times, but this was the first time I've done a food tour. I wish I had done this on my first visit! Stella was an amazing guide, providing us not only with great options for tasty treats but also sharing info about the history and culture of Hawaii and Honolulu, specifically. It is about 3 hours and maybe a mile or so of total walking (all flat). Come hungry and be prepared for a unique experience. This tour is absolutely worth it!

reviews.author: tomandkarenmorton
reviews.text: We had a wonderful day with Stella exploring Waikiki and the hidden local spots for delicious treats and snacks. We left with full stomachs and full of local history.

reviews.author: lauramG6544IM
reviews.text: We had Stella for our guide and she made this such a wonderful experience! So much history and amazing knowledge about local food and ways to support local Hawaiian spots. She even told us to reach out for the rest of our trip if we had questions, which was such a cool resource. Everything we ate was delicious and we had an absolute blast! A must if you’re visiting Oahu (and ask for Stella for real she’s the best).

reviews.author: hmt1019
reviews.text: Stella! Great communication, great tour, fantastic food. Adds up to a great experience. Thank you for the great time.

reviews.author: Tom W
reviews.text:
Our tour guide, Stella was fantastic. She showed us all the local places and shared with us the rich history of Hawaii. We were stuffed by the end of the tour. The kalua pork tacos and poke bowls were incredible!

Stella was very friendly and accommodating. She also gave us great recommendations on which excursions are worthwhile and which one's were not. Highly recommend a food crawl with Stella. Mahalo!

reviews.author: 761sherit
reviews.text:
Stella was amazing! Very knowledgeable and knows all the great good stops. 
The malasadas and kalua tacos were the highlights! 
Thanks, Stella! I will definitely send people your way.

reviews.author: Ray M
reviews.text: Really enjoyed the tour with Stella! A bit of Hawaiian history mixed with local food culture made for a fun time and great introduction to Waikiki!

reviews.author: 66ckp
reviews.text: Most food tours are a great way to experience a city, but this one is exceptional! Don’t pass on it if food and an easy walk fit into your day! Stella spoke to native Hawaiian history through the chosen cultural stops AND spoke to our palates through her Hawaiian food stops. ❤️ Honestly, we’ve been on those same streets and unknowingly walked right passed them! A lot of wonderful, local foods and ‘regular’ portions (vs. only a bite to whet your appetite). Everyone on our tour walked away stuffed

reviews.author: 84christenem
reviews.text: We two veteran travel writers had a delightful tour with Stella, a real pro in her knowledge of local foodie favorites and great stops for classic Hawaiian fare. Our fare includes terrific coffee -- hot or cold-- warm malassadas, Hawaii made chocolate, terrific poke, spicy street fare pork tacos, shave ice and even that Hawaiian classic, Spam musubi.  The places were sometimes tucked away; we wouldn't have found them without the tour. The variety of delights reflected the ethnic mix that disting

reviews.author: 382virginian
reviews.text: This was great tour, you kinda get the lay of the land, and get to eat really good food! My favorite and I would've never have been able to find on my own was the taco truck! Omg so good. Stella was awesome!!

reviews.author: 502MichaelB
reviews.text:
We had an absolutely fantastic food tour in Honolulu, and Stella made it unforgettable! From start to finish, she was personable, knowledgeable, warm, and genuinely welcoming. She made elus feel comfortable right away, and her enthusiasm for the local culture and cuisine really came through.

The food selections were incredible. We sampled locally sourced chocolates that were rich and unique, enjoyed fresh, flavorful poke, and had the softest, most delicious malasadas. The standout for me was th

reviews.author: murphy123123
reviews.text: Go on this food tour with Stella...it's the best! We have been on food tours all over the world. Often they just give you non filling foods like candy,  muffins etc. This tour we got REAL FOOD! Plus Stella paid close attention to my sugar aversion which I really appreciated.

reviews.author: T7381AFjohno
reviews.text: Stella was great. Very knowledgeable of the history of Oahu.  Food stops were very good.

reviews.author: lucycA8606BJ
reviews.text: Wow what an amazing day I had on the food tour! Stella was absolutely brilliant - she made the tour so fun and took us to the best spots. Everything was so delicious and I ate things I never usually would at places I’d never think to go to! Highly recommend and would happily do the same tour again next time I’m here!

reviews.author: TrevorR287
reviews.text: Stella was amazing! Very knowledgeable and passionate about Hawaiian food and culture. Her food choices were spot on. She is a kind and generous person. Thank you Stella!

reviews.author: Linda A
reviews.text:
Stella was amazing. She took us to great hidden food spots, all the while sharing Hawai’i history.
The pork tacos are second to none.

reviews.author: pc_angel7911
reviews.text:
We had the most wonderful experience on our food tour with Stella. She was incredibly kind, welcoming, and genuinely passionate about what she does. You can tell she truly cares about the people she guides and the experience she creates for them.
The tour itself was amazing — we had a chocolate tasting, coffee, a fresh malasada donut, spam musubi, kalua pork, poke bowls, and shaved ice, and everything was thoughtfully chosen and delicious. It wasn’t just about the food, though. Stella also share

reviews.author: Grace Dishman
reviews.text: Amazing food tour! Stella was our guide. She was very knowledgeable and answered all our questions, and gave amazing suggestions. The food was so amazing. So much variety and we all enjoyed our food. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.author: Sheila Morris
reviews.text: We had an amazing time with Stella. The tour she put together was fabulous. Terrific food choices and her knowledge of the history of Hawaii was super interesting. I would highly recommend her.

reviews.author: Andy Braun
reviews.text: Stella was great. She’s well-informed on Hawaiian and Oahu history and her food selections were top notch. We’d recommend her to everyone.

reviews.author: Jeff H.
reviews.text:
STELLA!!!
What an amazing food tour
Stella was absolutely awesome, great info and fantastic food!!!!!

reviews.author: Laura Miller
reviews.text: We had Stella for our guide and she made this such a wonderful experience! So much history and amazing knowledge about local food and ways to support local Hawaiian spots. She even told us to reach out for the rest of our trip if we had questions, which was such a cool resource. Everything we ate was delicious and we had an absolute blast! A must if you’re visiting Oahu (and ask for Stella for real she’s the best).

reviews.author: Devon Lowery
