reviews.text: Loved the Secret Food Tour with Stella!  She did an awesome job incorporating history and culture into our day.  The food was a great selection and I feel like we had plenty of "off-the-beaten-path" selections.  She had great recommendations for everyone too.

reviews.author: Mr. Marshall’s Travel
reviews.text: Stella! Great communication, great tour, fantastic food. Adds up to a great experience. Thank you for the great time.

reviews.author: S. Conaway
reviews.text: Stella was amazing. Related to everyone on our tour. Had conversations with everyone individually and did a great job with the history of the island and the food history as well. The food was delicious and I was stuffed by the end of it!

reviews.author: Sarkis Arabian
reviews.text: Stella was amazing! She made sure we were taken care of. Amazing food selection and experience. Highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Marla Johnson
reviews.text: My mom & I did the Food Tour with Stella, she was amazing and the tour was so fun!! A highlight of our time spent in Waikiki. Stella was very knowledgeable on the history of the area and took us to some of the coolest spots for food. I highly recommend this tour!

reviews.author: Carly Andrus
reviews.text: Stella was incredible. Such a great experience and the food was amazing.

reviews.author: Emma Gale
reviews.text: Stella is an icon, not only did she take us on a delicious and interesting tour, but she made recommendations for our bar hopping plans tonight and brunch tomorrow, all Waikiki local businesses. 10/10 would go again

reviews.author: Lucy Crossley
reviews.text: Wow what an amazing day I had on the food tour! Stella was absolutely brilliant - she made the tour so fun and took us to the best spots. Everything was so delicious and I ate things I never usually would at places I’d never think to go to! Highly recommend and would happily do the same tour again next time I’m here!

reviews.author: Lindsey
reviews.text:
We had the most wonderful experience on our food tour with Stella. She was incredibly kind, welcoming, and genuinely passionate about what she does. You can tell she truly cares about the people she guides and the experience she creates for them.
The tour itself was amazing — we had a chocolate tasting, coffee, spam musubi, a fresh malasada donut, kalua pork, poke bowls, and shaved ice, and everything was thoughtfully chosen and delicious. It wasn’t just about the food, though. Stella also share

reviews.author: Kelli Lyons
reviews.text: Our Honolulu food tour was excellent!  Stella was super knowledgeable and selected awesome food tastings. We had a blast and highly recommend.

reviews.author: Andria Cool
reviews.text: Over and above on all counts!!! Food, information, friendliness, professionalism and taking care of all our needs. Stella is the best!

reviews.author: Debbie Doll
reviews.text: Stella was an amazing tour guide.  She gave us a wealth of Hawaiian culture and information. The food tastes were delicious.  Stella is the best!!!

reviews.author: Jess Holmstrom
reviews.text: We had a great time! We learned a lot about the island and some great places to eat. We had 2 kids with us and it was very accomodating for them.

reviews.author: Denise Ingram
reviews.text:
We had a great time on the Secret Food Tours Honolulu. Stella was fun and sweet and very informative and the food venues were amazing. I would highly recommend this tour.
Thanks Stella!!

reviews.author: Kat
reviews.text: Awesome tour and Stella was an outstanding guide!The food was delicious and we throughly enjoyed our tour. A must do tour when visiting Oahu!

reviews.author: lynned801
reviews.text: Never heard from them.  They were supposed to pick me up at Hotel.  The Covid19 lockdown went in effect while I was traveling to Honolulu.  I want my money back.  I never heard from them.

reviews.author: SeanyWest3
reviews.text: Giovanni Mazzarella was our CCA (Certified Culinary Aficionado) and he was AWESOME! He had a great attitude from the moment he picked us up to the moment he dropped us off! He had a smile the entire day; he had an answer for every question; he had a napkin for every bite; he was on top of EVERYTHING throughout the entire day! We would highly recommend this food tour as we learned a ton, ate the best food and had a blast making great memories in Honolulu!!!! 10 out of 10! We would 100% go back! H

reviews.author: Ed S
reviews.text: For foodies and normal people.  Great sampling of enormous variety of Asian and Hawaiian cuisine.  In addition FUN and interesting overview of Honolulu

reviews.author: billp654
reviews.text: Our tour guide, Gio, is warm, entertaining, and ingenious.  He has outfitted a cart and shoulder bag to provide everything a patron could need while travelling around Honolulu exploring the food scene.  We started with a breakfast treat like no other.  During our time together, we had a good balance of drives in the van and walking stops.  Along the way, many people greeted Gio as if he were family.  Personally, my favorite was the spiced pineapple (we bought some of the spice to bring home).  M

reviews.author: 890joeb
reviews.text: I have traveled to the Hawaiian Islands several times (please see my previous reviews) and this cultural/food tour was definitely, unquestionable a highlight of my trips to Hawaii. Our expert guide/Chef Gio was worth the whole price you pay for admission.  This man was so crafty and personable and his energy... has given him the nick-name "mayor" of Honolulu's exotic Chinatown by it's merchants, which he expertly navigates you though like no other could. We tasted delicacies from several stops a

reviews.author: TomH919
reviews.text:
Geo was very pleasant and knowledgeable. As far as the tour we did not enjoy it. We missed the last 2 stops because we were a little uncomfortable of the area we were in. It did not smell good, we saw a rat on the Main Street drinking water. The tour was mainly Chinese food in Chinatown. Our guide sent us off on our own while he ate lunch. 
I have been on quite a few food tours but did not enjoy this one. 
Pro’s - Geo taught us a lot about Chinese history in Hawaii. 
Con’s - you will be on your

reviews.author: Andrea K
reviews.text:
Gio was an amazing tour guide. He didn't just provide us with cold waters and the food on the stops but brought fresh items from his garden, fresh fruits from he market stalls and even homemade soursop sorbet for us to try! Friendly and easy-going with a wealth of information about the combination of many Asian cuisines to form Hawaii's unique food culture, Gio made 3 stops on our tour :
1.  Manapau (filled buns, mostly steamed buns with either pork or chicken) 
2. Chinatown with about 30 min ti

reviews.author: waysidewoods
reviews.text: Gio was a great tour guide. We learned so much about Hawaiian food and culture. Gio was very prepared and knew everybody along the way. The tour went without a hitch. We really enjoyed all the different types of foods. Gio was very accommodating and had all the right equipment and materials to make it a successful day. The van was brand new and air-conditioned, and he had parking spots all lined up. I would highly recommend this tour to others.

reviews.author: petertP8402MO
reviews.text: We just finished the food tour and loved it!  Gio was personable, informative, and ensured that everyone had a great time.  We loved the foods selected and the engaging backstories that enhanced the experience. Great trip!

reviews.author: bursta2
reviews.text: Gio is a lively man that is passionate about what he does and the history behind the culture, food and family stories. The tour delivered all it promised and more, was comfortable, entertaining and interesting!

reviews.author: Mary Lynn P
reviews.text: My husband and I took Hawaii Food Tours walking and driving tour Honolulu. This Hole in the Wall tour included some great treats: manapua, malasadas, noodles, dim sum, poke, cream puffs, fresh fruit, apple-banana lumpia, pork belly, chow fun noodles, spices, and even dried fruit. A good bit of the tour centers in Chinatown with some history and drive by sight seeing in Honolulu. This is a small group tour with an air conditioned van. Our guide was Gio and we were very impressed with his organiza

reviews.author: redstackpmc
reviews.text: Gio has our food ambassador/tour guid for a very fast four hour adventure into the Honolulu food scene.   The tour van was very comfortable with pick up and delivery at local hotels (we live here so in was a short walk for us).  Gio provided both food insights and a bit of local history was we made our way around Honolulu (Kaka'ako, Chinatown and Liliha.  The variety and taste contrasts were great.  We will be recommending this tour to all of our out of town visitors.  At the end though Gio's pe

reviews.author: johnsE227WM
reviews.text: From the time Gio picked us up in a nice new van we knew we were in for a treat. Took us around his favorite places in Chinatown. Gio makes this whole tour. He tells you the why, how and when of all the foods you are about to sample. If you are a foodie you want to take this tour. Will do this again.

reviews.author: ebuchholz05
reviews.text: Gio was our guide for the day and he did such and amazing job! He took us to a few great places including the farmers market in China town. We would have never thought to go there on our own, but saw and ate so many interesting foods! The food we tried along this tour was so so good! Gio brought some star fruit from his tree from home and it was so fresh! I highly recommend this to anyone looking to try some local foods but has no idea where to start. I also recommend doing this on the first day

reviews.author: blighni
reviews.text: Excellent food tour with Gio. Picked up from hotel right on time. Sampled lots of different food from around Honolulu - not your usual Hawaiian food but more local Hawaiian specialties. Sampled manapuas, dumplings, coco puffs, char sui pork, and many more local specialties. Gio was a great guide and full of knowledge (probably helped him being a chef previously). Recommend this tour for something different in Honolulu.

reviews.author: singingbee27
reviews.text:
This tour was awesome.  We went to Chinatown and ate from many top notch spots that only the locals know about.  We tried different fruits and our trip was made that much better by our guide Gio.  He was amazing!  He is a chef and was very informed about what we were eating and anything else that we saw along the way and had questions about.
I definitely recommend this tour if you have the time.

reviews.author: Rtolen01
reviews.text: This was the second time I had an opportunity to experience the Famous Hole-in-the-Wall and let me tell you my memory did not do it justice.  What an amazing way to learn more about Hawaii and the beautiful cultures that contribute to it’s richness through food.  We went to where the locals go to shop and eat.  Chinatown was definitely a highlight.  Gio was very knowledgeable and it was apparent he lives food and culture.  I truly appreciated his thoughtfulness and the relationships he built wit

reviews.author: Travel-Lady-Jan
reviews.text: Gio was a knowledgeable [also a chef], friendly, and very organized tour leader!  I was totally impressed with being picked up exactly to the minute on time, and I was the "last" one to be picked up, so it was amazing he was so prompt.  We tasted a nice variety of foods, and even had a choice at 1 or 2 places on which fillings we wanted (for example, with the manapua).  I recommend taking this tour at the beginning of your visit to Honolulu so you can come back to some of the places visited on t

reviews.author: cfam1995
reviews.text: The most important thing in the food tour is the food, not the quantity, but the quality, and this tour was high quantity of high quality food. Geo hosted us as if we were in his home, not on a tour van, welcoming and full of food knowledge. Get off the beaten path and go on this tour!

reviews.author: Jason B
reviews.text: If you are considering booking this tour, DO IT. You won’t be disappointed. Gio was amazing and took us to some great places including fun spots in China Town. The price point can’t be beat and you will learn all kinds of fun tidbits along the way, while filling your stomach!

reviews.author: No Name
reviews.text: Hello, I can see that you’re closed now, but I wanted to say that I took the tour in February 2020 right before Covid and I thought it was fantastic and loved the different cuisines your energy and knowledge about food and you did something nobody else Does,  you cooked us food outside of your van with your own set up. I hope you’re doing well. I came here, hoping to be able to find you join another tour the end of this month. I wish you well!

reviews.author: Hal Homer
reviews.text: Worst food tour ever.  3 of 6 scheduled tastings here at the Diamond head/ Oahu tour were closed on the day of tour.  Guide was apologetic but really?  This was beyond a waste of $200 for two people.  Not normally a reviewer/eater but trying hard to help others not make this same mistake.  Do better- quit ripping people off.

reviews.author: Mark Anderson
reviews.text:
I went on this tour some months ago now, but the owner keeps deleting my reviews, so I will continue to post them in the hope others might see this before it is deleted again. I often see other negative reviewers saying the same thing.
My wife and I have been on many food tours in our travels, however this was appalling. For a tour costing over $100/person we were provided less than $10 worth of food in six 'tastes' - many of which were a single serve shared with everyone on the tour using tooth

reviews.author: Sean Gordon
reviews.text: Giovanni Mazzarella was our CCA (Certified Culinary Aficionado) and he was AWESOME! He had a great attitude from the moment he picked us up to the moment he dropped us off! He had a smile the entire day; he had an answer for every question; he had a napkin for every bite; he was on top of EVERYTHING throughout the entire day! We would highly recommend this food tour as we learned a ton, ate the best food and had a blast making great memories in Honolulu!!!! 10 out of 10! We would 100% go back! H

reviews.author: Robert Prejza
reviews.text: Good way to spend a morning!

reviews.author: Robert Prejza
reviews.text: Enthusiastic tour guide. Personable and accommodating. Knowledgeable of his area as well. We felt like Anthony Bourdain, No Reservations. Food portions seemed a bit on the small side to us. Half a pot sticker, really? And two bites of Korean BBQ? Barely woke our taste buds. Enjoyed the tour of Chinatown but felt a little rushed. Expected a 4 hour tour for the price point. Glad we topped ours off with a visit to Foster Gardens. Overall, it was an interesting and unique way to spend a morning in H

reviews.author: Jackie Thompson
reviews.text: My daughter and I recently booked the Hole in the Wall Food whilst we were visiting Honolulu.  We had the most amazing few hours with Gio who went beyond expectations in making you feel comfortable, encouraging you to mingle and of course explaining the background to each of the foods and the vendors that supplied them. Also so impressive was Gio's self fashioned cart and accompanying bags where he managed to provide any item that the guests on the food tour could possibly need (and more).  Anti

reviews.author: Annette Martinez
reviews.text: Our tour guide, Gio, was very engaging, knowledgeable, and charismatic. Introduction to the foods we would not ever have had a chance to taste anywhere else was a great  experience. Will highly recommend to friends and acquaintances traveling to Oahu.

reviews.author: Suzanne Lovell
reviews.text: We are so grateful our daughter insisted we take the Hole In The Wall food tour. From the moment we met our culinary guide Gio we knew we were in good hands. The places you will go, the food you will eat, the people you will meet, the things you will learn about the culture meld that is Hawai’i come together to make this time well spent. Treat yourself. And do it early in your visit. You will want to go back to each of the stops again

reviews.author: Danny Lepe
reviews.text: This food tour was amazing. We got the chance to try some of the local household favorites from Hawaii.  Our tour guide Gio was the man and he absolutely loves his job and life in general.  He was so happy the entire day and his infectious smile and personality really carried over to everyone on the tour.  He was really great at gauging people's tastes and was able to tell me what my favorite bite of the day would be, and he was spot on.  All the food was delicious, but he said the Manapuas woul

reviews.author: tom ying
reviews.text: This food tour should be called Asian food tour instead of the hole in the wall food tour. Almost all of the places we went to were in Chinatown. Being Chinese, I thought the food was pretty good, comparable to the Chinese food I've grown up with. I wish there were more food however, I was left hungry by the end. Also, it was advertised on the website that we will have "The best Korean barbecued chicken in the world"- but we didn't have any Korean bbq. All in all, if you were in town and wanted

reviews.author: Shannon & Doreen Blumhagen
reviews.text: We had a great day today! To say that Gio, our guide, loved his job would be an understatement! He was VERY attentive to our needs and tastes. Great advice on restaurants, local food and produce. He shared great stories and was most helpful in learning about Hawaii culture. I would recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: N “Ewok” Edwards
reviews.text:
Word of advice: take this food tour on your first day in Hawaii!
Gio was a great guide, took us to heaps of places we would have never found on our own, explained the stories behind the food and also provided us with a huge list of recommended restaurants for all occasions.
It was unfortunate for us that we took this tour on our last day,a we couldn't try out the recommended restaurants or buy any food as we couldn't take it back home with us due to customs restrictions. This was a real shame as

reviews.author: Natalie Arvizu
reviews.text: Great food tour; well-planned schedule with an enthusiastic tour guide who obviously knew what he was talking about. The best part is the post-tour availability for recommendations! They gave great tips for places to go outside Honolulu, and in a very timely manner. The tour was based heavily in Chinatown, so be prepared for that! The food was all excellent; I plan on going back for everything we had on the tour.

reviews.author: Anastasia Noormohammadi
reviews.text: Absolutely loved this tour and our tour guide, Gio! You will be impressed with the knowledge Gio has to offer on not just food but Hawaii itself and it's culture. Gio has a true passion in what he does and it shows quite well with his enthusiasm and intellect. I enjoyed having a tatse of local foods and meeting a few locals along the way. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Autumn Tuttroen
reviews.text:
My husband and I greatly enjoyed our time with Gio as he was the perfect combination of enthusiastic and chill. Gio was also prepared for every anticipated need we would have as he came equipped with cutlery, sauces, wet naps, hand sanitizer, extra napkins, cold water, and lots of tasty morsels all packed into his rolling cart.

The personal touch of creating a dish from numerous vendors that we visited in Chinatown was delightful and our group was the envy of onlookers as several folks who were

reviews.author: Fearless02305226276
reviews.text:
Quinn was our terrific guide on our Road to
Hāna tour. He just chose just the right amount of stops to give us a wonderful taste of the scenery and culture. He is so knowledgeable on everything and had a fun way sharing his knowledge by engaging us in novel activities. We highly recommend Quinn and this tour!

reviews.author: mmanjula
reviews.text:
Five stars, without question.

We did the Road to Hana with Stardust Hawaii and our guide Quinn made it one of the most memorable days of our entire trip. From the moment he picked us up in Ka'anapali, it was clear this wasn't just a tour — it was an experience.

Quinn's knowledge of Maui's history, culture, and natural beauty is extraordinary. He wove stories about the Hawaiian language, the significance of the land, and local legends seamlessly into every stop, so the drive never felt like a l

reviews.author: Q3435PNvivianc
reviews.text:
I would not recommend booking with Stardust Hawaii, LLC.

The tour experience was disappointing due to poor communication and misleading information. Prior to booking, I specifically asked if the tour was fully operational and was assured that it was, with only one stop being eliminated. This turned out to be inaccurate.

We were not informed ahead of time that multiple key parts of the tour would be canceled. Instead, we only found out after we were already on the bus, and at that point, we wer

reviews.author: meshanr2020
reviews.text: Carley was amazing,  she kept the group engaged and was knowledgeable of the tour sights. She made the trip memorable

reviews.author: V1030CLalanf
reviews.text: Our guide,  Carly, was informative and insightful. She shared some amazing destinations and food choices.  For fun Carly tested our knowledge of Hawaiian islands facts. I would definitely ride with her again.

reviews.author: 985ajay
reviews.text: Fantastic experience -  our guide Quinn did a great job of sharing stories and history not just about the points of interest along the way, but also about life in Hawaii and the culture.  Also, I would recommend having a local driver vs renting a car - much more enjoyable with the winding roads.

reviews.author: Douglas D
reviews.text: Marty was a great tour guide.   We had a great day with him and other guests.   He shared so many facts we would have never known with out him sharing.    As Marty said his company invests in nice vans.   Our  van was very nice a Mercedes fan with big leather seats.    They provided drinks, snacks, and lunch.    If we took our rental car up the road to Hana we would not have been able to enjoy the day as much.    We stopped for banana bread, bathroom breaks, falls, and had lunch at the black san

reviews.author: Hawii2013
reviews.text: DOM took us to the botanical garden and the lavender farm. Did a great job

reviews.author: J K
reviews.text: THIS was perfect!! Our guide was Marty, and he was fun AND knowledgeable. We would have had no idea how to enjoy Hana on our own :). Thanks Marty !

reviews.author: rosecQ4239HX
reviews.text: Roger was an amazing tour guide. He shared so much history and knowledge about each stop or place we drove by. He had us ahead of other tours so that we were not stuck with so many other tours. He even was able to add in an additional stop for us which had amazing views. He took the time to make sure we had an amazing experience. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: 543tomic
reviews.text: Don was outstanding. He was a wealth of knowledge. Told stories and made the trip the best of a lifetime.

reviews.author: rogerkY4444QR
reviews.text: Carly was great and the food was better!

reviews.author: Dennisgerk
reviews.text: Informative, knowledgeable comprehensive. Many stories to be told by driver. Full day with waterfalls, banana bread, coconuts, waves, and black sand

reviews.author: NYC1960
reviews.text: So worth it! Lying down as I write this. I'm that full. Local hot spots with amazing food. Expensive tour but you will eat your money's worth! Very knowledgeable guide. Beautiful, comfortable van!

reviews.author: Julie H
reviews.text: We did a bunch of research and signed up with Stardust road to Hana tour and we are so glad we did!! vehicle was very comfortable, very clean, we could see everything from any direction! our driver, Roger, was amazing!! helpful, informative on areas of interest, engaging and truly enjoyed sharing this side of Maui with us. 12 in the van. Our group of 3 were 1st on/last off so we have the privilege of hearing some of his own personal talk stories- thank you Roger! every stop was amazing and we re

reviews.author: heathernR214QT
reviews.text: Incredible experience! Roger was knowledgeable, fun, considerate and personable. He was a great driver and motion sickness was a non issue for us. We packed in a lot of stops during the tour and saw amazing things! This tour started earlier and we were grateful -  We missed the afternoon rush and made it back early enough to fit in other activities in the evening. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: jancie57
reviews.text: This tour is a great way to see all the highlights of the road to Hana. Our guide, Guara, did a great job pointing out things you might miss if you drive the road yourself. And the stops were perfect to get a feel for the area. Thanks for the keeping the trip interesting with explanations of the flora, local legends and island life.

reviews.author: JESSICA T
reviews.text:
Captains & the relationships they forge make the whole trip/excursion. Captain Marty is superbly TOP NOTCH. His focus on his people & candid knowledge of the winding, occasionally treacherous, road to Hāna was uncanny & intriguing. His passion for his craft shined through at every corner. His tips of where to jump from the cliff/waterfall & those words of encouragement will endure. 
Thanks for the fruit samples & for galvanizing the eclectic eleven kind sir. Cheers.

reviews.author: DgrBlu
reviews.text: Roger was informative,  entertaining and a good driver and took us to some beautiful places and the weather was perfect.  Food made for a nice casual lunch.

reviews.author: F1432ERterris
reviews.text: We took the Road to Hanna with Richard as our guide and had a wonderful experience.  We can't  express how informative and nice Richard was.  Well worth the money and we are glad to be fortunate enough to have had Richard as our guide.  This was a tour we will not forget.

reviews.author: Julie A. Galvin, PhD, LP
reviews.text:
Quinn was our terrific guide on our Road to
Hāna tour. He just chose just the right amount of stops to give us a wonderful taste of the scenery and culture. He is so knowledgeable on everything and had a fun way sharing his knowledge by engaging us in novel activities. We highly recommend Quinn and this tour!

reviews.author: Vivian Contreras
reviews.text:
I would not recommend booking with Stardust Hawaii, LLC.

The tour experience was disappointing due to poor communication and misleading information. Prior to booking, I specifically asked if the tour was fully operational and was assured that it was, with only one stop being eliminated. This turned out to be inaccurate.

We were not informed ahead of time that multiple key parts of the tour would be canceled. Instead, we only found out after we were already on the bus, and at that point, we wer

reviews.author: Mary Ann Matthews
reviews.text: This is a fantastic tour and worth every penny! Karli, the tour guide was such a pleasure to be with. Her knowledge, efficiency and demeanor made it a day to remember! (Photos don’t show everything we had!)

reviews.author: Ajay Joshi
reviews.text: Fantastic experience -  our guide Quinn did a great job of sharing stories and history not just about the points of interest along the way, but also about life in Hawaii and the culture.  Also, I would recommend having a local driver vs renting a car - much more enjoyable with the winding roads.

reviews.author: Stacie Baker
reviews.text: Had a great day on the road to Hana. Quinn was our driver and he was excellent. He is not only a good driver, but also a wealth of information on everything about Hawaii. Was an excellent day and so much more relaxing leaving the driving to a professional. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: marylove moy
reviews.text:
I want to compliment your tour guide Roger who was our driver this week on the Road to Hana. He was courteous, prompt, knowledgeable and funny. We all learned so much about Hawaiian history, the Lahaina fires,  vegetation and culture. I also felt very safe in his driving. A true credit to your company.
Mahalo

reviews.author: Donna Lajeunesse
reviews.text: (Princess Cruises guest) I did the authentic tastes food tour today, and it was great. Our guide, Karli was incredible!! She was so friendly, calming and knowledgeable. The food stops were unique and definitely places I wouldn't have sought myself, but I enjoyed everything we got to try. Finishing the tour at the Brewery was a perfect end to the day. Didn't get any food pictures because I was to busy eating!  🤣

reviews.author: Heather Nelson
reviews.text: Incredible experience! Roger was knowledgeable, fun, considerate and personable. He was a great driver and motion sickness was a non issue for us. We packed in a lot of stops during the tour and saw amazing things! This tour started earlier and we were grateful -  We missed the afternoon rush and made it back early enough to fit in other activities in the evening. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: David Milburn
reviews.text: My wife and I took the Local Taste of Maui tour today and Karli was an outstanding tour guide and host. The tour was informative and the food we sampled was exceptional. We would have never located these businesses if we had been exploring on our own. I highly recommend this tour!!!

reviews.author: biffbangpow
reviews.text: I would HIGHLY recommend doing the Road to Hana tour with Stardust Hawaii. Especially if you can get Roger as your driver and guide! Not only is he incredibly friendly, humorous, and accommodating, his knowledge of Maui is immense. He has a gifted ability to tell stories that draw you into the complicated history of Hawaii and all the islands. Roger has been leading tours for many years and his experience shows in spades. He'll even show you how to jump off a waterfall, if you so dare! Hūlō!

reviews.author: Ruth Del Rosario
reviews.text: Great trip.On time. Assurance to be back on time in cruise ship. Gave us peace of mind. Quinn is ver knowledgeable. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: daneives
reviews.text: We weren’t sure about taking this trip as it is an all day trip but we are so glad we decided to go. Quinn was an amazing driver and guide. My wife so so happy that we had him to navigate this journey and that I wasn’t driving. Quinn’s knowledge of the island and humor made for a great experience. We would highly recommend this trip for anyone wanting to go to Hana. It’s not cheap but so worth the money.

reviews.author: K Moore
reviews.text: Quin was excellent. Facilitated group participation while riding in the van with rider chosen topics.

reviews.author: Katelyn
reviews.text: Our group had amazing time with Quinn. He made the experience that much memorable. The scenery was breath taking but Quinn came with so much knowledge about the Hawaiian culture.

reviews.author: Sumi1001
reviews.text:
Our Tour to Hana with Quinn was absolutely incredible! Quinn was super nice, always upbeat, and genuinely made the entire experience feel special. He seemed like an endless book of knowledge — from Hawaiian history and culture to the agriculture, food, and excursions along the route. We learned so much more than we expected and appreciated how he shared stories and facts in such an engaging, fun way.

Beyond being knowledgeable, Quinn was thoughtful and attentive throughout the day. You could te

reviews.author: Ash Mai
reviews.text:
We went to road to Hana. Our tour guide
( Dom) was exceptional.He made us very comfortable and shared a lot of information about the places during the journey. Great experience!

reviews.author: Delyn Fraley
reviews.text: Just got back from the Road to Hana yesterday with our tour guide Dom. This was an absolutely magical experience. Dom is so knowledgeable about the island, history, plants and animals. Anything we asked about or saw, he knew about. Also, could NOT imagine trying to do that drive myself. I would have been so scared to tackle the narrow roads and one lane bridges. Dom handled it with care and precision. I do not recommend trying to do this on your own. Definitely hire Stardust Hawaii to take your

reviews.author: Jyoti Wadhwa
reviews.text: Excellent commentary, safe driving and a positive attitude....Quinn was AWESOME!!

reviews.author: Janice Pellecchia
reviews.text: Passionately knowledgable historian.  Quinn was amazing!

reviews.author: JoAnne Lauer
reviews.text: Tasting Kauai food tours are always the highlight of our visits to Kauai. Susan is a delightful guide, bringing her island style, friendly and inspiring perspectives, and excellent storytelling to each stop. She is also extremely accommodating to all the guests. The food is always incredible - excellent dishes at wonderful eateries supporting local, family-owned businesses. Portions are generous and the food is top quality! Susan offers great recommendations for other eateries and local activiti

reviews.author: Joyce Leon
reviews.text: Susan was a wonderful guide. Appreciated the local stories. Food was amazing....come hungry! Everyone should do a food tour in kauai.

reviews.author: Rhondi Shigemura
reviews.text: Do NOT use Tasting Kauai, they are a sham!! Had reservations a week ago, they never showed, no calls, no texts, no explanations.  We stayed at the meeting place for over an hour and a half. Husband called and texted them at least 5 times…NoTHING!! So frustrating for this experience, I would give them zero stars if I could!!!  No customer service whatsoever. We had a prepaid voucher for 4 of us, “non-refundable” was printed on it. I’m sure we’ll never see our $500 bucks either! Do NOT use this ri

reviews.author: Chin Cox
reviews.text: Susan was a wonderful host for our food walking tour. The food choices were delicious! Thank you for a great experience.

reviews.author: Christopher Tabat
reviews.text: Very good tour.  Susan was an excellent guide,  provided a lot of interesting information about general Kauai culture that we didn't know after coming here for 22 years.    Almost too much food,  really appreciated the list of recommended restaurants across the island that Susan sent us.   Would definitely recommend and would go on another of their tours in the future.

reviews.author: David Mower
reviews.text: We loved our tour with Susan.   It was super fun to try several restaurants and learn a lot about Kauai.    Definitely a great way to spend an afternoon.

reviews.author: John Goergen
reviews.text: The Kapaa Tour was excellent. We visited four fine restaurants, and Susan was a wonderful guide.

reviews.author: Cassie Brower
reviews.text: This food tour was such a wonderful way to start our stay in Kauai! Susan taught us about the history of Kauai and some really cool facts about the foods we were trying. At the end of the tour she gave us a huge list with places to try, and even personalized the list to our preferences. She was wonderful! Highly recommend this tour!

reviews.author: Amy Smith
reviews.text: Hostess was very knowledgeable, friendly, attentive. Food was superb. Reasonably priced. Great outing to experience local cuisine.

reviews.author: Kory Nelson
reviews.text: If you regularly visit Kauai, this is a good way to learn about good local places to eat, but we found one location chosen to be a major disappointment. The Kenji Burger location, while quaint, had very poor quality burgers.  Our guide was fun, but I would recommend planning ahead to choose the day of the week for the tour in your area.

reviews.author: Cassie Nimerfroh
reviews.text: We would highly recommend taking the food tour!  Susan was our guide and she was delightful!  She shared interesting bits of history along the way. The samples were plentiful and delicious!  We would also recommend taking the tour at the start of your stay because she gave us several recommendations of places to eat while we are here and it’s always great to have this information while planning your stay!!

reviews.author: Joe Schwartz
reviews.text:
Such a great way to spend the afternoon.  The food was outstanding and Susan was a phenomenal guide with a wealth of island knowledge.  We'll be back!

Mahalo!
Joe

reviews.author: Maura Hodits
reviews.text: Delicious food, went back next day to have the pineapple pork sandwich,   Susan was a great tour guide, little hard to find where to park but worked out

reviews.author: Brittany Hutchison
reviews.text: Loved our tour! Food was amazing and Susan was great!

reviews.author: Vicki Channer
reviews.text: Wonderful experience. Light walking.  Met many owners at quaint eating places. Ate lots of good food. Guide was fun and knowledgeable . I'd do his again

reviews.author: Heather Frank
reviews.text: Great experience with interesting information, yummy selection, such a kind tour guide Susan I would definitely book again!

reviews.author: Leslie Moss
reviews.text: Suzanne was a fun guide and the food was great!

reviews.author: Dan Kimball
reviews.text: Very fun tour and our guide Susan was great.

reviews.author: Susan Zeider
reviews.text: We had a wonderful time on the South Shore Food Truck Tour. Our guide, Susan, was knowledgable and helpful. The weather varied greatly during the tour, but she handled it all.  Great food, and a great guide.

reviews.author: Debbie Salazar
reviews.text: Tasting Kauai North with the tour guide Susan was a fantastic experience.  She greeted our group with enthusiasm, kindness and welcome.  She took us on a small town tour of delicious tastes and sips while sharing some history of the island.  This tour is absolutely worth your time and money.  An enjoyable experience for sure.

reviews.author: M9742NPpams
reviews.text: We had Kai and Ellie as our tour guides and they were super great! Would recommend 100%. Learned about some Hawaiian food heritage and was shown some of the best spots in town!

reviews.author: dianarG4479XO
reviews.text:
Excellent two guides, Ellie and Kamakea, who were kind and attentive to everyone’s  need.  The route seemed much longer than about a mile. The guides made adjustments to those who walked slower. Food was ready and delicious. Drinks were yummy!!!! Thanks for keeping everyone hydrated with water at every spot. Excellent, satisfying experience!
J and Di

reviews.author: Wander22013571528
reviews.text: Ellie and “K” were amazing guides for our Kona food tour. They shared their knowledge and love of Kona and introduced us to food, culture and places we likely would not have otherwise enjoyed. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Dreamer812810
reviews.text: Kai was great,very knowledgeable & he took great care of all of us. Kept us well informed as we  sampled our way thru Kona.  Only issue was finding a parking spot.  Fun afternoon!!

reviews.author: Max H
reviews.text: Kai was personable and very  knowledgeable of the area and the culture. The food was exquisite and varied. A great way to get to know the area and sample some of the local fare!

reviews.author: Sunshine15965068464
reviews.text: Kai was an excellent guide, fun and very knowledgeable.  The food was very good and the drinks were delicious.  Best Mai Tai I have ever had.  Thank you Kai!

reviews.author: cynthiacQ9896SN
reviews.text: Fabulous food tour! Kai was a great tour guide. Not only was the food wonderful, but Kai shared so muck knowledge about Hawaii and the culture. Would highly recommend this tour! Mahalo!

reviews.author: SusanB561
reviews.text: Kai was awesome!  Very informative and the food/drinks that are provided are absolutely delicious!  Highly recommended!!

reviews.author: E2122ZRjohnc
reviews.text:
Food stops were amazing, and we loved the food at every stop.  The avocado fries at Papa Kona's were unique and amazing. The Kona Inn Mai Tai set an incredibly high bar. The tour finished with delicious gelato at Gypsea Gelato, try the butterfinger and toasted coconut.

Kai and Ellie were friendly and very knowledgeable about the Island's history.

We would definitely recommend this tour.

reviews.author: 325kayz
reviews.text: Loved this tour! Ellie was a great guide, she shared info about the food, restaurants, Hawaiian history, and also shared Spam musubi and longan fruit with our group during our walk. All the stops shared their specialties with us. Loved the avocado fries at Papa Kona, mai tails at Kona Inn, to name a few. It was all good! Highly recommend this tour.

reviews.author: C6943BTstephenj
reviews.text: Kai was a very knowledgeable and entertaining guide.  The history of Hawaii was very interesting.   All the food venues were delicious and the pace of the tour was great.  We highly recommend this tour.

reviews.author: Jillian K
reviews.text:
Kamakea and Kris were fantastic guides. The Tour showed us great places to eat and the food was fabulous!  I enjoyed Kai’s pizza the most. We had avocado fries which was a first for me along with great tasting gelato at the end. 
I did not expect to have so much food. The pace of the tour was good- just enough time to enjoy the tasting and hear about what we were having. We heard some history as we walked. It was about a 4 mile walk today. If I could give the tour more than 5 stars I would!

reviews.author: Dianne F
reviews.text: This was a great food tour. Our guide, Kamakea was fantastic! She started with a brief history of Kona and then we were off! We went to seven or eight places and enjoyed everything we ate. The portion sizes were nice but not huge. That being said, we were stuffed by the end of the tour. Come hungry!

reviews.author: skline528
reviews.text: We had great food, fun local knowledge and Hawaiian history intermingled  with about 30 minutes total walking in between stops. Kamakea was warm and welcoming and knowledgeable. Enough food for a good lunch over 3 hours. Water provided, restrooms enroute. The food may vary yet we had clam chowder, prosecco, fruit gummies, spam musubi, mai tai, Iilikoi mimosa and fried avocados, fish and chips and gelato. We also got to meet some lovely people on our tour.

reviews.author: sandrawP3670VW
reviews.text: Our tour was a delight, thanks to Ellie and Kamakea. I’ve been to Kona multiple times, yet I still learned all kinds of new things and tasted some fantastic food. We visited both noteworthy places and little local spots I never would have found on my own. I’d absolutely recommend this tour to anyone on their first trip to Kona, and honestly, even repeat visitors will be pleasantly surprised.

reviews.author: RSB1055
reviews.text: Fun walking tour on Ali'i in Kona. Yummy food, some history of the area and fun group. We were all so full by the end. Kai and Ellie were great!!

reviews.author: W5769DRrichardb
reviews.text: My wife and I had the best time! Right from the start, we felt very welcomed and comfortable with our guide Kamala. We had lots of fun eats and drinks as we made our way through downtown. As Kamala grew up in the area,we learned lots of Hawaiian history and fun facts. Keli the owner,was on a lot of the tour which just added MORE fun. We’ve already told friends and relatives, they need to go on this tour when they’re here!!

reviews.author: Tourist33742174366
reviews.text: I had such a fun time on this tour. The tour guides are very knowledgeable about the area, and the tour took place near the shopping centers, so it was a great opportunity to explore places to shop afterward. The food from each stop was unique and very delicious. This is a great choice if it’s your first day on the Big Island.

reviews.author: adrianabH9020OY
reviews.text: Yesterday’s Kona walking food tour with Ellie was a pleasure. Besides being introduced to local specialties, like ube-syrup flavored drinks and ginger-tumeric-lemongrass ice cream, we learned about Kona’s Royal Hawaiian heritage, which has greatly enlivened our experience of the Big Island. Would do it again. Ellie was a gem!

reviews.author: P5629TUhelenb
reviews.text: Ellie and Kai were great guides, showing us all the great places to drink and dine in Kona (all portions were more than generous). The tour was informative and fun and all locations were clean with friendly staff and great views.

reviews.author: Alondra Soto-castillo
reviews.text: Ellie was out guide you get all lot of history as well as plenty of food and drink. You get to see the places you wouldn't necessarily see on your own and try food you wouldn't normally order!! Great tour!! Great views at most of the restaurants !

reviews.author: B Kevin Gordon
reviews.text: Ellie and “K” were amazing guides for our Kona food tour. They shared their knowledge and love of Kona and introduced us to food, culture and places we likely would not have otherwise enjoyed. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Richelle Griffin
reviews.text: We had such a fun time on this tour. The guides were very knowledgeable about the historical places and culture of Hawaii. The food and drinks were all fantastic. It gave us an idea of where we wanted to return during our stay! I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Taylor Wright
reviews.text: We had a great time at the Walking Food Tour with Ellie as our guide. She is very knowledgeable about the city, history, and culture. We hit some of the best spots and left very full! I recommend hitting this tour early in your trip to revisit your favorite spots for a full meal!!

reviews.author: Jillian Kindlund
reviews.text:
Kamakea and Kris were fantastic guides. The Tour showed us great places to eat and the food was fabulous!  I enjoyed Kai’s pizza the most. We had avocado fries which was a first for me along with great raring gelato at the end.
The pace of the tour was good- just enough time to enjoy the tasting and hear about what we were having. We heard some history as we walked. It was about a 4 mile walk today. If I could give the tour more than 5 stars I would!

reviews.author: tony N.
reviews.text: Best tasting tour we’ve been on. 7 stops offering great variety accompanied with informative narration of the food and Kona history.

reviews.author: Dave Kremers
reviews.text: Great people, good food and a fun time!

reviews.author: Gina G
reviews.text: We’re stuffed! This was such a fun tour! Highly recommend. Lot of fun city and culture facts.

reviews.author: Dana Morris
reviews.text: Our experience during the food tour was awesome! Our guide gave us some history of the area and then we ate at 6 different restaurants and drank at 4 of those places.  You won’t leave hungry! Best food tour that we have experienced!

reviews.author: Nicole Kantrowitz
reviews.text:
Ellie was our tour guide and she was absolutely fantastic! The food was phenomenal, cocktails and drinks were amazing as well. 10/10 would recommend.

Ellie checked in ahead of time to confirm any allergies/food needs/or anyone not drinking alcohol. Both Ellie and the restaurants were very accommodating to specific needs and ensuring everyone had something to taste/drink at almost every spot.

reviews.author: Teal Picka-Sims
reviews.text: Fun way to explore the city. Our tour guide, Kamakea, was fantastic. She was a lot of fun, told us history about the city and kept us on course. The food and beverages were great - a little spendy, but enjoyed it thoroughly!

reviews.author: Russ Sorber
reviews.text: Our guides Kai and Kamala(sp?) were very knowledgeable about Hawaiian history and made excellent restaurant and food selections for this walking tour.  My partner and I especially appreciated the clam chowder at the Fish Hopper restaurant.  The fresh poke at the out of the way deli (which we never would have found on our own) was the best I've ever tasted.  We also enjoyed  fancy purple  Ube-be drinks, unique to Kona,  and the ocean view at Papa Konas. Highly recommend this tour.

reviews.author: Jo Stammers
reviews.text: Tour with Ellie and Kai was amazing. Loved all the stops and the food was fab. The portions were plentiful and our guides were so knowledgeable and had lots to tell us about Kona

reviews.author: Christopher Johnson (Ferf)
reviews.text: Ellie was a great Kona food guide.  She was friendly, knowledgeable, and knew just when to chime in.  We had a great walking tour of not just Kona food, but Kona town.

reviews.author: Lvallory
reviews.text: Amazing tour by Ellie and Kai! Good explanation of places and food, nice conversation, all in all 5 stars!

reviews.author: Matt Wilkinson
reviews.text: Met Ellie our guide by the “Big Banyan Tree” at noon as instructed and then Josh and Nicole from Wisconsin joined us. Me being down from Kansas City, we had the Midwest well represented! Let me tell you this walking tour of culinary delights in Kailua-Kona was worth every penny. I would recommend it heartily to any and all visiting the Big Island. We dined and drank our way up and down Ali’i drive and also got a nice primer on Hawaiian history and culture along the way. What a wonderful experien

reviews.author: Josh Billica
reviews.text: Had an absolutely amazing time with Kai and delicious food! Kai was very knowledgeable and was a great tour guide. Our groups favorites were the pizza, poke, fish and chips, and chowder, but everything was great. 10/10 would recommend for your next visit. PS the pineapple marg at Kai's hits different.

reviews.author: Kayla Abbott
reviews.text: We had a wonderful experience exploring Kona with Ellie and Kama! All of the food and drinks we had were delicious and loved the history woven in. Food tours are our go to whenever we are traveling to find hidden gems and mom and pop places to go back to. This was no different, and we have already recommended to tour to others!

reviews.author: Shelli M
reviews.text: Wow!  We had a wonderful time with Kai and learning about the history of Kona, sampling amazing food and tasting some great drinks.  Our favorite was the fried avocado and of course gelato to finish up the fun!  We’ve been to the big island too many times to count, but this was a first for us and highly recommend!
